        }
    })
}(jQuery);

/////=csc-advanced-list.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-ADVANCED-LIST
 * @classdesc Gelişmiş liste
 * @author tuncayk
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled : false,
		cls : "csc-advanced-list",
		focusable: true
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.METHODS = ["setOptions(items, config)", "addOptions(items, index)","addAttribute(optionValue, attr)","rmAttribute(optionValue, attr)","removeOption","removeSelectedOptions()","filter(filterProp, filterValue, config)", "inverseFilter(filterProp, filterValue, setNull)", "getSelectedText", "setEmptyText(text)", "getOptions()",
		"sortOptions(fieldName, order)", "clearOptions", "setDefaultValue(value)","getSelectedOptions()","selectItem(that)","setOnContextMenuCallback(callback)", "getOptionsHasAttr(attributes)","changeOptionText(value, text)","selectByIndex(index,select)", "focus()","focusSearchBox()"];
	this.EVENTS = ["selected", "itemSelected(data)","itemDoubleClicked(data)"];

	this.Type = function(moduleName) {};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-ADVANCED-LIST", def);
var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function() {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	bc.fprop = config.filterProp;
	config.sideVarUniqueIDLast = 0;

	bc.EMPTY_TEXT = "-----";
	bc.EMPTY_VALUE = config.defaultValue;

	if(config.emptyValue){
		bc.EMPTY_TEXT = config.emptyText;
		bc.EMPTY_VALUE = config.emptyValue;
		config.defaultValue = bc.EMPTY_VALUE;
	}
	bc.options = [];
	config.value = [];
};
/**
 * @description Sets default value. Default value is value of list when no item selected.
 * @function setDefaultValue
 * @param value - default value.
 */
BC.prototype.setDefaultValue = function(value) {

	this.config.defaultValue = value;
}
BC.prototype.selectByIndex = function(index, select) {

	var config=this.config;
	var $$listElement=document.getElementById(config.id+"-ul");
	$$listElement=$$listElement.children;
	this.selectItem($$listElement[index].dataset.value,true)
}
BC.prototype.clear = function(){
	this.setValue(this.config.defaultValue);
	this.config.text = undefined;
	this.config.rawvalue  = undefined;
	this.config.searchKey = undefined;
	this.reRender();
}


BC.prototype.setValue = function(value, text) {
	var bc=this, optsConfig=bc.optionsConfig ||{}, config=bc.config;
	if(text){//if text provided then it must add to options
		var option = bc.getOption(value);
		if(!option){
			option = {}, optsConfig=bc.optionsConfig;
			option[optsConfig.valueField || config.valueField || "value"] = value;
			option[optsConfig.textField || config.textField || "text"] = text;
			bc.addOptions(option);
		}
	}
	if (value !== null && typeof value == "object" && !Array.isArray(value)) {
		bc.addOptions(value);
		value = value[optsConfig.valueField || config.valueField || "value"];
	}
	config.value = Array.isArray(value) ? value : [value];
	this.selectItem(config.value, true);
};

/**
 * @description Nesnelerin hangi alanına göre sıralanması gerektiğini belirler.
 * @function sortOptions
 * @param {string} fieldName
 * @param {string} [order="asc"] - Artan ya da azalan sıra "desc" ya da "asc" olabilir.
 */
BC.prototype.sortOptions = function(fieldName, order){
	this.sortFieldName = fieldName;
	this.sortOrder = order || "asc";
	this.reviewTreeStructure();
	this.rreq();
};

BC.prototype.sortArray = function(data){
	var me = this;
	if(data){
		return data.sort(function(a,b){
			if(me.sortOrder == "desc"){
				if(typeof a[me.sortFieldName] == "string"){
					return b[me.sortFieldName].localeCompare(a[me.sortFieldName]);
				} else {
					if(a[me.sortFieldName] < b[me.sortFieldName]) return 1;
					if(a[me.sortFieldName] > b[me.sortFieldName]) return -1;
					return 0;
				}
			}else{
				if(typeof b[me.sortFieldName] == "string"){
					return a[me.sortFieldName].localeCompare(b[me.sortFieldName]);
				} else {
					if(a[me.sortFieldName] < b[me.sortFieldName]) return -1;
					if(a[me.sortFieldName] > b[me.sortFieldName]) return 1;
					return 0;
				}
			}
		});
	}
};

BC.prototype.reviewTreeStructure = function() {
	var bc=this,options = bc.options, parents=[],i;
	if (bc.sortFieldName){
		options = bc.sortArray(options);
	}
	for(i=options.length-1; i>=0 ;i--){
		if(options[i].children){
			parents.unshift(options[i]);
			options.splice(i, 1);
		}
	}
	if(!parents.length){
		return;//No tree structure
	}
	var newOptions = [],j,parent,childValue,k,config=bc.config,optsConfig=bc.optionsConfig||{}, found;
	for(i=0; i<parents.length; i++){
		parent = parents[i];
		newOptions.push(parent);
		for(j=0; j<parent.children.length; j++){
			childValue = parent.children[j];
			found = false;
			for(k=0; k<options.length;k++){
				if(childValue == options[k][optsConfig.valueField||config.valueField||"value"]){
					newOptions.push(options[k]);
					options.splice(k, 1);
					found = true;
					break;
				}
			}
			if(!found){
				console.error("Advanced list child options not found for value: " + childValue);
			}
		}
	}
	if(options.length){
		console.error("Advanced list there are options with no parent : " + options.length);
	}
	bc.options = newOptions;
};

BC.prototype.prepareOptions = function() {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, hiddenListElements= [], options=bc.options, config=bc.config;
	bc.localOptions = [];

	if(config.emptyOption !== false &&  options.length == 0) {
		options[0] = [config.emptyValue || bc.EMPTY_VALUE, config.emptyText || bc.EMPTY_TEXT, true];
	}

	var loptions=bc.localOptions, isArray = Array.isArray;
	if (bc.sortFieldName){
		options = bc.sortArray(options);
	}

	var optsConfig = bc.optionsConfig || {};
	for (var i=0; i < options.length; i++) {
		var item = options[i];
		if(item.children) { //headerları doğrudan ekle. İçindekileri filtreye tabi tut.
			loptions.push([item[optsConfig.valueField || config.valueField || "value"], item[optsConfig.textField || config.valueField || "text"], "expanded", item.children.length]);
			continue;
		}
		if(this.fexclude) {
			if(item[bc.fexclude[0]] == bc.fexclude[1]) {
				loptions.push([item[optsConfig.valueField || config.valueField || "value"], item[optsConfig.textField || config.textField || "text"]]);
				continue;
			}
		}

		if(isArray(item)) {
			if(bc.fprop && isArray(bc.fvalue) && !isInIt(bc.fvalue, item[0])){
				continue;
			}
			if(this.iprop && isArray(bc.ivalue) && isInIt(bc.ivalue, item[0])){
				continue;
			}
			loptions.push(item);
		} else if (typeof item != "object") {
			if(bc.fprop && isArray(bc.fvalue) && !isInIt(bc.fvalue, item)){
				continue;
			}
			if(bc.iprop && isArray(bc.ivalue) && isInIt(bc.ivalue, item)){
				continue;
			}
			loptions.push([item, item]);
		} else {
			if (bc.fprop) {//filter va mı?
				if(isArray(bc.fvalue) && !isInIt(bc.fvalue, BEANUtils.getValue(item, bc.fprop))){
					continue;
				}
				if(!isArray(bc.fvalue) && item[bc.fprop] != bc.fvalue){
					continue;
				}
			}
			if (bc.iprop) {//inverse filter va mı?
				if(isArray(bc.ivalue) && isInIt(bc.ivalue, BEANUtils.getValue(item, bc.iprop))){
					continue;
				}
				if(!isArray(bc.ivalue) && item[bc.iprop] == bc.ivalue){
					continue;
				}
			}
			loptions.push([item[optsConfig.valueField || config.valueField || "value"], item[optsConfig.textField || config.textField || "text"]]);
		}
	}
}
BC.prototype.applyFilterResults = function() {
	var bc=this,loptions=bc.localOptions,config=bc.config;
	for(var n=0;n<loptions.length;n++) {
		if(loptions[n][2] !== false) {
			$$.rmClass(config.id + "_item_"+loptions[n][0], "hidden");
		} else {
			$$.addClass(config.id + "_item_"+loptions[n][0], "hidden");
		}
	}
}

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf,config=bc.config,readonly=bf.isReadonly();
	var $$div = $$.create("DIV", {"id": config.id, "title":config.tips },["csc-advanced-list",config.cssClass], config.style, $container);
	if(config.style && config.style.height){
		$$div.style.overflowY = "auto";
	}

	$container.appendChild($$div);
	bc.prepareOptions();

	$$div.style.display = inDesigner(bf) || bf.isVisible() ? "" : "none";

	if(config.enableUserFilter) { //Listeyi girdiye göre filtrele
		var $$searchDiv = $$.create("DIV", {id:this.config.id+"_search"}, "csc-adv-list-search-div", undefined);
		var $$searchText = $$.create("INPUT", {type: "text", id: this.config.id+"-adv-list-search",placeholder: config.placeholder}, "csc-adv-list-search-text", undefined, $$searchDiv);
		var $$right = $$.byid(this.config.id+ "-ul");

		$$.insertFirst($$searchDiv,$$div);
		$$searchText.onkeyup = function(e){
			e.preventDefault();
			if(e.keyCode=== 40 || e.keyCode=== 38){
				var $$ul=document.getElementById(config.id+"-ul");
				var showedChilds=[];
				for (var i = $$ul.children.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
					if(!$$ul.children[i].classList.contains("hidden")){
						showedChilds.push($$ul.children[i]);
					}
				}
				if(e.keyCode=== 40){
					bc.selectItem(showedChilds[showedChilds.length-1].dataset.value,true);
					showedChilds[showedChilds.length-1].focus();
				}
				if(e.keyCode=== 38){
					bc.selectItem(showedChilds[0].dataset.value,true);
					showedChilds[0].focus();

				}

			}else{
				var key = $$searchText.value;
				delete bc.config.searchKey;
				if(key){
					key = SIDEString.turkishToLoverCase(key);
					bc.config.searchKey = key.replace(new RegExp("[iİ]","gi"), "[iİ]");
				}
				bc.searchKeyInRight($$right);
				return false;
			}

		};
	}

	this.renderStaticOptions($$div);

	if(config.value.length) {
		bc.setValue(config.value);
	} else if (config.defaultValue){
		bc.setValue(config.defaultValue, config.text);
	}
	if(bc.focusSearch){
		bc.focusSearchBox();
	}
};

BC.prototype.searchKeyInRight = function($$right) {
	var bc=this, loptions = bc.localOptions, config=bc.config, regex = new RegExp("("+config.searchKey+")","gi");
	for(var i=0; i<loptions.length; i++) {
		var item = loptions[i];
		var text = item[1];
		newData  = text.match(regex);
		if(!config.searchKey || (config.searchKey && newData !== null) || item[3] !== undefined){
			item[2]=true;
		} else {
			item[2]=false;
		}
	}
	this.applyFilterResults();
};


BC.prototype.toggleHeader = function(value) {
	var bc=this, loptions = bc.localOptions;
	for(var i=0; i<loptions.length ;i++){
		if(loptions[i][0] == value){
			if(loptions[i][2] == "expanded"){
				loptions[i][2] = "collapsed";
				$$.rmClass(bc.config.id+"_item_"+value, "expanded");
			} else {
				loptions[i][2] = "expanded";
				$$.addClass(bc.config.id+"_item_"+value, "expanded");
			}
		}
	}
}

BC.prototype.focus = function(){
	var $$ul = $$.byid(this.config.id+"-ul");
	if($$ul){
		var $$selectedLi = $$.getChildHasClass($$ul, "item-selected");
		if($$selectedLi){
			$$selectedLi.focus();
		} else {
			$$ul.focus();
		}
	}
};
BC.prototype.focusSearchBox = function(){
	var $$textBox=$$.byid(this.config.id+"-adv-list-search");
	if($$textBox){
		$$textBox.focus();
		$$textBox.setSelectionRange(0, $$textBox.value.length);
	} else {
		this.focusSearch = true;
	}
};
BC.prototype.renderStaticOptions = function($$div){
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	var $$ul = $$.create("UL", {id: config.id+"-ul", "tabindex": 150000}, ["csc-advanced-list-ul",config.cssClass], config.style);


	$$ul.addEventListener("keydown", function(event){
		var keyCode=event.keyCode;
		if(keyCode == 13){//enter press
			return;
		}
		event.preventDefault();
		var $$selectedLi = $$.getChildHasClass($$ul, "item-selected");
		var showedChilds=[];
		for (var i = $$ul.children.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
			if(!$$ul.children[i].classList.contains("hidden")){
				showedChilds.push($$ul.children[i]);
			}
		}
		showedChilds.reverse()

		function showedChildsNextItem(){
			var showedChildsIndex = showedChilds.indexOf($$selectedLi);
			var nextItem;
			if(showedChildsIndex >= 0 && showedChildsIndex < showedChilds.length - 1){
				nextItem = showedChilds[showedChildsIndex + 1];
			}
			return nextItem;
		}
		function showedChildsPrevItem(){
			var showedChildsIndex = showedChilds.indexOf($$selectedLi);
			var prevItem;
			if(showedChildsIndex >= 0 && showedChildsIndex < showedChilds.length + 1){
				prevItem = showedChilds[showedChildsIndex - 1];
			}
			return prevItem;
		}
		function selectFirstChild(){
			bc.selectItem(showedChilds[0].dataset.value,true);
			showedChilds[0].focus();
		}
		function selectLastChild(){
			bc.selectItem(showedChilds[showedChilds.length-1].dataset.value,true);
			showedChilds[showedChilds.length-1].focus();
		}
		function selectNextElement(){
			var nextItem=showedChildsNextItem();
			if(nextItem){
				bc.selectItem(nextItem.dataset.value,true);
				nextItem.focus();
			}else{
				selectFirstChild();
			}
		}
		function selectPrevElement(){
			var prevItem=showedChildsPrevItem();
			if(prevItem){
				bc.selectItem(prevItem.dataset.value,true);
				prevItem.focus();
			}else{
				selectLastChild();
			}
		}


		if(keyCode===40){
			if($$selectedLi){
				selectNextElement();
			}else{
				selectLastChild();
			}
		}else if(keyCode===38){
			if($$selectedLi){
				selectPrevElement();
			}else{
				selectFirstChild();
			}
		}
	});
	$$div.appendChild($$ul);
	var optionStr = "";
	if (inDesigner(bf)) {
		bc.localOptions=[["1","Lorem Ipsum"],["2","Dolor Si Amet"],["3","Consectetur Adipiscing"]]; //sample data
	}
	var loptions = bc.localOptions, optsConfig=bc.optionsConfig||{};
	for(var i=0; i<loptions.length; i++) {
		var value = loptions[i][0], text = loptions[i][1], elemID;
		if(typeof text == "string" && text.indexOf("<") >= 0){
			text = text.replace("<", "&#060;");
		}
		if(typeof value == "string" && value.indexOf("'") >= 0){
			value = value.replace(/'/g,"&#39;")
		}

		elemID = config.id+"_item_"+value;
		var $$li = $$.create("LI", {id: elemID, "tabindex": 150000});

		//Set Attributes:
		if(optsConfig.propertiesAsAttributes){
			var propertiesAsAttributes = optsConfig.propertiesAsAttributes, option;
			for(var n=0;n<propertiesAsAttributes.length;n++) {
				option = this.getOption(loptions[i][0]);
				var attrValue =option[propertiesAsAttributes[n]];
				if(Array.isArray(attrValue)) {
					attrValue = attrValue.join([separator = ' ']);
				}
				if(attrValue !== undefined) {
					$$li.setAttribute("data-"+propertiesAsAttributes[n],attrValue);
				}
			}
		}
		if(value) {
			$$li.dataset.value=value;
		}
		$$li.dataset.index=i;
		var option = this.getOption(value)
		if(option && option.attributes){
			for(var attrName in option.attributes){
				$$li.setAttribute(attrName, option.attributes[attrName]);
			}
		}

		//Set Text:
		var $$span = $$.create("SPAN");
		$$span.innerHTML = text;
		$$li.appendChild($$span);

		if(loptions[i][2] == "expanded" || loptions[i][2] == "collapsed") { //Item, header ise:
			if(loptions[i][3] == 0){
				$$.addClass($$li, "empty");
			}
			$$li.onclick = function(event){
				bc.toggleHeader(this.getAttribute("data-value"));
			};
			if(loptions[i][3] == 0){
				$$.addClass($$li, "empty");
			}
			if (loptions[i][2] == "expanded") {
				$$.addClass($$li, "expanded");
			}

			$$.addClass($$li, "header");
			$$ul.appendChild($$li);
			var $$subUl = $$.create("UL", {id: elemID+"-ul"});
			$$li.appendChild($$subUl);
		} else {
			if(!inDesigner(bf)) {
				$$li.oncontextmenu = function(event){
					var option = bc.getOption(this.getAttribute("data-value"));
					bf.fire("rowRightClicked", option);
					if(bc.contextMenuCallback){
						event.preventDefault();
						var rowid = this.getAttribute("id");
						var menuItemsObj = bc.contextMenuCallback(option, rowid);
						csdu.contextMenu({
							moduleName: bf.getModuleName(),
							left: event.pageX,
							top: event.pageY,
							items:menuItemsObj,
							leftSide: (bc.contextMenuOptions && bc.contextMenuOptions.leftSide) ? true : false
						}, rowid, event);
					}
				};
				$$li.onclick = function(event){
					event.stopPropagation();
					//item-selected event'inde döndürülen objeden internal kullanılaan sideVar item'larını çıkar:
					var value = this.getAttribute("data-value");
					var option = bc.getOption(value);
					bc.selectItem(value, !$$.hasClass(this,"item-selected"));
					bf.fire("itemSelected",option);
				};
				$$li.ondblclick = function(event){
					event.stopPropagation();
					var value = this.getAttribute("data-value");
					var option = bc.getOption(value);
					bf.fire("itemDoubleClicked",option);
				};
			}
			if($$subUl) {
				$$subUl.appendChild($$li);
			}
			else {
				$$ul.appendChild($$li);
			}
		}
		if (config.value == value) {
			$$.addClass($$li, "item-selected");
		}
	}
};

/**
 * @description Selects/unselects the item which has given value according to flag. Toggles value if flag value is not provided.
 * @function selectItem
 * @param value
 * @param flag
 */
BC.prototype.selectItem = function(value, flag) {
	var loptions = this.localOptions, config=this.config, id = config.id + "_item_"+ value;
	var valueIndex = config.value.indexOf(value);
	if(flag === undefined){//undefined means make toogle
		if(valueIndex >= 0) {//allready selected?
			flag = false;
		} else {
			flag = true;
		}
	}

	if(flag && valueIndex >= 0){
		return;//flag true and allread selected
	} else if(!flag && valueIndex < 0){
		return;//flag false and allready not selected
	}

	if(this.config.allowMultipleSelect) {
		if(flag){
			config.value.push(value);
			$$.addClass(id, "item-selected");
		} else {
			config.value.splice(valueIndex, 1);
			$$.rmClass(id, "item-selected");
		}
	} else {
		var $$csAdvancedListElement=document.getElementById(config.id);
		if(flag){
			$$.rmClass(config.id + "_item_"+config.value[0], "item-selected");
			config.value = [value];
			$$.addClass(id, "item-selected");
		} else {
			config.value = [];
			$$.rmClass(id, "item-selected");
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.setOnContextMenuCallback = function(callback, options) {
	this.contextMenuCallback = callback;
	this.contextMenuOptions = options;
};

/**
 * @description Advanced-List'e seçeneklerin verilmesini sağlar.
 * @function setOptions
 * @param {array} items
 * @example En basit kullanımı: ["Erkek","Kadın"] yada [1920, 2000, 2021] Bu kullanımda value ve text alanlarının değerleri aynıdır. <br/> Dizi içeriği dizi olabilir: [[1,"Erkek"], [2,"Kadın"]] Bu kullanımda iç dizide ilk eleman value alanının, ikinci eleman ise text alanının içeriğidir. <br/> Dizi içeriği nesne olabilir (value ve text isimleri sabit): [{value: "1", text: "Erkek"},{value:"2", text: "Kadın"}} <br/> Dizi içeriği nesne olabilir (value ve text isimleri config ile verilir): items => [{plaka: "06", adi: "Ankara"},{value:"01", adi: "Adana"}], config=> {value: "plaka", text: "adi"}
 * @param config - items parametresi nesne dizisi olduğunda ve nesnelerin value ve text alanları standart dışı olduğunda hangi alanın value alanı hangi alanın text alan olarak kullanılabileceğini belirtir.<br/>
 * @example items=> [{plaka: "06", adi: "Ankara"},{value:"01", adi: "Adana"}]  config=> {value: "plaka", text: "adi"}
 */
BC.prototype.setOptions = function(items, config) {
	var bc=this;
	bc.optionsConfig = config;

	if (!Array.isArray(items) || !items.length) {
		return;
	}
	bc.options = csCloneObject(items, true);
	bc.reviewTreeStructure();
	bc.prepareOptions();
	bc.reRender();
};

/**
 * Changes text of option whose value is given by parameter
 * @param value - option's value
 * @param text - option's new text
 */
BC.prototype.changeOptionText = function(value, text) {
	var option = this.getOption(value);
	if(option){
		var bc=this, config=bc.config, optsConfig = bc.optionsConfig || {};
		option[optsConfig.textField || "text"] = text;
		var $$li = $$.byid(config.id+"_item_"+value), $$span = $$.child($$li, "SPAN");
		if($$span){
			$$span.innerHTML = text;
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.addOptions = function(items, index, notrender, parentValue){
	/**
	 * @description Adds new options to options.
	 * @function addOptions
	 * @param items - New options to add list's options (opt=false)
	 * @param {number} [index=last] - Insert position into options. If not given new options are added to tail of options. If parentValue is given then index must be relative to parentOption.
	 * @param {boolean} [notrender=false] - Immediate render after add option
	 * @param {string} [parentValue=null]- If list has a tree structure then parentValue must be given.
	 */
	var bc=this, options=bc.options;
	if (!Array.isArray(items)) {
		items = [items];
	}
	if(parentValue !== undefined){
		var optsConfig=bc.optionsConfig||{};
		for(var i=0; i<options.length ;i++){
			if(options[i][optsConfig.valueField||this.config.valueField||"value"] == parentValue){
				if(!options[i].children){
					options[i].children = [];
				}
				if (index === undefined) {
					for(var k=0; k<items.length ;k++){
						options[i].children.push(items[k][optsConfig.valueField||this.config.valueField||"value"]);
					}
				} else {
					for(var k=0; k<items.length ;k++){
						options[i].children.splice(index+k, 0, items[k][optsConfig.valueField||this.config.valueField||"value"]);
					}
				}
				options = options.concat(items);
				break;
			}
		}
	} else {
		if (index !== undefined) {
			var op2 = options.splice(index, options.length - index);
			options = options.concat(items, op2);
		} else {
			options = options.concat(items);
		}
	}
	bc.options = options;
	bc.reviewTreeStructure();
	BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
};

/**
 * @description Adds attributes to html li element which has given value.
 * @function addAttribute
 * @param value
 * @param {object} attr - Attributes to add. (opt=false)
 * @example {attr1:"value1", attr2:"value2"}
 */
BC.prototype.addAttribute = function(value, attr){
	var config = this.config, $$dom = $$.byid(config.id+"_item_"+value);
	var $$dom = $$.byid(config.id+"_item_"+value);
	var option = this.getOption(value);
	if(!option){
		return;
	}
	if(!option.attributes){
		option.attributes = {};
	}
	for(var key in attr){
		option.attributes[key] = attr[key];
		if($$dom){
			$$dom.setAttribute(key, attr[key]);
		}
	}
};

/**
 * @description Removes attributes from html li element which has given value.
 * @function rmAttribute
 * @param value
 * @param {string[]} attrs - Attributes to remove.
 * @example ["attr1", "attr2"]
 */
BC.prototype.rmAttribute = function(value, attrs){
	var config = this.config, $$dom = $$.byid(config.id+"_item_"+value);
	var option = this.getOption(value);
	if(!option){
		return;
	}
	if(!option.attributes){
		option.attributes = {};
	}
	for(var i=0; i<attrs.length ;i++){
		delete option.attributes[attrs[i]];
		if($$dom){
			$$dom.removeAttribute(attrs[i]);
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.removeSelectedOptions = function() {
	/**
	 * TODO: Listeden seçilen değerleri kaldırır.
	 */

	var $$select = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if (!$$select) {
		return;
	}
	this.selectedOptions = this.config.value;
	if (!this.selectedOptions || this.selectedOptions.length == 0) {
		return;
	}

	var trashList = [];
	for (var i = 0; i < this.selectedOptions.length; i++) {
		trashList.push(this.selectedOptions[i]);
	}
	this.removeOption(trashList);

};

/**
 * @description Removes options have given value(s)
 * @function removeOption
 * @param values - a value or array of values to remove options
 */
BC.prototype.removeOption = function(values) {
	if(!values){
		return;
	}
	if(!Array.isArray(values)){
		values = [values];
	}
	var bc=this,optsConfig=bc.optionsConfig || {}, options=bc.options, config=bc.config;

	for(var k=0; k<values.length ;k++){
		for(var i=0; i<options.length; i++) {
			var item = options[i];
			if (Array.isArray(item)) {
				if(item[0] == values[k]){
					options.splice(i, 1);
					break;
				}
			} else if (typeof item != "object") {
				if(item == values[k]){
					options.splice(i, 1);
					break;
				}
			} else {
				if(BEANUtils.getValue(item, optsConfig.valueField || config.valueField || "value") == values[k]) {
					options.splice(i, 1);
					break;
				}
				if(item && Array.isArray(item.children) && item.children.indexOf(values[k]) >= 0){
					item.children.splice(item.children.indexOf(values[k]), 1);
				}
			}
		}
	}
	this.prepareOptions();
	bc.reviewTreeStructure();
	this.reRender();
};

/**
 * @description Returns the option which has given value
 * @function getOption
 * @param value
 */
BC.prototype.getOption = function(value){
	var bc=this,options = bc.options;
	var optsConfig = bc.optionsConfig || {}, config = bc.config;
	for(var i=0; i<options.length ;i++){
		if(Array.isArray(typeof options[i])){
			if(options[i][0] == value){
				return options[i];
			}
		} else if(typeof options[i] == "object"){
			if(options[i][optsConfig.valueField || config.valueField || "value"] == value){
				return options[i];
			}
		} else {
			if(options[i] == value){
				return options[i];
			}
		}
	}
};

/**
 * @description Returns the option which has given attribute(s)
 * @function getOptionHasAttr
 * @param {object | object[]} attr - attribute or attributes array
 */
BC.prototype.getOptionsHasAttr = function(attributes){
	var bc=this,options = bc.options, results=[];
	var optsConfig = bc.optionsConfig || {}, config = bc.config;
	if(!Array.isArray(attributes)){
		attributes = [attributes];
	}
	for(var i=0; i<options.length ;i++){
		var check = true;
		for(var j=0; j<attributes.length ;j++){
			for(var attrName in attributes[j]){
				if(!options[i].attributes){
					check = false;
					break;
				}
				if(options[i].attributes[attrName] != attributes[j][attrName]){
					check = false;
					break;
				}
			}
		}
		if(check){
			results.push(options[i]);
		}
	}
	return results;
};

/**
 * @description Returns the options as array
 * @function getOptions
 */
BC.prototype.getOptions = function(){
	return this.options.slice();
};

/**
 * @description Returns the selected items' options as array
 * @function getSelectedOptions
 */
BC.prototype.getSelectedOptions = function(){
	var result = [];
	for(var i=0; i<this.config.value.length ;i++){
		result.push(this.getOption(this.config.value[i]));
	}
	return result;
};

/***
 * @description Returns the selected items' text as array
 * @function getSelectedText
 */
BC.prototype.getSelectedText = function(){
	var texts = [];
	var bc=this, optsConfig = bc.optionsConfig || {}, config = bc.config;
	for(var i=0; i<config.value.length ;i++){
		var option = bc.getOption(config.value[i]);
		if(Array.isArray(option)){
			texts.push(option[1]);
		} else if(typeof option == "object"){
			texts.push(option[optsConfig.textField || config.textField || "text"]);
		} else {
			texts.push(option);
		}
	}
	return texts;
};

/**
 * @description Clears al options
 * @function clearOptions
 */
BC.prototype.clearOptions = function(){

	this.setOptions([]);
};

/**
 * @description Listede hiçbir şey seçili olmadığında bir değer ayarlanıp ayarlanmayacağına karar verir.
 * @function setEmptyOption
 * @param {boolean} [flag=true] - true olursa hiçbir şey seçili değilken varsayılan değeri olacaktır.
 */
BC.prototype.setEmptyOption = function(flag){
	if(flag === undefined){
		flag = true;
	}
	this.config.emptyOption = flag;
	this.reRender();
};

/**
 * @description Listede hiçbir şey seçili olmadığında ayarlanacak varsayılan değeri belirler.
 * @function setEmptyText
 * @param {string} text - Ayarlanacak varsayılan değerin metni
 * @param [value] - Ayarlanacak varsayılan değer
 */
BC.prototype.setEmptyText = function(text, value){
	this.config.emptyText = text;
	if(value !== undefined){
		this.config.emptyValue = value;
	}
	this.reRender();
};

/**
 * @function filter
 * @description List'deki seçenekleri filtreler
 * @example list.filter("ilKodu", "06");//Sadece ilkodu değeri "06" olan seçenekler görüntülenir.
 * @example list.filter("ilKodu", ["06","07","08"]);//Sadece ilkodu değeri "06", "07" yada "08" olan seçenekler görüntülenir.
 * @example list.filter(["06"]);//Sadece ilkodu değeri "06" olan seçenekler görüntülenir. (İl Kodu alanı "Filter Field" özelliğinde verildiği varsayılmıştır)
 * @param filterProp - filtrelemenin hangi alana göre yapılacağını belirler. Bu alan verilmediğinde "Filter Field" özelliğinde verilmiş olan kullanılır.<br/>
 * @param filterValue - filtreleme kullanılacak değerleri belirleyen parametredir
 * @param config - config.setNull true verildiğinde filtreleme işleminden sonra combonun değerini temizlemiyi sağlar.
 */
BC.prototype.filter = function(filterProp, filterValue, config) {
	var disableFilterInverseFilter = BCDefaults.get("CSC-ADVANCED-LIST", "allowMultipleFilter", false);

	if(disableFilterInverseFilter){
		this.iprop = null;
		this.ivalue = null;
	}

	if((typeof config === "boolean" && config == true) || (config && config.setNull === true)){
		this.setValue(null);
	}
	if(typeof config === "object" && config.filterExclude) {
		this.fexclude = config.filterExclude;
	}
	if(filterValue === undefined){
		this.fprop = this.config.filterProp;
		filterValue = filterProp;
	} else {
		this.fprop = filterProp;
	}
	this.fvalue = filterValue;

	if(config && config.forcePrepareOptions){
		this.prepareOptions();
	}

	this.reRender();
};

/**
 * @function inverseFilter
 * @description List'deki seçenekleri ters filtreler, yani paramtre ile verilen değerler dışındaki seçenekler gösterilir.
 * @example list.filter("ilKodu", "06");//ilkodu değeri "06" olmayan seçenekler görüntülenir.<br/>
 * @example list.filter("ilKodu", ["06","07","08"]);//ilkodu değeri "06", "07" yada "08" olmayan seçenekler görüntülenir.<br/>
 * @example list.filter(["06"]);//ilkodu değeri "06" olmayan seçenekler görüntülenir. ("ilkodu" alanı "Filter Field" özelliğinde verildiği varsayılmıştır)
 * @param filterProp - def="deneme"filtrelemenin hangi alana göre yapılacağını belirler. Bu alan verilmediğinde "Filter Field" özelliğinde verilmiş olan kullanılır.
 * @param filterValue - filtreleme kullanılacak değerleri belirleyen parametredir
 * @param setNull - true verildiğinde filtreleme işleminden sonra combonun değerini temizlemiyi sağlar. optiyonel bir parametredir
 */
BC.prototype.inverseFilter = function(filterProp, filterValue, setNull) {
	var disableFilterInverseFilter = BCDefaults.get("CSC-ADVANCED-LIST", "allowMultipleFilter", false);

	if(disableFilterInverseFilter){
		this.fprop = null;
		this.fvalue = null;
	}

	if(setNull === true){
		this.setValue(null);
	}
	if(filterValue === undefined){
		this.iprop = this.config.filterProp;
		filterValue = filterProp;
	} else {
		this.iprop = filterProp;
	}
	this.ivalue = filterValue;
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {

	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var $$dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if($$dom){
			$$dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-horizontal.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** @class CSC-HORIZONTAL LAYOUT */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {};

	this.BaseBF = "CONTAINER";
	this.LABEL = "Horizontal Layout";

	this.METHODS = [ "mask", "unmask", "collapse", "expand", "isCollapsed()", "close" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "onload", "selected", "oncontextmenu", "onEnterPressed", "oninit(param)", "closeIconSelected"  ];

	this.Type = function() {};
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-HORIZONTAL", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function() {
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf,config=bc.config;
	if(config.conWidth){
		config.labelPosition = "none";
		bc.conWidths = {};
		var widths = config.conWidth.split(","),i=0;
		for(var mname in bf.members){
			bc.conWidths[mname] = widths[i];
			i++;
		}
	}
};

/**
 * @functon close
 * @description Closes the page that is opened as popup or opened in a tab panel or an accordion panel.
 */
BC.prototype.close = function(){
	var parent = this.bf.getParent();
	if(parent && typeof parent.close == "function"){
		parent.close(this.bf.getMemberName());
	}
};

BC.prototype.getLabelId = function() {
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf;
	for(var mname in bf.members){
		var ref = bf.members[mname].bcRef;
		var memConfig = ref.config;
		if(memConfig.layoutConfig && memConfig.layoutConfig.plabel){
			bc.plabelid = ref.getLabelId ? ref.getLabelId() : memConfig.id;
			break;
		}
	}
	return bc.plabelid || bc.config.id;
};

BC.prototype.getChildContainer = function(memberName) {
	var $$container = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(!$$container){
		return;
	}
	if(this.config.titleType == "fieldset" || this.config.titleType == "bfieldset"){
		var $$fieldset = $$.child($$container,"fieldset");
		var $$vertContainer = $$.getChildHasClass($$fieldset, "csc-hor-items-container");
		return $$.getChildHasAttr($$vertContainer, "rel", memberName);
	} else {
		var $$vertContainer = $$.getChildHasClass($$container, "csc-hor-items-container");
		return $$.getChildHasAttr($$vertContainer, "rel", memberName);
	}
};

BC.prototype.renderMember = function(member, $$formItemsContainer) {
	
	if (member.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP") {
		return;
	}
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf;
	var $$after = null, $$into = null;
	if (!$$formItemsContainer) {
		var previusMember = null;
		$$formItemsContainer = $$.getChildHasClass(this.config.id, "csc-hor-items-container");
		
		if (!$$formItemsContainer) {
			var $$filedset = $$.getChildHasClass(this.config.id, "csc-form-fieldset");
			$$formItemsContainer = $$.getChildHasClass($$filedset, "csc-hor-items-container");
		}
		for ( var memName in this.bf.members) {
			var mem = this.bf.members[memName];
			if (mem == member) {
				break;
			}
			var ref = mem.bcRef; 
			if (ref.isRendered()) {
				previusMember = this.bf.members[memName];
			}
		}
		if (previusMember) {
			$$after = $$.query($$formItemsContainer, [{tagName: "DIV", clazz: "csc-hor-block", attr: {rel: previusMember.$CS$.name}}])
		} else {
			$$into = $$formItemsContainer;
		}
	}

	var memName = member.$CS$.name;
	var renderedDiv = $$.query($$formItemsContainer, [{tagName: "DIV", clazz: "csc-hor-block", attr: {rel: memName}}])
	if (renderedDiv) {
		$$.remove(renderedDiv);
	}
	if(!inDesigner(this.bf) && !member.hasVisibleItem()) {
		return;
	}

	var memberConfig = member.getConfig();
	var labelPos = memberConfig.labelPosition === "inherited" ? this.config.labelPosition : (memberConfig.labelPosition || this.config.labelPosition);
	var alignClass = null;

	if (labelPos == "top") {
		alignClass = "csc-top-align";
	} else if (labelPos == "left") {
		alignClass = "csc-left-align";
	} else if (labelPos == "right") {
		alignClass = "csc-right-align";
	}

	var $$horBlock = $$.create("DIV", {"rel" : memName}, "csc-hor-block");
	if(bc.conWidths && bc.conWidths[memName]){
		$$horBlock.style.width = bc.conWidths[memName];
	}
	if(memberConfig.layoutConfig && memberConfig.layoutConfig.newLine){
		$$.addClass($$horBlock, "csc-hor-block-newline");
	}
	
	if(memberConfig.label){
		if (alignClass != null) {
			var $$labelDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, ["csc-form-label "+ alignClass + "-label",  memberConfig.label_class]);
			if (memberConfig.label) {
				var label = memberConfig.label;
				if (labelPos == "left") {
					label = label + ":";
				}
				if(memberConfig.labelClick!==false){
					$$labelDiv.innerHTML = "<label for='"+memberConfig.id+"'>"+ label +"</label>";
				}else{
					$$labelDiv.innerHTML = "<label>"+ label +"</label>";
				}
			}
			if($$horBlock.childNodes[0]){
				$$horBlock.insertBefore($$labelDiv, $$horBlock.childNodes[0]);
			} else {
				$$horBlock.appendChild($$labelDiv);
			}
		} else {
			alignClass = "csc-left-align";
		}	
	}
	
	var $$elementDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined);
	if(!bc.conWidths){
		$$.addClass($$elementDiv, alignClass + "-element");
	}
	if (member.isRequired() && (!this.bf.isDisabled() && !member.isDisabled())) {
		$$.addClass($$elementDiv, "csc-required");
	}

	$$horBlock.appendChild($$elementDiv);

	if ($$after) {
		var $$parent = $$after.parentNode;
		if($$after.nextSibling){
			$$parent.insertBefore($$horBlock, $$after.nextSibling);
		} else {
			$$parent.appendChild($$horBlock);
		}
	} else if ($$into && $$into.childNodes.length) {
		$$into.insertBefore($$horBlock, $$into.childNodes[0]);
	} else {
		$$formItemsContainer.appendChild($$horBlock);
	}

	BFEngine.render(member, $$elementDiv);

	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$dom){
		var style = window.getComputedStyle($$dom);
		if(style.getPropertyValue("position") == "fixed"){
			$$dom.style.position = "absolute";
			window.setTimeout(function(){
				$$dom.style.position = "";
			},100);
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bf = this.bf;
	var bc = this;
	var config=bc.config;
	
	var displayProp = this.config.visible ? "" : "none";
	var $$horContainer = $$.create("DIV", {"id":this.config.id}, [this.config.cssClass, "csc-hor-container"], {"width" : "100%", "display" : displayProp});
	
	if (this.config.style && this.config.style.width) {
		$$.css($$horContainer, "width", this.config.style.width);
	}
	
	if (this.config.style && this.config.style.height) {
		$$.css($$horContainer, "height", this.config.style.height);
	}
	
	var $$formItemsContainer = $$.create("DIV", {"rel" : this.config.id},"csc-hor-items-container", this.config.style || {});
	if(config.panelType){
		$$formItemsContainer.classList.add("csc-hor-container__"+config.panelType);
	}
	if(config.style && config.style.fillPanel){
		$$formItemsContainer.classList.add("csc-hor-container--filled");
	}
	if(config.style && config.style.borderPanel){
		$$formItemsContainer.classList.add("csc-hor-container--bordered");	
	}
	if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		$$.css($$horContainer, "display", "");
	}
	if(sideDebugLevel() > 1){
		$$horContainer.setAttribute("rel-def", bf.getBusinessName());
	}

	var titleType = this.config.titleType || "none";

	if (titleType == "window") {
		var $$titleDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, ["csc-form-title", this.config.titleClass], {"width" : "100%"});
		var $$titleSpan = $$.create("SPAN", undefined, "csc-form-title", {"width" : "100%"});
		$$titleSpan.innerHTML = this.config.title;
		if (this.config.titleIcon) {
			$$.addClass($$titleSpan, this.config.titleIcon);
		}
		
		$$titleDiv.appendChild($$titleSpan);
		
		if (this.config.collapsible === true) {
			var $$collapseBtn = $$.create("INS",undefined,"collapse");
			$$collapseBtn.onclick=function() {
				if (bc.collapsed) {
					bf.expand();
				} else {
					bf.collapse();
				}
			};
			$$titleDiv.appendChild($$collapseBtn);
			if(this.config.collapsePos === "left"){
				$$.addClass($$titleDiv, "csc-form-title-collapse-left"); 
			}
		}
		
		if(this.config.showCloseIcon){
			var $$closeBtn = $$.create("ins", null, "close");
			$$closeBtn.onclick = function() {
				bc.bf.fire("closeIconSelected");
			};
			$$titleDiv.appendChild($$closeBtn);
		}
		
		$$horContainer.appendChild($$titleDiv);
		$$horContainer.appendChild($$formItemsContainer);
		$$.addClass($$formItemsContainer, "csc-bordered-container");
	} else if (titleType == "fieldset" || titleType == "bfieldset") {
		var $$fieldSet = $$.create("FIELDSET", undefined, ["csc-form-fieldset", titleType == "bfieldset" ? "borderless-fieldset":null]);
		var $$legend = $$.create("LEGEND");
		var $$titleSpan = $$.create("SPAN");
		if (this.config.collapsible === true && this.config.showTitle !== false) {
			$$.addClass($$legend, "collapse");

			$$legend.onclick=function() {
				if (bc.collapsed) {
					bf.expand();
				} else {
					bf.collapse();
				}
			};
			
			$$titleSpan.innerHTML = this.config.title || "&nbsp;";
			$$legend.appendChild($$titleSpan);
			$$fieldSet.appendChild($$legend);
		} else if (this.config.title && this.config.showTitle !== false) {
			$$titleSpan.innerHTML = this.config.title;
			$$legend.appendChild($$titleSpan);
			$$fieldSet.appendChild($$legend);
		} else {
			$$.addClass($$fieldSet, "csc-form-fieldset-nolegend");
		}
		if(this.config.bottomBorder === false){
			$$.addClass($$fieldSet, "no-bottom-border");
		}
		$$fieldSet.appendChild($$formItemsContainer);
		$$horContainer.appendChild($$fieldSet);
	} else if (titleType === undefined || titleType == "none") {
		$$.addClass($$horContainer, "csc-bordered-box");
		$$horContainer.appendChild($$formItemsContainer);
	}
	$container.appendChild($$horContainer);

	for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
		var member = bf.members[memberName];
		this.renderMember(member);
	}

	if (this.config.collapsible === true) {
		if (this.collapsed) {
			this.collapse();
		} else {
			this.expand();
		}
	}

	this.applyAddedClasses();// Apply css classes added by user
	
	if(this.config.maskIt){
		this.mask();
	}
};

BC.prototype.collapse = function() {
	/**
	 * @function collapse
     * @description Paneli sadece başlığı gözükecek şekilde (varsa) kapatır. 
     */
     var $$container = $$.byid(this.config.id);
     if(this.config.titleType == "fieldset" || this.config.titleType == "bfieldset"){
     	var $$fieldset = $$.child($$container,"fieldset");
		$$.toggleClass($$.child($$fieldset, "legend"), "expand", "collapse");//-------------> legend'in class'ını değiştir
		$$.toggleClass($$fieldset, "expanded", "collapsed");//-------------> fieldset'in class'ını değiştir TODO: legend'de eklenmiş sınıf yerine fieldset'i kullan ve gerecek css değişikliğini tüm temalarda yap.
		$$.css($$.getChildHasClass($$fieldset, "csc-hor-items-container"), "display", "none");//-----> içeriği kapat
		$$.css($$fieldset, "height", 0);
	} else if(this.config.titleType == "window"){
		var $$ins = $$.query($$container, [{tagName: "DIV", clazz: "csc-form-title"}, {tagName: "INS"}]);
		$$.toggleClass($$ins, "expand", "collapse");//--------------------------------------> legend'in class'ını değiştir
		$$.css($$.getChildHasClass($$container, "csc-hor-items-container"), "display", "none");//----> içeriği kapat
	}
	
	this.collapsed = true;
};

BC.prototype.isCollapsed = function() {
	return this.collapsed;
};
/**
 * @function expand
 * @description Kapalı paneli, içerdiği elemanlar gözükecek şekilde aşağıya doğru açar. Açık panelde bir değişiklik yapmaz.
 */
BC.prototype.expand = function() {
 var $$container = $$.byid(this.config.id);
 if(this.config.titleType == "fieldset" || this.config.titleType == "bfieldset"){
    var $$fieldset = $$.child($$container,"fieldset");
		$$.toggleClass($$.child($$fieldset, "legend"), "collapse", "expand");//-------------> legend'in class'ını değiştir
		$$.toggleClass($$fieldset, "collapsed", "expanded");//-------------> fieldset'in class'ını değiştir TODO: legend'de eklenmiş sınıf yerine fieldset'i kullan ve gerecek css değişikliğini tüm temalarda yap.
		$$.css($$.getChildHasClass($$fieldset, "csc-hor-items-container"), "display", "");//-----> içeriği kapat
		if($$fieldset){
			$$fieldset.style.height = "";
		}
	} else if(this.config.titleType == "window"){
		var $$ins = $$.query($$container, [{tagName: "DIV", clazz: "csc-form-title"}, {tagName: "INS"}]);
		$$.toggleClass($$ins, "collapse", "expand");//--------------------------------------> legend'in class'ını değiştir
		$$.css($$.getChildHasClass($$container, "csc-hor-items-container"), "display", "");//----> içeriği kapat
	}
	this.collapsed = false;
	BFEngine.DRL(this.bf);
};


BC.prototype.setTitle = function(title){
	this.config.title = title;
	var $$container = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(this.config.titleType == "window") {
		var $$spanTitle = $$.query($$container, [{tagName: "div", clazz: "csc-form-title"}, {tagName: "span"}]);
		if($$spanTitle){
			$$spanTitle.innerHTML = title;
		}
	} else if(this.config.titleType == "fieldset" || this.config.titleType == "bfieldset") {
		var $$spanTitle = $$.query($$container, [{tagName: "fieldset"}, {tagName: "legend"}, {tagName: "span"}]);
		if($$spanTitle){
			$$spanTitle.innerHTML = title;
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.load = function() {
	if (this.onloadcallback) {
		this.onloadcallback();
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	}else if (eventName == "oncontextmenu") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.oncontextmenu = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "drop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "onload") {
		this.onloadcallback = callback;
	} else if (eventName == "onEnterPressed") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onkeypress = function(e) {
				if (e.keyCode == 13) {
					callback();
				}
			};
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.mask = function(message) {
	/**
	 * @function mask
     * @description Panele bir mesaj içeren koyu renkli "Yükleniyor" maskesi koymaya yarar.
     * @param [message] Maskenin üstünde yazan mesaj
     */
     var id = this.config.id;
     this.config.maskMessage = message || this.config.maskMessage;
     this.config.maskIt = true;
     var $$gen = $$.byid(id);
     if(!$$gen){
     	return;
     }

     var $$maskDiv = $$.create("DIV",{"id": id + "-mask"}, "maskDiv", {"width": $$.innerWidth($$gen)+"px", "height": $$.innerHeight($$gen)+"px"});

     var $$loadingDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "maskedLoadInfo");

     var $$img = $$.create("IMG", {"src": "css/bc-style/img/loadmaskicon.gif"});
     var $$span = $$.create("SPAN");
     $$span.innerHTML = message;

     $$loadingDiv.appendChild($$img);
     $$loadingDiv.appendChild($$span);
     $$maskDiv.appendChild($$loadingDiv);

     var $$parent = $$gen.parentNode;
     $$parent.insertBefore($$maskDiv, $$gen);

     $$.css($$loadingDiv, {"margin-left": $$.innerWidth($$gen) / 2 - $$.innerWidth($$loadingDiv) / 2+"px", "margin-top": $$.innerHeight($$gen) / 2 - $$.innerHeight($$loadingDiv) / 2+"px"});
 };

 BC.prototype.unmask = function() {
	/**
	 * @function unmask
     * @description Panele konulan mesaj içerikli maskeyi kaldırmaya yarar.
     */
     $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id+"-mask");
     $$.remove($$dom);
     this.config.maskIt = undefined;
 };


})(window);
/////=csc-image.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** @class CSC-IMAGE */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		tools : false
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Image";
	this.METHODS = [ "notify", "setBase64Data(mimetype, data, notrender)", "setSrc(src, dontUseResourceUrl)", "setTips(tips)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed", "selected", "ondrag", "ondrop", "ondownload", "onmouseover", "onmouseout" ];
	this.DISABLE_EVENTS = [ "selected" ];

	this.Type = function() {
	};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-IMAGE", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
	return this.config.value;
};
BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
	this.config.value = value;
};
BC.prototype.setSrc = function(src, dontUseResourceUrl) {
	/**
	 * @function setSrc
     * @description Görüntünün kaynağını belirler.
     * @param [src] Görüntünün kaynağı
     * @param [dontUseResourceUrl] kaynağı belirlerken URL kullanılıp kullanılmaması durumunu belirler
     */
	this.config.src = src;
	this.config.dontUseResourceUrl = dontUseResourceUrl;
	
	this.bf.rerender();
};
BC.prototype.setTips = function(tips) {
	/**
	 * @function setTips
     * @description Görüntünün üstüne gelip bekleyince beliren ipucunu ayarlar.
     * @param [tips] Görüntünün üstünde beliren ipucu
     */
	this.config.tips = tips;
	var $$img = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if ($$img) {
		$$img.setAttribute("title", this.config.tips);
	}
};
BC.prototype.setBase64Data = function(mimetype, data, notrender) {
	/**
	 * @function setBase64Data
     * @description Görüntünün Base64 cinsinden kodlanmış halini ayarlar.
     * @param [mimetype] Dosya kimlik tanımlayıcısı. Örn: "image/png", "image/jpeg"
     * @param [data] Base64 cinsinden kodlanmış veri
     * @param [notrender] Veriler değiştikten sonra görüntünün (image) render edilip edilmemesini belirler.
     */
	if(mimetype == "fullpath"){
		this.config.src = data;
	} else {
		mimetype = mimetype || "image/png";
		this.config.src = "data:"+mimetype+";base64,"+data;
	}
	if (notrender) {
		return;
	}
	this.bf.rerender();
};

BC.prototype.setVisible = function(flag) {
	this.config.visible = flag;
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$dom){
		$$dom.style.display = (flag ? "" : "none");
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc = this, bf = this.bf;
	var bfname = this.bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
	var title = this.config.tips || this.config.title;
	var $$div;
	var src = this.config.src;
	if(src && src.indexOf("base64") < 0 && this.config.dontUseResourceUrl !== false){
		src = SideModuleManager.getResourceUrl(bfname.substring(0, bfname.indexOf(".")), src);
	}
	
	var $$img;
	if(this.config.sprite){
		$$img = $$.create("DIV", {"id": this.config.id, title: title, "draggable": (this.config.draggable ? "true" : "false"), "droppable": (this.config.droppable ? "true" : "false")}, ["csc-image", this.config.cssClass],
				{"background": "url("+src+") no-repeat",
				 "backgroundPosition": this.config.backgroudPos,
				 "backgroundSize": (this.config.spriteWidth || "")+" "+ (this.config.spriteHeight || "") });
	}else{
		$$img = $$.create("IMG", {"id": this.config.id, src: src || "css/bc-style/img/iconNotAvaliable.png", title: title, "draggable": (this.config.draggable ? "true" : "false"), "droppable": (this.config.droppable ? "true" : "false"), }, ["csc-image", this.config.cssClass]);
	}
	
	if(this.config.progress){
		var $$progresDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, undefined, {textAlign: "center"}, $container);
		var $$progresImg = $$.create("IMG", {src: "css/bc-style/img/ajax-loader2.gif"}, undefined, undefined, $$progresDiv);
		var $$progresSpan = $$.create("SPAN", undefined, undefined, {lineHeight: "16px"}, $$progresDiv);
		$$progresSpan.innerHTML = SideMLManager.get(this,"imageLoading");
	}
	
	if(this.config.msg && !this.config.tools){
		$$div = $$.create("DIV", {id: this.config.id}, "csc-notify-div");
		if(!this.config.style || !this.config.style.width){
			$$div.innerHTML = SideMLManager.get(this,"notifyError");
			$container.appendChild($$div);
			return;
		}
		var $$span = $$.create("SPAN");
		$$span.innerHTML = this.config.msg;
		$$span.style.left = (parseInt(this.config.style.width, 10)-25)/2 +"px";
		$$div.appendChild($$span);
		$$div.appendChild($$img);
	}
	if(this.config.tools){
		$$div = $$.create("DIV", {id: this.config.id}, "csc-image-tools");
		$$divcontainer = $$.create("DIV", {id: this.config.id+"-cont"}, "csc-image-container");
		$$.css($$div, this.config.style);
		$$divcontainer.appendChild($$img);
		$$div.appendChild($$divcontainer);
		
		this.angle = this.angle || 0;
		
		var $$iconsDiv = $$.create("DIV", {id: this.config.id+"-icons"}, "csc-image-tools-icons");
		var $$rotateLeft = $$.create("SPAN", {title: "Sola çevir"}, "csc-image-tools-rleft");
		var $$rotateRight = $$.create("SPAN", {title: "Sağa çevir"}, "csc-image-tools-rright");
		var $$zoomIn = $$.create("SPAN", {title: "Büyüt"}, "csc-image-tools-zin");
		var $$zoomOut = $$.create("SPAN", {title: "Küçült"}, "csc-image-tools-zout");
		var $$save = $$.create("SPAN", {title: "Kaydet"}, "csc-image-tools-save");
		var $$print = $$.create("SPAN", {title: "Yazdır"}, "csc-image-tools-print");
		
		$$print.onclick = function(){
			SIDEUtil.print(bc.bf,"");
		};
		
		$$save.onclick = function(){
			bc.bf.fire("ondownload");
		};
		
		$$rotateRight.onclick = function(){
			var old = bc.angle;
			bc.angle = (bc.angle + 90) % 360;
			$$.rmClass($$img, "rotate-left-"+old);
			if(bc.angle){
				$$.addClass($$img, "rotate-left-"+bc.angle);
			}
			if(bc.angle === 90 || bc.angle === 270){
				$$divcontainer.style.height = $$img.width +"px";
				$$divcontainer.style.width = $$img.height +"px";
			}else{
				$$divcontainer.style.height = $$img.height +"px";
				$$divcontainer.style.width = $$img.width +"px";
			}
		};
		
		$$rotateLeft.onclick = function(){
			var old = bc.angle;
			bc.angle = Math.abs((360+(bc.angle-90)) % 360);
			$$.rmClass($$img, "rotate-left-"+old);
			if(bc.angle){
				$$.addClass($$img, "rotate-left-"+bc.angle);
			}
			if(bc.angle === 90 || bc.angle === 270){
				$$divcontainer.style.height = $$img.width +"px";
				$$divcontainer.style.width = $$img.height +"px";
			}else{
				$$divcontainer.style.height = $$img.height +"px";
				$$divcontainer.style.width = $$img.width +"px";
			}
			
		};
		
		$$zoomIn.onclick = function(){
			$$img.style.width = parseInt($$img.offsetWidth + $$img.offsetWidth*0.20)+"px";
			$$img.style.height = parseInt($$img.offsetHeight + $$img.offsetHeight*0.20)+"px";
		};
		
		$$zoomOut.onclick = function(){
			$$img.style.width = parseInt($$img.offsetWidth - $$img.offsetWidth*0.20)+"px";
			$$img.style.height = parseInt($$img.offsetHeight - $$img.offsetHeight*0.20)+"px";
		};
		
		$$div.appendChild($$iconsDiv);
		$$iconsDiv.appendChild($$rotateLeft);
		$$iconsDiv.appendChild($$rotateRight);
		$$iconsDiv.appendChild($$zoomIn);
		$$iconsDiv.appendChild($$zoomOut);
		$$iconsDiv.appendChild($$save);
		$$iconsDiv.appendChild($$print);
		
		var onLoadFunction = function(img){
			$$img = img || $$img;
			var containerWidth = $$div.offsetWidth;
			var containerHeight = $$div.offsetHeight;
			var imgWidth = $$img.offsetWidth;
			var imgHeight = $$img.offsetHeight;
			if(imgWidth > containerWidth || imgHeight > containerHeight){
				if(imgHeight / containerHeight > imgWidth / containerWidth){
					imgWidth = Math.ceil(imgWidth*(containerHeight/imgHeight));
					imgHeight = containerHeight;
				} else {
					imgHeight = Math.ceil(imgHeight*(containerWidth/imgWidth));
					imgWidth = containerWidth;
				}
				$$img.style.width = imgWidth+"px";
				$$img.style.height = imgHeight+"px";
			} else if(bc.config.fill){
				if(containerWidth/imgWidth < containerHeight/imgHeight){
					var rate = containerWidth/imgWidth;
					$$img.style.width = containerWidth+"px";
					$$img.style.height = Math.floor(imgHeight*rate)+"px";
				} else {
					var rate = containerHeight/imgHeight;
					$$img.style.height = containerHeight+"px";
					$$img.style.width = Math.floor(imgWidth*rate)+"px";
				}
			}
			$$img.style.left = parseInt((containerWidth-imgWidth)/2)+"px";
			$$img.style.top = parseInt((containerHeight-imgHeight)/2)+"px";
			
			if(bc.config.progress){
				$container.removeChild($$progresDiv);
			}
		};
		
		if(this.config.sprite){
			var img = new Image();
			img.src = src;
			img.onload = function(){ onLoadFunction(this); };
		}
		
		$$img.onload = function(){ onLoadFunction(); };
		
	} else {
		$$.css($$img, this.config.style);
		if(this.config.progress){
			
			if(this.config.sprite){
				var img = new Image();
				img.src = src;
				img.onload = function(){
					$container.removeChild($$progresDiv);
				};
			}
			
			$$img.onload = function(){
				$container.removeChild($$progresDiv);
			};
		}
	}
	
	if(this.config.draggable){
		$$img.ondragstart = function() {
			bc.bf.fire("ondrag");
		};
	}
	if(this.config.droppable){
		$$img.ondrop = function() {
			bc.bf.fire("ondrop");
		};
		$$img.ondragover = function(event) {
			event.preventDefault();
		};
	}
	
	if(this.selectable){
		$$.addClass($$img, "selectable");
	}
	
	$$img.style.display = this.bf.isVisible() || inDesigner(this.bf) ? "" : "none";// Design Time da visible yap
	if($$div){
		$container.appendChild($$div);
	} else {
		$container.appendChild($$img);
	}
	
};

BC.prototype.notify = function(message){
	/**
	 * @function notify
     * @description Görüntünün üstünde bir bildirim çıkmasını sağlar. Bunun için genişlik(width) özelliğinin verilmiş olması gerekmektedir.
     * @param [message] Bildirimde yazacak mesaj
     */
	this.config.msg = message;
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "changed") {
		var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if ($$dom) {
			$$dom.onchange = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "selected") {
		this.selectable = true;
		var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if ($$dom) {
			$$dom.onclick = callback;
			$$.addClass($$dom, "selectable");
		}
	} else if (eventName == "onmouseover") {
		var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if ($$dom) {
			$$dom.onmouseover = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "onmouseout") {
		var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if ($$dom) {
			$$dom.onmouseout = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-empty.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-EMPTY
 * 
 * @classdesc Temel empty componenti.
 * 
 * @author Mahmut Yıldız, Mete Işık
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.METHODS = [];
	this.EVENTS = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-EMPTY", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
};
})(window);
/////=csc-accordion.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**  
 * @class CSC-ACCORDION LAYOUT 
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		closeable : false
	};

	this.BaseBF = "DYN-CONTAINER";
	this.LABEL = "Accordion"; 
	this.TabbedPane = true;

	this.METHODS = [ "select(tabName, multiSelect)", "close", "removeAll", "setHeight(height)", "getSelectedTab", "getSelectedTabName", "selectCheckbox(memberName, flag)", "addHeaderClass(member, className)", "deleteHeaderClass(member, className)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected", "onload", "tabSelected(selectedTab, tabname)", "relayout()", "onscroll(scrollTop, scrollLeft)", "oncheckboxclicked(isChecked, memberName)" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	} ];

	this.Type = function() {
	};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-ACCORDION", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function() {
	this.config.selecteds = [];//multiselect'ten dolayı dizi'ye çevirdim mahmuty 
};

BC.prototype.isSelected = function(tabName) {
	var selecteds = this.config.selecteds;
	for(var i=0; i<selecteds.length ;i++){
		if(selecteds[i] == tabName){
			return true;
		}
	}
	return false;
};

BC.prototype.hasVisibleItem = function() {
	return true;
};

BC.prototype.DRL = function() {
	var $accDiv = $("#" + this.config.id);
	if($accDiv.length == 0){
		return;
	}
	if(this.config.mainTab){
		var parentBF = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
		var myName = this.bf.$CS$.name;
		while (parentBF && (parentBF.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-PAGE" && parentBF.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-PAGEX")) {
			myName = parentBF.$CS$.name;
			parentBF = parentBF.$CS$.parent;
		}
		var otherHeights = 0;
		if (parentBF) {
			if(parentBF.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-HORIZONTAL" && parentBF.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-BALANCED-HOR" && typeof parentBF.bcRef.getChildContainer == "function"){
				for ( var childName in parentBF.members) {
					if (childName == myName) {
						continue;
					}
					var child = parentBF.members[childName];
					if (child.isVisible() && child.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-POPUP") {
						otherHeights += $$.outerHeight(parentBF.bcRef.getChildContainer(childName), false);
					}
				}
			}
			var $parent = $("#"+parentBF.getConfig().id);
			if($parent.height()){
				$accDiv.css("height", ($parent.height() - otherHeights) + "px");
				$accDiv.css("width", "100%");
				$accDiv.css("overflow", "auto");
			}
		}
	}
	
	var $$containerDiv = $$.child($accDiv[0], "div");
	var $$titleDivs = $$.getChildsHasClass($$containerDiv, "csc-acc-title");
	var containerWidth = $$containerDiv.offsetWidth;
	containerWidth = containerWidth - 140;
	for(var i=0; i<$$titleDivs.length ;i++){
		$$.getChildHasClass($$titleDivs[i], "csc-acc-title-text").style.width = containerWidth+"px";
		//$$.child($$titleDivs[i], "span").style.width = containerWidth+"px";
	}
	
	var containerHeight = this.setPanelHeight();
	
	this.bf.fire("relayout",containerWidth, containerHeight );
};

BC.prototype.getScrollPosition = function() {
	var bc = this;
	var $panelsDiv = $("[rel='"+bc.config.selecteds[0]+"-panel']", "#"+bc.config.id);
	return {
		top: $panelsDiv.scrollTop(),
		left: $panelsDiv.scrollLeft()
	};
};

BC.prototype.selectCheckbox = function(memberName, flag){
	/**
     * @description Eğer sekmelere checkbox eklenmişse (Accordion özelliklerinden Show Checkbox "Yes" ise) istenilen sekmenin checkbox'ı işaretlenir ya da işareti silinir.
     * @function selectCheckbox
     * @param {string} [memberName] checkbox'ı işaretlenecek ya da silinecek sekmenin adı tırnak içinde girilir.
     * @param {boolean} [flag] checkbox işaretlenecek ise true, işaret silinecek ise false girilir. 
     */
	var $$chbox = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-ch-" + memberName);
	if($$chbox){
		flag = flag === undefined ? true : flag;
		$$chbox.checked = flag;
	}
};

BC.prototype.addHeaderClass = function(member, className){
	/**
     * @description Herhangi bir member'ın başlığına özel css class eklemek için kullanılır.
     * @function addHeaderClass
     * @param {object} [member] Class eklenecek olan member bileşeni.
     * @param {string} [className] Eklenecek olan css class ismi 
     */
	if($$.byid(this.config.id)){
		var $$container = $$.byid(this.config.id).children[0];
		var $$header = $$.getChildsHasAttr($$container, "rel", member.getMemberName())[0];
		$$.addClass($$header, className);
		member.setConfig("layoutConfig.headerClass", className, false);
	}else {
		member.setConfig("layoutConfig.headerClass", className, true);
	}
}

BC.prototype.deleteHeaderClass = function(member, className){
	/**
     * @description Herhangi bir member'ın başlığından css class kaldırmak için kullanılır.
     * @function deleteHeaderClass
     * @param {object} [member] Class kaldırılacak olan member bileşeni.
     * @param {string} [className] Kaldırılacak olan css class ismi. 
     */
	if($$.byid(this.config.id)){
		var $$container = $$.byid(this.config.id).children[0];
		var $$header = $$.getChildsHasAttr($$container, "rel", member.getMemberName())[0];
		$$.rmClass($$header, className);
		member.setConfig("layoutConfig.headerClass", "", false);
	}else {
		member.setConfig("layoutConfig.headerClass", "", true);
	}
}

BC.prototype.appendNewMember = function(member, memberName, select) {
	if(!member.isVisible())
		return false;
	var bc = this;
	if (member.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP") {
		return;// popup ise çizme devam et
	}
	var $$accDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	var $$containerDiv = $$.child($$accDiv, "div");

	var bf = this.bf;
	var memConfig = member.getConfig();
	if (memConfig.title === undefined) {
		memConfig.title = "Accordion ";
	}
	var closeable = (memConfig.layoutConfig && memConfig.layoutConfig.closable !== undefined) ? memConfig.layoutConfig.closable : this.config.closable;
	
	var $$titleDiv = $$.create("div",{"rel": memberName},"csc-acc-title");
	var showCheckboxMember = (memConfig.layoutConfig && memConfig.layoutConfig.showCheckbox !== true) ? false : true;
	
	if(!memConfig.layoutConfig){ showCheckboxMember = false; }
	
	if(this.config.showCheckbox === true || showCheckboxMember){
		var floatx = (memConfig.layoutConfig && memConfig.layoutConfig.checkboxPosition) || this.config.checkboxPosition || "left";
		$$checkbox = $$.create("INPUT", {"id": this.config.id + "-ch-"+memberName, rel: memberName, "type":"checkbox"}, undefined, {"float":floatx});
		$$checkbox.onclick = function(event) {
			event.stopPropagation();
			bc.bf.fire("oncheckboxclicked", event.target.checked, this.getAttribute("rel"));
		};
		$$titleDiv.appendChild($$checkbox);
	}
	
	if (memConfig.layoutConfig && memConfig.layoutConfig.tabimage) {
		var $$img = $$.create("img",{"src": memConfig.layoutConfig.tabimage});
		$$titleDiv.appendChild($$img);
	}
	
	if(memConfig.layoutConfig && memConfig.layoutConfig.headerClass){
		$$.addClass($$titleDiv, memConfig.layoutConfig.headerClass);
	}
	
	var $$spanCount = $$.create("span",{"class":"csc-acc-count"});
	var $$spanTitle = $$.create("span",{"class":"csc-acc-title-text"});
	if(this.config.showItemCount){
		this.config.countCounter++;
		$$spanCount.innerHTML = this.config.countCounter + " ";
		$$titleDiv.appendChild($$spanCount);
	}
	$$spanTitle.innerHTML = memConfig.title;
	$$spanTitle.style.width = ($$containerDiv.offsetWidth-140)+"px";
	$$titleDiv.appendChild($$spanTitle);
	if (closeable) {
		var $$closeDiv = $$.create("div", null, "csc-acc-close");
		$$closeDiv.onclick = function(e) {
			e.stopPropagation();
			bf.close($(this).parent().attr("rel"));
			return false;
		};
		$$titleDiv.appendChild($$closeDiv);
	}
	if (!member.isDisabled()) {
		$$titleDiv.onclick = function(event) {
			if (event.which == 2) {// middle click, destroy tab
				event.preventDefault();
				bf.close(this.getAttribute("rel"));
				return false;
			}
			event.stopPropagation();
			var mname = this.getAttribute("rel");
			if(bc.config.multiSelect){
				bc.selectMulti(mname, !bc.isSelected(mname));
			}else{
				bf.select(mname);
			}
			return false;
		};
	} else {
		$$.addClass($$titleDiv, "disabled-acc");
	}
	$$containerDiv.appendChild($$titleDiv);

	var $$panelDiv = $$.create("div", {"rel": memberName + "-panel"}, "csc-acc-panel");
	$($$panelDiv).scroll(function(event) {
		console.log("acc on scroll");
		var top = $(this).scrollTop();
		bc.bf.fire("onscroll", top);
	});
	$$containerDiv.appendChild($$panelDiv);
	var $$contentDiv = $$.create("div", {"rel": memberName}, "csc-acc-content");
	$$panelDiv.appendChild($$contentDiv);

	BFEngine.render(member, $$contentDiv);
	if (select) {
		this.select(memberName);
	}
};

BC.prototype.setHeight = function(height){
	/**
     * @description Accordion panel'in sabit yüksekliğini belirler.
     * @function setHeight
     * @param {int} [height] accordion panel'in piksel cinsinden yüksekliği 
     */
	if(height === undefined || height === null){
		return;
	}
	if(typeof height == "number"){
		height = ""+height;
	}
	if(height.indexOf("px") < 0){
		height = height +"px";
	}
	if(!this.config.style){
		this.config.style = {};
	}
	this.config.style.height = height;
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf,config=bc.config;
	var $$accDiv = $$.create("div", {"id": config.id},["csc-accordion", config.cssClass], config.style);
	var $$accContainerDiv = $$.create("div",undefined,"csc-acc-container");
	$$accDiv.appendChild($$accContainerDiv);
	// set styles of container
	$$accDiv.style.display = config.visible ? "" : "none";
	// $accDiv.css(this.config.style || {});
	$container.appendChild($$accDiv);

	var selecteds = config.selecteds;
	// Render buttons section
	config.countCounter = 0;
	for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
		if (!selecteds.length) {
			selecteds = [memberName];
		}
		bc.appendNewMember(bf.members[memberName], memberName, false);
	}
	bc.DRL();
	for(var i=0; i<selecteds.length ;i++){
		bc.select(selecteds[i], config.multiSelect);
	}
	
//	if(bc.config.showScrollButtons === true ){
//	if(panelDiv.scrollHeight > $$.height(panelDiv) ){
	if(bc.config.showScrollTopButton === true && selecteds.length){
		var $$scrollButtonCont = $$.create("div", {id: config.id+"-scroll-button-cont"}, "csc-accordion-scroll-button-cont", undefined, $$accDiv);
		var $$scrollTopButton = $$.create("div", {title: "Yukarı", id: config.id+"-scroll-top-button"}, ["csc-accordion-scroll-top-button", "csc-accordion-scroll-button"], undefined, $$scrollButtonCont);
//		var $$scrollLeftButton = $$.create("div", {id: config.id+"-scroll-left-button"}, ["csc-accordion-scroll-left-button", "csc-accordion-scroll-button"], undefined, $$scrollButtonCont);
		$$scrollTopButton.onclick = function(){
			
			$("#"+bc.config.id+".csc-accordion .csc-acc-title.selected").each(function(){
				var panelDiv = $$.getChildHasAttr($$accContainerDiv, "rel", this.getAttribute("rel") + "-panel");
				if(panelDiv){
					panelDiv.scrollTop = 0;
				}
			});
		}
	}
//	}
};

BC.prototype.setPanelHeight = function($$accDiv, tabName) {
	if (!$$accDiv) {
		$$accDiv = $$.child($$.byid(this.config.id), "div");
	}
	if (!tabName) {
		tabName = this.config.selecteds[0];
	}
	if (!tabName) {
		return;
	}
	if(!this.config.mainTab && (!this.config.style || !this.config.style.height)){
		return;
	}
	var totalHeight = $$.innerHeight($$accDiv);
	var titleHeights = 0;
	var titleDivs = $$.getChildsHasClass($$accDiv, "csc-acc-title");
	for ( var i = 0; i < titleDivs.length; i++) {
		titleHeights += $$.outerHeight(titleDivs[i], true);
	}

	var panelDiv = $$.getChildHasAttr($$accDiv, "rel", tabName + "-panel");
	var popupDiv = $$.getChildHasAttr(panelDiv, "rel", tabName + "-popup");
	if(panelDiv){
		var height = (totalHeight - titleHeights);
		panelDiv.style.height =  height+ "px";
		return height;
	}
};

BC.prototype.selectMulti = function(tabName, select) {
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf,config=bc.config,selecteds=config.selecteds,found=false;
	for(var i=0; i<selecteds.length ;i++){
		if(selecteds[i] == tabName){
			found = true;
			if(!select){
				selecteds.splice(i, 1);
			}
			break;
		}
	}
	if(select && !found){
		selecteds.push(tabName);
	}
	var accDiv = $("#" + config.id).find(">div");
	var $$accDiv = accDiv[0];
	var titleDiv = $$.getChildHasAttr($$accDiv, "rel", tabName);
	if(!titleDiv){
		return;
	}
	var classList = titleDiv.className.split(' ');
	
	if(!select){	// seçilmiş
		$$.rmClass(titleDiv, "selected");
		$($$.getChildHasAttr($$accDiv, "rel", tabName + "-panel")).slideUp();
	}else{	// seçilmemiş
		$$.addClass(titleDiv, "selected");
		bc.setPanelHeight($$accDiv, tabName);
		
		$($$.getChildHasAttr($$accDiv, "rel", tabName + "-panel")).slideDown();
		BFEngine.DRL(bf.members[tabName]);
	}
		
	this.bf.fire("tabSelected", bf.members[tabName], tabName);
};

BC.prototype.select = function(tabName, multi, select) {
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf,config=bc.config,selecteds=config.selecteds;
	if(multi){
		bc.selectMulti(tabName, select == undefined ? true : select);
		return;
	}
	/**
     * @description Adı girilen sekme aşağıya kaydırılarak açık duruma gelir (içindeki elemanlarla beraber).
     * @function select
     * @param {string} [tabName] açık duruma gelecek sekmenin adı tırnak içinde verilir. 
     * @param [multi]
     * @param [select]
     */
	var oldSelected = selecteds[0];

	var accDiv = $("#" + config.id).find(">div");
	var $$accDiv = accDiv[0];

	if (oldSelected && oldSelected != tabName) {
		var selectedDiv = accDiv.find(">div.selected");
		selectedDiv.removeClass("selected");
		var titleDiv = $$.getChildHasAttr($$accDiv, "rel", tabName);
		$$.addClass(titleDiv, "selected");

		bc.setPanelHeight($$accDiv, tabName);
		var panelDiv = $$.getChildHasAttr($$accDiv, "rel", tabName + "-panel");
		$(panelDiv).slideDown();
		var oldPanelDiv = $$.getChildHasAttr($$accDiv, "rel", oldSelected + "-panel");
		$(oldPanelDiv).slideUp();
		BFEngine.DRL(bf.members[tabName]);
	} else {
		for (var member in bf.members) {
			if (member == tabName) {
				var titleDiv = $$.getChildHasAttr($$accDiv, "rel", tabName);
				$$.addClass(titleDiv, "selected");
				bc.setPanelHeight($$accDiv, tabName);
				var panelDiv = $$.getChildHasAttr($$accDiv, "rel", tabName + "-panel");
				if(panelDiv){
					panelDiv.style.display = "block";
				}
				BFEngine.DRL(this.bf.members[member]);
				
				break;
			}
		}
	}
	config.selecteds = [tabName];
	if (inDesigner(bf) && window.csd.changeConfig && oldSelected != tabName) {
		bf.members[tabName].fire("selected", undefined, true);// 3 parametre göndermesi designer için önemli. csd=>selectedElementCallback te
	}
	if (oldSelected != tabName) {
		bf.fire("tabSelected", bf.members[tabName], tabName);
	}
};

/**
 * @description Seçili sekmenin adını getirir.
 * @function getSelectedTabName
 **/
BC.prototype.getSelectedTabName = function() {
	return this.config.selecteds[0];
};

/**
 * Returns the the selected tab
 * @returns {*} selected tab
 */
BC.prototype.getSelectedTab = function () {
	var tabname = this.config.selecteds[0];
	return this.bf.members[tabname];
};

/**
 * @description Adı girilen sekme ekrandan kaldırılır (içindeki elemanlarla beraber).
 * @param {string} [tabName] ekrandan kaldırılacak sekmenin adı tırnak içinde verilir.
 * @function close
 */
BC.prototype.close = function(tabName) {
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf,config=bc.config;
	if (inDesigner(bf)) {
		return;
	}
	var newSelected = null;
	var previus = null, noPrevius = false;
	if(!config.multiSelect && config.selecteds[0] == tabName){
		for(var memberName in bf.members) {
			if (memberName == tabName) {
				if (previus) {
					break;
				}
				noPrevius = true;
				continue;
			}
			previus = memberName;
			if (noPrevius) {
				break;
			}
		}
		bf.removeMember(tabName);
		bc.select(previus || config.selecteds[0]);
	} else {
		bf.removeMember(tabName);
	}
	bc.DRL();
};


BC.prototype.addMember = function(name) {
	this.appendNewMember(this.bf.members[name], name, true);
};

BC.prototype.removeMember = function(name) {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	$acc = $("#" + config.id);
	$acc.find(">div>div[rel='" + name + "']").remove();
	$acc.find(">div>div[rel='" + name + "-panel']").remove();
	for(var i=0; i<config.selecteds.length ;i++){
		if(config.selecteds[i] == name){
			config.selecteds.splice(i, 1);
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.removeAll = function() {
	/**
     * @description Accordion'daki bütün sekmeler ekrandan kaldırılır (içindeki elemanlarla beraber).
     * @function removeAll
     */
	for(var memberName in this.bf.members){
		this.bf.removeMember(memberName);
	}
	this.DRL();
};

BC.prototype.load = function() {
	if (this.onloadcallback) {
		this.onloadcallback();
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "drop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "onload") {
		this.onloadcallback = callback;
	}
};



})(window);
/////=csc-button.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-BUTTON
 * @classdesc Temel buton componenti.
 * @author Mahmut Yıldız
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		focusable: true,
		style:{
			buttonManifest:"none",
			buttonIcon:"none"
		}
	};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.LABEL = "Button"; 
	this.METHODS = [ "setTitle(title)", "setTips(tips)", "setIcon(iconPath)", "focus" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected" ];
	this.DISABLE_EVENTS = [];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
}
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-BUTTON", def);

var BC = def.Type;

/**
 * @function focus
 * @description focus to button
 */
BC.prototype.focus = function(){

	$$txt = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$txt){
		$$txt.focus();
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config, style=config.style||{}, css={width:style.width, height: style.height};
	var bfname = bf.getBusinessName();
	var title = (config.title === undefined || config.title === null) ? "Button" :  config.title;
	var $$divOuter = $$.create("DIV", null,"csc-button-outer", {width: style.width});
	css.width = css.width && (""+css.width).indexOf("%")>0 ? "100%" : css.width;
	css.height = css.height && (""+css.height).indexOf("%")>0 ? "100%" : css.height;
	var $$input = $$.create("INPUT", {type: "button", id:config.id, title : config.tips, "tabindex": config.tabIndex, value : title, disabled : (bf.isDisabled() && !config.runOnDisabled)}, ["csc-button", config.cssClass], css);
	$$input.setAttribute("rel",bf.$CS$.name);
	$$divOuter.style.display = inDesigner(bf) || config.visible ? "" : "none";
	if(bf.isDisabled() && !config.runOnDisabled){
		$$divOuter.classList.add("csc-button-outer--disabled");
	}
	if(config.theme){
		$$.addClass($$input, "csc-button-theme "+config.theme);
	}

	if(config.buttonType){
		$$.addClass($$divOuter, "csc-button-type "+config.buttonType);
	}
	if(style.buttonManifest!="none"){
		$$.addClass($$input,"btn--"+style.buttonManifest);
		$$.addClass($$divOuter,"csc-button__btn--"+style.buttonManifest);
	}
	if(style.buttonIcon!="none"){
		$$.addClass($$divOuter,"csc-button--with-icon");
		var buttonIconElement=$$.create("I", null, "fa "+style.buttonIcon);
		$$divOuter.appendChild(buttonIconElement);
	}
	
	if(config.icon) {
		$$.css($$input, {
			backgroundImage : "url('" + SideModuleManager.getResourceUrl(bfname.substring(0, bfname.indexOf(".")), config.icon )+ "')",
			paddingLeft : "28px",
			backgroundPosition : "4px center",
			backgroundRepeat : "no-repeat"
		});
		$$.addClass($$input, "csc-button-icon");
	}
	if(config.tooltip){//HTML tooltip
		$$.addClass($$divOuter, "csc-tooltip-div");
		var $$img = $$.create("IMG", {src: "css/bc-style/img/ucgen-beyaz.png"}, "csc-tooltip-img");
		var $$span = $$.create("SPAN", null, "csc-tooltip-span");
		$$span.innerHTML = config.tooltip;
		$$divOuter.appendChild($$input);
		$$divOuter.appendChild($$img);
		$$divOuter.appendChild($$span);
	} else {
		$$divOuter.appendChild($$input);
	}
	$container.appendChild($$divOuter);
};

/**
 * @function setTitle
 * @description Butonun üstünde yazan yazıyı ayarlar.
 * @param [title] Butonun üstünde yer alacak yazı
 */
BC.prototype.setTitle = function(title) {
	var config=this.config;
	config.title = title || "";
	var $$input = $$.byid(config.id);
	if($$input){
		$$input.setAttribute("value", config.title);
	}
};

/**
 * @function setTips
 * @description Butonun üstüne gelip bekleyince beliren ipucunu ayarlar.
 * @param [tips] Butonun üstünde beliren ipucu
 */
BC.prototype.setTips = function(tips) {
	var config=this.config;
	config.tips = tips || "";
	var $$input = $$.byid(config.id);
	if($$input){
		$$input.setAttribute("title", config.tips);
	}
};

/**
 * @function setIcon
 * @description Butonu ikon olarak ayarlar.
 * @param [iconPath] Butonun yerine ayarlanacak ikonun hangi lokasyondan alınacağı
 */
BC.prototype.setIcon = function(iconPath) {
	this.config.icon = iconPath;
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	var bc=this, config=bc.config;
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = $$.byid(config.id);
		if (dom) {
			dom.onclick = function(event){
				SIDENavigator.setEvent(event);
				var now = new Date().getTime();
				if(!bc.lastClickedTime || (now - bc.lastClickedTime) > 300 ){
					bc.lastClickedTime = now;
					callback(event);
				}else{
					console.log("[csc-button] Duplicate click prevented.");
				}
			};
		}
	}
};

})(window);
/////=csc-dropdown-button.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-BUTTON
 * @classdesc Temel buton componenti. 
 * @author Mahmut Yıldız
 * */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
			menuPlace: "bl"
	};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.LABEL = "Dropdown Button"; 

	this.METHODS = [ "setTitle(title)", "setContextMenu(contextMenu)", "isChecked", "setChecked(flag)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected", "checkChanged(checked)" ];
	this.DISABLE_EVENTS = [];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
}
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-DROPDOWN-BUTTON", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.setContextMenu = function(contextMenu){
	this.ctxmenu = contextMenu;
};

BC.prototype.isChecked = function(){
	return this.config.checked;
};

BC.prototype.setChecked = function(flag){
	if(flag === undefined){
		flag = true;
	}
	this.config.checked = flag;
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id+"-ch");
	if($$dom){
		$$dom.checked = flag;
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc = this;
	var title = this.config.title || "";
	var $$a = $$.create("A", {id:this.config.id, href:"#", title : this.config.tips}, ["csc-dropdown-button", this.config.cssClass], this.config.style);
	if(this.config.check){
		var $$checkbox = $$.create("INPUT", {type: "checkbox", id:this.config.id+"-ch"});
		if(this.config.checked){
