	$container.appendChild($$vertContainer);

	// append members into container
	for ( var memberName in this.bf.members) {
		var member = this.bf.members[memberName];

		if (member.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP") {
			continue;// popup ise çizme devam et
		}
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf) && !member.hasVisibleItem()) {
			continue;
		}

		var memberConfig = member.getConfig();
		var $$rowDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "csc-balanced-ver-row");
		var $$labelDiv = null, $$elementDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "csc-ver-cell");
		var labelPosition = memberConfig.labelPosition === "inherited" ? this.config.labelPosition : (memberConfig.labelPosition || this.config.labelPosition);

		if (labelPosition != "none") {
			$$labelDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, ["csc-form-label", memberConfig.label_class]);
			if (memberConfig.label) {
				var label = memberConfig.label;
				if(labelPosition != "right"){
					label = label + ":";
				}
				$$labelDiv.innerHTML = label;
			}
		}

		if (labelPosition == "left") {
			$$.addClass($$labelDiv, "csc-ver-cell");
			$$.css($$labelDiv, "text-align", "right");
			$$rowDiv.appendChild($$labelDiv);
			$$rowDiv.appendChild($$elementDiv);
			$$vertTable.appendChild($$rowDiv);
			if (this.config.horAlign == "left") {
				$$.css($$elementDiv, "width", "100%");
			} else if (this.config.horAlign == "center") {
				$$.css($$elementDiv, "text-align", "left");
			} else {
				$$.css($$labelDiv, "width", "100%");

			}
		} else if (labelPosition == "top") {
			$$.addClass($$labelDiv, "csc-ver-cell");
			$$vertTable.appendChild($$labelDiv);
			$$vertTable.appendChild($$elementDiv);
		} else if (labelPosition == "right") {
			var $$containerDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "csc-ver-row");
			$$.css($$labelDiv, "textAlign", "left");
			$$containerDiv.appendChild($$elementDiv);
			$$containerDiv.appendChild($$labelDiv);
			$$vertTable.appendChild($$containerDiv);
		} else {// label position == none
			$$rowDiv.appendChild($$elementDiv);
			$$vertTable.appendChild($$rowDiv);
		}

		if (member.isRequired() && (!this.bf.isDisabled() && !member.isDisabled())) {
			$$.addClass($$elementDiv, "csc-required");
		}

		BFEngine.render(member, $$elementDiv);
	}
	
	if (this.config.collapsible === true) {
		if(this.collapsed){
			this.collapse();
		} else {
			this.expand();
		}
	}
	
	this.applyAddedClasses();//Apply css classes added by user
	
	if(this.config.maskIt){
		this.mask();
	}
};

BC.prototype.load = function() {
	if (this.onloadcallback) {
		this.onloadcallback();
	}
};

BC.prototype.collapse = function() {
	/**
     * @description Paneli sadece başlığı gözükecek şekilde (varsa) kapatır. 
     * @function collapse
     */
	var $$container = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(this.config.titleType == "fieldset" || this.config.titleType == "bfieldset"){
		var $$fieldset = $$.child($$container,"fieldset");
		$$.toggleClass($$.child($$fieldset, "legend"), "expand", "collapse");//-------------> legend'in class'ını değiştir
		$$.toggleClass($$fieldset, "expanded", "collapsed");//-------------> fieldset'in class'ını değiştir TODO: legend'de eklenmiş sınıf yerine fieldset'i kullan ve gerecek css değişikliğini tüm temalarda yap.
		$$.css($$.getChildHasClass($$fieldset, "csc-balanced-ver-table"), "display", "none");//-----> içeriği kapat
		$$.css($$fieldset, "height", 0);
	} else if(this.config.titleType == "window"){
		var $$ins = $$.query($$container, [{tagName: "DIV", clazz: "csc-form-title"}, {tagName: "INS"}]);
		$$.toggleClass($$ins, "expand", "collapse");//--------------------------------------> legend'in class'ını değiştir
		$$.css($$.getChildHasClass($$container, "csc-balanced-ver-table"), "display", "none");//----> içeriği kapat
	}
	
	this.collapsed = true;
};

BC.prototype.expand = function() {
	/**
     * @description Kapalı paneli, içerdiği elemanlar gözükecek şekilde aşağıya doğru açar. Açık panelde bir değişiklik yapmaz.
     * @function expand
     */
	var $$container = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(this.config.titleType == "fieldset" || this.config.titleType == "bfieldset"){
		var $$fieldset = $$.child($$container,"fieldset");
		$$.toggleClass($$.child($$fieldset, "legend"), "collapse", "expand");//-------------> legend'in class'ını değiştir
		$$.toggleClass($$fieldset, "collapsed", "expanded");//-------------> fieldset'in class'ını değiştir TODO: legend'de eklenmiş sınıf yerine fieldset'i kullan ve gerecek css değişikliğini tüm temalarda yap.
		$$.css($$.getChildHasClass($$fieldset, "csc-balanced-ver-table"), "display", "");//-----> içeriği kapat
		if($$fieldset){
			$$fieldset.style.height = "";
		}
	} else if(this.config.titleType == "window"){
		var $$ins = $$.query($$container, [{tagName: "DIV", clazz: "csc-form-title"}, {tagName: "INS"}]);
		$$.toggleClass($$ins, "collapse", "expand");//--------------------------------------> legend'in class'ını değiştir
		$$.css($$.getChildHasClass($$container, "csc-balanced-ver-table"), "display", "");//----> içeriği kapat
	}
	
	this.collapsed = false;
};

BC.prototype.mask = function(message) {
	/**
	 * @function mask
     * @description Panele bir mesaj içeren koyu renkli "Yükleniyor" maskesi koymaya yarar.
     * @param [message] Maskenin üstünde yazan mesaj
     */
	var id = this.config.id;

	var $$gen = $$.byid(id);
	if(!$$gen){
		this.config.maskIt = true;
		return;
	}
	
	var $$maskDiv = $$.create("DIV",{"id": id + "-mask"}, "maskDiv", {"width": $$.innerWidth($$gen)+"px", "height": $$.innerHeight($$gen)+"px"});

	var $$loadingDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "maskedLoadInfo");

	var $$img = $$.create("IMG", {"src": "css/bc-style/img/loadmaskicon.gif"});
	var $$span = $$.create("SPAN");
	$$span.innerHTML = message;
	
	$$loadingDiv.appendChild($$img);
	$$loadingDiv.appendChild($$span);
	$$maskDiv.appendChild($$loadingDiv);
	
	var $$parent = $$gen.parentNode;
	$$parent.insertBefore($$maskDiv, $$gen);
	
	$$.css($$loadingDiv, {"margin-left": $$.innerWidth($$gen) / 2 - $$.innerWidth($$loadingDiv) / 2+"px", "margin-top": $$.innerHeight($$gen) / 2 - $$.innerHeight($$loadingDiv) / 2+"px"});
};

BC.prototype.unmask = function() {
	/**
     * @description Panele konulan mesaj içerikli maskeyi kaldırmaya yarar.
     * @function unmask
     */
	$$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id+"-mask");
	$$.remove($$dom);
	this.config.maskIt = undefined;
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	}else if (eventName == "oncontextmenu") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.oncontextmenu = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "drop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "onload") {
		this.onloadcallback = callback;
	} else if (eventName == "onEnterPressed") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onkeypress = function(e) {
				if (e.keyCode == 13) {
					callback();
				}
			};
		}
	}
};


})(window);
/////=csc-link.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-link
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled : false,
		cls : "csc-link",
		value : "link"
	};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.LABEL = "Link";
	this.METHODS = [ "setLink(link)", "getLink", "setHref(href)", "getHref" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected" ];
	this.DISABLE_EVENTS = [ "selected" ];

	this.Type = function() {};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-LINK", def);

var BC = def.Type;

/**
 * @function getLink
 * @description Bağlantıda yazan metni getirir.
 */
BC.prototype.getLink = function() {
	return this.config.title;
};

/**
 * @function setLink
 * @description Bağlantının metnini ayarlar.
 * @param [title] Bağlantıda yazan metin.
 */
BC.prototype.setLink = function(title) {
	this.config.title = (title === undefined ? "" : title);
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if ($$dom) {
		$$dom.innerHTML = title;
	}
};

/**
 * @function setHref
 * @description Bağlantının gideceği adresi ayarlar.
 * @param [href] Bağlantının gideceği adres.
 */
BC.prototype.setHref = function(href) {
	var disabled = this.bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : "";
	if((disabled || disabled != "") && !this.config.runOnDisabled){
		return;
	}
	this.config.href = href || "#";
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if ($$dom) {
		$$.attr($$dom, {href: href, target: "_blank"});
	}
};

/**
 * @function getHref
 * @description Bağlantının gideceği adresi getirir.
 */
BC.prototype.getHref = function() {
	return this.config.href;
};

BC.prototype.setValue = function(title) {
	if(title !== undefined){
		this.setLink(title);
	}
};

BC.prototype.getText = function() {
	return this.config.title;
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config,bf=bc.bf;
	var value = (config.title === undefined ? "" : config.title);
	var disabled = bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : "";
	var fontWeight = config.fontWeight || "";
	var fontSize = config.fontSize || "";
	var italic = config.italic || "";
	// create link
	var $$a = $$.create("A", {"href": "#", id: config.id, title: config.tips}, [config.cls, config.cssClass], {"font-weight": fontWeight});
	$$a.innerHTML = value;
	if(!inDesigner(bf) && config.href){
		$$.attr($$a, {href: config.href, target: "_blank" });
	}
	
	// Design Time da visible yap
	if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		$$a.style.display = "";
	}
	if(config.style && config.style.width){
		$$.css($$a, {width: config.style.width, display: "inline-block"});
	}

	// Italic mi kontrol et
	if (italic) {
		$$a.style.fontStyle = "italic";
	}
	if (fontSize != "") {
		$$a.style.fontSize = fontSize + "px";
	}

	if((disabled || disabled != "") && !config.runOnDisabled){
		$$.addClass($$a, "csc-link-disabled");
		$$.rmAttr($$a, "href");
	}
	$container.appendChild($$a);
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if ($$dom) {
			$$dom.onclick = function(e){
				e.preventDefault();
				callback();
			};
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-calendar.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** 
 * @class CSC-CALENDAR 
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Calendar"; 

	this.METHODS = [ "highlightDate(dates)", "getDate", "getDates()", "disableDates(baseDate, beforeDayNum, afterDayNum)", "setMinDate(date)", "setMaxDate(date)", "setDates(dates)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed(highlight)", "selected(event)", "yearMonthChanged(year, month)", "onload" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	}, {
		name : "JQuery-UI",
		version : "1.10.4"
	}, {
		name : "multidatespicker",
		version : "1.0"
	} ];

	this.Type = function() {
		this.highDates = [];
	};
};
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-CALENDAR", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
	return this.config.value;
};

BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
	this.config.value = value;
};

BC.prototype.load = function(value) {
	this.bf.fire("onload");
};

/**
 * @function setMinDate
 * @description Takvim için seçilebilecek alt limiti ayarlar. Bu tarihten önceki günler görüntülenmez ya da deaktif olur.
 * @param [date] Date nesnesi türündedir.
 */
BC.prototype.setMinDate = function(date) {
	var dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	$(dom).datepicker( "option", "minDate", date );
};

/**
 * @function setMaxDate
 *	@description Takvim için seçilebilecek üst limiti ayarlar. Bu tarihten sonraki günler görüntülenmez ya da deaktif olur.
 * @param [date] Date nesnesi türündedir.
 */
BC.prototype.setMaxDate = function(date) {
	var dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	$(dom).datepicker( "option", "maxDate", date );
};

/**
 * @function disableDates
 * @description Takvimde seçili aralıktaki tarihleri deaktif hale getirir.
 * @param [baseDate] Hedef gün. dd/mm/yyyy formatında string türündedir.
 * @param {int} [beforeDayNum=0] Hedef tarihten önce deaktif edilecek gün sayısı.
 * @param {int} [afterDayNum=0]  Hedef tarihten sonra deaktif edilecek gün sayısı.
 */
BC.prototype.disableDates = function(baseDate, beforeDayNum, afterDayNum) {
	this.config.disableDates = true;
	this.config.disableBefore = beforeDayNum;
	this.config.disableBase = baseDate;
	this.config.disableAfter = afterDayNum;
	
	var baseDate = SIDEDateUtil.getDateObjFromString(this.config.disableBase);
	this.disabledDates = [baseDate.getTime()];
	for(var i=0; i<this.config.disableBefore; i++){
		baseDate.setDate(baseDate.getDate()-1);
		this.disabledDates.push(baseDate.getTime());
	}
	baseDate = SIDEDateUtil.getDateObjFromString(this.config.disableBase);
	
	for(var i=0; i<this.config.disableAfter; i++){
		baseDate.setDate(baseDate.getDate()+1);
		this.disabledDates.push(baseDate.getTime());
	}
	
	var $tarih = $("#"+this.config.id);
	$tarih.datepicker( "refresh" );
};

BC.prototype.destroybc = function(){
	$("#" + this.config.id).datepicker("destroy").off();
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var disabled = this.bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : "";
	var numberofmonths = 1;
	if (this.config.numberOfMonths) {
		numberofmonths = this.config.numberOfMonths;
	}
	var $tarih = $("<div>").attr({
		id : this.config.id
	});
	
	$tarih.css("display", this.config.visible ? "" : "none");
	$tarih.css(this.config.style || {});// Style altındaki // herşeyi ver
	$tarih.addClass("csc-calendar").addClass(this.config.cssClass);

	// Design Time da visible yap
	if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		$tarih.css("display", "");
	}

	$container.appendChild($tarih[0]);

	var bc = this;
	
	var settings = {
			beforeShowDay : function(date) {
				if(bc.config.rejectWeekend){
					if($.datepicker.noWeekends(date)){
						return $.datepicker.noWeekends(date)
					}
				}
				if(bc.config.rejectSunday){
					if (date.getDay() === 0) {
						return false;
					}
				}
				var dateArray = bc.highDates;
				for ( var i = 0; dateArray.length && i < dateArray.length; i++) {
					if(typeof dateArray[i] == "object" && !(dateArray[i] instanceof Date)){
						if (date.getDate() == dateArray[i].date.getDate() && date.getMonth() == dateArray[i].date.getMonth() && date.getYear() == dateArray[i].date.getYear()) {
							return [ true, dateArray[i].clazz, dateArray[i].tips ];
						}
					} else {
						if (date.getDate() == dateArray[i].getDate() && date.getMonth() == dateArray[i].getMonth() && date.getYear() == dateArray[i].getYear()) {
							return [ true, "special" ];
						}
					}
				}
				
				if(bc.config.disableDates){
					for(var i=0; i<bc.disabledDates.length; i++){
						if(date.getTime() === bc.disabledDates[i])
							return [ false ];
					}
				}
				
				return [ true, '', '' ];
			},
			onSelect: function(date, dateObj){
				
				var dateArray = bc.highDates, highlight;console.log(dateArray);
				for ( var i = 0; dateArray.length && i < dateArray.length; i++) {
					if(typeof dateArray[i] == "object" && !(dateArray[i] instanceof Date)){
						if (dateObj.currentDay == dateArray[i].date.getDate() && dateObj.currentMonth == dateArray[i].date.getMonth() && dateObj.currentYear == dateArray[i].date.getFullYear()) {
							highlight = dateArray[i].clazz;
						}
					} else {
						if (dateObj.currentDay == dateArray[i].getDate() && dateObj.currentMonth == dateArray[i].getMonth() && dateObj.currentYear == dateArray[i].getFullYear()) {
							highlight = dateArray[i].clazz;
						}
					}
				}
				bc.bf.fire("changed", highlight);
			},
			onChangeMonthYear: function(year, month){
				bc.bf.fire("yearMonthChanged", year, month);
			},
			numberOfMonths : parseInt(numberofmonths, 10),
			yearRange: this.config.yearRange
		};
	
	if(this.config.multiSelectable){
		$tarih.multiDatesPicker(settings);
	}else{
		$tarih.datepicker(settings);
	}
	if(this.dates){
		this.setDates(this.dates);
	}
};

/**
 * @function getDate
 * @description Seçilen ya da en son seçilmiş tarihi Date nesnesi türünde döner.
 */
BC.prototype.getDate = function() {
	var $tarih = $("#" + this.config.id);
	var result =$tarih.datepicker("getDate");
	if(result.getDate){//is date obj
		return result;
	}
	return null;
};

/**
 * @function setDates
 * @description Takvim multiselectable ise verilen tarihlerin hepsini tavkimde seçilmiş hale getirir. multiselectable değil ise sadece ilk değer seçilmiş hale getirilir.
 * @param [dates] yyyymmdd formatında string dizisidir. Ayarlanmak istenilen tarihlerdir.
 */
BC.prototype.setDates = function(dates) {
	var $tarih = $("#" + this.config.id);
	if(this.config.multiSelectable){
		if(!dates.length){
			return;
		}
		for(var i=0; i<dates.length; i++){
			dates[i] = SIDEDateUtil.getDateObjFromString(dates[i], "yyyymmdd");
		}
		$tarih.multiDatesPicker('addDates', dates);
	}else{
		if(typeof dates === "string"){
			$tarih.datepicker( "setDate", SIDEDateUtil.getDateObjFromString(dates, "yyyymmdd") );
		}else if(dates instanceof Date) {
			$tarih.datepicker( "setDate", dates);
		}else {
			$tarih.datepicker( "setDate", SIDEDateUtil.getDateObjFromString(dates[0], "yyyymmdd") );
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.saveState = function() {
	this.dates = this.config.multiSelectable ? this.getDates() : this.getDate();
};

/**
 * @function getDates
 * @description MultiSelectable Takvimde seçilmiş olan günlerin tarihini string dizisi olarak verir.
 * @param [dateFormat] default="yyyymmdd" Seçilen tarihlerin formatını tamınlar.
 */
BC.prototype.getDates = function(dateFormat) {
	var $tarih = $("#" + this.config.id);
	var dates = $tarih.multiDatesPicker("getDates", "object");
	var results = [];
	for(var i=0; i<dates.length; i++){
		results[i] = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDateByDate(dates[i], dateFormat || "yyyymmdd");
	}
	return results;
};

BC.prototype.highlightDate = function(dateArray) {
	var bc = this, highDatesStack = [];
	if(!Array.isArray(dateArray)){
		dateArray = [dateArray];
	}
	bc.highDates = bc.highDates.concat(dateArray);
	for(var i=0; i<bc.highDates.length; i++) {
		highDatesStack.push(bc.highDates[i].toString());
	}
		
	this.bf.rerender();
};

BC.prototype.clear = function(dateArray) {
	this.highDates = [];
	BFEngine.reRender(this.bf);
};


BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
				dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-tarih.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** 
 * @class CSC-TARIH
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		cls : "csc-tarih",
		focusable: true,
		disabledKey: "disabled"
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Date";

	this.METHODS = [ "setMaxDate(date)", "setMinDate(date)", "setTips(tips)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed", "selected" , "beforeShow"];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	}, {
		name : "JQuery-UI",
		version : "1.10.4"
	}, {
		name : "JQuery.maskedinput",
		version : "1.3"
	}, {
		name : "jquery-ui-timepicker",
		version : "1.3"
	}, {
		name : "ui.datepicker-tr",
		version : "1.0"
	}];
	this.Type = function() {};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-TARIH", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function(){
	//ddf -> Default date format
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	bc.ddf = "dd/mm/yyyy";
	if (!config.dateFormat) {
    	var LOCAL_MAP ={
    		tr:{
    		 dateFormat:"dd/mm/yyyy",
    		},
    		en:{
    	 	 dateFormat:"mm/dd/yyyy",
    		},
    		az:{
    		 dateFormat:"dd.mm.yyyy"
    		},
    	}
    	var locale = SSession.getAny("LOCALE_DATE", "LOCALE") || window.sideLang;
    	config.dateFormat = LOCAL_MAP[locale].dateFormat|| bc.ddf;
    }
	if(config.onlyMY){
		config.dateFormat = "mm/yyyy";
		config.returnFormat = "mmyyyy";
	}
	if(config.initToday){
		config.value = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDateByDate(new Date(), config.dateFormat || bc.ddf);
	}
	bc.emptyMask =  (config.dateFormat || bc.ddf).replace("yyyy", "____").replace("mm", "__").replace("dd", "__");
};

BC.prototype.setMaxDate = function(date) {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	if(!(date instanceof Date)){
		date = SIDEDateUtil.getDateObjFromString(date, "yyyymmdd");
	}
	config.maxDate = date;
	var $tarih = $( "#date-"+config.id );
	if($tarih){
		$tarih.datepicker( "option", "maxDate", config.maxDate );
	}
};

BC.prototype.focus = function(){
	$$txt = $$.byid("date-" + this.config.id);
	if($$txt){
		$$txt.focus();
	}
};

BC.prototype.setMinDate = function(date) {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	if(!(date instanceof Date)){
		date = SIDEDateUtil.getDateObjFromString(date, "yyyymmdd");
	}
	config.minDate = date;
	
	var $tarih = $( "#date-"+config.id );
	if($tarih){
		$tarih.datepicker( "option", "minDate", config.minDate );
	}
};

BC.prototype.getValue = function(returnFormat) {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config,value = bc.getText();
	if(value.indexOf('_') >= 0 ){//mask geliyor
		return "";
	}
	if (stringTrim(value) == "" || !config.returnFormat || config.returnFormat == "same") {
		return value;
	}
	return SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(value, config.dateFormat || bc.ddf, returnFormat || config.returnFormat || config.dateFormat || bc.ddf);
};

BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	if (value === undefined || value === null) {
		value = "";
	}
	
	var format = config.dateFormat;
	if(config.returnFormat){
		if(config.returnFormat == "same"){
			format = config.dateFormat || bc.ddf || config.returnFormat;
			config.returnFormat = format;
		}else{
			format = config.returnFormat;
		}
	};

	// Date Valid değilse hata mesajı atıp dön;
	if (stringTrim(value) != "" && !SIDEDateUtil.isValidDate(value, format)) {
		return;
	}

	config.value = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(value, config.returnFormat, config.dateFormat || bc.ddf);
	var domObject = byid("date-" + config.id);
	if (domObject) {
		domObject.value = config.value;
		if(config.value == ""){
			$(domObject).trigger("clearmask");
		}
	} else {// readonly durumunu kontrol et
		var domObject = byid(config.id);
		if (domObject) {
			domObject.innerHTML = config.value;
		}
	}
	
	var activeChangedEvent = SideDefaults[SideModuleManager.getLocalModuleName()]["support-changed-event-on-setvalue"];
	if( activeChangedEvent || activeChangedEvent == "true" ){
		bc.bf.fire("changed");
	}
};

BC.prototype.saveState = function() {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	var $$dom=byid("date-" + config.id) || byid(config.id);
	if (!$$dom) {
		return;
	}
	config.value = bc.getText();
};

BC.prototype.getText = function() {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	var $$dom=byid("date-" + config.id);
	var value = config.value || "";
	if ($$dom) {
		value = $$dom.value;
	} else {// readonly durumunu kontrol et
		$$dom = byid(config.id);
		if ($$dom) {
			value = $$dom.innerHTML;
		}
	}
	return value;
};

BC.prototype.destroybc = function(){
	var bc=this, config=bc.config;
	var $tarih = $("#date-" + config.id);
	if(!bc.selectEvent && $tarih.datepicker("widget").is(":visible")){
		bc.fireDestroy=true;
		bc.destroys = bc.destroys || [];
		bc.destroys.push($tarih);
		return;
	}
	if(bc.selectEvent){
		window.setTimeout(function(){
			for(var i=0; bc.destroys && i<bc.destroys.length ;i++){
				bc.destroys[i].datepicker("destroy").unmask().off();
			}
			bc.destroys = [];
		}, 1);
	} else {
		$tarih.datepicker("destroy").unmask().off();
	}
};

/**
 * @function setTips
 * @description Başlığın üstüne gelip bekleyince beliren ipucunu ayarlar.
 * @param [tips] Butonun üstünde beliren ipucu
 **/
BC.prototype.setTips = function(tips) {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	config.tips = tips || "";
	var $$p = $$.byid(config.id);
	if($$p){
		$$p.setAttribute("title", config.tips);
	}
};
BC.prototype.ordinal_suffix_of = function (i) {
	var bc = this, config = bc.config;
	var j = i % 10,
		k = i % 100;
	if (j == 1 && k != 11) {
		return "st";
	}
	if (j == 2 && k != 12) {
		return "nd";
	}
	if (j == 3 && k != 13) {
		return "rd";
	}
	return "th";
}
BC.prototype.humanViewChangeFormat = function () {
	var bc = this, config = bc.config;
	if(!config.value){
		return "";
	}

	var date = SDate.getDateObjFromString(config.value, config.returnFormat);
	var d =new Date();
	var months = [SideMLManager.get("common.january"), SideMLManager.get("common.february"), SideMLManager.get("common.march"),
	SideMLManager.get("common.april"), SideMLManager.get("common.may"), SideMLManager.get("common.june"),
	SideMLManager.get("common.july"), SideMLManager.get("common.august"), SideMLManager.get("common.september"),
	SideMLManager.get("common.october"), SideMLManager.get("common.november"), SideMLManager.get("common.december")];

	if (window.sideLang == "en") {
		return months[d.getMonth()] + " " + date.getDate() + this.ordinal_suffix_of(date.getDate()) + " " + date.getFullYear();
	}
	else {
		return date.getDate() + " " + months[d.getMonth()] + " " + date.getFullYear();
	}
};
BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this,bf=bc.bf,config=bc.config,readonly=bf.isReadonly();
	var value = config.value || "";
	if (readonly) {
		var $$tarih = $$.create("SPAN",{"id": config.id},"csc-rospan");
		if (value) {
			$$tarih.innerHTML = value;
		}
		if (inDesigner(bf)) {
			$$tarih.innerHTML = "01/01/1901";
		}
		if(config.cssClass){
			$$.addClass($$tarih, config.cssClass);
		}
		if(config.tips){
			$$.attr($$tarih, "title", config.tips);
		}
		$container.appendChild($$tarih);
		if (config.readonlyFormat == "human-view") {
        			$$tarih.innerHTML = this.humanViewChangeFormat();
        }
	} else {
		var disabled = bf.isDisabled();
		var dateFormat = config.dateFormat || bc.ddf;
		var $$tarihDiv = $$.create("DIV", {id: config.id},"csc-tarih-container");
		if (config.style && config.style.width) {
			var size = config.style.width.split("px")[0];
			size = parseInt(size, 10) + 24;
			$$tarihDiv.style.minWidth = size + "px";
			$$tarihDiv.style.width = size + "px";
		}
		
		if(config.tips){
			$$.attr($$tarihDiv, "title", config.tips);
		}
		var placeHolder = config.placeholder;
		if(config.placeholder == "auto"){
			placeHolder = dateFormat;
			if(window.sideLang == "tr"){
				placeHolder = placeHolder.replace("dd","gg").replace("mm","aa");
			}
		}
		
		var $$tarih = $$.create("INPUT", {id : "date-" + config.id, placeholder: placeHolder,"tabindex": config.tabIndex, type : "text", value : value}, ["csc-tarih", config.cssClass], config.style);
		if(disabled || config.onlyPicker){
			$$tarih.setAttribute(config.disabledKey,config.disabledKey);
		}
		$$tarihDiv.style.display = config.visible ? "" : "none";
		
		if(bf.isRequired()){
			$$.addClass($$tarih, "csc-required");
		}
		$$tarihDiv.appendChild($$tarih);
		$container.appendChild($$tarihDiv);
		
		if (!disabled) {
			// Create DatePicker
			var $tarih = $($$tarih);
			$tarih.datepicker({
				showOn : "button",
				buttonImage : "css/bc-style/img/tarih.png",
				buttonImageOnly : true,
				buttonText: config.tips || "",
				yearRange: config.yearRange,
				reverseYearRange: config.reverseYears,
				showButtonPanel: true,
				onSelect: function(date){
					if(config.onlyMY){
						return;
					}
					$tarih.val(date);
					bc.blurFired = true;
					$tarih.blur();
					delete bc.blurFired;
					bf.fire("selected");
					bc.selectEvent =true;
					if(bc.fireDestroy) {
						bc.destroybc();
					}
					bc.selectEvent =false;
				},
				beforeShow: function(){
					if(config.onlyMY){
						$("#ui-datepicker-div").addClass("csc-tarih-no-days");
					}
					bf.fire("beforeShow");
				},
				onClose: function(){
					if(config.onlyMY){
						var month = $("#ui-datepicker-div .ui-datepicker-month :selected").val();
						var year = $("#ui-datepicker-div .ui-datepicker-year :selected").val();
						month = parseInt(month, 10) +1;
						if(month < 10){
							month = "0"+month;
						}
						$tarih.datepicker('option', 'defaultDate', new Date(year, month-1, 1));
						$tarih.val(month+"/"+year);
						bc.blurFired = true;
						$tarih.blur();
						delete bc.blurFired;
						$("#ui-datepicker-div").removeClass("csc-tarih-no-days");
					}
				}
			});
			
			
			if(config.immError){
				$$.bindEvent($$tarih, "blur", function(){
					if($tarih.datepicker("widget").is(":visible")){
						return;
					}
					var value = $$tarih.value;
					if(value == "" || value == bc.emptyMask){
						$$tarih.value = "";
						return;
					}
					var error = bc.validate();
					if(error){
						$$tarih.value = "";
						setMask();
						CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(error);
					}
				});
			}
			
			$tarih.focus(function(){
				if(this.createTextRange) {
		            var range = this.createTextRange();
		            range.move('character', 0);
		            range.select();
		        } else {
		        	this.setSelectionRange(0,1);
		        }
			});
			if(!config.onlyMY){
				$tarih.datepicker("option", "dateFormat", dateFormat.replace("yyyy", "yy"));
				if(value){
					$tarih.val(value);
				}
			}
			bc.applyInlineValidation($$tarih, $$tarihDiv);
			// Set Mask
			function setMask(){
				var mask = dateFormat.replace("dd", "99").replace("mm", "99").replace("yyyy", "9999");
				$tarih.mask(mask, {notclearvalue: true});
			}
			setMask();
			
			$tarih.datepicker( "option", "minDate", config.minDate);
			$tarih.datepicker( "option", "maxDate", config.maxDate);
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.renderRequired = function(flag) {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	if(!config.validation){
		return;
	}
	var $$dom = $$.byid("date-" + config.id);
	if(!$$dom){
		return;
	}
	if(config.validation.req){
		$$.addClass($$dom, "csc-required");
	} else {
		$$.rmClass($$dom, "csc-required");
	}
};

BC.prototype.validate = function(){
	var bc=this,config=bc.config;
	var value = stringTrim(bc.getText());
	var format = config.dateFormat || bc.ddf;
	if(value != "" && value != bc.emptyMask) {
		var dateObj = SIDEDateUtil.getDateObjFromString(value, config.dateFormat || bc.ddf);
		if(config.minDate && config.minDate > dateObj){
			return SideMLManager.get(bc, "dateIntervalError");
		}
		if(config.maxDate && config.maxDate < dateObj){
			return SideMLManager.get(bc, "dateIntervalError");
		}
		return SIDEDateUtil.checkDate(value, format, config.rejectWeekend, config.label);
	}
};

BC.prototype.renderInlineVal = function($val){
	if(!this.bf.isReadonly()){
		var $tarihDiv = $("#"+this.config.id);
		$tarihDiv.append($val);
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	var bc=this,config=bc.config,$$dom;
	if (eventName == "changed") {
		$$dom = $$.byid(config.id);
		if ($$dom) {
			var $tarih = $("#date-" + config.id);
			$$dom.onchange = function(){
				if($tarih.datepicker( "widget" ).is(":visible") && !bc.blurFired){
					return;
				}
				try {
					BFEngine.a();
					callback();
				} finally {
					BFEngine.r();
				}
			};
		}
	} else if (eventName == "selected") {
		$$dom = $$.byid(config.id);
		if ($$dom) {
			$$dom.onclick = callback;
			var bc = this;
			if(!inDesigner(bc.bf) && $$dom.tagName == "SPAN" && !bc.bf.isDisabled()){
				$$.addClass($$dom, "csc-textbox-linked");
			}
		}
	}
};


})(window);
/////=csc-textarea.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** 
 * @class CSC-TEXTAREA 
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		cls : "csc-textarea",
		roEmptyValue: "-----",
		focusable: true,
		disabledKey: "disabled"
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "TextArea";

	this.METHODS = [ "focus", "setMaxLength(maxLength)", "setDefaultValue(value)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed", "selected", "onkeypress(event)", "onkeyup(event)" ];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
}
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-TEXTAREA", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.setDefaultValue = function(value) {
	this.config.defaultValue = value;
}

BC.prototype.clear = function() {
	this.setValue(this.config.defaultValue || "");
}

BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
	var domObject = byid(this.config.id);
	if (domObject) {
		var readonly = this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly();
		if (readonly || domObject.value === undefined) {
			return this.config.value;
		} else {
			return domObject.value;
		}
	}
	return this.config.value || "";
};
BC.prototype.ellipsis=function (value, maxLength) {
	var thiz = this;
	var ellipsistxt=document.createElement("span");
    var showAllLink=document.createElement("a");
    showAllLink.classList.add("showButon");
    var showSummary=document.createElement("a");
    showSummary.classList.add("hideButon");
    showAllLink.innerHTML="Tümünü Göster";
    showSummary.innerHTML="Daralt";
	showAllLink.addEventListener("click",function () {
        ellipsistxt.innerHTML=value;
        showSummary.style.display = "block";
        showAllLink.style.display = "none";
    });

    showSummary.addEventListener("click",function () {
        ellipsistxt.innerHTML=value.substring(0, maxLength-1)  + "..." ;
        showSummary.style.display = "none";
        showAllLink.style.display = "block";
	});

	if(typeof  maxLength === "string"){
		maxLength = parseInt(maxLength);
	}
	if(value.length < maxLength){
        return [ellipsistxt];

		//return value;

	} else{
		ellipsistxt.innerHTML=value.substring(0, maxLength-1)  + "..." ;
		return [ellipsistxt,showAllLink,showSummary];
		//return value.substring(0, maxLength-1)  + "..." ;

	}

}
BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
	if (value === null || undefined === value) {
        value = "";
    }
    this.config.value = value;
    var domObject = byid(this.config.id);
    if (domObject) {
        var readonly = this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly();
        //var ellipsisARR=this.ellipsis(value, this.config.ellipsis);
        if (readonly ) {
			var ellipsisARR=this.ellipsis(value, this.config.ellipsis);
			if(this.config.ellipsis==0 || undefined==this.config.ellipsis){
				domObject.innerHTML=value;
			}
			else{
				for(var i=0; i<ellipsisARR.length; i++){
                domObject.appendChild(ellipsisARR[i]);
                }
			}

		} else {
            domObject.value = value;
        }
    }
};

BC.prototype.saveState = function() {
	this.config.value = this.getValue();
};

BC.prototype.focus = function(){
	$$txt = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$txt){
		$$txt.focus();
	}
};

BC.prototype.setMaxLength = function(maxLength) {
	this.config.maxlength = maxLength;
}

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config, readonly = bc.isParentReadonly() || bf.isReadonly();
	if (readonly) {
		var $$span = $$.create("span", {"id": config.id}, ["csc-rospan", config.cssClass], config.style);
		if(config.value === undefined || config.value === null || config.value === ""){
			$$span.innerHTML = config.roEmptyValue || config.defaultValue || "";				
		}else if(config.ellipsis) {
         			var tempVal= this.ellipsis(config.ellipsis);
		} else {
			$$span.innerHTML = config.value;
		}
		
		if (inDesigner(bf)) {
			$$span.style.display = "";
			$$span.innerHTML = config.roEmptyValue || "Readonly";
		}
		if(!config.style || !config.style.whiteSpace){
			$$span.style.whiteSpace = "normal";
		}
		if(config.style && config.style.whiteSpace == "non"){
			$$span.style.whiteSpace = "";
		}
		$container.appendChild($$span);
	} else {
		var $$newTextArea = $$.create("TEXTAREA", {
			id : config.id,
			rows : config.rows,
			title:config.tips,
			placeholder: config.placeholder,
			cols : config.cols,
			maxlength : config.maxlength,
			tabindex: config.tabIndex
		});
		if(bf.isDisabled()){
			$$newTextArea.setAttribute(config.disabledKey,config.disabledKey);
		}
		if (config.resize == false) {
			$$.css($$newTextArea, "resize", "none");
		}
		$$.css($$newTextArea, "display", config.visible ? "" : "none");
		$$.css($$newTextArea, config.style || {});

		// Design Time da visible yap
		if (inDesigner(bf)) {
			$$.css($$newTextArea, "display", "");
		}

		$$.addClass($$newTextArea, "csc-textarea");
		if (config.cssClass) {
			$$.addClass($$newTextArea, config.cssClass);
		}

		if (config.value !== undefined && config.value !== null ) {
			$$newTextArea.value = config.value;
		}else{
			$$newTextArea.value = config.defaultValue || "";
		}

		$$.bindEvent($$newTextArea, "keypress", function(e){
			if (e.keyCode == 13) {
				e.stopPropagation();//panel içinde onEnterPress engelleme
			}
		});
		
		if(config.filter == "number"){
			$$.bindEvent($$newTextArea, "keypress", function(e){
				if(e.charCode == 0){
					return true;
				}
				if(e.charCode < 48 || e.charCode > 57){
					e.preventDefault();
					return false;
				}
			});
		}
		
		if(config.filter == "upper"){
			$$.bindEvent($$newTextArea, "keyup", function(e){
				$$newTextArea.value = SIDEString.turkishToUpperCase($$newTextArea.value);
			});
		}
		
		if(config.filter == "upperEnglish"){
			$$.bindEvent($$newTextArea, "keyup", function(e){
				$$newTextArea.value = SIDEString.turkishToEngUpperCase($$newTextArea.value);
			});
		}
		
		if(bf.isRequired()){
			$$.addClass($$newTextArea, "csc-required");
		}
		bc.applyInlineValidation($$newTextArea);
		$container.appendChild($$newTextArea);
	}
};
BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "changed") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onchange = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "onkeypress") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onkeypress = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "onkeyup") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onkeyup = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-form-buton-group.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** 
 * @class CSC-FORM-BUTON-GROUP 
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		cls : "csc-button-group",
		border : true
	};

	this.BaseBF = "DYN-CONTAINER";
	this.LABEL = "Form Buton Group";

	this.METHODS = [];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected", "drop", "dragover" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	} ];

	this.Type = function() {
	};
	this.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();

	this.Type.prototype.render = function($container) {
		if($$.hasClass($container, "seperatorDiv")){	// ADogan reRender yaparkenki sorun için geçici çözüm
			$container = $container.parentNode;
		}
		
		var bf = this.bf;
		
		var classes ="csc-button-group";
		if(this.config.cssClass !== undefined) {
			classes= "csc-button-group" + this.config.cssClass;
		}
		
		var $newButtonGroup = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id).addClass(classes);
		
		if (this.config.buttonGroupTheme) {
			$newButtonGroup.addClass(this.config.buttonGroupTheme);
		}
		if (this.config.shrinkWrap) {
			$newButtonGroup.addClass("shrinkWrap");
		}
		checkAndSetCss($newButtonGroup, "width");

		checkAndSetCss($newButtonGroup, "display", this.config.visible ? "block" : "none");
		checkAndSetCss($newButtonGroup, this.config.style || "");

		// Design Time da visible yap
		if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
			$newButtonGroup.css("display", "");
		}
		if (this.config.showSeperator) {
			var $$seperatorDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "seperatorDiv");
			$$seperatorDiv.appendChild($newButtonGroup[0]);
			$container.appendChild($$seperatorDiv);
		} else {
			$container.appendChild($newButtonGroup[0]);
		}
		var counter = 0;
		for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
			var member = bf.members[memberName];
			if (member.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP") {
				continue;// popup ise çizme devam et
			}
			if(!inDesigner(bf) && !member.hasVisibleItem()) {
				continue;
			}
			BFEngine.render(member, $newButtonGroup[0]);
		}

	};

	this.Type.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
		if (eventName == "selected") {
			var dom = byid(this.config.id);
			if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
				dom.onclick = callback;
			}
		} else if (eventName == "drop") {
			var dom = byid(this.config.id);
			if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
				dom.ondrop = callback;
			}
		} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
			var dom = byid(this.config.id);
			if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
				dom.ondragover = callback;
			}
		}
	};

}

BCEngine.registerType("CSC-FORM-BUTON-GROUP", new Definition());
})(window);
/////=csc-table-row.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-TABLE-ROW
 * @author Mahmut Yıldız
 */

function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {};

	this.BaseBF = "CONTAINER";
	this.LABEL = "Table Row";


	this.METHODS = [ "setSelectable(flag)", "cancelDelete", "cancelAdd" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-TABLE-ROW", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function(){
	var parent = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
	if(parent && parent.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-TABLE-HEADER"){
		this.tablebc = parent.$CS$.parent.bcRef;
	}
};

BC.prototype.cancelDelete = function(){
	this.cdel = true;
};

BC.prototype.cancelAdd = function(){
	this.cadd = true;
};

BC.prototype.reRender = function($container) {
	var id=this.config.id;
	var $$myself = $$.byid(id);
	if(!$$myself){//mahmuty zaten hiç çizilmemiş
		return;
	}

	var $$parent = $$myself.parentNode;
	var $$next = $$myself.nextElementSibling;
	BFEngine.destroy(this.bf, true);

	$$.remove($$myself);

	var $$tr = $$.create("tr", {id: id});
	if($$next){
		$$parent.insertBefore($$tr, $$next);
	} else {
		$$parent.appendChild($$tr);
	}
	this.render($$tr);
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bf = this.bf;
	var id = this.config.id;
	//Parent mutlaka TABLE yada HEADER olmalı
	var p = bf.$CS$.parent, parent=p;
	if(parent.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-DT" && parent.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-TABLE" && parent.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-TABLE-HEADER"){
		SIDENavigator.notify("TABLE ROW(" +bf.$CS$.name +") can be only use in TABLE or in a TABLE-HEADER.", {warning: true, notime: true});
		return;
	}
	var bc = this, colmodel = [], header, tablebf, config=bc.config, id=config.id;
	if(parent.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-TABLE-HEADER"){
		header = parent;
	}
	while(parent){
		if(parent.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-TABLE"){
			tablebf = parent;
			break;
		}
		parent = parent.$CS$.parent;
	}
	var $$tr;
	if($container.getAttribute("id") == id){
		$$tr = $container;//look above reRender method
	} else {
		var $$tr = $$.create("tr", {id: id});
		$container.appendChild($$tr);
	}
	$$.addClass($$tr, this.config.cssClass);
	
	if(this.config.isActionBar){
		if(p.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-DT"){
			$$.css($$tr, "float", "right");
		}
		$$tr.parentNode.insertBefore($$tr, $$tr.parentNode.childNodes[0]);
		$$.addClass($$tr, "csc-table-action-tr");
		var $$td = $$.create("th");
		var $$div = $$.create("DIV",null,"csc-table-action-div");
		$$td.setAttribute("colspan", 100);
		$$tr.appendChild($$td);
		$$td.appendChild($$div);
		$$div.style.width = ($$td.offsetWidth-100)+"px";
		for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
			var member = bf.members[memberName];
			if (!member.isVisible()) {
				continue;
			}
			BFEngine.render(member, $$div);
		}
	} else {
		var cellCount = 0;
		if(this.tablebc.rowNumbers || this.tablebc.config.rownumbers){
			var rowCount = 0, isFirstRow = false;
			for(var memName in header.bcRef.bf.members){
				var member = header.bcRef.bf.members[memName];
				if(member.getConfig().isActionBar){
					continue;
				}
				if(rowCount == 0 && member == this.bf){
					isFirstRow = true;
				}
				rowCount++;
			}
			if(isFirstRow){
				var $$td = $$.create("th", {rowspan: rowCount}, "csc-table-rowcount");
				$$tr.appendChild($$td);
			}
			cellCount++;
		}
		if(this.tablebc.rowSelectable || this.tablebc.config.selectable){
			var rowCount = 0, isFirstRow = false;
			for(var memName in header.members){
				if(rowCount == 0 && header.members[memName] == this.bf){
					isFirstRow = true;
				}
				rowCount++;
			}
			if(isFirstRow){
				var $$td = $$.create("th", {rowspan: rowCount});
				$$.addClass($$td, "csc-table-select");
				$$tr.appendChild($$td);
				if(this.tablebc.config.selectall){
					var tablebc = this.tablebc;
					var $$check = $$.create("input", {id: this.tablebc.config.id+"-sall", type: "checkbox"});
					$$check.onclick = function(){
						tablebc.selectAll(this.checked);
					};
					$$td.appendChild($$check);
				}
			}
			cellCount++;
		}
		for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
			var member = bf.members[memberName];
			if (!member.isVisible()) {
				continue;
			}
			if(header){
				var $$td = $$.create("th");
				var memConfig = member.getConfig();
				if(memConfig.colSpan){
					$$td.setAttribute("colspan", member.getConfig().colSpan);
					cellCount += parseInt(member.getConfig().colSpan);
				} else {
					cellCount++;
				}
				if(memConfig.rowSpan){
					$$td.setAttribute("rowspan", member.getConfig().rowSpan);
				}
				if(memConfig.layoutConfig){
					if(memConfig.layoutConfig.columnWidth){
						$$td.style.minWidth = memConfig.layoutConfig.columnWidth;
					}
					if(memConfig.layoutConfig.cellAlign){
						$$td.style.textAlign = memConfig.layoutConfig.cellAlign;
					}
				}
			} else {
				throw "Table Row render";
			}
			$$tr.appendChild($$td);
			BFEngine.render(member, $$td);
		}
		if(cellCount && this.tablebc && !this.tablebc.colCellCount){
			this.tablebc.colCellCount = cellCount;
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.setSelectable = function(flag){
	if(flag === undefined){
		flag = true;
	}
	this.config.selectable = flag;
	var tablebc;
	var parent = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
	if(parent && parent.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-TABLE"){
		tablebc = parent.bcRef;
	}
	if(!tablebc){
		return;
	}
	tablebc.prepareMetaData();
	tablebc.bf.rerender();
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "drop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	}
};

})(window);
/////=csc-turkeymap.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-TURKEYMAP  
 * @author hakand
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
	};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.LABEL = "Turkey Map";
	
	this.METHODS = ["setData(countyMap, rangeArr, legendObj)", "showDistinctMap(countyId)", "showTurkeyMap", "showDistinct(countyId, distinctId)", "showDividedDistrictMap(districtId, data)"];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected()", "onload()", "countySelected(countyId, countyName, countyData)", "distinctSelected(distId)", "backButtonSelected", "dividedDistrictSelected(data)", "ondrop","dragover"];
	this.DISABLE_EVENTS = [ "selected" ];
	
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [
		{name : "d3", version : "3.1.9"}, 
		{name: "turkeymap", version: "1.0" },
		{name: "turkeymap-distinct", version: "1.0" },
		{name: "raphaeljs", version: "2.1.4" }
	];

	this.Type = function() {
	};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-TURKEYMAP", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.setData = function (data, range, legendObj, notrender) {
	this.data = data;
	this.range = range;
	this.legendObj = legendObj;

	if(notrender) {
		return;
	}
	this.bf.rerender();
};

BC.prototype.init = function () {
	this.countyMode = 1;

	if(inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		this.data = {
			"38": {value: 500, color: "steelblue"},
			"06": {value: 130, color: "lightblue"},
			"34": {value: 230, color: "red"}
		};

		this.range = [0, 500];

		this.legendObj = {
			"Kayseri": "steelblue",
			"Ankara": "lightblue",
			"İstanbul": "aqua"
		};
	}
	this.callbackArr = [];

	//Load d3 library if not loaded
	if(window.d3LibLoaded) {
		return;
	}
	var pathPrefix = "js/3thParty/d3/", bc = this, libs;
	if(CSSession.getEnv() == "dev" || CSSession.getEnv() == "test" || inDesigner(bc.bf)) {
		pathPrefix = "designer/" + pathPrefix;
	}
	libs = [pathPrefix + "d3.v3.min.js"];

	SLibraryLoader.loadLib("d3", libs, {progress: true}, function () {
		window.d3LibLoaded = true;
		BFEngine.a();
		BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
		BFEngine.r();
	});
};

BC.prototype.load = function () {
	if(this.onloadcallback) {
		this.onloadcallback();
	}
};

BC.prototype.getPercentageColor = function (pct) {
	if(pct == 0) {
		pct = 0.00000001;
	}
	var percentColors = [
		{pct: 0.0, color: {r: 153, g: 0, b: 0}},
		{pct: 0.5, color: {r: 255, g: 255, b: 0}},
		{pct: 1.0, color: {r: 0, g: 153, b: 0}}];

	for(var i = 0; i < percentColors.length; i++) {
		if(pct <= percentColors[i].pct) {
			var lower = percentColors[i - 1];
			var upper = percentColors[i];
			var range = upper.pct - lower.pct;
			var rangePct = (pct - lower.pct) / range;
			var pctLower = 1 - rangePct;
			var pctUpper = rangePct;
			var color = {
				r: Math.floor(lower.color.r * pctLower + upper.color.r * pctUpper),
				g: Math.floor(lower.color.g * pctLower + upper.color.g * pctUpper),
				b: Math.floor(lower.color.b * pctLower + upper.color.b * pctUpper)
			};
			return 'rgb(' + [color.r, color.g, color.b].join(',') + ')';
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.prepareCountyColor = function (color, val) {
	if(color) {
		return color;
	}
	var retColor = this.config.backgroundColor || "#A0A0A0";
	if(this.config.colorAccToValue && val) {
		var pct = 1;
		if(this.range) {
			pct = (val - this.range[0]) / (this.range[1] - this.range[0]);
		} else {
			pct = val / 100;
		}
		return this.getPercentageColor(pct);
	}
	return retColor;
};

BC.prototype.countySelected = function (d) {
	$(".csc-map-tooltip").css("opacity", 0).css("display", "none");
	if(this.countyMode === 1) {
		this.bf.fire("countySelected", d.key, d.value.name, d.value.data);
	} else {

		//TODO: 3.level distinct selected

		var val = csCloneObject(d.value, true);
		val.distinctId = val.county;
		val.countyId = this.countyObj.id;
		delete val.path;
		delete val.county;
		this.bf.fire("distinctSelected", val);
	}
};

BC.prototype.showTurkeyMap = function () {
	var bc = this;
	if(this.svg) {
		this.countyMode = 1;
		this.reRender();
	} else {
		this.callbackArr.push(function () {
			bc.showTurkeyMap();
		});
	}
};

BC.prototype.showDistinctMap = function (countyId) {
	var bc = this;
	if(this.svg) {
		var countyObj = turkeyDistinctMap[countyId];
		if(!countyObj) {
			console.log("County not found:" + countyId);
			return;
		}
		this.countyMode = 0;
		this.countyObj = countyObj;
		this.countyObj.id = countyId;

		this.reRender();
	} else {
		this.callbackArr.push(function () {
			bc.showDistinctMap(countyId);
		});
	}
};

BC.prototype.showDistinct = function (countyId, distId) {
	if(this.svg) {
		var countyObj = turkeyDistinctMap[countyId];
		if(!countyObj) {
			console.error("County not found:" + countyId);
			return;
		}
		this.distinctObj = null;
		for(var i = 0; i < countyObj.distincts.length; i++) {
			var distObj = countyObj.distincts[i];
			if(distObj.county == distId || (distId && distObj.county == distId.distinctId)) {
				this.distinctObj = distObj;
				break;
			}
		}
		if(!this.distinctObj) {
			console.error("Distinct not found:" + countyId + ", " + distId);
			return;
		}

		this.countyMode = 2;
		this.countyObj = countyObj;

		this.reRender();
	} else {
		this.callbackArr.push(function () {
			bc.showDistinct(countyId, distId);
		});
	}
};


BC.prototype.loadScript = function () {
	var bc = this;
	if(!window.isTurkeyMapRequested) {
		SIDEUtil.loadJSFromBC(bc, "designer/js/3thParty/turkeymap/", "js/3thParty/turkeymap/", "turkeymap-paths.js", function(){
			SIDEUtil.loadJSFromBC(bc, "designer/js/3thParty/turkeymap/", "js/3thParty/turkeymap/", "turkeymap-distinct-paths.js", function(){
				window.isTurkeyMapLoaded = true;
				//çiz
				bc.bf.rerender();

				for(var i in  bc.callbackArr) {
					bc.callbackArr[i]();
				}
				bc.callbackArr = [];
			})
		});
		window.isTurkeyMapRequested = true;
	}
};

/**
 * @function showDividedDistrictMap
 * @description Seçilen ilçeyi random parçalara böler.
 * @param [districtId] Bölünecek olan ilçe ID'sini tutan objedir. İçerisinde countyId, distinctId, name bilgileri vardır.
 * @param [data] Object Array' dir. İlçe datanın boyutu kadar parçaya bölünür. Her bir data mutlaka value değerini tutmalıdır. Bunun yanında title ve color bilgileri opsiyoneldir. Bunlar dışında başka fieldlar da set edilebilir.
 **/
BC.prototype.showDividedDistrictMap = function (districtId, data) {
	if(this.svg) {
		var countyObj = turkeyDistinctMap[districtId.countyId];
		if(!countyObj) {
			console.error("County not found:" + districtId.countyId);
			return;
		}
		this.distinctObj = null;
		for(var i = 0; i < countyObj.distincts.length; i++) {
			var distObj = countyObj.distincts[i];
			if(distObj.county == districtId.distinctId) {
				this.distinctObj = distObj;
				break;
			}
		}
		if(!this.distinctObj) {
			console.error("Distinct not found:" + districtId.countyId + ", " + districtId);
			return;
		}

		this.countyMode = 2;
		this.countyObj = countyObj;
		this.dividedDistrictMapData = data;

		this.reRender();
	} else {
		this.callbackArr.push(function () {
			bc.showDistinct(districtId.countyId, districtId);
		});
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function ($container) {
	if(!window.d3LibLoaded) {
		return;
	}

	var bc = this;

	var $$div = $$.create("DIV", {"id": this.config.id}, "csc-turkeymap");
	$container.appendChild($$div);
	$(".csc-map-tooltip").css("opacity", 0).css("display", "none");

	if(!window.turkeyMapPaths && !window.isTurkeyMapLoaded) {
		bc.loadScript();
		return;
	}


	var durationTime = 1000;

	var $$titlediv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "chart-title-div");
	$$titlediv.innerHTML = bc.config.title || "";

	var data = this.data;
//		if(!data){
//			return;
//		}
	if(this.countyMode === 2) {//ilçeyi göster
		this.paths = {};
		this.paths[this.distinctObj.county] = this.distinctObj;
	} else if(this.countyMode === 0) {//ilçeleri göster
		this.paths = {};
		var pathsArr = this.countyObj.distincts;
		for(var i in pathsArr) {
			var obj = pathsArr[i];
			this.paths[obj.county] = obj;
		}
	} else if(this.countyMode === 1) {//illeri göster
		if(!this.countyPaths) {
//			this.countyPaths = csCloneObject(turkeyMapPaths, true);
			this.countyPaths = window.turkeyMapPaths;
		}

		this.paths = csCloneObject(this.countyPaths, true);
	}

	//önce mapteki tüm kullanıcı verilerini temizle
	for(var i in this.paths) {
		var county = this.paths[i];
		if(county) {
			county.data = undefined;
		}
	}

	//varsa mape kullanıcı verilerini koy
	if(data) {
		for(var i in data) {
			var county = this.paths[i];
			if(county) {
				county.data = data[i];
			}
		}
	}

	if(!this.config.style) {
		this.config.style = {};
	}

	var defaultWidth = 1050, defaultHeight = 500, defaultTextSize = 20;//burayı değiştirme scale'i bozar
	var margin = {top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0};
	var width = this.config.style.width || $($container).width() || defaultWidth;//$container.width() || defaultWidth;

	if(!this.config.style.width) {	// ADogan - rerender yapılırken container ortada yoksa genişlik değeri kayboluyordu.
		this.config.style.width = width;
	}

	var height = this.config.style.height || width / 2;// defaultHeight;//$container.height() || defaultHeight;
	if(inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		width = defaultWidth / 2;
		height = defaultHeight / 2;
	}
	var legendWidth = bc.config.showLegend ? 100 : 0;
	var mapWidth = width - legendWidth - margin.right - margin.left;
	var mapHeight = height - margin.top - margin.bottom;
	var scaleX = mapWidth / defaultWidth;
	var scaleY = mapHeight / defaultHeight;
	var transX = margin.left;
	var transY = (margin.top - (height / 5));
	var titleTextSize = scaleX * defaultTextSize;

	if(this.countyMode === 0) {//ilçerleri gösterirken
		var w = this.countyObj.width.split("px")[0];
		var h = this.countyObj.height.split("px")[0];
		transX = -10;
		transY = 0;
		scaleX = mapWidth / w;
		scaleY = mapHeight / h;
	} else if(this.countyMode === 2) {//sadece bir ilçe gösterirken
//		var w = this.countyObj.width.split("px")[0];
//		var h = this.countyObj.height.split("px")[0];
//		var l = this.countyObj.distincts.length;
		transX = 0;
		transY = 0;
		scaleX = 1;//mapWidth / w * 2.3;//Math.sqrt(l);
		scaleY = 1;//mapHeight / h * 2.3;//Math.sqrt(l);
	}


	var tooltipDiv = d3.select("body").append("div").attr("class", "csc-map-tooltip").style("opacity", 20);
	this.svg = d3.select($$div).append("svg").attr("width", width).attr("height", height);

	if(this.countyMode !== 1) {
		this.svg.append("text").attr("x", width / 2).attr("y", height / 25).attr("dy", ".4em").style("text-anchor", "middle").style("font-size", titleTextSize).text(this.countyMode == 2 ? this.distinctObj.name : this.countyObj.name);
		this.svg.append("text").attr("x", 30).attr("y", height / 2 - 25).attr("dy", ".1em").style("text-anchor", "middle").style("font-size", 13).text("Geri");
		this.svg.append("image").attr("xlink:href", "css/bc-style/img/mapLeftArrow.png").attr("width", 100).attr("height", 45).attr("y", height / 2 - 30).attr("x", -20)
			.on("click", function (d) {
				if(bc.countyMode === 0) {
					bc.showTurkeyMap();
				} else if(bc.countyMode === 2) {
					bc.showDistinctMap(bc.countyObj.id);
				}
				bc.bf.fire("backButtonSelected");
			}).style("cursor", "pointer");
	}

	var mapContainerG = this.svg.append("g");
	mapContainerG.attr("transform", "translate(" + transX + "," + transY + ") scale(" + scaleX + ", " + scaleY + ")");

	var clipPath = mapContainerG.selectAll("path").data(d3.entries(this.paths)).enter();
	if(this.dividedDistrictMapData && this.countyMode == 2) {
		clipPath = mapContainerG.selectAll("clipPath").data(d3.entries(this.paths)).enter()
			.append("svg:clipPath")
			.attr("id", function (d) {
				return "map" + d.key;
			});
	}

	d3.selection.prototype.moveToFront = function () {
		return this.each(function () {
			this.parentNode.appendChild(this);
		});
	};
	d3.selection.prototype.moveToBack = function () {
		return this.each(function () {
			var firstChild = this.parentNode.firstChild;
			if(firstChild) {
				this.parentNode.insertBefore(this, firstChild);
			}
		});
	};

	function enlarge($$countySvg) {
		if(!$$countySvg) {
			return
		}
		if(bc.countyMode === 2) {
			return
		}
		var tx = 0, ty = 0, sx = 1, sy = 1, defaultS = 1;
		var box = $$countySvg.getBBox();
		sx = sy = 1.4;
		tx = -(box.width / 2 + box.x) * (sx - defaultS);
		ty = -(box.height / 2 + box.y) * (sy - defaultS);
		d3.select($$countySvg).transition().attr("transform", "translate(" + tx + "," + ty + ") scale(" + sx + ", " + sy + ")").style("stroke", "black").style("stroke-width", "1");
		d3.select($$countySvg).moveToFront();
	};
	function shrink($$countySvg) {
		if(!$$countySvg) {
			return
		}
		if(bc.countyMode === 2) {
			return
		}
		var tx = 0, ty = 0, sx = 1, sy = 1, defaultS = 1;
		d3.select($$countySvg).transition().attr("transform", "translate(" + tx + "," + ty + ") scale(" + sx + ", " + sy + ")").style("z-index", "0").style("stroke", "none").style("stroke-width", "1");
	}

	function mouseover(d, $$countySvg) {
		if(!$$countySvg) {
			return
		}

		tooltipDiv.html("");
		tooltipDiv.style("opacity", 1).style("display", "block").style("z-index", "55555");
		tooltipDiv.style("left", (d3.event.pageX + 10) + "px").style("top", (d3.event.pageY + 10) + "px");

		var tDiv = $$.create("DIV", {}, [], {}, tooltipDiv[0][0]);
		var tDiv2 = $$.create("DIV", {}, [], {}, tDiv);
		var tooltipstr = (bc.config.showCountyNamesInTooltip !== false ? d.value.name : "");
		var title = ((d.value.data && d.value.data.title) ? (d.value.data.title) : "");
		if(title && tooltipstr) {
			tooltipstr += "<br/>";
		}
		tooltipstr += title;
		tDiv2.innerHTML = tooltipstr;
		if(window.innerHeight - tDiv2.offsetHeight<=d3.event.pageY){
			tooltipDiv.style("top", "");
			tooltipDiv.style("bottom", "10px");
		}

		if(d.value.data && d.value.data.content && d.value.data.content.length > 0) {
			var $$contentDiv = bc.createContentSlider(d.value.data.content, $(tDiv).width(), $(tDiv).height());
			//tDiv.appendChild($$contentDiv);
			tDiv.insertBefore($$contentDiv, tDiv.firstChild);
		}
		if(bc.config.mouseOverHighlight !== false) {
			d3.select($$countySvg).style("fill", "skyblue");
		}
		enlarge($$countySvg);
	};
	function mouseout(d, $$countySvg) {
		if(!$$countySvg) {
			return
		}
		shrink($$countySvg);
		tooltipDiv.style("opacity", 0).style("display", "none");
		tooltipDiv.style("bottom", "");
		d3.select($$countySvg).style("fill", function (d) {
			var county = d.value;
			return bc.prepareCountyColor(county.data && county.data.color, county.data && county.data.value);
		});
	};
	function mousedown(d, $$countySvg) {
		if(!$$countySvg) {
			return
		}
		bc.countySelected(d);
	};

	var path = clipPath.append("path")
		.attr("d", function (d) {
			return d.value.path;
		})
		.style("fill", function (d) {
			var county = d.value;
			return bc.prepareCountyColor(county.data && county.data.color, county.data && county.data.value);
		})
		.on("mouseover", function (d) {
			mouseover(d, this);
		}).on("mouseout", function (d) {
			mouseout(d, this);
		}).on("mousedown", function (d) {
			mousedown(d, this);
		})
		.attr("transform", "translate(" + (mapWidth / scaleX) / 2 + "," + (mapHeight / scaleY) / 2 + ") scale(0, 0)")
		.transition().duration(durationTime).delay(function (d, i) {
			return i * 10;
		})
		.attr("transform", function () {
			var tx = 0, ty = 0, sx = 1, sy = 1;
			if(bc.countyMode === 2) {//sadece ilçeyi göstereceksen matematiksel hesap yap.
				var box = this.getBBox();
				sx = sy = mapHeight / box.height * 8.5 / 10;
				tx = (-box.x - box.width / 2 ) * sx + (mapWidth / 2);
				ty = (-box.y - box.height / 2) * sy + (mapHeight / 2);
			}
			return "translate(" + tx + "," + ty + ") scale(" + sx + ", " + sy + ")"
		}).attr("id", function (d) {
//		debugger;
			return "map_" + d.value.county;
		})

	if(bc.config.showCountyNames) {
		var that = this;
		window.setTimeout(function () {
				var scale=window.screen.width/1050;
				var fontSize = 7*scale;
				var textG = that.svg.append("g");
				textG.selectAll("text").data(d3.entries(that.paths)).enter()
					.append("text").attr("x", function (d) {
					if(that.countyMode == 1){
						return (d.value.x || 0) * scaleX;
					} else {
						if(!bc.config.showDistrictNames){
							return;
						}
						var ilKodu = d.key.substring(1,3);
						if(!turkeyDistinctNamePositions[ilKodu][d.key]){
							return 0;
						}
						return Math.floor(turkeyDistinctNamePositions[ilKodu][d.key].x*scaleX);
					}
				})
					.attr("y", function (d) {
						//return (d.value.y || 0) * scaleY;
						if(that.countyMode == 1){
							return (d.value.y || 0) * scaleY;
						} else {
							if(!bc.config.showDistrictNames){
								return;
							}
							var ilKodu = d.key.substring(1,3);
							if(!turkeyDistinctNamePositions[ilKodu][d.key]){
								return 0;
							}
							return Math.floor(turkeyDistinctNamePositions[ilKodu][d.key].y*scaleY);
						}
					})
					.style("font-size", that.countyMode== 1 ? (14 * scaleX) : fontSize)
					.text(function (d) {
						return that.countyMode==1 || bc.config.showDistrictNames ? d.value.name : "";
					})
					.attr("countyId", function (d) {
						return d.key;
					})
					.on("mouseover", function (d) {
						var countyId = this.getAttribute("countyId");
						var result = $$.getChildsHasAttr(mapContainerG[0][0], "id", "map_" + countyId);
						if(result && result.length == 1) {
							mouseover(d, result[0]);
						}
					})
					.on("mouseout", function (d) {
						var countyId = this.getAttribute("countyId");
						var result = $$.getChildsHasAttr(mapContainerG[0][0], "id", "map_" + countyId);
						if(result && result.length == 1) {
							mouseout(d, result[0]);
						}
					})
					.on("mousedown", function (d) {
						var countyId = this.getAttribute("countyId");
						var result = $$.getChildsHasAttr(mapContainerG[0][0], "id", "map_" + countyId);
						if(result && result.length == 1) {
							mousedown(d, result[0]);
						}
					});
				/*
				 textG.attr("transform", "translate(" + (mapWidth/scaleX)/2 + "," + (mapHeight/scaleY)/2 + ") scale(0, 0)")
				 .transition().duration(durationTime).delay(function(d, i) { return i * 10; })*/
				textG.attr("transform", function () {
					return "translate(0,0) scale(1,1)"
				})
			}
			, 1000);
	}

	if(this.countyMode !== 1) {
		path.style("stroke", "none")//çok küçük ilçelerde (adalar, istanbul) scale buyuk old. için ilçenin tamamı stroke oluyor bu yüzden none yapıldı.
			.style("stroke-width", "1");
	}

	if(bc.config.showLegend) {
		var legendObj = bc.legendObj;

		if(!legendObj && this.config.colorAccToValue) {
			legendObj = {
				"min": this.getPercentageColor(0.00001),
				"avr": this.getPercentageColor(0.5),
				"max": this.getPercentageColor(1.0)
			};
		} else {
			legendObj = legendObj || {};

			//burada eski legend yapısı bozulmadan çalışması için ek düzenleme yapıldı.
			//artık data içinde legend = true ise kendiliğinden legend içinde gösterilecek ve datadaki renk kullanılacak.
			for(var key in data) {
				if(data[key].legend) {
					legendObj[key] = "";
				}
			}
		}

		var legend = this.svg.selectAll(".legend").data(d3.entries(legendObj)).enter().append("g").attr("class", "legend").attr("transform", function (d, i) {
			return "translate( -25," + (i * 20 + 10) + ")";
		});
		legend.append("text").attr("x", width + 25).attr("y", 9).attr("dy", ".35em").style("text-anchor", "end").text(function (d) {
			if(!bc.data) {
				return "";
			}
			var dataObj = bc.data[d.key];
			if(dataObj && dataObj.label2) {
				return dataObj.label2;
			}
			return "";
		});
		legend.append("rect").attr("x", width - 18).attr("width", 18).attr("height", 18).style("fill", function (d, i) {
			var color = d.value;

			if(!bc.data) {
				return color;
			}

			var dataObj = bc.data[d.key];
			if(dataObj) {
				if(bc.config.colorAccToValue) {
					color = bc.prepareCountyColor(dataObj.color, dataObj.value);
				} else if(dataObj.color) {
					color = dataObj.color;
				}
			}
			return color;
		});
		legend.append("text").attr("x", width - 24).attr("y", 9).attr("dy", ".35em").style("text-anchor", "end").text(function (d) {
			var label = d.key;
			if(bc.countyMode === 1) {
				var countyObj = turkeyDistinctMap[d.key];
				if(countyObj) {
					label = countyObj.name;
				}
			} else {
				var pathsArr = bc.countyObj.distincts;
				for(var i in pathsArr) {
					var obj = pathsArr[i];
					if(d.key == obj.county) {
						label = obj.name;
					}
				}
			}
			return label;
		});

		legend.attr("countyId", function (d) {
			return d.key;
		});

		legend.on("mouseover", function (d) {
			var id = this.getAttribute("countyId");
			var $$countySvg = $$.byid("map_" + id);
			if($$countySvg) {
				enlarge($$countySvg);
			} else {
				var fillColor = $$.child(this, "rect").style.fill;
				d3.selectAll("#" + bc.config.id + " path").each(function () {
					if(this.style.fill == fillColor) {
						enlarge(this);
					}
				})
			}

		}).on("mouseout", function (d) {
			var id = this.getAttribute("countyId");
			var $$countySvg = $$.byid("map_" + id);
			if($$countySvg) {
				shrink($$countySvg);
			} else {
				var fillColor = $$.child(this, "rect").style.fill;
				d3.selectAll("#" + bc.config.id + " path").each(function () {
					if(this.style.fill == fillColor) {
						shrink(this);
					}
				})
			}
		})
	}

	if(this.dividedDistrictMapData && this.countyMode == 2) {
		if(!window.isRaphaelJSRequested) {
			function callback() {
				bc.bf.rerender();
			}
			pathPrefix = "";
			if(CSSession.getEnv() == "dev" || CSSession.getEnv() == "test" || inDesigner(this.bf)){//design and test time
				pathPrefix = "designer/js/3thParty/raphaeljs/";
			}else{//runtime
			pathPrefix = "js/3thParty/raphaeljs/";
			}

			SIDEUtil.loadJS(pathPrefix + "raphael-min.js", callback);

			window.isRaphaelJSRequested = true;
			return;
		}

		// Mitchell’s Best-Candidate Algorithm
		function bestPointGenerator(searchRadius, tmpMapBox) {
			var quadtree = d3.geom.quadtree().extent([[0, 0], [width, height]])([]);
			return function (k) {
				var bestX, bestY, bestDistance = 0;
				for(var i = 0; i < k; ++i) {
					var x = Math.floor(Math.random() * (tmpMapBox.x2 - tmpMapBox.x + 1) + tmpMapBox.x),
						y = Math.floor(Math.random() * (tmpMapBox.y2 - tmpMapBox.y + 1) + tmpMapBox.y),
						rx1 = x - searchRadius,
						rx2 = x + searchRadius,
						ry1 = y - searchRadius,
						ry2 = y + searchRadius,
						minDistance = searchRadius;
					quadtree.visit(function (quad, x1, y1, x2, y2) {
						if(p = quad.point) {
							var p,
								dx = x - p[0],
								dy = y - p[1],
								d2 = dx * dx + dy * dy,
								d = Math.sqrt(d2);
							if(d < minDistance) {
								minDistance = d;
								rx1 = x - d;
								rx2 = x + d;
								ry1 = y - d;
								ry2 = y + d;
							}
						}
						return x1 > rx2 || x2 < rx1 || y1 > ry2 || y2 < ry1; // or outside search radius
					});

					if(minDistance > bestDistance) bestX = x, bestY = y, bestDistance = minDistance;
				}
				var best = [bestX, bestY];
				quadtree.add(best);
				return best;
			};
		}

		var pointsVertices = [];

		// Nokta kontrolü yapabilmek için Raphael.js
		var paper = Raphael(0, 0, mapWidth, mapHeight);
		var tmpMap = paper.path(this.distinctObj.path);
		var tx = 0, ty = 0, sx = 1, sy = 1;
		var tmpMapBox = tmpMap.getBBox();
		sx = sy = mapHeight / tmpMapBox.height * 8.5 / 10;
		tx = (-tmpMapBox.x - tmpMapBox.width / 2 ) + (mapWidth / 2);
		ty = (-tmpMapBox.y - tmpMapBox.height / 2) + (mapHeight / 2);
		tmpMap.transform("t" + tx + "," + ty + "s" + sx + "," + sy);
		tmpMapBox = tmpMap.getBBox();
		var pointGenerator = bestPointGenerator(30, tmpMapBox);

		for(var i = 0; i < this.dividedDistrictMapData.length; i++) {
			var best = pointGenerator(5);
			var tmpX = best[0];
			var tmpY = best[1];
			if(tmpMap.isPointInside(tmpX, tmpY)) {
				var point = [tmpX, tmpY];
				pointsVertices.push(point);
			} else {
				i--;
			}
		}
		paper.remove();
		// Nokta kontrolü sonu.

		var voronoiG = this.svg.append("svg:g").attr("id", "varonoi");
		voronoiG.selectAll("path")
			.data(d3.geom.voronoi(pointsVertices))
			.enter().append("svg:path")
			.attr("d", function (d) {
				return "M" + d.join(",") + "Z";
			})
			.attr("id", function (d, i) {
				return "path-" + i;
			})
			.attr("clip-path", function (d, i) {
				for(var pt in bc.paths) {
					return "url(#map" + pt + ")";
				}
			})
			.style("fill", d3.rgb(230, 230, 230))
			.style("stroke", d3.rgb(200, 200, 200))
			.attr("transform", "translate(" + (mapWidth / scaleX) / 2 + "," + (mapHeight / scaleY) / 2 + ") scale(0, 0)")
			.transition().duration(durationTime).delay(function (d, i) {
			return i * 15;
		})
			.attr("transform", function (d) {
				return "scale(1,1)";
			});

		voronoiG.selectAll("path").data(bc.dividedDistrictMapData)
			.on("mouseover", function (d, i) {
				if(d.title) {
					tooltipDiv.html("");
					tooltipDiv.style("opacity", 1).style("display", "block").style("z-index", "55555");
					tooltipDiv.style("left", (d3.event.pageX + 10) + "px").style("top", (d3.event.pageY + 10) + "px");

					var tDiv = $$.create("DIV", {}, [], {}, tooltipDiv[0][0]);
					var tDiv2 = $$.create("DIV", {}, [], {}, tDiv);
					var tooltipstr = d.title;
					tDiv2.innerHTML = tooltipstr;
				}

				d3.select(this).style('fill', function (d) {
					return bc.prepareCountyColor(d.color || d3.rgb(31, 120, 180), d.value);
				});
			})
			.on("mouseout", function (d, i) {
				tooltipDiv.style("opacity", 0).style("display", "none");

				d3.select(this).style("fill", d3.rgb(230, 230, 230));
			}).on("mousedown", function (d) {
			bc.bf.fire("dividedDistrictSelected", d);
		});
	}
};

BC.prototype.createContentSlider = function (content, w, h) {
	if(!content || content.length == 0) {
		return;
	}
//	var w = 200, h= 150;
	var $$div = $$.create("DIV", {id: this.config.id + "-content-slider"}, ["csc-content-slider"], {width: w, height: h});
	if(this.cb) {
		window.clearTimeout(this.cb);
	}
	var $$contents = [];
	var bfname = this.bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;


	for(var i = 0; i < content.length; i++) {
		var src = content[i];
		src = SideModuleManager.getResourceUrl(bfname.substring(0, bfname.indexOf(".")), content[i]);
		$$contents[i] = $$.create("DIV", {rel: i}, "csc-cs-content");
		$$.create("IMG", {src: src}, undefined, {width: w, height: h}, $$contents[i]);
		$$div.appendChild($$contents[i]);
	}

	this.active = 0;
	$$contents[0].style.display = "block";
	if(content.length > 1) {
		var bc = this;

		var gotoPage = function (to) {
			try {
				var prev = bc.active;
				if(to !== undefined) {
					bc.active = to;
				} else {
					bc.active++;
					if(bc.active >= $$contents.length) {
						bc.active = 0;
					}
				}
				var width = $$.width($$contents[prev]);
				if(!width) {
					return;
				}
				$$contents[bc.active].style.display = "block";
				$$contents[bc.active].style.zIndex = 0;
				$$contents[prev].style.zIndex = 1;
				$$contents[prev].style.width = width + "px";
				$($$contents[prev]).animate({left: "-" + $$contents[prev].offsetWidth + "px"}, 1000, function () {
					$$contents[prev].style.left = "";
					$$contents[prev].style.display = "";
					$$contents[bc.active].style.display = "block";

				});
				var $$activePage = $$.getChildHasClass(bc.config.id + "-pager", "active-page");
				$$.rmClass($$activePage, "active-page");
				$$activePage = $$.getChildHasAttr(bc.config.id + "-pager", "rel", "" + bc.active);
				$$.addClass($$activePage, "active-page");
			} catch (e) {
				window.clearTimeout(bc.cb);
			}
		};

		if(!inDesigner(this.bf)) {
			this.cb = window.setInterval(gotoPage, this.config.period || 3000);
		}
		return $$div;
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function (eventName, callback) {
	if(eventName == "selected") {
		this.clickBinded = true;
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if(dom) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if(eventName == "onload") {
		this.onloadcallback = callback;
	}
	else if(eventName == "ondrop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if(typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
			$$.bindEvent(dom, "dragover", function (ev) {
				ev.preventDefault();
				ev.stopPropagation();
			});//drop olayının çalışması için
		}
	}
	else if(eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if(typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-mini-button.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-MIN-BUTTON
 * @classdesc Temel buton componenti.
 * @author Mahmut Yıldız, Mete Işık
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		focusable : true
	};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.LABEL = "Mini Button";
	this.METHODS = [ "setTips(tips)", "changeIcon(src)", "focus",
			"setOnContextMenuCallback(callback)", "showContextMenu",
			"changeTheme(buttonTheme)", "changeButtonType(buttonType)","setBadge(text)", "removeBadge" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected" ];
	this.DISABLE_EVENTS = [ "selected" ];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];
	this.Type = function() {
	};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-MINI-BUTTON", def);

var BC = def.Type;
BC.prototype.miniButtonTooltips = function() {
	return {
		"fa-plus" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Add")
		},
		"fa-plus-circle" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Add")
		},
		"fa-caret-down" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Down")
		},
		"fa-caret-up" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Up")
		},
		"fa-caret-left" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Left")
		},
		"fa-caret-right" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Right")
		},
		"fa-paperclip" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Attachment")
		},
		"fa-bars" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Dropdown")
		},
		"fa-calendar" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Calendar")
		},
		"fa-calculator" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Calculator")
		},
		"fa-bar-chart" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Chart")
		},
		"fa-line-chart" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Chart")
		},
		"fa-pie-chart" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Chart")
		},
		"fa-check" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Check")
		},
		"fa-files-o" : {
			"tooltipText" : SideMLManager.get("CSC-MINI-Button.Copy")
		},

/**
 * @function setOnContextMenuCallback
 * @description Context menü açıldıktan sonra çağrılacak callback fonksiyonunu
 *              ayarlar.
 * @param [callback]
 *            callback fonksiyonu
 */
BC.prototype.setOnContextMenuCallback = function(callback) {
	var bc = this;
	this.contextMenuCallback = callback;

	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if ($$dom) {
		$$.bindEvent($$dom, "contextmenu", function(event) {
			bc.showContextMenu(event);
		});
	}
};

/**
 * @function showContextMenu
 * @description Pop-up şeklinde açılan context menüyü gösterir. Bunun için bir
 *              callback fonksiyonu olmak zorundadır.
 * @param [event]
 */
BC.prototype.showContextMenu = function(event) {
	event = event || window.event;
	var bc = this;
	console.log("mini button context menu");
	event.preventDefault();
	var menuItemsObj = this.contextMenuCallback();

	csdu.contextMenu({
		moduleName : bc.bf.getModuleName(),
		left : event.pageX,
		top : event.pageY,
		items : menuItemsObj
	}, undefined, event);
};

/**
 * @function focus
 * @description Odağı mini butona alır.
 */
BC.prototype.focus = function() {
	$$txt = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if ($$txt) {
		$$txt.focus();
	}
};

/**
 * @function setTips
 * @description Mini butonun üstüne gelip bekleyince beliren ipucunu ayarlar.
 * @param [tips]
 *            Mini butonun üstünde beliren ipucu
 */
BC.prototype.setTips = function(tips) {
	this.config.tips = tips;
	var $$btn = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if ($$btn) {
		$$btn.setAttribute("title", this.config.tips);
	}
};

/**
 * @function changeIcon
 * @description Mini butonu ikon olarak ayarlar.
 * @param [src]
 *            Mini butonun yerine ayarlanacak ikonun hangi lokasyondan alınacağı
 */
BC.prototype.changeIcon = function(src) {
	this.config.src = src;
	this.reRender();
};

/**
 * @function changeButtonType
 * @description Mini butonun ikonunu değiştirir.
 * @param [buttonType]
 *            Mini butonun font ikonların value larıdır.
 */
BC.prototype.changeButtonType = function(buttonType) {
	this.config.buttonType = "fa-" + buttonType
	this.reRender();
};
/**
 * @function changeTheme
 * @description Mini butonun temasini değiştirir.
 * @param [buttonTheme]
 *            primary,success,warning,danger seçeneklerinden biri string olarak
 *            gönderilir.
 */
BC.prototype.changeTheme = function(buttonTheme) {
	this.config.buttonTheme = buttonTheme;
	this.reRender();
};
BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc = this, bf = bc.bf, config = bc.config;
	var bfname = bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
	var btnSelector = null, src;

	if (!config.src && config.buttonType) {
		if (config.buttonType.indexOf("css/bc-style") !== -1) {
			// eskiden kalan icon button ise
			src = config.buttonType;
		} else {
			// yeni buttonType secilmis ise
			src = null;
		}
	} else {
		// icon olarak disaridan source verilmis ise
		if (config.src) {
			if(config.src.indexOf("base64")<0){
