				src = SideModuleManager.getResourceUrl(bfname.substring(0, bfname.indexOf(".")), config.src);
			} else {
				src = config.src;
			}
		} else {
			src = "css/bc-style/img/iconNotAvaliable.png";
		}
	}

	if (src === null) {
		// yebni ikon button
		btnSelector = "A";
	} else {
		// eski icon button ya da disardan source verilmis
		btnSelector = "INPUT";
	}
	var $$input = $$.create(btnSelector, {
		id : config.id,
		type : "button",
		"tabindex" : config.tabIndex,
		disabled : (bf.isDisabled() && !config.runOnDisabled),
		title : config.tips
	}, [ "csc-mini-button", config.cssClass ], config.style);
	$$input.setAttribute("rel",bf.$CS$.name);
	$$.css($$input, {
		display : bf.isVisible() ? "" : "none"
	});

	if (src !== null) {
		$$.css($$input, {
			background : "url('" + src + "') no-repeat"
		});
		var style = config.style;
		if (style && (config.style.width || config.style.height)) {
			var width = style.width ? style.width + "" : "16px", height = style.height ? style.height
					+ ""
					: "16px";
			if (width.indexOf("%") < 0 && height.indexOf("%") < 0) {
				width = width.indexOf("px") >= 0 ? width : width + "px";
				height = height.indexOf("px") >= 0 ? height : height + "px";
				$$.css($$input, {
					backgroundSize : width + " " + height
				});
			}
		}
	} else {
		if(this.config.badge) {
			var $$buttonBadge = $$.create("span",null,["mini-button__badge"],null,$$input);
			$$.addClass($$buttonBadge, "hide");
			$$buttonBadge .setAttribute("id", this.config.id + "_badge");
		}
		if (this.config.iconClass) {
			$$.create("I",null,["fa "+this.config.iconClass],null,$$input);
		} else{
			$$.create("I",null,["fa "+this.config.buttonType],null,$$input);
		}
		if (!bc.config.tips) {
			$$input.setAttribute(
					"title",
					bc.miniButtonTooltips()[this.config.buttonType.trim()].tooltipText);
		} else {
			$$input.setAttribute("title", bc.config.tips);
		}
		$$.addClass($$input, "csc-mini-button--font-icon");
		if (config.buttonTheme) {
			$$.addClass($$input, "csc-mini-button--theme csc-mini-button--"
					+ config.buttonTheme);
		}
	}
	if (inDesigner(bf)) { // Design Time da visible yap
		$$input.style.display = "";
	}

	if (bc.contextMenuCallback) {
		$$.bindEvent($$input, "contextmenu", function(event) {
			bc.showContextMenu(event);
		});
	}

	$container.appendChild($$input);
};
BC.prototype.setBadge = function(text){
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	if (!config.badge) {
		console.error("CSC-MIN-BUTTON:\nNotification Badge is " + config.badge);
		return;
	}
	var badge = $$.byid(config.id + "_badge");
	$$.rmClass(badge, "hide");
	badge.innerHTML = text;
}
BC.prototype.removeBadge = function(){
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	var badge = $$.byid(config.id + "_badge");
	$$.addClass(badge, "hide");
}
BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (dom) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-bar-chart.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-BAR-CHART
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled: false
	};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.LABEL = "Bar Chart";
	this.METHODS = ["setData(data, notrender)"];

	this.EVENTS = ["onload", "selected", "barSelected(value)"];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [
		{name: "d3", version: "3.1.9"}
	];

	this.Type = function () {
	};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-BAR-CHART", def);
var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function () {
	if(inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		this.data = {
			//labels : [ "Ocak", "Şubat", "Mart", "Nisan", "Mayıs" ],
			labels: [SideMLManager.get("common.january"), SideMLManager.get("common.february"), SideMLManager.get("common.march"), SideMLManager.get("common.april"), SideMLManager.get("common.may")],
			values: [120, 89, 92, 157, 69],
			info: ["", 123, "1234", "", ""],
			totalValue: undefined
		};
	}

	//Load d3 library if not loaded
	if(window.d3LibLoaded) {
		return;
	}
	var pathPrefix = "js/3thParty/d3/", bc = this, libs;
	if(CSSession.getEnv() == "dev" || CSSession.getEnv() == "test" || inDesigner(bc.bf)) {
		pathPrefix = "designer/" + pathPrefix;
	}
	libs = [pathPrefix + "d3.v3.min.js"];

	SLibraryLoader.loadLib("d3", libs, {progress: true}, function () {
		window.d3LibLoaded = true;
		BFEngine.a();
		BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
		BFEngine.r();
	});
};
BC.prototype.setVisible = function (flag) {
	this.config.visible = flag;
	$$.css(this.config.id, "display", flag ? "" : "none");
};

/**
 * @function setData
 * @description Bar chart'ta gözüken veri set edilir.
 * @param [data] Bar chart'ta gözükecek veri
 * @example { labels : [ "Ocak", "Şubat", "Mart", "Nisan", "Mayıs" ], values : [ 1120, 189, 192, 1157, 170 ], totalValue : 9000} formatinda girilir. totalValue parametresi values kısmındaki değerlerin yüzdesini hesaplarken kullanılır.
 * @param [notrender] Veriler değiştikten sonra chart'ın render edilip edilmemesini belirler. Bu parametre girilmezse varsayılan değeri false olarak alınır.
 */
BC.prototype.setData = function (data, notrender) {
	this.data = data;
	if(notrender) {
		return;
	}
	this.bf.rerender();
};

BC.prototype.render = function ($$container) {
	if(!window.d3LibLoaded) {
		return;
	}
	var bc = this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	var $$div = $$.create("DIV",{id: config.id}, null, null, $$container);
	if(!bc.data) {
		return;
	}

	if(config.title) {
		var $title = $$.create("DIV", null, "csc-bar-title", null, $$div);
		$title.innerHTML = config.title;
	}

	config.style = config.style || {};
	var data=bc.data, total = 0;
	if(data.totalValue) {
		total = data.totalValue;
	} else {
		for(var i in data.values) {
			total += data.values[i];
		}
	}

	var width = config.style.width || $$.innerWidth($$container) || 200, bar_height = 24, height = bar_height * data.labels.length + 10;
	var left_width = config.style.labelAreaWidth || 80;
	left_width = parseInt(left_width);
	width = width - left_width - 10;

	var x, y;
	x = d3.scale.linear().domain([0, d3.max(data.values)]).range([0, width - 35]);
	y = d3.scale.ordinal().domain(data.labels).rangeBands([0, height]);

	var chart = d3.select($$div).append('svg').attr('class', 'csc-bar-chart').attr('width', left_width + width).attr('height', height);
	var rect = chart.selectAll("rect").data(data.values).enter().append("rect").attr("x", left_width).attr("y", function (d, i) {
		return y(data.labels[i]);
	}).attr("width", x).attr("height", y.rangeBand() - 4);
	rect.append("svg:title").text(function (d) {
		return d;
	});
	rect.on("click", function (d) {
		bf.fire("barSelected", d);
	});

	chart.selectAll("text.score").data(data.values).enter().append("text")
		.attr("x", function (d) {
			return x(d) + left_width;
		}).attr("y", function (d, i) {
		return y(data.labels[i]) + y.rangeBand() / 2;
	}).attr("dx", -5).attr("dy", ".36em").attr("text-anchor", "end").attr('class', 'score').text(function (d, a, b, c) {
		return x(d) > 15 ? d : "";
	});

	chart.selectAll("text.percentage").data(data.values).enter().append("text").attr("x", function (d) {
		return x(d) + left_width + 33;
	}).attr("y", function (d, i) {
		return y(data.labels[i]) + y.rangeBand() / 2;
	}).attr("dx", -5).attr("dy", ".36em").attr("text-anchor", "end").attr('class', 'percentage').text(function (d, i) {
			if(data.info && data.info[i] !== undefined) {
				return data.info[i];
			} else {
				return (d / total * 100).toFixed(0) + "%";
			}
		}
	);

	var visibleCharCount = config.labelCharCount || 30;
	chart.append("svg:g").attr("width", left_width).selectAll("text.name").data(this.data.labels).enter().append("text").attr("x", 0).attr("y", function (d, i) {
		return y(data.labels[i]) + y.rangeBand() / 2;
	}).attr("dy", ".36em").attr("text-anchor", "start").attr('class', 'label').text(function (d) {
		if(d && d.length > visibleCharCount) {
			d = d.substring(0, visibleCharCount) + "...";
		}
		return d;
	}).append("svg:title").text(function (d) {
		return d;
	});
};

BC.prototype.load = function () {
	if(this.onloadcallback) {
		this.onloadcallback();
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function (eventName, callback) {
	if(eventName == "selected") {
		var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if($$dom) {
			$$dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if(eventName == "onload") {
		this.onloadcallback = callback;
	}
};


})(window);
/////=csc-fileupload.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-FILE-UPLOAD
 * @classdesc Fileupload componenti. Ajax tabanlıdır.
 * @author Hakan Durmaz, Murat Özüdoğru, Mahmut Yıldız
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled: false,
		cls: "csc-fileupload",
		quickSubmit: true
	};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.METHODS = ["setParameters(jp)", "clearParameters", "getFiles(getObj)", "uploadFiles", "abort"];
	this.EVENTS = ["selected", "changed", "upload-started", "upload-completed(respObj)"];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [
		{ name : "JQuery", version : "2.0.3" },
		{ name: "tus", version: "1.4.5" }
	];
	
	this.Type = function (moduleName) {
		this.uploadComplatedCallback = null;
		this.uploadStartedCallback = null;
		this.dndEmptyText = SideMLManager.get("common.dndEmptyText");

		if (BCDefaults.get("CSC-FILEUPLOAD", "customFileSelector", undefined, moduleName)) {
			window.customFileSelector = true;
		}
	};

}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-FILEUPLOAD", def);
var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function () {
	var bc = this;

	if(this.config.tusSupport && !window.tusLibLoaded && !window.tus){
		SLibraryLoader.loadLib("tus", ["js/3thParty/tus/tus.min.js"], {progress: true}, function () {
			window.tusLibLoaded = true;
			BFEngine.a();
			BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
			BFEngine.r();
		});
	}
};

BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
	return this.config.value;
};

BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
	this.config.value = value;
};

/**
 * @function setParameters
 * @description Parametreleri ayarlar.
 * @param [jp] JSON parametreleri
 */
BC.prototype.setParameters = function(jp) {
	this.params = jp;
};

/**
 * @function clearParameters
 * @description Parametreleri siler.
 */
BC.prototype.clearParameters = function() {
	delete this.params;
};

BC.prototype.checkExceptList = function(fileNames) {
	if(!this.config.except){
		return;
	}
	var exceptList = [];
	var except = this.config.except.split(",");
	for (var i = 0; i < except.length; i++) {
		except[i] = stringTrim(except[i]);
		if (except[i]) {
			exceptList.push(except[i]);
		}
	}
	
	for (var i = 0; i < fileNames.length; i++) {
		for (var j = 0; j < exceptList.length; j++) {
			if (SIDEString.endsWith(fileNames[i], SIDEString.ifMimeTypeConvertToExtension(exceptList[j]))) {
//				var msg = "'" + fileNames[i] + "' dosyası '." + exceptList[j] + "' uzantısına sahip olduğu için sunucuya yüklenmesine izin verilmiyor.";
				var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "notAllowedToUpload", fileNames[i], exceptList[j]);
				CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg, {
					error : true
				});
				throw msg;
			}
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.checkAcceptList = function(fileNames) {
	if(!this.config.accept){
		return;
	}
	var acceptList = [];
	var accept = this.config.accept.split(",");
	for (var i = 0; i < accept.length; i++) {
		accept[i] = stringTrim(accept[i]);
		if (accept[i]) {
			acceptList.push(accept[i]);
		}
	}
	
	var acceptIt = false;
	for (var i = 0; i < fileNames.length; i++) {
		acceptIt = false;
		for (var j = 0; j < acceptList.length; j++) {
			if (SIDEString.endsWith(fileNames[i].name, SIDEString.ifMimeTypeConvertToExtension(acceptList[j]))) {
				acceptIt = true;
			}
		}
		if (!acceptIt) {
			var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "notAllowedToUpload2", fileNames[i].name, this.config.accept);
			CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg, {
				error : true
			});
			throw msg;
		}
	}
};

// Upload etmek istediğinde
BC.prototype.submit = function() {
	this.preSubmit();

	var bc = this;

	var formData = new FormData();
	var $finput =  $("#" + this.config.id);
	var files = $finput.get(0).files;
	for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
		formData.append('file', files[i]);
	}

	var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
	xhr.upload.addEventListener("progress", function() {
		bc.uploadProgress();
	}, false);
	xhr.addEventListener("load", function(event) {
		bc.uploadComplete(event, this.status);
	}, false);
	xhr.addEventListener("error", function(event) {
		bc.uploadComplete(event, this.status);
 	}, false);

	xhr.open("POST", this.getUrl(), true);
	xhr.withCredentials = true;
	xhr.send(formData);
	// clear files
	$finput.replaceWith($finput.clone());
};

//Dışarıya açık metod. Kullanıcının upload'ı tetikliyebilmesi için. TODO IE9
/**
 * @function uploadFiles
 * @description Dosyaları yükler. Kullanıcı tetikleyebilir. Tus Support aktifse başlatma işini de yapar.
 */
BC.prototype.uploadFiles = function() {
	if(this.config.tusSupport){
		this.preSubmit();
		this.tusInstance.start();
	} else {
		this.submit();
	}
};

/**
 * @function uploadFiles
 * @description Dosyaları yükler. Kullanıcı tetikleyebilir. Tus Support aktifse başlatma işini de yapar.
 */
BC.prototype.abort = function() {
	if(this.config.tusSupport){
		this.tusInstance.abort();
	}
};

//File picker'daki file listesini döner TODO IE9 ve DND
/**
 * @function getFiles
 * @description File picker'daki file listesini döner
 * @param [getObj]
 */
BC.prototype.getFiles = function(getObj) {
	var result = [];
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(!$$dom){
		return result;
	}
	var files = $$dom.files;
	for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
		if(getObj){
			result.push(files[i]);
		}else{
			result.push(files[i].name);
		}
	}
	return result;
};


BC.prototype.uploadProgress = function() {
	var event = window.event;
	if (!event) {
		return;
	}
	var progress = Math.round(event.loaded / event.total * 100);
	$$.html(this.config.id + "-progress-div", progress + "%");
};

BC.prototype.uploadComplete = function(event, status) {
	if (!event) {
		event = window.event;
	}
	if(status !== 200){
		if (this.config.msg !== false) {
			var $$infodiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
			if($$infodiv){
				this.message = SideMLManager.get(this, "uploadFailed", status);
				$$infodiv.style.display = "";
				$$infodiv.innerHTML = this.message;
			}
		}
		this.uploadComplatedCallback(false);
	} else {
		if (this.config.msg !== false) {
			var $$infodiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
			if($$infodiv){
				$$infodiv.style.display = "";
				this.message = SideMLManager.get("common.uploadCompleted", status);
				$$infodiv.innerHTML = this.message;
			}
		}
		if (this.uploadComplatedCallback) {
			if(!this.config.respType || this.config.respType === "json"){
				var respObj = null;
				if (typeof event.target.responseText === "object") {
					respObj = event.target.responseText;
				} else if (typeof event.target.responseText === "string") {
					try {
						respObj = eval("(" + event.target.responseText + ")");
					} catch(e){}
				}
				this.uploadComplatedCallback(respObj);
			} else {
				this.uploadComplatedCallback(event.target.responseText);
			}
		}
	}
	this.removeMaskDiv();

	if (this.config.dnd) {
		this.renderDnd();
	}

	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.createMaskDiv = function(isDnd) {
	if(this.config.showProgress === false){
		return;
	}
	var bc = this;
	var $$dynDiv = $$.byid(bc.config.id + (isDnd ? "-dnd-div" : "-div"));
	if ($$dynDiv) {// bc çizilmişse
		if (!$$.byid(bc.config.id + "-mask")) {
			var width = $$.innerWidth($$dynDiv);
			var height = $$.innerHeight($$dynDiv);
			var cssObj = {
				width : width + 3,
				height : height + 3,
				position : "absolute",
				background : "#d0d0d0",
				opacity : 0.6,
				textAlign : "center",
				zIndex : 1111
			};

			var $$maskDiv = $$.create("div", {id : bc.config.id + "-mask"}, [ "csc-fileupload-mask" ], cssObj);
			$$dynDiv.parentNode.insertBefore($$maskDiv, $$dynDiv);
			var $$loaderImg = $$.create("img", {src : "css/bc-style/img/ajax-loader2.gif"}, null, {marginTop: "7px"}, $$maskDiv);
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.removeMaskDiv = function() {
	$$.remove(this.config.id + "-mask");
};

// //// DND METHODS ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
BC.prototype.dndUploadComplete = function(event) {
	if (!event) {
		event = window.event;
	}

	var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div");
	$$progress.value = 100;
	$$progress.innerHTML = 100;
	this.files = null;

	var respStr = "";
	if (typeof event.target.responseText === "string") {
		respStr = event.target.responseText;
	}
	// this.writeLog(respStr || "Yükleme işlemi tamamlandı.");
	this.clearLog();
	this.writeLog(SideMLManager.get("common.uploadCompleted"));

	if (this.uploadComplatedCallback) {
		if(!this.config.respType || this.config.respType == "json"){
			var respObj = null;
			if (typeof event.target.responseText === "object") {
				respObj = event.target.responseText;
			} else if (typeof event.target.responseText === "string") {
				respObj = eval("(" + event.target.responseText + ")");
			}
			this.uploadComplatedCallback(respObj);
		} else {
			this.uploadComplatedCallback(event.target.responseText);
		}
	}
	this.removeMaskDiv();
	this.renderChooseFile();
};

BC.prototype.dndSubmit = function() {
	var bc = this;
	var files = this.files;

	if (files == null) {
		var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "noFileChosen");
		CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg);
		throw msg;
	}
	
	for (var i = 0; this.config.maxSize && i < files.length; i++) {
		if(files[i].size > this.config.maxSize*1024){
			var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "fileTooBig", this.config.maxSize);
			CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg, {error:true});
			return;
		}
	}
	
	var fileNames = [];
	for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
		fileNames.push(files[i].name);
	}
	this.checkExceptList(fileNames);
	this.checkAcceptList(files);

	if (this.uploadStartedCallback) {
		this.uploadStartedCallback();
	}

	var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div");
	var formData = new FormData();
	for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
		formData.append('file', files[i]);
	}
	var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
	xhr.onload = function(event) {
		bc.dndUploadComplete(event);
	};
	xhr.upload.onprogress = function(event) {
		if (event.lengthComputable) {
			var complete = (event.loaded / event.total * 100 | 0);
			$$progress.value = $$progress.innerHTML = complete;
		}
	};
	xhr.onerror = function(err) {
		bc.writeLog("Hata oluştu:" + err);
		this.files = null;
	};

	xhr.withCredentials = true;
	xhr.open("POST", this.getUrl(), true);
	xhr.send(formData);

	// this.clearInner();
	this.files = null;

	this.createMaskDiv(true);
};

BC.prototype.clearLog = function(){
	var dndArea = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd");
	dndArea.innerHTML = "";
};

BC.prototype.writeLog = function(file) {
	var dndArea = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd");
	if (file && file.name) {
		dndArea.innerHTML += '<li>' + file.name + '    ' + (file.size ? (file.size / 1024 | 0) + 'K' : '') + "</li>";
	} else {
		dndArea.innerHTML += '<li>' + file + "</li>";
	}
	console.log(file);
};

BC.prototype.clear = function() {
	var $$fileSelector = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$fileSelector){
		$($$fileSelector).val('');
	}
};

BC.prototype.clearInner = function() {
	var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");
	if ($$progress) {
		$$progress.innerHTML = "";
	}
	var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div");
	var $$fileSelector = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-dnd");
	if ($$progress && $$fileSelector) {
		$$progress.innerHTML = "";
		$$progress.value = 0;
		$$fileSelector.innerHTML = this.dndEmptyText;
	}
	
	this.files = null;
};

BC.prototype.readfiles = function(files) {
	if(!this.files){
		this.files = files;
	} else {
		for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
			this.files.append(file, files[i]);
		}
	}
	for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
		this.writeLog(files[i]);
	}
};

BC.prototype.getUrl = function() {
	var bfname = this.bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
	var moduleName = bfname.substring(0, bfname.indexOf("."));
	if(this.params && this.params.module){
		moduleName = this.params.module;
	}
	var url = SideModuleManager.getAppUrl(moduleName, this.config.servletPath);
	if(url.indexOf("?cmd=") < 0){
		url += "?cmd=fileUpload";
	}
	var token = CSSession.getToken(this.bf);
	if (token) {
		var tokenKey = window.getSideDefaults("param-token-key", this.bf);
		url += "&" + tokenKey + "=" + encodeURIComponent(token);
	}
	if (typeof this.params == "object") {
		for ( var key in this.params) {
			url += "&" + key + "=" + this.params[key];
		}
	}
	return url;
};

// //// DND METHODS END///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
BC.prototype.render = function ($container) {
	if(this.config.tusSupport && !window.tusLibLoaded && !window.tus){
		return;
	}

	var $$minimizeIcon;
	var $contDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-cont-div");
	// Body'de eski state varsa container içine taşı ve onu kullan.
	if($contDiv){
		$contDiv.parentNode.removeChild($contDiv);
		$$.css($contDiv, "visibility", "visible");
		$container.appendChild($contDiv);
		return;
	} else {
		$contDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-cont-div");
	}

	if(this.bf.isReadonly()){
		this.config.disabled = true;
	}

	if (this.config.minimize && this.config.minimize === "popup") {
		var bc = this;
		if (!($container.className === "cs-popup-content" )) {
			$$minimizeIcon = $$.create("DIV", {id: this.config.id + "-minimize-icon"}, "csc-fileupload-minimize-icon");
			$container.appendChild($$minimizeIcon);

			var bf = bc.bf;
			$$minimizeIcon.onclick = function () {
				var popup = new CSSimplePopup($contDiv, {
					disableShotcuts: false,
					closeOnEscape: true,
					dontRemove: false,
					title: "File Upload",
					width: 400
				});
				popup.open();

				bc.renderChooseFile();

				if (bc.config.dnd && !$$.isie9()) {
					bc.renderDnd();
				}

				var dom = byid(bc.config.id + "-btn");
				dom.onclick = function () {
					bf.fire("selected");
				}
			};
			return;
		}
	} else if (this.config.minimize && this.config.minimize === "inline" && !$$.byid(this.config.id + "-minimize-icon")) {
		var bc = this;
		$$minimizeIcon = $$.create("DIV", {id: this.config.id + "-minimize-icon"}, "csc-fileupload-minimize-icon");
		$container.appendChild($$minimizeIcon);

		$$minimizeIcon.onclick = function () {
			bc.config.clickedMinimizeButton = true;
			var $$dom = $$.byid(bc.config.id + "-cont-div");
			if ($$dom.style.display !== "none") {
				$$.css($$dom, "display", "none");
			} else {
				$$.css($$dom, "display", "");
			}
		}
	}

	$container.appendChild($contDiv[0]);

	if (this.config.minimize && this.config.minimize === "inline" && !this.config.clickedMinimizeButton) {
		$$.css($$.byid(this.config.id + "-cont-div"), "display", "none");
	}

	this.renderChooseFile();

	if (this.config.dnd && !$$.isie9()) {
		this.renderDnd();
	}
};

BC.prototype.renderChooseFile = function($container) {

	var $contDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-cont-div");
	var bc = this;
	var disabled = this.config.runOnDisabled !== true && this.bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : "";
	// create button

	var $fileUploadDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-div");
	var $progressDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-progress-div");
	if ($fileUploadDiv.length !== 0) {
		$fileUploadDiv.html("").show();
		$progressDiv.html("").show();
	} else {
		$fileUploadDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-div");
		$progressDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-progress-div").html("");
		$contDiv.append($fileUploadDiv);
		$contDiv.append($progressDiv);
	}
	this.message = null;
	var $form, $$iframe;
	if($$.isie9()){
		var bfname = this.bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
		$form = $("<form>").attr({method:"post", enctype:"multipart/form-data", target:"iif"+this.config.id});
		$$iframe = $$.create("iframe",{name:"iif"+this.config.id, id:"iif"+this.config.id, width:0, height:0, border: 0}, null, {display: "none"});
		if(window.customFileSelector) $form.css("display","table");
	}
	
	if(window.customFileSelector){
		var $fileSelector = $("<input style=\"width:100%; height: 100%; margin: 0px !important;\">");
	
		$fileUploadDiv.css("display", "table");
		var $customFileSelector = $("<div class=\"csc-fileupload-custom-fileselector csc-fileupload\">").append($fileSelector);
		$customFileSelector.addClass(this.config.cls);
		var $fakeSelector = $("<div>").appendTo($customFileSelector);
		var $fakeSelectorInput = $("<input type=\"button\" value=\""+SideMLManager.get(this, "chooseFileLabel")+"\" >").appendTo($customFileSelector);
		var $fakeSelectorSpan = $("<span>"+SideMLManager.get(this, "noFileChosen")+"</span>").appendTo($customFileSelector);
	}else{
		var $fileSelector = $("<input>");
	}
	
	$fileSelector.bind("change", function(e) {
		var $fileUploadDiv = $("#" + bc.config.id + "-dnd-div");
		var $progressDiv = $("#" + bc.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div");
		// diğer file upload bileşenini sakla
		$fileUploadDiv.hide();
		$progressDiv.hide();
		bc.clearInner();

		if(bc.config.tusSupport){
			bc.initTus(e.target.files);
		}

		bc.bf.fire("changed");
	});

	$fileSelector.addClass(this.config.cls);
	// set Basic Attributes if exists
	checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "id", this.config.id);
	checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "type", "file");
	checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "accept", this.config.accept);
	if (this.config.multiple) {
		checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "multiple", "multiple");
	}
	checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "size", "20");
	checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "disabled", disabled);
	if(window.customFileSelector) checkAndAddAttribute($fakeSelectorInput, "disabled", disabled);
	checkAndSetCss($fileSelector, this.config.style);
	// set display if exists
	if(window.customFileSelector){checkAndSetCss($customFileSelector, "display", this.config.visible ? "table-cell" : "none");}
	else {checkAndSetCss($fileSelector, "display", this.config.visible ? "" : "none");}
	
	if($form){
		$fileSelector.attr("name", "file");
		if(window.customFileSelector) $form.append($customFileSelector); else $form.append($fileSelector);
		$fileUploadDiv.append($form);
		$fileUploadDiv.append($$iframe);
		$$iframe.firstload = true;
		$$iframe.onload = function(){
			if($$iframe.firstload){
				$$iframe.firstload = false;
				return;
			}
			var content;
			try {
				content = $$iframe.contentDocument.body.textContent;//hata oluşunca bura ie erişim hatası veriyor
				bc.uploadComplete({target: { responseText: content}}, 200);
			} catch(e){
				var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "uploadFailedOldBrowser");
				alert(msg);
				bc.uploadComplete({target: {}}, "");
			}
			bc.reRender();
		};
		
	} else {
		if(window.customFileSelector) $fileUploadDiv.append($customFileSelector);
		else $fileUploadDiv.append($fileSelector);
	}

	$fileSelector.css(this.config.style || {});
	if(window.customFileSelector) $customFileSelector.css(this.config.style || {});

	// Design Time da visible yap
	if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		$fileSelector.css("display", "");
		$fileSelector.attr("disabled", "");
	}

	$fileSelector.addClass("csc-fileupload");

	var btnTitle = SideMLManager.get("common.upload");
	if (this.config.title) {
		btnTitle = this.config.title;
	}

	if (this.config.button !== false) {
		var $uploadButton = $("<input>");
		$uploadButton.attr({id: this.config.id + "-btn", type: "submit", value: btnTitle});
		if(disabled){
			$uploadButton.attr("disabled", disabled);
		}
		$uploadButton.addClass(this.config.cls);
		checkAndSetCss($uploadButton, this.config.style);
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf)) {
			var bc = this;
			if($form){
				$form[0].onsubmit = function(){
					$form.attr("action", bc.getUrl());
					var file = $fileSelector.val();
					if(!file){
						return false;
					}
					bc.checkExceptList([file]);
					//bc.checkAcceptList([file]);
					if (bc.uploadStartedCallback) {
						bc.uploadStartedCallback();
					}
				};
			} else {
				$uploadButton.click(function() {
					$("#" + bc.config.id + "-progress-div").html("");
					bc.submit($fileSelector);
				});
			}
		}
		$uploadButton.addClass("csc-fileupload");

		checkAndSetCss($uploadButton, "display", this.config.visible ? "" : "none");
		if (!disabled) {
			if($form){
				$form.append($uploadButton);
			} else {
				$fileUploadDiv.append($uploadButton);
			}
		}
		
		if(window.customFileSelector){
			$fileSelector.change(function(){
				var files = "";
				if(this.files.length>1)
					files = SideMLManager.get(this, "fileChosen", this.files.length);
				else
					files = this.files[0].name;
				$fakeSelectorSpan.text(this.files.length>0 ? files : SideMLManager.get(this, "noFileChosen"));
			});
		}
	} else {
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf)) {
			var bc = this;
			$fileSelector.change(function(e) {
				if(!bc.config.quickSubmit){
					return;
				}
				if($form){
					$form.attr("action", bc.getUrl());
					var file = $fileSelector.val();
					if(!file){
						return;
					}
					bc.checkExceptList([file]);
					//bc.checkAcceptList([file]);
					if (bc.uploadStartedCallback) {
						bc.uploadStartedCallback();
					}
					$form.submit();
					return;
				}
				$("#" + bc.config.id + "-progress-div").html("");
				bc.submit($fileSelector);
			});
		}
	}

	if (!this.config.showProgress) {
		$progressDiv.hide();
	}

};

BC.prototype.renderDnd = function() {
	var $contDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-cont-div");
	var bc = this;
	var disabled = this.bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : "";
	if (disabled && this.config.runOnDisabled !== true) {
		return;
	}

	// bileşenin html elementlerini oluştur. div -> [div-dnd, div-> [progress, button] ]
	var $fileUploadDndDiv = $("#" + this.config.id + "-dnd-div");
	if ($fileUploadDndDiv.length !== 0) {
		$fileUploadDndDiv.html("").show();
	} else {
		$fileUploadDndDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-dnd-div");
		$contDiv.append($fileUploadDndDiv);
	}

	$fileUploadDndDiv.addClass("csc-fileuploaddnd");
	$fileUploadDndDiv.addClass(this.config.cls);
	checkAndSetCss($fileUploadDndDiv, this.config.style);
	checkAndSetCss($fileUploadDndDiv, "display", this.config.visible ? "" : "none");
	var $infoDiv = $("<div>").addClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-info-div");
	var $progressDiv = $("<progress>").attr("id", this.config.id + "-dnd-progress-div").attr("min", "0").attr("max", "100").attr("value", "0");
	var $fileSelector = $("<ul>");
	$fileSelector.addClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-dnd-area");
	checkAndAddAttribute($fileSelector, "id", this.config.id + "-dnd");
	$fileSelector.html(this.dndEmptyText);
	$infoDiv.append($progressDiv);
	$fileUploadDndDiv.append($fileSelector);
	$fileUploadDndDiv.append($infoDiv);
	// Design Time da visible yap
	if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		$fileUploadDndDiv.css("display", "");
		$fileUploadDndDiv.attr("disabled", "");
	}

	// dnd alan için eventler bağla
	$fileSelector[0].ondragover = function() {
		$fileSelector.addClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-hover");
		return false;
	};
	$fileSelector[0].ondragend = function() {
		$fileSelector.removeClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-hover");
		return false;
	};
	$fileSelector[0].ondrop = function(e) {
		e.preventDefault();
		$fileSelector.removeClass("csc-fileuploaddnd-hover");
		bc.readfiles(e.dataTransfer.files);

		// diğer file upload bileşenini sakla
		$("#" + bc.config.id + "-div").hide();
		$("#" + bc.config.id + "-progress-div").hide();

		if (bc.config.button === false) {
			bc.dndSubmit();
		}
	};

	// yükle butonu
	if (this.config.button !== false) {
		var btnTitle = SideMLManager.get("common.upload");
		if (this.config.title) {
			btnTitle = this.config.title;
		}
		var $uploadButton = $("<input>");
		$uploadButton.attr({id: this.config.id + "-dnd-btn", type: "submit", value: btnTitle});
		checkAndSetCss($uploadButton, this.config.style);
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf)) {
			$uploadButton.click(function() {
				$progressDiv.html("");
				bc.dndSubmit();
			});
		}
		$infoDiv.append($uploadButton);
	}

	// temizle butonu
	var $clearButton = $("<input>");
	checkAndAddAttribute($clearButton, "type", "button");
	checkAndAddAttribute($clearButton, "value", SideMLManager.get("common.clear"));
	$clearButton.click(function() {
		bc.clearInner();
	});
	$infoDiv.append($clearButton);

	if (!this.config.showProgress) {
		$progressDiv.hide();
	}
};

BC.prototype.getHtmlId = function() {
	if(this.config.minimize === "popup"){
		return this.config.id + "-minimize-icon"
	}
	return this.config.id + "-cont-div";
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function (eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName === "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id + "-btn");
		if (typeof dom !== "undefined" && dom !== null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName === "upload-completed") {
		this.uploadComplatedCallback = callback;
	} else if (eventName === "upload-started") {
		this.uploadStartedCallback = callback;
	}
};

BC.prototype.initTus = function (files) {
	if(files.length > 1){
		SPopup.MessageBox("Tus.io support can not work when Multiple Upload property is enabled!", {error: true});
	} else {
		var bc = this;
		var $$progress = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-progress-div");

		this.tusInstance = new tus.Upload(
			files[0],
			{
				endpoint: bc.getUrl(),
				retryDelays: [0, 1000, 3000, 5000],
				onProgress: function (bytesUploaded, bytesTotal,x,y) {
					if(bc.config.showProgress){
						$$progress.value = $$progress.innerHTML = (bytesUploaded / bytesTotal * 100).toFixed(2) + "%";
					}
				},
				onError: function (err) {
					bc.uploadComplete(null, err);
				},
				onSuccess: function (x,y,z) {
					bc.uploadComplete(null, 200);
				},
				onChunkComplete: function (x, y, z) {
					console.log("asasas");
				}
			}
		);
	}
};

BC.prototype.preSubmit = function () {
	var $finput =  $("#" + this.config.id);
	var files = $finput.get(0).files;
	if (files.length === 0) {
		var msg = SideMLManager.get("common.noFileToUpload");
		CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg);
		throw msg;
	}

	for (var i = 0; this.config.maxSize && i < files.length; i++) {
		if(files[i].size > this.config.maxSize*1024){
			var msg = SideMLManager.get(this, "fileTooBig", this.config.maxSize);
			CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg, {error:true});
			return;
		}
	}

	var fileNames = [];
	for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
		fileNames.push(files[i].name);
	}
	this.checkExceptList(fileNames);
	this.checkAcceptList(files);

	if (this.uploadStartedCallback) {
		this.uploadStartedCallback();
	}

	this.createMaskDiv();
};

BC.prototype.saveState = function() {
	var component = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-cont-div");
	if(component){
		var container = component.parentNode;
		container.removeChild(component);
		$$.css(component, "visibility", "hidden");
		$$.body().appendChild(component);
	}
};

BC.prototype.destroybc = function () {
	var component = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-cont-div");
	if(component){
		var container = component.parentNode;
		if(container.tagName !== "BODY"){
			container.removeChild(component);
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-pull.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-PULL
 * @author hakand
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
			disabled : false
		};

		this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
		this.LABEL = "Pull";

		this.METHODS = [];

		this.EVENTS = [ "onload", "onmessage(message, from)", "selected" ];

		this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
			name : "JQuery",
			version : "2.0.3"
		}];

		this.Type = function() {
		};
		this.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();

		this.Type.prototype.init = function() {
		};
		this.Type.prototype.getValue = function() {
		};
		this.Type.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
		};
		this.setVisible = function(flag) {
			this.config.visible = flag;
			$("#" + this.config.id).css("display", flag ? "" : "none");
		};

		this.Type.prototype.render = function($container) {
			

			if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
				var $div = $("<div>").attr("id", this.config.id);
				$container.appendChild($div[0]);
				$div.html("PULL");
			}
			
		};

		this.Type.prototype.load = function(){
			if(this.config.port && this.onmessagecallback){
				var moduleName = BFEngine.getModuleName(this.bf);
				if(window.CSIMMan && window.CSIMMan[moduleName]){
					CSIMMan[moduleName].register(this.config.port,  {onmessage: this.onmessagecallback});
					console.log("Pull component registered:"+this.config.id);
				}else{
					console.log("Pull component could not registered:"+this.config.id);
				}
			}
			
			if (this.onloadcallback) {
				this.onloadcallback();
			}
		};

		this.Type.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
			if (eventName == "selected") {
				var dom = byid(this.config.id);
				if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
					dom.onclick = callback;
				}
			} else if (eventName == "onmessage") {
				this.onmessagecallback = callback;
			} else if (eventName == "onload") {
				this.onloadcallback = callback;
			}
		};
}

BCEngine.registerType("CSC-PULL", new Definition());
})(window);
/////=csc-iframe.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-IFRAME
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled : false
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Iframe";
	this.METHODS = [ "setSource(src)", "setData(html)", "print()", "mask", "unmask" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "oninit(param)", "iframeLoaded"];

	this.Type = function() {};
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-IFRAME", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.setDisabled = function(flag) {
	this.config.value = this.getValue();
	this.config.disabled = flag;
};

BC.prototype.setVisible = function(flag) {
	this.config.visible = flag;
	$$.css($$.byid(this.config.id), "display", flag ? "" : "none");
};

/**
 * @function setSource
 * @description IFrame'in kaynağını ayarlar.
 * @param [src] IFrame'in kaynağı
 */
BC.prototype.setSource = function(src) {
	this.config.src = src;
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$dom){
		$$dom.setAttribute("src", src);
	}
};

/**
 * @function setData
 * @description IFrame'in içereceği html içeriğin verilmesini sağlayan metoddur.
 * @param [innerHTML] IFrame'in içinde gösterilecek html içerik
 */
BC.prototype.setData = function(innerHTML) {
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$dom){
		$$dom.contentDocument.body.innerHTML = "";
		$$dom.contentDocument.write(innerHTML);
	}
};

/**
 * @function print
 * @description IFrame'in yazdırılması için print pop-up'ını açar.
 */
BC.prototype.print = function() {
	$$iframe = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$iframe){
		$$iframe.focus();
		$$iframe.contentWindow.print();
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config, style=config.style;
	if (style && style.width) {
		size = style.width.split("px")[0];
	}

	var $$newiframe = $$.create("IFRAME", {frameborder: config.borderWidth});

	if (!inDesigner(bf) && config.src) {
		$$.attr($$newiframe, "src", config.src);
	}

	$$.attr($$newiframe, {
		id : config.id,
		size : config.size
	});
	
	if (bf.isDisabled()) {
		$$.attr($$newiframe, "disabled", "disabled");
	}

	$$.css($$newiframe, "display", config.visible ? "" : "none");
	$$.css($$newiframe, style || {});

	// Design Time da visible yap
	if (inDesigner(bf)) {
		$$.css($$newiframe, "display", "");
	}

	$$.addClass($$newiframe, ["csc-iframe", config.cssClass]);

	$container.appendChild($$newiframe);
};

/**
 * @function mask
 * @description IFrame'e bir mesaj içeren koyu renkli "Yükleniyor" maskesi koymaya yarar.
 * @param [message] Maskenin üstünde yazan mesaj
 */
BC.prototype.mask = function(message) {
	message = message || SideMLManager.get("common.loadingText");
	var id = this.config.id;

	var $$gen = $$.byid(id);
	var $$maskDiv = $$.create("DIV",{"id": id + "-mask"}, "maskDiv", {"width": $$.innerWidth($$gen)+"px", "height": $$.innerHeight($$gen)+"px"});

	var $$loadingDiv = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "maskedLoadInfo");

	var $$img = $$.create("IMG", {"src": "css/bc-style/img/loadmaskicon.gif"});
	var $$span = $$.create("SPAN");
	$$span.innerHTML = message;
	
	$$loadingDiv.appendChild($$img);
	$$loadingDiv.appendChild($$span);
	$$maskDiv.appendChild($$loadingDiv);
	
	var $$parent = $$gen.parentNode;
	$$parent.insertBefore($$maskDiv, $$gen);
	
	$$.css($$loadingDiv, {"margin-left": $$.innerWidth($$gen) / 2 - $$.innerWidth($$loadingDiv) / 2+"px", "margin-top": $$.innerHeight($$gen) / 2 - $$.innerHeight($$loadingDiv) / 2+"px"});
};

/**
 * @function unmask
 * @description IFrame'e konulan mesaj içerikli maskeyi kaldırmaya yarar.
 */
BC.prototype.unmask = function() {
	$$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id+"-mask");
	$$.remove($$dom);
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "iframeLoaded") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (dom) {
			dom.onload = callback;
		}
	} 
};
})(window);
/////=csc-grid.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** 
 * @class CSC-GRID
 * @param CS
 * @returns {Definition}
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled : false,
		gridExport : true,
		cls : "csc-gridwiew",
		altrows: false//zebra görünüm
	};

	this.BaseBF = "TABULAR";
	this.LABEL = "Grid";

	this.METHODS = [ "mask", "unmask", "selectRow(rowid)", "selectAll", "setOnContextMenuCallback(callback)", "showContextMenu", "setExcelFileName(filename)","setExcelExportPath(path)", "onExcelImport(callback)", "showExcelExport(flag)", "showExcelImport(flag)", "getPageRowCount", "removeSelectedRows", "setExcelModule(moduleName)" ];
	
	// #mahmuty onpaging gibintra için yapildi. pagingi kendileri ele aliyorlar. 
	// #mahmuty onpagechange page desigisikliklerinde firlatiliyor. 
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected",  "rowClicked(row, isSelectedEvent)", "rowRightClicked(row)", "drop", "dragover", "onload", "onpaging(page)", "onpagechange(page)", "rowselected(row, isselected)", "selectedAll(isselected)", "rightClick(row)", "doubleClick(row)", "rowDoubleClicked(row, memberName)" , "onExcelImport-complated()"];
	this.DISABLE_EVENTS = [ "selected"];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	}, {
		name : "JQuery.JQGRID",
		version : "4.3"
	}, {
		name : "JQuery.JQGRID-LOCALE",
		version : "4.3"
	}];

	this.Type = function() {};
}
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();

if( SideDefaults[SideModuleManager.getLocalModuleName()]["support-dt-for-grid"] == "true" ){
	BCEngine.registerType("CSC-GRID-OLD", def);
}else{
	BCEngine.registerType("CSC-GRID", def);
}

var BC = def.Type;
var excelExportButtonClicked = false;
BC.prototype.init = function(){
	this.selecteds = [];
	this.rowStyles = {};
	

	if(window.jqgridLoaded){
		return;
	}

	var pathPrefix = "js/3thParty/jquery/jqGrid/", bc=this, libs;
	if(CSSession.getEnv() == "dev" || CSSession.getEnv() == "test" || inDesigner(bc.bf)){
		pathPrefix = "designer/" + pathPrefix;
	}
	libs = [pathPrefix+"jquery.jqGrid-4.5.4.min.js", "css/style/jqGrid/ui.jqgrid.css"];

	if(window.sideLang){
		libs.push(pathPrefix+"locale/grid.locale-"+window.sideLang+".min.js");
	}

	SLibraryLoader.loadLib("jq-qrid", libs, {progress:true, serieLoad:true, module:bc.bf.getModuleName()}, function () {
		window.jqgridLoaded = true;
		BFEngine.a();
		BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
		BFEngine.r();
	});

};

BC.prototype.removeSelectedRows = function(){
	throw "\"removeSelectedRows\" is not implemented, instead use deleteSelectedRows";
}

BC.prototype.setExcelFileName = function(filename){
	this.efl = filename;
};

BC.prototype.setExcelExportPath = function(path){
	this.config.excelExportPath = path;
};

BC.prototype.setNodata = function(flag) {
	var $$div = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$div){
		if(flag){
			$$.addClass($$div, "csc-grid-nodata");
		} else {
			$$.rmClass($$div, "csc-grid-nodata");
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.setOnContextMenuCallback = function(callback, options) {
	var bc = this;
	this.contextMenuCallback = callback;
	this.contextMenuOptions = options;
	if(!window.jqgridLoaded) {
		return;
	}
	$("#"+this.config.id +"_table").jqGrid({
		onRightClickRow: function(rowid, iRow, iCol, e){
			bc.rightClickCallback(rowid, iRow, iCol, e);
		}
	});
};

BC.prototype.rightClickCallback = function(rowid, iRow, iCol, e) {
	var bc = this;
	if(bc.contextMenuCallback){
		var row = bc.bf.getRowByRowId(rowid);
		window.currentRow = row;
		bc.showContextMenu2(e, row, rowid);
	}
};

BC.prototype.showContextMenu2 = function(event, row, rowid) {
	var bc = this;
//	console.log("grid context menu", rowid);
	event.preventDefault();
	var menuItemsObj = this.contextMenuCallback(row, rowid);

	csdu.contextMenu({
		moduleName: bc.bf.getModuleName(),
		left: event.pageX, 
		top: event.pageY, 
		items:menuItemsObj,
		leftSide: (bc.contextMenuOptions && bc.contextMenuOptions.leftSide) ? true : false 
		
	}, rowid, event);
};

BC.prototype.showContextMenu = function() {
	var bc = this;
	var event = window.event;
	var rowid = currentRow.getRowId();
	var row = currentRow;
//	console.log("grid context menu2", rowid);
	event.preventDefault();
	var menuItemsObj = this.contextMenuCallback(row, rowid);
	csdu.contextMenu({
		moduleName: bc.bf.getModuleName(),
		left: event.pageX, 
		top: event.pageY, 
		items:menuItemsObj,
		leftSide: (bc.contextMenuOptions && bc.contextMenuOptions.leftSide) ? true : false
	}, rowid);
};

BC.prototype.destroybc = function(){
	if(!window.jqgridLoaded){
		return;
	}
	$("#"+this.config.id+ "_table").jqGrid("GridDestroy");
};


BC.prototype.showExcelExport = function(flag) {
	this.config.gridExport = flag;
	this.bf.rerender();
}

BC.prototype.showExcelImport = function(flag) {
	this.config.gridImport = flag;
	this.bf.rerender();
}


BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	if (!$container || $container.length == 0) {
		return;
	}
	if(!window.jqgridLoaded){
		return;
	}

	if(!this.config.style){
		this.config.style = {};
	}
	this.parentWidth = 0;//dorelayout'ta ihtiyaç olacak
	var id = this.config.id;
	var page = id + "-div";
	var altrows = (this.config.altrows === true);// --------> Default altrows false
	var multi = (this.config.multiselect || false);// ------> Default multiselect true
	var rownumbers = (this.config.rownumbers === true);// --> Default row numbers false
	var pageNum = parseInt(!this.config.pageNum ? 10 : this.config.pageNum, 10);
	
	if(this.bf.isDisabled()){
		multi = false;//disable durumunda checkbox'lar çıkmasın SIDE-1607 
	}

	if (this.config.page === false || pageNum <= 0) {
		page = undefined;
		pageNum = 100000;
	}
	this.pageNum = pageNum;

	var colnames = [], colmodel = [];

	var bf = this.bf;
	var bc = this;

	for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
		var member = bf.members[memberName];
		var memberRef = member.bcRef;
		if (memberRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP" || memberRef.typeName == "CSC-HIDDEN") {
			continue;
		}
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf) && !member.isVisible()) {
			continue;
		}
		var memberConfig = member.getConfig();
		var title = memberConfig.title || memberConfig.label || "";
		var model = {
			name : memberName,
			index : memberName,
			formatter : cellrenderer
		};
		
		if (memberRef.typeName == "CSC-MINI-BUTTON") {
			model.align = "center";
		}
		
		var colWidth = 10;
		if (memberConfig.layoutConfig) {
			if (memberConfig.layoutConfig.columnWidth !== "" && memberConfig.layoutConfig.columnWidth !== undefined) {
				colWidth = memberConfig.layoutConfig.columnWidth;
			}
			if(memberConfig.layoutConfig.cellAlign){
				model.align = memberConfig.layoutConfig.cellAlign;
			}
			model.sortable = memberConfig.layoutConfig.sortable !== false;
		}
		if (typeof colWidth == "string" && colWidth.indexOf("px") > 0) {
			model.fixed = true;
			colWidth = parseInt(colWidth, 10);
		}
		model.width = colWidth;
		colnames.push(title);
		colmodel.push(model);
	}

	// CELLRENDERER
	function cellrenderer(cellvalue, options, rowObject) {
//		return "<span class='csd-replace-item' rel='" + options.colModel.name + "$$" + rowObject.$$rowid + "'></span>";
		return "<span id='gg$" + options.colModel.name + "$" + rowObject.$$rowid + "'></span>";
	}

	// Create Grid
	var tempHeight = this.config.style.height;
	this.config.style.height = undefined;
	var $div = $("<div>").attr("id", id).css("width", "100%").css(this.config.style);
	$div.attr("rel",this.bf.$CS$.name);
	this.config.style.height = tempHeight;
	$div.css("display", (inDesigner(this.bf) || this.config.visible) ? "" : "none");
	if(this.config.cssClass){
		$div.addClass(this.config.cssClass);
	}

	$container.appendChild($div[0]);
	var $newGrid = $("<table>");
	// Set ID, Disabled and Type Attributes if exists
	checkAndAddAttribute($newGrid, "id", id + "_table");

	$div.append($newGrid);
	var $$noDataDiv = $$.create("div", {id: this.config.id+"-nodata"}, "csc-grid-nodata", {display: "block", fontWeight: "bold"}, $div[0]); 

	// Pager
	var $newPager = $("<div>");
	checkAndAddAttribute($newPager, "id", id + "-div");
	$div.append($newPager);

	var height = this.config.style.height || "100%";
	if (this.config.page != false && height != "100%") {
		height = (height - 60);
	}
	
	var pwidth = $div.width();
	if(bf.$CS$.parent){
		var $$parent = bf.$CS$.parent.bcRef.getChildContainer(bf.$CS$.name);
		pwidth = $$.innerWidth($$parent);
		if(!pwidth){
			pwidth = $div.width();
		}
	}

	$newGrid.jqGrid({
		datatype : inDesigner(bf) ? "array" : cscPager,
		autowidth : true,
		shrinkToFit : true,
		height : height,
		colNames : colnames,
		sortname: bc.sortName,
		sortorder: bc.sortorder,
		colModel : colmodel,
		rowNum : pageNum === 0 ? undefined : pageNum,
		pager : "#" + page,
		viewrecords : true,
		altRows: altrows,
		altclass: altrows ? "csc-grid-tek" : undefined,
		multiselect : multi, // multi select
		pgbuttons : true,
		rownumbers : rownumbers,
		gridComplete : function() {
			//Selection'ları tekrar set et
			if(bc.selecteds.length == 0){
				return;
			}
			var $grid = $("#" + bc.config.id + "_table");
			try {
				bc.innerSelect = true;
				for(var i=0; i<bc.selecteds.length ;i++){
					$grid.jqGrid('setSelection', bc.selecteds[i]);
				}
			} finally {
				bc.innerSelect = false;
			}
		},
		onSortCol : function(memberName, iCol, order) {
			bc.saveScrollPosition();
			if (bf.$CS$.ds) {// datasource exist?
				var grid = $("#" + id + "_table");
				var page = grid.getGridParam("page");
				var sortColumn = memberName;
				bc.sortName = memberName;
				bc.sortorder = order;
				var alias = undefined;
				if (bf.$CS$.ds.options.sortMap && bf.$CS$.ds.options.sortMap[memberName]) {
					sortColumn = bf.$CS$.ds.options.sortMap[memberName];
				}
				if (bf.$CS$.ds.options.tableAliasMap && bf.$CS$.ds.options.tableAliasMap[memberName]) {
					alias = bf.$CS$.ds.options.tableAliasMap[memberName];
				}
				bf.$CS$.ds.options.sorters = [ {
					property : sortColumn,
					tableAlias: alias,
					direction : order == "asc" ? "ASC" : "DESC"
				} ];
				// Sort type ekleme
				var member = bf.members[memberName];
				if (member.getConfig().layoutConfig && member.getConfig().layoutConfig.sortType) {
					bf.$CS$.ds.options.sorters[0].sortType = member.getConfig().layoutConfig.sortType;
				}
				bf.gotoPage(page, function(){
					bc.loadScrollPosition();
				});
			} else {
				bc.sortName = memberName;
				bc.order = order;
				bf.sort(memberName, order);
				bc.loadScrollPosition();
			}
		},
		onPaging : function(param) {
			//disabled buton bug fix
			var $$btnDom = $$.byid(param);
			if($$btnDom && $$.hasClass($$btnDom, "ui-state-disabled")){
				return;
			}
			bf.saveState();
			
			var grid = $("#" + id + "_table");
			var tmembers = bf.fmembers || bf.tmembers;
			
			if (bc.onpagechange || bc.onpaging || bf.$CS$.ds) {// datasource exist?
				var page = grid.getGridParam("page");
				var rowCount = bf.$CS$.ds ? (bf.$CS$.ds.rowcount || 0) : tmembers.length;
				var lastpage = Math.ceil(rowCount / pageNum);
				if(lastpage == 0){
					return;
				}
				if (param.indexOf("next") == 0) {
					page = page + 1;
				} else if (param.indexOf("prev") == 0) {
					page = page - 1;
				} else if (param == "user") {
					page = parseInt($("#pg_" + id + "-div").find(".ui-pg-input").val(), 10);
				} else if (param.indexOf("last") == 0) {
					page = lastpage;
				} else if (param.indexOf("first") == 0) {
					page = 1;
				}
				if (page < 1) {
					page = 1;
				} else if (page > lastpage) {
					page = lastpage;
				}
				bc.pageIndex = page;
				grid.setGridParam({
					page : page,
					lastpage : lastpage,
					records : rowCount - 1
				});
				if(bf.$CS$.ds){
					bf.gotoPage(page);
				}
				if(bc.onpaging){
					bf.fire("onpaging", page);
				}
				if(bc.onpagechange){
					bf.fire("onpagechange", page);
				} 
			} else {
				var lastpage = Math.ceil(tmembers.length / pageNum);
				if (param.indexOf("next") == 0) {
					page = page + 1;
				} else if (param.indexOf("prev") == 0) {
					page = page - 1;
				} else if (param == "user") {
					page = parseInt($("#pg_" + id + "-div").find(".ui-pg-input").val(), 10);
				} else if (param.indexOf("last") == 0) {
					page = lastpage;
				} else if (param.indexOf("first") == 0) {
					page = 1;
				}
				bc.pageIndex = page;
			}
		},
		beforeSelectRow : function(rowid, e) {
			/**
			 * @function beforeSelectRow
		     * @description Grid'de istenilen bir satırı seçer.
		     * @param [rowid] Satır id'si
		     * @param [e]
		     */
			if(multi){
				return true;
			}
			if ($(this).getGridParam('selrow') == rowid) {
				return false;
			} else {
				return true;
			}
		},
		onSelectRow: function(rowid, isselected){
			if(bc.innerSelect){
				return;
			}
			if(isselected){
				if(!multi){
					bc.selecteds = [rowid];
				} else if(!isInIt(bc.selecteds, rowid)){
					bc.selecteds.push(rowid);
				}
			} else {
				var indis = findInArray(bc.selecteds, rowid);
				if(indis >= 0){
					bc.selecteds.splice(indis, 1);
				}
			}
			bf.fire("rowselected", bf.getRow(bf.getIndexFromRowId(rowid)), isselected);
		},
		onSelectAll: function(rowids, isselected){
			bc.selectAll(isselected, true);
			bf.fire("selectedAll", isselected);
		},
		ondblClickRow: function(rowid){
			bf.fire("doubleClick", bf.getRowByRowId(rowid));
		},
		onRightClickRow: function(rowid, iRow, iCol, e){
			SIDENavigator.setEvent(e);
			bf.fire("rightClick", bf.getRowByRowId(rowid));
			bc.rightClickCallback(rowid, iRow, iCol, e);
		}
	// jsonReader : { repeatitems: false }
	});
	if(BCDefaults.get("CSC-GRID", "showAll", undefined, this.bf.getModuleName()) || (this.config.page && this.config.showAllBtn)){
		$newGrid.navGrid('#' + page, {
			edit : false,
			add : false,
			del : false,
			search : false,
			refresh : false
		}).navButtonAdd('#' + page, {
			caption : bc.showAll ? SideMLManager.get("common.showPaging") : SideMLManager.get("common.showAll"),
			id : "showall_" + id,
			title:  bc.showAll ? SideMLManager.get("common.showPaging") : SideMLManager.get("common.showAll"),
			buttonicon : "grid-show-all",
			onClickButton : function() {
				bc.showAll = !bc.showAll;
				if(bc.showAll){
					bc.oldPageNum = pageNum;
					pageNum = 100000;
				} else {
					pageNum = bc.oldPageNum;
				}
				bc.config.pageNum = pageNum;
				bc.bf.rerender();
			},
			position : "last"
		});
	}
	
	if (this.config.gridExport) {
		$newGrid.navGrid('#' + page, {
			edit : false,
			add : false,
			del : false,
			search : false,
			refresh : false
		}).navButtonAdd('#' + page, {
			caption : SideMLManager.get("common.exportExcel"),
			id : "excel_" + id,
			buttonicon : "grid-export",
			onClickButton : function() {
				if(excelExportButtonClicked){
					CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox("You cannot export excel for the duration of this timeout: " + (getSideDefaults("excelExport-button-timeout") / 1000) % 60 + "sec.", {error: true});
					return;
				}
				excelExportButtonClicked = true;
				setTimeout(function(){ 
			    	excelExportButtonClicked = false;	
			    }, getSideDefaults("excelExport-button-timeout"));

				var excelFileFormat = bc.config.gridFileType;
				var cmd,ds=undefined;
				if (bf.$CS$.ds) {// datasource exist?
					cmd = "EXPORT_EXCEL_FROM_DS";
					ds = csCloneObject(bf.$CS$.ds, true);
					if(ds.params && ds.params.pv){
						ds.params.pv.limit = 100000;
					}
				} else {
					cmd = "EXPORT_EXCEL";
					ds = bf.getText();
				}
				var bfname = bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
				var module = bf.getModuleName();
				var cp = bf.$CS$.name, parent = bf.getParent();
				do{
					if(parent && parent.isBusinessField()){
						cp = parent.$CS$.name + "." +cp;
					}
					if(parent){
						parent = parent.getParent();	
					}
				}while(parent && parent.$CS$.CTX !== "root");
				if(parent){
					cp =  parent.$CS$.name+ "." + cp;
				}
				SIDEUtil.downloadFileWithPost({
					cmd: cmd,
					s: "ş",
					jp: {
						metadata : bf.getMetaData(),
						ds: ds,
						filename: bc.efl,
						excelFileFormat:excelFileFormat,
						checkSpecialChars:"false",
						sideLang: window.sideLang,
						cp: cp,
						page: cp.split(".")[0]
					}
				}, {
					url: SideModuleManager.getAppUrl(module, bc.config.excelExportPath||"side-support-gridexport"),
					module: module,
					onload : function(err){
						CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(err, {error: true});
					},
					onerror : function(err){
						if(getSideDefaults("show-excel-export-errors")){
							CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(err, {error: true});	
						}
						
					}
				});
			},
			position : "last"
		});
	}
	
	if (this.config.gridImport) {
		$newGrid.navGrid('#' + page, {
			edit : false,
			add : false,
			del : false,
			search : false,
			refresh : false
		}).navButtonAdd('#' + page, {
			caption : SideMLManager.get("common.importExcel"),
			id : "excel_import_" + id,
			buttonicon : "grid-export",
			onClickButton : function() {
				var $$div = $$.create("DIV", {"id":"excel_import_popup"});
				var $$buton = $$.create("INPUT", {type: "button",id: "excel_import_doneButton", value:SideMLManager.get(this, "addToGrid")});
				var $$textarea = $$.create("TEXTAREA", {"id":"excel_import_contentTextarea"}, undefined, {"width":"100%", "height":"405px"}, $$div);
				$$buton.onclick = function() {
					excelImportPopup.close();
					var rows = $$textarea.value.split("\n");
					if(rows[rows.length-1] == "")
						rows.pop();
					
					var memberNames = [];
					for(var mname in bc.bf.members){
						memberNames.push(mname);
					}
					
					var newRows = [];
					for(var i=0; i<rows.length;i++){
						var newRow = {};
						var cols = rows[i].split("\t");
						if(bc.onexcelimport){
							cols = bc.onexcelimport(cols, rows[i]);
							if(!cols){
								continue;
							}
						}
						for(var j=0; j<memberNames.length; j++){
							if(cols[j]){
								newRow[memberNames[j]] = cols[j];
							}
						}
						newRows.push(newRow);
					}
					bc.bf.add(newRows);
					bc.bf.fire("onExcelImport-complated");
				};
				
				$$div.appendChild($$buton);
				var excelImportPopup = new CSSimplePopup($$div, {dontRemove: false, title: SideMLManager.get("common.importExcel"), width: 680, height: 430, closeOnEscape:true});

				excelImportPopup.open();
			},
			position : "last"
		});
	}

	function cscPager(param) {
		var tmembers = bf.fmembers || bf.tmembers;
		if (!tmembers) {
			return;
		}
		if(bc.config.nodata){
			if(!tmembers.length){
				$$noDataDiv.innerHTML = bc.config.nodata;
				$$noDataDiv.style.display = "block";
				$$.byid("gbox_"+bc.config.id+"_table").style.display = "none";
			} else {
				$$noDataDiv.style.display = "none";
				$$.byid("gbox_"+bc.config.id+"_table").style.display = "block";
			}
		}
		var grid = $("#" + id + "_table").clearGridData();
		var start = 0;
		var end = tmembers.length;
		if (bf.$CS$.ds) {// datasource exist?
			if (bc.config.page === false && pageNum <= 0) {
				pageNum = 1000;
			}
			if (pageNum <= 0) {
				pageNum = 10;// datasource olduğunda page number olmalı
			}
			var count = (bf.$CS$.ds.rowcount - (bf.$CS$.ds.page) * param.rows > 0) ? bf.$CS$.ds.rowcount - param.rows : /*bf.$CS$.ds.rowcount - (bf.$CS$.ds.rowcount -*/ (bf.$CS$.ds.page - 1) * param.rows/*)*/;
			grid.setGridParam({
				page : bf.$CS$.ds.page,
				lastpage : Math.ceil(bf.$CS$.ds.rowcount / pageNum),
				records : count
			});
		} else {
			end = tmembers.length;
			if (pageNum > 0) {
				var lastPage = Math.ceil(tmembers.length / pageNum);
				var page = param.page;
				if (lastPage < page) {
					page = lastPage || 1;
				}
				var count = (tmembers.length - page * param.rows > 0) ? tmembers.length - param.rows : tmembers.length - (tmembers.length - (page - 1) * param.rows);
				grid.setGridParam({
					page : page,
					lastpage : lastPage,
					records : count
				});
				start = (page - 1) * param.rows;
				end = (page) * param.rows;
			}
		}

		renderPage(start, end);

		function renderPage(start, end) {
			var tmembers = bf.fmembers || bf.tmembers;
			var raws = [];
			for ( var i = start; i < end; i++) {
				if (i >= tmembers.length) {
					break;
				}
				var raw = tmembers[i].getValue();
				raw.$$rowid = tmembers[i].getRowId();
				raws.push(raw);
			}
			grid.jqGrid('addRowData', '$$rowid', raws);
			for ( var i = start; i < end; i++) {
				if (i >= tmembers.length) {
					break;
				}
				var members = tmembers[i].getMembers();
				var rowid = tmembers[i].getRowId();
				var $$tr = null;
				for ( var memberName in members) {
					var member = members[memberName];
//					var $td = $(".csd-replace-item[rel='" + memberName + "$$" + rowid + "']", grid).parent().empty();
					var $$span = $$.byid("gg$" + memberName + "$" + rowid);
					if(!$$span){
						continue;
					}
					var $$td = $$span.parentNode;
					$$td.innerHTML = "";
					if (!$$tr) {
						$$tr = $$td.parentNode;
					}
					if (member.getConfig().layoutConfig && member.getConfig().layoutConfig.vertAlign) {
						$$.css($$td, "vertical-align", member.getConfig().layoutConfig.vertAlign);
//						$td.css("vertical-align", member.getConfig().layoutConfig.vertAlign);
					}
					BFEngine.render(member, $$td);
				}
				if (bc.rowStyles[rowid] && $$tr) {
					for(var k=0; k<$$tr.children.length ;k++){
						$$.css($$tr.children[k], bc.rowStyles[rowid]);
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		$newGrid.jqGrid('clearGridData', true);
		var row = new CSDGridRow(bf, 0);
		for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
			row.members[memberName] = bf.members[memberName];
		}
		var rowValue = row.getValue(), rowid = row.getRowId();
		rowValue.$$rowid = rowid;
		jQuery("#" + this.config.id + "_table").jqGrid('addRowData', "$$rowid", [ rowValue ]);
		for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
			var $$span = $$.byid("gg$" + memberName + "$" + rowid);
			if(!$$span){
				continue;
			}
			var $$rowcontainer = $$span.parentNode;
			var member = bf.members[memberName];
			if (member.getConfig().layoutConfig && member.getConfig().layoutConfig.vertAlign) {
				$$rowcontainer.style.verticalAlign = member.getConfig().layoutConfig.vertAlign;
			}
			BFEngine.render(member, $$rowcontainer);
		}
		jQuery("#" + this.config.id + "_table").trigger("reloadGrid");
		for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
			BFEngine.bindBCEvents(bf.members[memberName], true);
		}
	}

	if (this.config.style && this.config.style.width && (""+this.config.style.width).indexOf("%") < 0){
		$newGrid.setGridWidth(parseInt(this.config.style.width), true);
	} else if(this.bf.$CS$.parent){ 
		$newGrid.setGridWidth(pwidth, true);
		var parent = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
		BFEngine.onAfterLazyRender(bf, function() {
			var $$parent = parent.bcRef.getChildContainer(bf.$CS$.name);
			if ($$parent) {
				$("#" + id + "_table").setGridWidth($$parent.offsetWidth, true);
			}
		});
	}

	if(this.pageIndex){
		$newGrid.trigger('reloadGrid', [{
			page : this.pageIndex
		}]);
	}
};

BC.prototype.gotoPage = function(page){
	this.pageIndex = page;
	if(window.jqgridLoaded) {
		var grid = $("#" + this.config.id + "_table");
		grid.trigger('reloadGrid', [{
			page : page
		}]);
	}
};

BC.prototype.onExcelImport = function(callback){
	this.onexcelimport = callback;
};

BC.prototype.currentPage = function(){
	if(window.jqgridLoaded) {
		return $("#" + this.config.id + "_table").getGridParam('page');
	}
};

BC.prototype.getCurrentPage = function(){
	if(window.jqgridLoaded) {
		var grid = $("#" + this.config.id + "_table");
		return grid.getGridParam('page');
	}
};


/**
 * @function mask
 * @description Gride bir mesaj içeren koyu renkli "Yükleniyor" maskesi koymaya yarar.
 * @param [message] Maskenin üstünde yazan mesaj
 */

BC.prototype.mask = function(message, showLoadIcon) {
	var id = $(this)[0].config.id;
	var $gen = $("#" + id).addClass("maskedBF");
	var $parent = $gen.parent();
	var $maskDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", "maskDiv").css("width", $gen.width()).css("height", $gen.height()).css("position", "absolute").css("z-index", 1).css("opacity", 0.2).css("background-color","#aaa");

	var $loadingDiv = $("<div>").attr("id", "maskedLoadInfo").css("position", "absolute");

	var $img = $("<img>").attr("src", "css/bc-style/img/loadmaskicon.gif").css("margin-right", 8).css("margin-left", 5).css("height", 13);
	if(showLoadIcon === false){
		$img.css("display", "none");
	}
	var $span = $("<span>").html(message);

	$parent.prepend($maskDiv.append($loadingDiv.append($img).append($span)));
	$loadingDiv.css("margin-left", $gen.width() / 2 - $loadingDiv.width() / 2).css("margin-top", $gen.height() / 2 - $loadingDiv.height() / 2);

};

/**
 * @function unmask
 * @description Gride konulan mesaj içerikli maskeyi kaldırmaya yarar.
 */
BC.prototype.unmask = function() {
	var id = $(this)[0].config.id;
	$("#" + id).removeClass("maskedBF");
	$("#maskDiv").remove();
};

// row'un {adi: "xx", soyadi: "xx" .. } şeklinde olması bekleniyor, dizi de olabilir
BC.prototype.addRow = function(row, position) {
	// jQuery("#" + this.config.id+"_table").jqGrid('addRowData', row.getRowId(), row.getValue(), position);
	if(window.jqgridLoaded) {
		$("#" + this.config.id + "_table").trigger("reloadGrid");
	}
};

	/**
	 * @function selectAll
 * @description Selects all rows
     * @param [select]
     * @param [inner]
     */
BC.prototype.selectAll = function(select, inner){
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf;
	if(select === undefined){
		select = true;
	}
	bc.selecteds = [];
	if(select){
		var tmembers = bf.fmembers || bf.tmembers;
		for(var i=0; i<tmembers.length ;i++){
			bc.selecteds.push(tmembers[i].getRowId());
		}
	}
	if(!inner && window.jqgridLoaded){
		var $grid = $("#" + bc.config.id + "_table");
		$grid.jqGrid('resetSelection');
		try {
			bc.innerSelect = true;
			for(var i=0; i<bc.selecteds.length ;i++){
				$grid.jqGrid('setSelection', bc.selecteds[i]);
			}
		} finally {
			bc.innerSelect = false;
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.selectRow = function(rowid, select) {
	if (!rowid) {
		if (currentRow) {
			rowid = currentRow.getRowId();
		} else {
			return;
		}
	}
	var $grid = $("#" + this.config.id + "_table");
	var isSelected = false, indis = -1;
	for(var i=0; i<this.selecteds.length ;i++){
		if(this.selecteds[i] == rowid){
			isSelected = true;
			indis = i;
			break;
		}
	}
	if((isSelected && select !== false) || (!isSelected && select === false)){
		return;
	}
	if(isSelected && select == false && indis >= 0){
		this.selecteds.splice(indis, 1);
	}
	if(!isSelected && select){
		if(this.config.multiselect){
			this.selecteds.push(rowid);
		} else {
			this.selecteds = [rowid];
		}
	}
	try {
		this.innerSelect = true;
		if(window.jqgridLoaded){
			$grid.jqGrid('setSelection', rowid);
		}
	} finally {
		this.innerSelect = false;
	}
};

BC.prototype.highlightRow = function(rowid, color) {
	if(typeof rowid != "string"){
		rowid = ""+rowid;
	}
	var css = this.rowStyles[rowid];
	if(!css){
		css = {};
		this.rowStyles[rowid] = css;
	}
	css.backgroundColor = color || "#C3D3EA";
	var grid = $("#" + this.config.id + "_table");
	var $tr = grid.find(">tbody>tr[id='" + rowid + "']");
	if ($tr.length > 0) {
		$tr.children().css(css);
	}
};

BC.prototype.styleRow = function(rowid, style) {
	if(!style || typeof style != "object"){
		return;
	}
	var css = this.rowStyles[rowid];
	if(!css){
		css = {};
		this.rowStyles[rowid] = css;
	}
	csDefaults(css, style);
	
	var grid = $("#" + this.config.id + "_table");
	var $tr = grid.find(">tbody>tr[id='" + rowid + "']");
	if ($tr.length > 0) {
		$tr.children().css(style);
		$("td .csc-rospan", $tr).css(style);
	}
};

BC.prototype.DRL = function(force) {
	if(!window.jqgridLoaded) {
		return;
	}
	var containerDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if (!containerDiv) {
		return;
	}
	var parent = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
	if (this.gridHeight) {
		containerDiv.style.height = containerDiv.children[0].offsetHeight + 2 + "px";
	}
	var bc=this, config=bc.config, bf=bc.bf;
	if ((!config.style || !config.style.width || config.style.width.indexOf("%") >= 0) && bf.$CS$.parent) {
		var parentWidth = $$.innerWidth(containerDiv.parentNode);
//		console.log("parent (" + parent.$CS$.name + "-" + this.bf.$CS$.name + ") width: " + parentWidth);
		if (force || bc.parentWidth != parentWidth) {
			bc.parentWidth = parentWidth;
			$("#" + config.id + "_table").setGridWidth(parentWidth, true);
			var def = bf.$CS$.definition;
			// Asagidaki kisim grid elemanlari icin dolayout yapildigi kisim.
			var tmembers = bf.fmembers || bf.tmembers;
			if (inDesigner(bf) === undefined && tmembers) {
				for ( var s = 0; s < tmembers.length; s++) {
					for ( var mm in def.MEMBERS) {
						BFEngine.DRL(tmembers[s].get(mm), force);
					}
				}
			} else {
				for (var mname in bf.members) {
					BFEngine.DRL(bf.members[mname], force);
				}
			}

		}
	}
	// pager bug fix
	if (config.gridExport || (BCDefaults.get("CSC-GRID", "showAll", bf.getModuleName()) || config.showAllBtn)) {
		var $$leftPager = $$.byid(config.id + "-div_left");
		if ($$leftPager) {
			$$leftPager.style.width = "";
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.load = function() {
	this.bf.fire("onload");
};

BC.prototype.deleteRow = function(RowID) {
	// jQuery("#" + this.config.id + "_table").jqGrid("delRowData", RowID);
	if(window.jqgridLoaded) {
		jQuery("#" + this.config.id + "_table").trigger("reloadGrid");
	}
};

BC.prototype.getCellWidth = function(memberName) {
	var td = document.getElementById(this.config.id + "_table_" + memberName);
	if (!td) {
		return 0;
	}
	return td.offsetWidth;
};

// Secilen satirlarin id'lerini iceren dizi doner
BC.prototype.getSelectedRowIds = function($grid) {
	var clone = [];
	for(var i=0; i<this.selecteds.length ;i++){
		clone.push(this.selecteds[i]);
	}
	return clone;
};


BC.prototype.clear = function(clearDataSource) {
	if(clearDataSource !== false){
		this.bf.$CS$.ds = null;
	}
	delete this.pageIndex;
	if(window.jqgridLoaded){
		jQuery("#" + this.config.id + "_table").jqGrid('clearGridData', true);
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "changed") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onchange = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "onpaging") {
		this.onpaging = true;
	} else if (eventName == "onpagechange") {
		this.onpagechange = true;
	} else if (eventName == "drop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.getPageRowCount = function(){
	return this.pageNum;
};

BC.prototype.saveScrollPosition = function() {
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(!this.scrollInfos){
		this.scrollInfos = [];
	}
	if($$dom){
		var scrollInfo = {};
		scrollInfo.parent = $$dom.parentNode;
		while(scrollInfo.parent){
			if(scrollInfo.parent.scrollTop > 0){
				scrollInfo.scrollTop = scrollInfo.parent.scrollTop;
				break;
			}
			scrollInfo.parent = scrollInfo.parent.parentNode;
		}
	}
	
	this.scrollInfos.push(scrollInfo);
}

BC.prototype.loadScrollPosition = function() {
	if(!this.scrollInfos){
		return;
	}
	var scrollInfo = this.scrollInfos.pop();
	if(scrollInfo && scrollInfo.parent){
		scrollInfo.parent.scrollTop = scrollInfo.scrollTop;
	}
	
	if(this.scrollInfos.length == 0){
		delete this.scrollInfos;
	}
}
})(window);
/////=csc-print-dotmatrix.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * 	@class CSC-PRINT-DOTMATRIX
 * 	@author ADogan
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "DotMatrix Printer";

	this.METHODS = ["print(text, printerName, charSet, showMessage, delay)"];
	this.EVENTS = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
	
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {name: "dot-matrix",version : "1.0"}];
};

var SILAPrintService = {
	init : function(success, error) {
	    var modules = SideModuleManager.getModules();
		if(modules.sila) {
		    if (window.libUtilSila === undefined) {
				var waterFall = new CSWaterFall();
				CSCaller.ajaxcall(modules.sila.side, null,{async: false},
				    function(res){
				        waterFall.add(function(){
				            SideModuleManager.loadModule("sila", function(){
				                console.log("SILA Modülü yüklendi");
				                waterFall.ok();
				            });
				        });
				        waterFall.add(function() {
				            window.libUtilSila.checkStatus("Yazdırma", function(resp) {
				                if(success) {
				                    success(resp);
				                }
				            }, function(err) {
				                 if(error) {
				                    error(err);
				                }
				            });
				            waterFall.ok();
				        });
				        waterFall.run();
				    },
				    function(err){
				        switch(err.status) {
				            case 404 :
				                error(new Error('SILA Modülü kurulu değil'));
				                return;
				            default:
				                return;
				        }
				    }
				);
		    } else {
				window.libUtilSila.checkStatus("Yazdırma", function(resp) {
				    if(success) {
				        success(resp);
				    }
				}, function(err) {
				    if(error) {
				        error(err);
				    }
				});
		    }
		} else {
		    error(new Error('SILA Modülü kurulu değil'));
		    return;
		}
	},
	print : function(text, printerName, charSet) {
		var yazdirSubmit = function() {
		debugger;
			var waterFall = new CSWaterFall();
			var pbar = CSPopupUTILS.ProgressBar("Lütfen bekleyiniz..");
			var texts = [];
			if(Array.isArray(text)) {
				texts = text;
			} else {
				texts.push(text);
			}
			for(var i = 0; i<texts.length; i++) {
				waterFall.add(function(wtf, pText){
					CSCaller.call("dmAppletService_print",{"text" : pText, "printerName" : printerName, "charSet" : charSet } , {"url": libUtilSila.getAddress()} ).then(function(resp){
						CSCaller.call("dmAppletService_getStatus",{} , {"url": libUtilSila.getAddress()} ).then(function(resp1){
							SILAPrintService.status = resp1;
							pbar.close();
							wtf.ok();
						}).error(function(resp1){
							pbar.close();
							wtf.ok();	
						});
					}).error(function(resp){
						pbar.close();
						wtf.ok();	
					});
				}, texts[i]);
			}
			waterFall.run();
		};
		libUtilSila.checkStatusAndSubmit("Yazdırma", yazdirSubmit);
	},
	status : "",
	sila : true
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-PRINT-DOTMATRIX", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.print = function(text, printerName, charSet, showMessage, delay) {
	if(showMessage || delay){
		if(showMessage){
			this.config.showMessage = showMessage;
		}
		if(delay){
			this.config.delay = delay;
		}
	}
	
	if(this.config.showMessage){
		var $$popup = $$.create("DIV");
		
		var printPopup = new CSSimplePopup($$popup, {dontRemove: false, title: SideMLManager.get(this, "textPrinting"), width: 250, height: 65, closeOnEscape:true});
		printPopup.open();
	}
	
	if(!charSet || charSet === "" || charSet === undefined || charSet === null){
		charSet = "cp857";
	}
	
	if(Array.isArray(text)) {
	    if(document.printApplet.sila) {
	        document.printApplet.print(text, printerName, charSet);
	    } else {
    	    for(var i = 0; i<text.length; i++) {
        	    document.printApplet.print(text[i], printerName, charSet);
    	    }
	    }
	} else {
    	document.printApplet.print(text, printerName, charSet);
    }
	
	if(this.config.showMessage){
		var $$printResult = $$.create("DIV");
		$$printResult.innerHTML = document.printApplet.status;
		
		if($$printResult.innerHTML.indexOf(SideMLManager.get(this, "sentToPrinter")) !== -1){
			window.setInterval(function () {printPopup.close()}, this.config.delay || 2000);
		}
		
		$$popup.appendChild($$printResult);
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc = this;
	SILAPrintService.init(function(res) {
			document.printApplet = SILAPrintService;
        },function(err) {
			if(!$$.byid("csc-print-dotmatrix-container")){
				var bfname = bc.bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
				var jarpath = SideModuleManager.getResourceUrl(bfname.substring(0, bfname.indexOf(".")), "resources/dot-matrix/dmapplet.jar");
				
				var $$container = $$.create("div", {id:"csc-print-dotmatrix-container"}, undefined, {width: "0px", height: "0px", overflow: "hidden"}, $$.body());
				var $$applet = $$.create("APPLET", {id: "dmapplet", "name": "printApplet", archive:jarpath, "code":"tr.com.cs.side.dotmatrix.DMApplet.class", "MAYSCRIPT":true});
				
				$$container.appendChild($$applet);
			}
	});
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {};

})(window);
/////=csc-seperator.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-SEPERATOR
 * @classdesc Seperator.
 * @author Mahmut Yıldız, Mete Işık
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.LABEL = "Seperator";

	this.METHODS = [];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed", "selected" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-SEPERATOR", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config, size = config.size || 2;
	var layout = bf.$CS$.parent.bcRef.typeName;
	var $$newSeperator = $$.create("DIV", {"id": config.id}, "csc-seperator", config.style);
	$$newSeperator.style.display = config.visible ? "" : "none";
	
	// Design Time da visible yap
	if (inDesigner(bf)) {
		$$newSeperator.style.display = "";
	}

	if(config.fill === "line"){
		$$newSeperator.style.background = "url('css/bc-style/img/sep-hor-back.png') center repeat-x";
		$$.addClass($$newSeperator, "fill-line");
	}
	if (layout == "CSC-HORIZONTAL") {
		$$.css($$newSeperator, "height", "10px");
		$$.css($$newSeperator, "width", size);
	} else {
		$$.css($$newSeperator, "width", "100%");
		$$.css($$newSeperator, "height", size);
	}

	$container.appendChild($$newSeperator);
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "changed") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onchange = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-passwordfield.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** @class CSC-PASSWORDFIELD */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled: false,
		cls: "csc-textbox",
		focusable: true
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Password";
	this.METHODS = ["focus"];
	this.EVENTS = ["changed", "selected", "blur", "keyup"];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [{
		name: "JQuery",
		version: "2.0.3"
	}];
	this.Type = function() {};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-PASSWORDFIELD", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.getValue = function () {
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$dom) {
		return $$dom.value;
	}
	return this.config.value;
};

BC.prototype.setValue = function (value) {
	if(value === null || undefined === value) {
		value = "";
	}
	this.config.value = value;
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
