	if($$dom) {
		$$dom.value = value;
	}
};

/**
 * @function focus
 * @description Focuses the component
 */
BC.prototype.focus = function () {
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$dom) {
		$$dom.focus();
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function ($$container) {
	var bc = this, bf = bc.bf, config = bc.config;
	// Create Password Field
	var $$input = $$.create("INPUT", {
		id: config.id,
		type: "password",
		maxLength: config.maxLength | 1000,
		placeholder: config.placeholder
	}, ["csc-password", config.cssClass], config.style, $$container);
	if(bf.isDisabled()) {
		$$input.setAttribute("disabled", "disabled");
	}
	if(inDesigner(this.bf)) {//Designer'da autocomplete'i kapat
		$$input.setAttribute("autocomplete", "new-password");
	}
	if(bf.isRequired()) {
		$$.addClass($$input, "csc-required");
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function (eventName, callback) {
	var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(!$$dom) {
		return;
	}
	if(eventName == "changed") {
		$$dom.onchange = callback;
	} else if(eventName == "keyup") {
		$$dom.onkeyup = callback;
	} else if(eventName == "selected") {
		$$dom.onclick = callback;
	} else if(eventName == "blur") {
		$$dom.onblur = callback;
	} else if(eventName == "onfocus") {
		$$dom.onfocus = callback;
	}
};

})(window);
/////=csc-multi-combobox.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-MULTI-COMBOBOX
 * @classdesc Çoklu seçimlerde kullanılmak üzere tasarlanmış combobox.
 * @author mahmuty
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled : false,
		cls : "csc-combobox",
		suggestOnFocus: true
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Multi-Combo";
	this.METHODS = [ "setOptions", "filter", "getSelectedText", "addValue(value, text)", "getOptions", "changeRefData(refName, callback)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed(value)", "selected", "keyup(prevValue, value)", "blur", "itemSelected(value, text)" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	} ];

	this.Type = function() {
		this.EMPTY_TEXT = "-----";
		this.EMPTY_VALUE = "";
	};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-MULTI-COMBOBOX", def);
var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function() {
	this.config.value = [];
	
	this.optionsClosed = true;

	this.inTabular = false;
	var parent = this.bf;
	while (parent) {
		if (parent.$CS$.definition.isTabular) {
			this.inTabular = true;
			break;
		}
		parent = parent.$CS$.parent;
	}
	if (this.inTabular && parent[this.bf.$CS$.name]) {
		this.options = parent[this.bf.$CS$.name].bcRef.options;
		this.optionsConfig = parent[this.bf.$CS$.name].bcRef.optionsConfig;
	}
};

//Focus olduğunda label'ın okunabilmesi için
BC.prototype.getLabelId = function() {
	return this.config.id + "-input";
};

BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
	if(this.config.newitem){
		var $$input = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-input");
		if($$input){
			var newvalue = stringTrim($$input.textContent);
			if(newvalue){
				if(newvalue.length-1 <= parseInt($$input.getAttribute("maxLength"))){
					this.config.value.push({
						value : newvalue,
						text : newvalue
					});
					var $$selectDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id);
					this.addValueInner($$selectDiv, $$input, newvalue, newvalue);
					
					this.liclick = true;
					$$overlayDiv = $$.byid("multi-combobox-overlay");
					if($$overlayDiv){
						$$optionsDiv.style.display = "none";
						$$.remove($$overlayDiv);
					}
					$$input.innerHTML = "";
					this.bf.fire("blur");
				}
			
			}
		}
	}
	var result = [];
	for ( var i = 0; this.config.value && i < this.config.value.length; i++) {
		result.push(this.config.value[i].value);
	}
	return result;
};

BC.prototype.getText = function() {
	var result = [];
	for ( var i = 0; this.config.value && i < this.config.value.length; i++) {
		result.push(this.config.value[i].text);
	}
	return result;
};

BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
	if (value === null || value === undefined) {
		return;
	}
	if (!Array.isArray(value)) {
		value = [ value ];
	}

	this.config.value = [];
	this.config.rawvalue = undefined;

	if(!this.localOptions){
		this.prepareOptions();
//		this.localOptions = [];
	}
	
	var readonly = this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly();
	if (readonly) {
		var $$span = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		var htmlStr = "";
		for ( var i = 0; i < value.length; i++) {
			var val = value[i];
			if (typeof val == "object") {
				this.config.value.push(val);
				htmlStr = val.text +" ";
			} else {
				for ( var j = 0; j < this.localOptions.length; j++) {
					if (val == this.localOptions[j][0]) {
						var text = this.localOptions[j][1];
						this.config.value.push({
							value : val,
							text : text
						});
						htmlStr += text +" ";
						break;
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if($$span){
			$$span.textContent = htmlStr;
		}
	} else {
		var $$selectDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		var $$input = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-input");
		for ( var i = 0; i < value.length; i++) {
			var val = value[i];
			if (typeof val == "object") {
				this.config.value.push(val);
				this.addValueInner($$selectDiv, $$input, val.value, val.text);
			} else {
				for ( var j = 0; j < this.localOptions.length; j++) {
					if (val == this.localOptions[j][0]) {
						var text = this.localOptions[j][1];
						this.config.value.push({
							value : val,
							text : text
						});
						this.addValueInner($$selectDiv, $$input, val, text);
						break;
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.clear = function() {
	this.config.value = [];
	var readonly = this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly();
	if (readonly) {
		var $$element = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if ($$element) {
			$$element.innerHTML = "";
		}
	} else {
		var $$ul = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-ul");
		if ($$ul) {
			var lis = $$.getChildsHasTag($$ul, "li");
			for ( var i = 0; i < lis.length; i++) {
				$$.remove(lis[i]);
			}
		}
	}
};

/**
 * @function changeRefData
 * @description Referans veriyi değiştirir.
 * @param [refName] referans verinin adı
 * @param [callback] callback fonksiyonu
 */
BC.prototype.changeRefData = function(refName, callback){
	delete this.config.refDataNames;
	delete this.config.appRefData;
	var bc = this;
	function finishOperation(){
		bc.bf.rerender();
		if(callback){
			callback();
		}
	}
	if(!refName){
		finishOperation();
	} else if(CSRefDataManager.refData.side[refName]){//side referans verisi mi? o zaman dinamik olarak getirmeye ihtiyaç yok
		this.config.refDataNames = refName;
		finishOperation();
	} else {
		this.config.appRefData = refName;
		CSRefDataManager.requestRefData(false, [refName], finishOperation, BFEngine.getModuleName(this.bf));
	}
};

// BC.prototype.saveState = function() {
// var value = this.getValue();
// if (value == this.EMPTY_VALUE && this.config.rawvalue !== undefined) {
// this.config.value = this.config.rawvalue;
// } else {
// this.config.value = value;
// }
// };

BC.prototype.setVisible = function(flag) {
	this.config.visible = flag;
	$("#" + this.config.id).css("display", flag ? "" : "none");
};

BC.prototype.prepareOptions = function() {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	var selectedRefDataName = (config.refDataNames && config.refDataNames != "none") ? config.refDataNames : config.appRefData;
	bc.localOptions = [];
	if (bc.options) {
		if (!config.filterProp || (config.filterProp && bc.filterValue)) {
			for (var i = 0; i < bc.options.length; i++) {
				var item = bc.options[i];
				if (Array.isArray(item)) {
					bc.localOptions.push([ item[0], item[1] ]);
				} else if (typeof item != "object") {
					bc.localOptions.push([ item, item ]);
				} else {
					if (config.filterProp && Array.isArray(bc.filterValue) && !isInIt(bc.filterValue, item[config.filterProp])) {
						continue;
					}
					if (config.filterProp && !Array.isArray(bc.filterValue) && bc.filterValue && item[config.filterProp] != bc.filterValue) {
						continue;
					}
					if ( (bc.optionsConfig && bc.optionsConfig.value && bc.optionsConfig.text) || (config.valueField || config.textField) ) {
						bc.localOptions.push([ BEANUtils.getValue(item, (bc.optionsConfig && bc.optionsConfig.value) || config.valueField), BEANUtils.getValue(item, (bc.optionsConfig && bc.optionsConfig.text) || config.textField) ]);
					} else {
						bc.localOptions.push([ item.value, item.text ]);
					}
				}
			}
		}
	} else if (selectedRefDataName != undefined) {
		if (!inDesigner(bf) && selectedRefDataName != "none") {
			var data = CSRefDataManager.getData(selectedRefDataName);
			if (data) {
				if (!config.filterProp || (config.filterProp && bc.filterValue)) {
					for ( var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
						if (config.filterProp && Array.isArray(bc.filterValue) && !isInIt(bc.filterValue, data[i][config.filterProp])) {
							continue;
						}
						if (config.filterProp && !Array.isArray(bc.filterValue) && bc.filterValue && data[i][config.filterProp] != bc.filterValue) {
							continue;
						}
						if (config.valueField && config.textField) {
							bc.localOptions.push([ data[i][config.valueField], data[i][config.textField] ]);
						} else {
							bc.localOptions.push([ data[i].value, data[i].text ]);
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.getOptions = function(full){
	/**
	 * @function getOptions
     * @description Multi combo'daki verileri dizi halinde getirir.
     * @param [full] dizinin içinde bütün nesnenin mi olacağı yoksa sadece text,value ikilisinin mi olacağı.
     */
	if(this.options){
		return this.options;
	}
	
	var result = [];
	if(!this.localOptions){
		this.prepareOptions();
	}
	if(this.localOptions){
		var valueField = this.config.valueField || "value", textField = this.config.textField || "text";
		var selectedRefDataName = (this.config.refDataNames && this.config.refDataNames != "none") ? this.config.refDataNames : this.config.appRefData;
		var data = CSRefDataManager.getData(selectedRefDataName);
		for(var i=0; i<this.localOptions.length ;i++){
			for(var j=0; j< data.length; j++){
				var value = BEANUtils.getValue(data[j], valueField);
				var text = BEANUtils.getValue(data[j], textField);
				if((this.localOptions[i][0] === value) && (this.localOptions[i][1] === text) ){
					if(full){
						result.push(data[j]);//TODO mahmuty klonlamak gerekebilir
					} else {
						result.push({value: value, text: text});
					}
					break;
				}
			}
		}
	}
	return result;
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {

	this.prepareOptions();
	var bc = this;
	var readonly = this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly();
	this.disabled = this.bf.isDisabled();
	if (readonly) {
		var $span = $("<span>").attr("id", this.config.id);
		$span.addClass("csc-combobox");
		$span.css(this.config.style || {});
		$span.css("display", this.bf.isVisible() ? "" : "none");
		if (this.config.cssClass) {
			$span.addClass(this.config.cssClass);
		}
		if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
			$span.css("display", "");// Design Time da visible yap
			$span.html("Readonly");
		} else {
			var texts = this.getText();
			var str = "";
			for(var i=0; i<texts.length ;i++){
				str += texts[i] +" ";
			}
			$span.html(str);
		}
		$container.appendChild($span[0]);
		$$.bindEvent($span, "click", function(e){
			bc.bf.fire("selected");
		});
	} else {
		// create combobox
		var $$selectDiv = $$.create("div");
		var $$optionsDiv = $$.create("div");
		var $$ul = $$.create("ul");
		if(this.config.style && this.config.style.height){
			$$.css($$ul, "height", this.config.style.height +"px");
		}
		$$selectDiv.setAttribute("id", this.config.id);
		$$.bindEvent($$selectDiv, "click", function(e){
			bc.bf.fire("selected");
		});
		if(!this.disabled){
			$$selectDiv.setAttribute("tabindex", this.config.tabIndex);
		}
		$$optionsDiv.setAttribute("id", this.config.id + "-opt");
		$$ul.setAttribute("id", this.config.id + "-ul");
		
		if(this.bf.isRequired()){
			$$.addClass($$selectDiv, "csc-required");
		}

		$$.addClass($$selectDiv, "csc-multi-select");
		$$.addClass($$selectDiv, this.config.cssClass);
		$$.addClass($$optionsDiv, "csc-multi-options");
		$$.css($$selectDiv, this.config.style);
		$$.css($$selectDiv, "display", inDesigner(this.bf) || this.bf.isVisible() ? "" : "none");// Design Time da visible yap

		$container.appendChild($$selectDiv);
		$$selectDiv.appendChild($$ul);
		$$selectDiv.appendChild($$optionsDiv);
		if(!this.disabled){
//			var $$input = $$.create("input");
			var $$input = $$.create("span", {maxLength: this.config.maxLength, contentEditable: true/*, tabindex: 1*/});
			$$input.setAttribute("id", this.config.id + "-input")
			$$.addClass($$input, "csc-mc-text");
			$$ul.appendChild($$input);
			
			if(this.config.suggestOnFocus){
				$$input.onfocus = function() {
					bc.onEnter($$selectDiv, $$optionsDiv, $$input);
				};
			}
			$$input.onkeyup = function(event) {
				if(bc.config.newitem &&  $$input.innerHTML.length-1	 > parseInt($$input.getAttribute("maxLength"))){
					return;
				}
				if (event.keyCode == 38 || event.keyCode == 13 /* || event.keyCode == 9 */) {
					return;
				}
				if (event.keyCode == 40) {
					if ($$optionsDiv.style.display != "block") {
						bc.onEnter($$selectDiv, $$optionsDiv, $$input);
					}
					return;
				}
				if (event.keyCode == 8 && this.prevValue == "") {
					var lis = $$.getChildsHasTag($$ul, "li");
					if (lis.length == 0) {
						return;
					}
					var toDelete = lis[lis.length - 1].getAttribute("rel");
					for ( var j = 0; j < bc.config.value.length; j++) {
						if (bc.config.value[j].value == toDelete) {
							bc.config.value.splice(j, 1);
							break;
						}
					}
					$$.remove(lis[lis.length - 1]);
				}
				if(bc.config.newitem && event.keyCode == "188"){//188 => virgül
					var newvalue = stringTrim($$input.textContent.substring(0, $$input.textContent.length-1));
					$$input.innerHTML = "";
					if(!newvalue){
						return;
					}
					bc.config.value.push({
						value : newvalue,
						text : newvalue
					});
					bc.addValueInner($$selectDiv, $$input, newvalue, newvalue);
					return;
				}
				if (bc.onkeyup) {
					bc.onkeyup(this.prevValue, this.textContent);
				} else {
					bc.renderOptions($$optionsDiv, this, "x");
				}
				if (this.prevValue != this.textContent) {
					this.prevValue = this.textContent;
				}
			};
			$$input.onpaste = function(e){
				try {
					e.preventDefault();
					var data = "";
					if(e.clipboardData){
						data = e.clipboardData.getData('text/plain');
						
					} else if (window.clipboardData) {
						data = window.clipboardData.getData('Text');
					}
					$$input.textContent = data;
					var sel = window.getSelection();
					sel.collapse($$input, 1);
					
					
				}catch(e){
				}
			};
			$$selectDiv.onkeydown = function(event) {
				if (event.keyCode == 32) {// space
					if($$input.textContent == ""){
						event.preventDefault();
						return;
					}
				}
				
				if ($$.isDisplayNone($$optionsDiv)) {
					bc.onEnter($$selectDiv, $$optionsDiv, $$input);
					return;
				}
				var optionsUl = $$.child($$optionsDiv, "ul");
				var selected = $$.getChildsHasClass(optionsUl, "csc-mc-selected")[0];
				var toSelect = null;
				
				if (event.keyCode == 40) {// asagi
					if (selected) {
						toSelect = $$.next(selected);
					} else {
						toSelect = $$.child(optionsUl, "li");
					}
				} else if (event.keyCode == 38) {// yukari
					if (selected) {
						toSelect = $$.prev(selected);
					}
				} else if (event.keyCode == 13) {// enter
					event.preventDefault();
					if (selected) {
						var val = selected.getAttribute("rel");
						bc.selectOption($$selectDiv, $$optionsDiv, selected, val);
					}
					return;
				}
				if (selected && toSelect) {
					$$.rmClass(selected, "csc-mc-selected");
					$$.addClass(toSelect, "csc-mc-selected");
				} else if (toSelect) {
					$$.addClass(toSelect, "csc-mc-selected");
				}
				
			};
			
			if(this.config.suggestOnFocus) {
				$$.bindEvent($$selectDiv, "click", function(e) {
					if(e.target.className.indexOf("ffscroll-arrow-up") > -1 || e.target.className.indexOf("ffscroll-arrow-down") > -1){
						return;
					}
					bc.onEnter($$selectDiv, $$optionsDiv, $$input);
				});
			}
		}
		
		// Firefox için Srollbar Düzeltmesi.
		if($$.isff()){
			var hght = this.config.style ? this.config.style.height : undefined;
			if(hght && hght.indexOf("px") > 0) { hght.slice(0, hght.indexOf("px")); }
			if(!hght || parseInt(hght) < 45){
				var arrowUp = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "ffscroll-arrow-up", undefined, $$selectDiv);
				var arrowDown = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "ffscroll-arrow-down", undefined, $$selectDiv);
				
				var checkPosition = function(){
					!$$ul.scrollTop ? $$.rmClass(arrowUp, "ffscroll-clickable") : $$.addClass(arrowUp, "ffscroll-clickable");
					$$ul.scrollTop + $$ul.getBoundingClientRect().height == $$ul.scrollHeight ? $$.rmClass(arrowDown, "ffscroll-clickable") : $$.addClass(arrowDown, "ffscroll-clickable");
				};
				
				bc.bf.on("changed", bc, checkPosition);
				
				$$ul.addEventListener("scroll", function(){
					checkPosition();
				});
				
				var intervalID;
				
				var manualScroll = function(type, dom){
					if(intervalID){
						clearInterval(intervalID);
					}
					
					if(type > 1){
						if(dom.className.indexOf("ffscroll-clickable") > -1){
							$$ul.scrollTop = type == 2 ? $$ul.scrollTop-12 : $$ul.scrollTop+12;
							checkPosition();
						}
					}else{
						intervalID = setInterval(function(){
							if(dom.className.indexOf("ffscroll-clickable") > -1){
								$$ul.scrollTop = type ? $$ul.scrollTop+12 : $$ul.scrollTop-12;
								checkPosition();
							}
						}, 80);
					}
				};
				
				$$.css($$selectDiv, "position", "relative");
				
				arrowUp.onmousedown     = function(){ manualScroll(0, this); };
				arrowDown.onmousedown   = function(){ manualScroll(1, this); };
				
				arrowUp.onmouseout = arrowDown.onmouseout = arrowDown.onmouseup = arrowUp.onmouseup = function(){
					clearInterval(intervalID);
				}
				
				arrowUp.onclick     = function(){ manualScroll(2, this); };
				arrowDown.onclick   = function(){ manualScroll(3, this); };
			}
		}
		
		this.renderFuncRunning = true;
		this.setValue(this.config.value);
		this.renderFuncRunning = false;
	}
	this.applyAddedClasses();// Apply css classes added by user
};

BC.prototype.renderOptions = function($$optionsDiv, $$input, x) {
	if (!$$optionsDiv) {
		$$optionsDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-opt");
		if (!$$optionsDiv) {
			return;
		}
	}
	var bc = this;
	$$optionsDiv.onclick = function(){
		bc.liclick = true;
		bc.scroll = true;
	};
	$$optionsDiv.onmouseup = function(){
		bc.scroll = false;
		$$input.focus();
	};
	var $$optionsUl = $$.child($$optionsDiv, "ul");
	if(!$$optionsUl){
		return;
	}
	var $$selectDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	var str = $$input.textContent.toUpperCase().replace("\\","").replace("%","*");
	var regex = $$input.textContent ? new RegExp(str) : null;
	$$optionsUl.innerHTML = "";
	for ( var i = 0; i < this.localOptions.length; i++) {
		var val = this.localOptions[i][0];
		var found = false;
		for ( var j = 0; j < this.config.value.length; j++) {
			if (this.config.value[j].value == val) {
				found = true;
				break;
			}
		}
		if (found) {
			continue;
		}
		var text = this.localOptions[i][1];
		if (regex && !regex.test(text.toUpperCase())) {
			continue;
		}
		var $$li = $$.create("li");
		var $$span = $$.create("span");
		$$li.setAttribute("rel", val);
//		$$li.setAttribute("tabindex", 0);
		$$li.setAttribute("rel2", text);
		$$span.textContent = this.localOptions[i][1];

		$$optionsUl.appendChild($$li);
		$$li.appendChild($$span);
		$$li.onclick = function(e) {
			bc.liclick = true;
			e.stopPropagation();
			var val = this.getAttribute("rel");
			if ($$.getChildsHasAttr($$optionsDiv, "rel", val).length > 0) {
				return;
			}
			bc.selectOption($$selectDiv, $$optionsDiv, this, val);
		};
	}
};

//Click ile yada tab ile multicombo'ya girildiğinde componenti hazirlayan metod
BC.prototype.onEnter = function($$selectDiv, $$optionsDiv, $$input) {
	var bc = this;
	if(bc.optionsClosed === false){
		return;
	}
	$$overlayDiv = $$.byid("multi-combobox-overlay");
	if(!$$overlayDiv){
		$$overlayDiv = $$.create("div", {id: "multi-combobox-overlay"});
		$$.addClass($$overlayDiv, "csc-multi-select-overlay");
		
		if(CSPopupContext.existGlobalPopup()){
			$$overlayDiv.style.zIndex = CSPopupContext.getGlobalZindex();
		} else {
			$$overlayDiv.style.zIndex = CSPopupContext.getZindex();
		}
//		var pp = CSPopupUTILS.findMyPopup(bc.bf);
//		if(pp){
//			console.dir(pp);
//		}
		//$$.body().appendChild($$overlayDiv); //TODO mahmuty overlaydiv in tamamen kaldırılması gerekebilir
	
		$$overlayDiv.onclick = function(e) {
			var target = e.target;
			while (target) {
				if (target == $$optionsDiv || target == $$selectDiv) {
					return;
				}
				target = target.parentNode;
			}
			bc.optionsClosed = true;
			$$optionsDiv.style.display = "none";
			$$.remove($$overlayDiv);
		};
	}

	$$input.onblur = function() {
		function kotroletOverlayKapat(){
			if (bc.liclick) {
				if(bc.scroll){
					bc.liclick = false;
					return;
				}
				bc.liclick = false;
				return;
			}
			
			if(bc.config.newitem){
				var newvalue = stringTrim($$input.textContent);
				if(newvalue.length > parseInt($$input.getAttribute("maxLength"))){
					return;
				}
				if(newvalue){
					bc.config.value.push({
						value : newvalue,
						text : newvalue
					});
					bc.addValueInner($$selectDiv, $$input, newvalue, newvalue);
				}
			}
	
		
			bc.optionsClosed = true;
			$$selectDiv.style.zIndex = parseInt($$overlayDiv.style.zIndex) - 1;
			$$optionsDiv.style.display = "none";
			$$.remove($$overlayDiv);
			$$input.innerHTML = "";
			bc.bf.fire("blur");
		}
		window.setTimeout(kotroletOverlayKapat, 300);
	};

	$$optionsDiv.innerHTML = "";
	var width = $$selectDiv.offsetWidth;
	$$optionsDiv.style.width = width + "px";
	$$optionsDiv.style.top = $$selectDiv.offsetHeight + "px";
	$$optionsDiv.style.display = "block";
	$$optionsDiv.style.zIndex = parseInt($$overlayDiv.style.zIndex) + 1;
	$$selectDiv.style.zIndex = parseInt($$overlayDiv.style.zIndex) + 1;

	var $$optionsUl = $$.create("ul");
	$$optionsDiv.appendChild($$optionsUl);
	bc.optionsClosed = false;

	this.renderOptions($$optionsDiv, $$input);
	$$input.focus();
};

BC.prototype.selectOption = function($$selectDiv, $$optionsDiv, $$li, value) {
	var text = $$li.getAttribute("rel2");
	this.config.value.push({
		value : value,
		text : text
	});
	var $$input = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-input");
	this.addValueInner($$selectDiv, $$input, value, text);
	$$input.innerHTML = "";
	$$input.focus();

	$$optionsDiv.style.top = $$selectDiv.offsetHeight + "px";
	$$.remove($$li);
};

BC.prototype.addValue = function(value, text) {
	/**
     * @description Multi combo'ya ekleme yapar.
     * @param [value] Eklenecek değer. Örn: "06"
     * @param [text] Eklenecek metin. Örn: "Ankara"
     */
	var $$selectDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	var $$input = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-input");
	if(text === undefined){
		text = value;
	}
	
	this.config.value.push({
		value : value,
		text : text
	});
	this.addValueInner($$selectDiv, $$input, value, text);
};

// Eklenen value values içerinde var mı diye bakmaz
BC.prototype.addValueInner = function($$selectDiv, $$input, value, text) {
	if (!$$selectDiv) {
		return;
	}

	var bc = this;
	var ul = $$.child($$selectDiv, "ul");
	var li = $$.create("li");
	li.setAttribute("rel", value);
	ul.insertBefore(li, $$input);
	li.textContent = text;
    li.onclick = function(){
        bc.bf.fire("itemSelected", this.getAttribute("rel"), this.firstChild.data);
    };
	if(!this.disabled){
		var span = $$.create("span");
		span.innerHTML = "x";
		span.setAttribute("rel", value);
		span.onclick = function(event) {
			event.stopPropagation();
			var toDelete = this.getAttribute("rel");
			for ( var j = 0; j < bc.config.value.length; j++) {
				if (bc.config.value[j].value == toDelete) {
					bc.config.value.splice(j, 1);
					break;
				}
			}
			$$.remove(this.parentNode);
			bc.renderOptions($$.byid(bc.config.id + "-opt"), $$.byid(bc.config.id + "-input"));
			if(!bc.renderFuncRunning){
				bc.bf.fire("changed", this.getAttribute("rel"));
			}
		};
		li.appendChild(span);
	}
	if(!bc.renderFuncRunning){
		bc.bf.fire("changed", li.getAttribute("rel"));
	}
};


BC.prototype.setOptions = function(items, config) {
	/**
	 * @function setOptions
     * @description Multi combo'da gözüken değerleri ayarlar.
     * @example items: [{plaka: "06", adi: "Ankara"},{plaka:"01", adi: "Adana"}]
     * items dizi olmalı. dizi içeriği dizi olabilir (içeriği 2 ): [[1,"Erkek"], [2,"Kadın"]] dizi içeriği primitive olabilir: ["Erkek","Kadın"] yada [1920, 2000] dizi içeriği object
	 * olabilir (value ve text isimleri sabit): [{value: "1", text: "Erkek"},{value:"2", text: "Kadın"}} dizi içeriği object olabilir (value ve text isimleri config ile verilir):
	 * [{plaka: "06", adi: "Ankara"},{value:"01", adi: "Adana"}}, config: {value: "plaka", text: "adi"}
     * @param [items] items dizi olmalıdır. 
     * @param [config] value ve text isimleri config ile verilir.
     * @example config:  {value: "plaka", text: "adi"}
     */
	if (!Array.isArray(items)) {
		return;
	}
	this.options = items;
	this.optionsConfig = config;

	this.prepareOptions();
	if (config && config.openSuggestList) {
		this.renderOptions($$.byid(this.config.id + "-opt"), $$.byid(this.config.id + "-input"));
	}
};

BC.prototype.filter = function(filterProp, filterValue) {
	/**
	 * @function filter
     * @description Multicombo'da sadece filtrelenen değerlerin gözükmesini sağlar.
     * @param [filterProp] Hangi elemana göre filtreleneceği. Örn: "plaka"
     * @param [filterValue] Filtrelenecek elemanın hangi değere göre kısıtlanacağı. Örn: "06"
     */
	if (filterValue === undefined) {
		filterValue = filterProp;
	} else {
		this.config.filterProp = filterProp;
	}
	this.filterValue = filterValue;

	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "keyup") {
		this.onkeyup = callback;
	} else if(eventName == "itemSelected"){
        var $$dom = byid(this.config.id);
        $$.addClass($$dom, "selectable");
    }
};
})(window);
/////=csc-context-menu.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-CONTEXT-MENU
 * @author hakand
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Context Menu"; 

	this.METHODS = ["setCallback(callback)", "setTitle(title)", "setTips(tips)", "setIcon(iconPath)", "showContextMenu(event)"];

	this.EVENTS = [ "selected(event)"];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	}];

	this.Type = function() {
	};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-CONTEXT-MENU", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function() {
	if(inDesigner(this.bf)){
		function getDefaultContextMenu(id){
			var obj = {};
			obj.aa = {
				"label" : SideMLManager.get("common.add"),
				"action" : function (event, id) { console.log(id);} ,
				"icon" : "css/bc-style/img/newfile.png",
				"icon" : "sf/img/i1.png",
				"seperator": true
			};
			obj.bb = {
				"label" : SideMLManager.get("common.delete"),
				"action" : function (event, id) { console.log(id); } ,
				"icon" : "css/bc-style/img/delete.png",
			};
			return obj;
		}
		this.setCallback(getDefaultContextMenu, {leftSide: true});
	}
};

BC.prototype.setDisabled = function(flag) {
	this.config.disabled = flag;
};

BC.prototype.destroybc = function(){
	$("#"+this.config.id).remove();
};

BC.prototype.setCallback = function(callback) {
	/**
     * @description Callback fonksiyonunu ayarlar.
     * @function setCallback
     * @param [callback] callback fonksiyonu
     */
	this.contextMenuCallback = callback;
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.showContextMenu = function(event) {
	event = event || window.event;
	var bc = this;
	console.log("csc-context-menu");
	event.preventDefault();
	var menuItemsObj = this.contextMenuCallback();

	var options = {
		top : event.pageY,
		left: event.pageX, 
		items: menuItemsObj,
		showAbove: bc.config.showAbove 
	};
	
	csdu.contextMenu( options, undefined, event);
};


BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc =this;
	var bfname = this.bf.$CS$.definition.BF_NAME;
	
	var title = "";
	if (this.config.title === undefined || this.config.title === null) {
		title = SideMLManager.get("common.contaxtMenu");
	} else if (stringTrim(this.config.title) != "") {
		title = this.config.title;
	}
	var $$input = $$.create("INPUT", {type: "button", id:this.config.id, "tabindex": this.config.tabIndex, title : this.config.tips, value : title, disabled : (this.bf.isDisabled() && !this.config.runOnDisabled)}, 
			//burada özellikle csc-button sınıfı yapıldı.
			["csc-button", this.config.cssClass], this.config.style);
	
	$$input.style.display = inDesigner(this.bf) || this.config.visible ? "" : "none";
	if(this.config.theme){
		$$.addClass($$input, "csc-button-theme "+this.config.theme);
	}
	if(this.config.cssClass){
		$$.addClass($$input, this.config.cssClass);
	}
	if (this.config.icon) {
		$$.css($$input, {
			backgroundImage : "url('" + SideModuleManager.getResourceUrl(bfname.substring(0, bfname.indexOf(".")), this.config.icon )+ "')",
			paddingLeft : "28px",
			backgroundPosition : "4px center",
			backgroundRepeat : "no-repeat"
		});
		$$.addClass($$input, "csc-button-icon");
	}
	
	if(this.config.tooltip){//HTML tooltip
		var $$div = $$.create("DIV", null, "csc-tooltip-div");
		var $$img = $$.create("IMG", {src: "css/bc-style/img/ucgen-beyaz.png"}, "csc-tooltip-img");
		var $$span = $$.create("SPAN", null, "csc-tooltip-span");
		$$span.innerHTML = this.config.tooltip;
		$$div.appendChild($$input);
		$$div.appendChild($$img);
		$$div.appendChild($$span);
		$container.appendChild($$div);
	} else {
		$container.appendChild($$input);
	}
	
	
	if(this.contextMenuCallback){
		$$.bindEvent($$input, "click", function(event){
			bc.showContextMenu(event);
		});
	}
	
	
	if(bc.config.showStatic){
		$$.addClass($$input, "csc-fixed-button-icon");
	}
	
};

BC.prototype.setTitle = function(title) {
	/**
     * @description Context menu butonunun üstündeki yazıyı ayarlar.
     * @function setTitle
     * @param [title] Context menu butonunun üstünde yer alacak yazı
     */
	this.config.title = title || "";
	var $$input = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$input){
		$$input.setAttribute("value", this.config.title);
	}
};

BC.prototype.setTips = function(tips) {
	/**
	 * @function setTips
     * @description Context menu butonunun üstüne gelip bekleyince beliren ipucunu ayarlar.
     * @param [tips] Butonun üstünde beliren ipucu
     */
	this.config.tips = tips || "";
	var $$input = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$input){
		$$input.setAttribute("title", this.config.tips);
	}
};

BC.prototype.setIcon = function(iconPath) {
	/**
	 * @function setIcon
     * @description Context Menu butonunu ikon olarak ayarlar.
     * @param [iconPath] Context menu butonunun yerine ayarlanacak ikonun hangi lokasyondan alınacağı
     */
	this.config.icon = iconPath;
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if(dom){
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-video-player.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-FLASH-PLAYER 
 * @classdesc Video player bileşeni
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		autoStart: false,
		vtype: "mp4",
		style: {
			width: 800,
			height: 600
		}
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Video Player";
	this.METHODS = [ "setData(data)" ];
	this.EVENTS = ["selected" ];
	
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ ];

	this.Type = function() {};
}
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-VIDEO-PLAYER", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.setData = function(data){
	this.config.data = data;
	var $$div = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(!$$div || !this.config.vtype){
		return;
	}
	var html = "";
	if (this.config.vtype == "mp4") {
		html += '<video  width="' + this.config.style.width + '" height="' + this.config.style.height +'" controls="controls">';
		html += '<source src="' +this.config.data+'" type="video/mp4" />';
		html += SideMLManager.get(this, "notSupportVideoTag");
		html += '</video>';
	} else {
		html = '<object type="application/x-shockwave-flash" width="' + this.config.style.width + '" height="' + this.config.style.height +'" wmode="transparent" data="css/bc-style/img/flvplayer.swf?file=' + this.config.data + '&autoStart=' + this.config.autoStart + '">';
		html += '<param name="movie" value="css/bc-style/img/flvplayer.swf?file=' + this.config.data + '&autoStart=false"/>';
		html += '<param name="wmode" value="transparent" />';
		html += '</object>';
	}
	
	$$div.innerHTML = html;
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var $$div = $$.create("DIV", {id: this.config.id },undefined,this.config.style);
	$container.appendChild($$div);
	if(!inDesigner(this.bf) && this.config.data){
		this.setData(this.config.data);
	}
	
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		$$.bindEvent(this.config.id, "click", callback);
	}
};

})(window);
/////=csc-gmap.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-MAP 
 * @author hakand
 */
function Definition() {

	
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled : false
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Map";
	
	this.METHODS = ["setZoomLevel(level)", "setPosition(latLngObj)", "getPosition()", "setMarkers(markerObjArr)", "removeMarkers(markerIdArr)", "clearAllMarkers", "searchAddress(addressStr, callback)"];

	this.EVENTS = [ "positionSelected(latLngObj)", "markerSelected(markerid, pageX, pageY, marker)"];
	
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [  { name : "JQuery", version : "2.0.3" }, { name: "gmap-marker", version: "1.0" }];

	this.Type = function() {
		var geocoder = null;
		var gmap = null;
		var gmapDiv = null;
//		var marker = null;
		var markerMap = [];
		var defaultLatLng = { lat:"39.962494", lng: "32.845272" };
		var defZoomLevel = 14;
		
		if(!window.gmapCallbackArr){
			window.gmapCallbackArr = [];
		}
		
		this.callbackArr = [];
		
		this.addToCallbackArr = function(callback){
			if(window.isGoogleMapLoaded){
				this.callbackArr.push(callback);//gmap scriptleri yuklendiyse bc nin callback arr.
			}else{
				window.gmapCallbackArr.push(callback);//gmap scriptleri daha yüklenmediyse global callback arr.
			}
		};
		
		this.setZoomLevel = function(level){
			/**
			 * @function setZoomLevel
		     * @description Haritadaki yakınlık seviyesini ayarlar.
		     * @param [level] yakınlık seviyesidir. Sayı girilmelidir.
		     */
			var bc = this;
			this.config.zoomLevel = level;
			if(gmap){
				gmap.setZoom(parseInt(level));
			}else{
				this.addToCallbackArr(function(){ bc.setZoomLevel(level);});
			}
		};
		
		this.getPosition = function() {
			/**
			 * @function getPosition
		     * @description Haritadaki güncel koordinatları verir.
		     **/
			return this.latLng;
		};
		
		this.setPosition = function(obj, nomarker) {
			/**
			 * @function setPosition
		     * @description Haritadaki güncel noktayı ayarlar.
		     * @param [obj] haritadaki güncel noktanın enlem ve boylam koordinatlarıdır. 
		     * @example gmap.setPosition({lat:"1.962494", lng: "25.845272"}) şeklinde lat enlem, lng boylam koordinatlarıdır.
		     * @param [nomarker]
		     */
			this.latLng = obj;
			this.panTo();
//			if(!nomarker){
//				this.placeMarker([obj]);
//			}
		};
		
		/*
		 * obj = { id, lat, lng, title}
		 */
		this.setMarkers = function(markerObjArrParam){
			var bc = this;
			if(!gmap){
				this.addToCallbackArr(function(){ bc.setMarkers(markerObjArrParam);});
				return;
			}

			var bounds = new google.maps.LatLngBounds();
			for(var i in markerObjArrParam){
				var obj = markerObjArrParam[i];
				var marker = markerMap[obj.id];
				var position = new google.maps.LatLng(obj.lat+"", obj.lng+"");
				if(!marker){
					var icon;
					if(obj.icon){
						var moduleName = this.bf.getModuleName();
						icon = SideModuleManager.getResourceUrl(moduleName, obj.icon);
					}
					if(obj.label){
						marker = new MarkerWithLabel({
							position: position,
//							draggable: true,
//							raiseOnDrag: true,
							map: gmap,
							title: obj.title,
							icon: icon || '',
							labelContent: obj.label+"",
							labelAnchor: new google.maps.Point(22, 0),
							labelClass: "csc-gmap-label", // the CSS class for the label
							labelStyle: {opacity: 0.75},
							//labelInBackground: false
						});
					}else{
						marker = new google.maps.Marker({
							position: position,
							map: gmap,
							title: obj.title,
							icon: icon || ''
						});
					}
				}
				marker.setMap(gmap);
				marker.setPosition(position);
				markerMap[obj.id || getid()] = marker;
				bounds.extend(position);
				
				//marker click event
				(function(marker, obj){
					google.maps.event.addListener(marker, 'click', function() {
						var event = window.event;
						bc.bf.fire("markerSelected", obj.id, event.pageX, event.pageY, obj);
						console.log("markerSelected", obj.id, event.pageX, event.pageY, obj); 
					});
				})(marker, obj);
			}
			//gmap.fitBounds(bounds);
			this.placeMarkers();
		};

		this.removeMarkers = function(markerIdArrParam){
			/**
			 * @function removeMarkers
		     * @description Haritadan işaretleri siler.
		     * @param [markerIdArrParam] Silinecek olan işaretlerin id'leri dizi olarak verilir. 
		     */
			if(!gmap){
				var bc = this;
				this.addToCallbackArr(function(){ bc.removeMarkers(markerIdArrParam);});
				return;
			}

			for(var i in markerIdArrParam){
				var markerid = markerIdArrParam[i];
				var marker = markerMap[markerid];
				if(marker){
					marker.setMap(null);
					delete markerMap[markerid];//marker map ten sil
				}
			}
		};
		
		
		this.searchAddress = function(addressStr, callback){
			/**
			 * @function searchAddress
		     * @description Girilen adresi arar.
		     * @param [address] Aranacak adres
		     * @param [callback] callback fonksiyonu
		     */
			if(!gmap){
				var bc = this;
				this.addToCallbackArr(function(){ bc.searchAddress(addressStr, callback);});
				return;
			}
			if(!geocoder){
				geocoder = new google.maps.Geocoder();
			}
			geocoder.geocode( { 'address': addressStr}, function(results, status) {
				if (status == google.maps.GeocoderStatus.OK) {
					//results[0].geometry.location
					callback(results);
					console.log(results);
				} else {
					console.error('[Csc-gmap] Geocode was not successful for the following reason: ' + status);
				}
			});
		};
		
		
		this.clearAllMarkers = function(){
			/**
			 * @function clearAllMarkers
		     * @description Bütün işaretleri siler.
		     */
			if(!gmap){
				var bc = this;
				this.addToCallbackArr(function(){ bc.clearAllMarkers();});
				return;
			}

			for(var i in markerMap){
				markerMap[i].setMap(null);
			}
			markerMap = {};
		};

		
		this.panTo = function(position){

			var bc = this;
			if(!gmap){
				this.addToCallbackArr(function(){ bc.panTo(position);});
				return;
			}

			position = position || new google.maps.LatLng(this.latLng.lat, this.latLng.lng);
			gmap.panTo(position);
		};
		
		this.placeMarkers = function(){
			if(!gmap){
				return;
			}
			//bounds => haritanın sınırlarını markerlara göre ayarla.
			var bounds = new google.maps.LatLngBounds();
			for(var i in markerMap){
				markerMap[i].setMap(gmap);
				bounds.extend(markerMap[i].getPosition());
			}

			// Don't zoom in too far on only one marker
		    if (bounds.getNorthEast().equals(bounds.getSouthWest())) {
		       var extendPoint1 = new google.maps.LatLng(bounds.getNorthEast().lat() + 0.01, bounds.getNorthEast().lng() + 0.01);
		       var extendPoint2 = new google.maps.LatLng(bounds.getNorthEast().lat() - 0.01, bounds.getNorthEast().lng() - 0.01);
		       bounds.extend(extendPoint1);
		       bounds.extend(extendPoint2);
		    }
			
			gmap.fitBounds(bounds);
		};
		
		function loadScript(bc){
			if(!window.isGoogleMapRequested){
				window.gmapLoadedCallback = function(){ 
					SIDEUtil.loadJSFromBC(bc, "designer/js/3thParty/gmap/", "js/3thParty/gmap-marker/", "markerwithlabel.min.js", function(){
						
						window.isGoogleMapLoaded = true; 
						//çiz
//						bc.bf.rerender();
						for(var i in  window.gmapBfCallbackArr){
							window.gmapBfCallbackArr[i]();//rerender lar
						}
						
						for(var i in  window.gmapCallbackArr){
							window.gmapCallbackArr[i]();
						}
						window.gmapCallbackArr = [];
					});
				};
				var $head = document.getElementsByTagName("head")[0];
				var script = document.createElement("script");
				script.src = "https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/js?v=3.exp&sensor=false&callback=gmapLoadedCallback";
				script.type = "text/javascript";
				$head.appendChild(script);
				window.isGoogleMapRequested = true;
			}else{
				if(!window.gmapBfCallbackArr){
					window.gmapBfCallbackArr = [];
				}
				window.gmapBfCallbackArr.push(function(){ bc.bf.rerender(); });
			}
		}

		
		this.init = function() {
		};

		this.load = function() {
		};
		
		this.DRL = function(){
			var parent = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
			if(parent){
				if(typeof parent.getChildContainer == "function"){
					var $$div = parent.getChildContainer(this.bf.$CS$.name);
				} else {
					var $$div = $$.byid(parent.bcRef.getHtmlId());
				}
				if($$div){
					var width = $$.width($$div);
					var height = $$.height($$div);
					if(width != this.width || height != this.height){
						this.width = width;
						this.height = height;
						this.reRender();
					}
				}
			}
		};
		
		this.render = function($container) {
			var bc = this;
			var bf = this.bf;

			if(!window.isGoogleMapLoaded){
				gmapDiv = $$.create("div", { id : bc.config.id});
				$container.appendChild(gmapDiv);
				loadScript(this);
				return;
			}
			
			
			//dorelayout için...
			var parent = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
			if(parent){
				if(typeof parent.getChildContainer == "function"){
					var $$div = parent.getChildContainer(this.bf.$CS$.name);
				} else {
					var $$div = $$.byid(parent.bcRef.getHtmlId());
				}
				if($$div){
					this.width = $$.width($$div);
					this.height = $$.height($$div);
				}
			}
			
			var disabled = this.bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : "";
			if(!this.config.style){
				this.config.style = {};
			}
			
			//haritayı çizmek için dom hazırla
			var w = this.config.style.width;
			w = w || "100%";
			var h = this.config.style.height;
			h = h || "100%";
			var $$newMapCont = $$.create("div");
			$$.css($$newMapCont, { "height": h, "width":w, "min-width": "200px", "min-height": "200px"});
			$container.appendChild($$newMapCont);
			
//			gmapDiv = $$.byid(bc.config.id);
//			if(gmapDiv){
//				$$.remove(gmapDiv);
//			}
//			if(window.m){
//				window.m.unbind();
//			}
			
			gmapDiv = $$.create("div", { id : bc.config.id, disabled: disabled});
			$$.css(gmapDiv, { "height": "100%", "width": "100%", "min-width": "200px", "min-height": "200px"});
			$$newMapCont.appendChild(gmapDiv);
			
			
			//harita çiz
			var latLngObj = this.latLng || defaultLatLng;
			var position = new google.maps.LatLng(latLngObj.lat, latLngObj.lng);
	        var mapOptions = {
	          zoom:  bc.config.zoomLevel ? parseInt(bc.config.zoomLevel) : defZoomLevel,
	          center: position,
	        };
	        
	        if(this.config.mapTypeHybrid === true){
	        	mapOptions["mapTypeId"] = google.maps.MapTypeId.HYBRID;
	        }
	        
//	        if(!gmap){
//	        	gmapDiv.innerHTML = "";
	        	gmap = new google.maps.Map(gmapDiv, mapOptions);
	        	console.log("map created");
	        	window.m = gmap;
//	        	
//	        	google.maps.event.addListener(gmap, 'idle', function() {
//	        		   
//	        		//haritayı verilen pozisyona ortala
//	        		console.log("idle");
	        		bc.panTo(position);
	        		bc.placeMarkers();
//	        		});
//	        }
	        
//	        if(bc.config.zoomLevel){
//	        	gmap.setZoom(parseInt(bc.config.zoomLevel));
//	        }
			
	        //harita tıklanırsa event fırlat
	        google.maps.event.addListener(gmap, 'click', function(e) {
	        	//bc.latLng = {lat:e.latLng.d, lng:e.latLng.e};
	        	//burası kasten açıklama satırı yapıldı. Çünkü harita açılınca her click eventinde latlng set ediyor ve markerlar ile aynı boundda olmayınca map hata alıyor. latlng mauel set edilmeli yada hic edilmemeli. 
	        	//hatta setPosition metodu kaldırılabilir.
	        	
	        	//placeMarker(e.latLng);
	        	bf.fire("positionSelected", bc.latLng);
	        	console.log(e.latLng);
	        });
	        
	        //harita tıklanırsa event fırlat
	        google.maps.event.addListener(gmap, 'rightclick', function(e) {
	        	var latLng = {lat:e.latLng.k, lng:e.latLng.B};
	        	//placeMarker(e.latLng);

	    		function getDefaultContextMenu(id){
	    			var obj = {};
	    			obj["New"] = {
	    	                "label" : SideMLManager.get(bc, "pin"),
	    	                "action" :  function (event, id) {  
	    	                	bc.setPosition(latLng);
	    	                	bc.clearAllMarkers();
	    	                	bc.setMarkers([latLng]);
	    	                	bf.fire("positionSelected", latLng);
	    	                } ,
	    	         		"icon"	:  "css/bc-style/img/marker.png"
	    	            };
	    			return obj;
	    		}
	    		
	    		csdu.contextMenu({
	    			left: event.pageX, 
	    			top: event.pageY, 
	    			items: getDefaultContextMenu()
	    		});
	        });
	        
	        for(var m=0;m<bc.callbackArr.length;m++){
	        	bc.callbackArr[m]();
	        }
	        bc.callbackArr = [];
	        
//	        bf.fire("mapLoaded");
		};
		
		

		this.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
			if (eventName == "selected") {
				var dom = byid(this.config.id);
				if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
					dom.onclick = callback;
				}
			}
		};
	};

	this.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
}

BCEngine.registerType("CSC-GMAP", new Definition());
})(window);
/////=csc-static-table.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-STATIC-TABLE
 * @author Mahmut Yıldız
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		colCount: 3
	};

	this.BaseBF = "CONTAINER";
	this.LABEL = "Static Table";

	this.METHODS = [ "collapse", "expand", "setColumnWidths(widths)", "setColumnCount(count)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected", "onload", "oninit(param)" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-STATIC-TABLE", def);

var BC = def.Type;


BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bf = this.bf;
	var bc = this;
	
	var colWidths = [];
	if(this.config.colWidths){
		var parts = this.config.colWidths.split(",");
		for(var i=0; i<parts.length ;i++){
			colWidths[i] = stringTrim(parts[i]);
		}
	}
	
	var $$containerDiv = $$.create("div", {id: this.config.id}, ["csc-static-table", this.config.cssClass]);
	var $$table = $$.create("table", {id: this.config.id+"-t"});
	var $$tbody = $$.create("tbody", {id: this.config.id+"-b"}, null, null, $$table);
	$$table.style.display = (inDesigner(this.bf) || this.config.visible) ? "" : "none";
	
	$$.css($$table, this.config.style || {});
	
	var titleType = this.config.titleType || "none";
	if (titleType == "window") {
		var $$titleDiv = $$.create("div", null, ["csc-form-title", this.config.titleClass], {"width": "100%"});
		var $$titleSpan = $$.create("span", null, this.config.titleIcon);
		$$titleSpan.innerHTML = this.config.title;
		$$titleDiv.appendChild($$titleSpan);
		if (this.config.collapsible === true) {
			var $$collapseBtn = $$.create("ins", null, "collapse");
			$$collapseBtn.onclick = function() {
				if (bc.collapsed) {
					bf.expand();
				} else {
					bf.collapse();
				}
			};
			$$titleDiv.appendChild($$collapseBtn);
		}
		$$containerDiv.appendChild($$titleDiv);
		$$containerDiv.appendChild($$table);
	} else if (titleType == "fieldset" || titleType == "bfieldset") {
		var $$fieldSet = $$.create("fieldset", null, ["csc-form-fieldset", titleType == "bfieldset" ? "borderless-fieldset":null]);
		var $$legend = $$.create("legend");
		if (this.config.collapsible === true && this.config.showTitle !== false) {
			$$.addClass($$legend, "collapse");
			$$legend.onclick = function() {
				if (bc.collapsed) {
					bf.expand();
				} else {
					bf.collapse();
				}
			};
			$$legend.innerHTML = "<span>" +(this.config.title || "&nbsp;")+ "</span>";
			$$fieldSet.appendChild($$legend);
		} else if (this.config.title && this.config.showTitle !== false) {
			$$legend.innerHTML = "<span>" +(this.config.title || "&nbsp;")+ "</span>";
			$$fieldSet.appendChild($$legend);
		} else {
			$$.addClass($$fieldSet, "csc-form-fieldset-nolegend");
		}
        if(this.config.bottomBorder === false){
            $$.addClass($$fieldSet, "no-bottom-border");
        }
		$$fieldSet.appendChild($$table);
		$$containerDiv.appendChild($$fieldSet);
	} else if (titleType === undefined || titleType == "none") {
		$$containerDiv.appendChild($$table);
	}
	
	$container.appendChild($$containerDiv);
	var counter = 0;
	var $$tr;
	for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
		var member = bf.members[memberName];
		var memConfig = member.getConfig();
		var memberRef = member.bcRef;
		if(memberRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP" || memberRef.typeName == "CSC-HIDDEN"){
			continue;
		}
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf) && !member.isVisible()) {
			continue;
		}
		if(counter % this.config.colCount == 0){
			$$tr = $$.create("tr",null,null,null,$$tbody);
		}
		counter++;
		var $$td = $$.create("td",{rel: memberName},null,null,$$tr);
		if(memConfig.layoutConfig && memConfig.layoutConfig.horAlign){
			$$td.style.textAlign = memConfig.layoutConfig.horAlign;
		}
		if(memConfig.layoutConfig && memConfig.layoutConfig.verAlign){
			$$td.style.verticalAlign = memConfig.layoutConfig.verAlign;
		}
		if(counter <= this.config.colCount && colWidths[counter-1] !== undefined && colWidths[counter-1] != "*"){
			$$td.style.width = colWidths[counter-1];
		}
		BFEngine.render(member, $$td);
	}
	while(true){
		if(counter % this.config.colCount == 0){
			break;
		}
		counter++;
		$$.create("td",null,null,null,$$tr);
	}
	
	for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
		BFEngine.DRL(bf.members[memberName]);
	}
};

BC.prototype.getChildContainer = function(memberName) {
	var $$tbody = $$.byid(this.config.id+"-b");
	if(!$$tbody){
		return;
	}
	var $$trs = $$.childs($$tbody, "tr");
	for(var i=0; i<$$trs.length ; i++){
		var $$td = $$.getChildHasAttr($$trs[i], "rel", memberName);
		if($$td){
			return $$td;
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.setColumnWidths = function(widths) {
	this.config.colWidths = widths;
	BFEngine.renderRequest(this.bf);
};

BC.prototype.setColumnCount = function(count) {
	this.config.colCount = count;
	BFEngine.renderRequest(this.bf);
};


BC.prototype.collapse = function() {
	var $$containerDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	var fieldset = $$.child($$containerDiv, "fieldset");
	if (!fieldset) {// window
		var $$ins = $$.query($$containerDiv, [{tagName: "div", clazz: "csc-form-title"}, {tagName: "ins"}]);
		if($$ins){
			$$.rmClass($$ins, "collapse");
			$$.addClass($$ins, "expand");
		}
		
	} else {// fieldset
		var $$legend = $$.query($$containerDiv, [{tagName: "fieldset"}, {tagName: "legend"}]);
		if($$legend){
			$$.rmClass($$legend, "collapse");
			$$.addClass($$legend, "expand");
		}
	}
	var $$table = $$.byid(this.config.id+"-t");
	$$table.style.display = "none";
	this.collapsed = true;
};

BC.prototype.expand = function() {
	var $$containerDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	var fieldset = $$.child($$containerDiv, "fieldset");
	if (!fieldset) {// window
		var $$ins = $$.query($$containerDiv, [{tagName: "div", clazz: "csc-form-title"}, {tagName: "ins"}]);
		if($$ins){
			$$.rmClass($$ins, "expand");
			$$.addClass($$ins, "collapse");
		}
		
	} else {// fieldset
		var $$legend = $$.query($$containerDiv, [{tagName: "fieldset"}, {tagName: "legend"}]);
		if($$legend){
			$$.rmClass($$legend, "expand");
			$$.addClass($$legend, "collapse");
		}
	}
	var $$table = $$.byid(this.config.id+"-t");
	$$table.style.display = "";
	BFEngine.DRL(this.bf);
	this.collapsed = false;
};

BC.prototype.setTitle = function(title){
	this.config.title = title;
	var $$container = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(this.config.titleType == "window") {
		var $$spanTitle = $$.query($$container, [{tagName: "div", clazz: "csc-form-title"}, {tagName: "span"}]);
		if($$spanTitle){
			$$spanTitle.innerHTML = title;
		}
	} else if(this.config.titleType == "fieldset" || this.config.titleType == "bfieldset") {
		var $$spanTitle = $$.query($$container, [{tagName: "fieldset"}, {tagName: "legend"}, {tagName: "span"}]);
		if($$spanTitle){
			$$spanTitle.innerHTML = title;
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "drop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.load = function(){
	this.bf.fire("onload");
};
})(window);
/////=csc-editor.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-EDITOR
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled : false,
		focusable: true
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "WYSIWYG Editor"; 


	this.METHODS = [ "getPlainText", "changeReturnType(typeName)", "clearUndoHistory","focus"];

	this.EVENTS = [ "onload", "selected", "blur", "onchange" ];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "tinymce",
		version : "4.1.7"
	},{
		name : "tinymceDir",
		version : "1.0"
	}];

	this.Type = function() {
	};
	this.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();

	this.Type.prototype.init = function(){
		var parent = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
		var bc=this,bf=bc.bf;
		if(bf.isVisible()) {
			while(parent) {
				if(parent.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-TABLE") {
					parent.on("onDoRelayout", this.bf, function () {
						for(var i = 0; i < parent.length(); i++) {
							var mem = parent.getRow(i).get(bf.getMemberName());
							if(mem) {
								mem.bcRef.doReLayout();
							}
						}
					});
					break;
				}
				parent = parent.$CS$.parent;
			}
		}

		//d3 kütüphanesini dinamik yükleme
		if(window.tinyLibLoaded) {
			return;
		}
		var pathPrefix = "js/3thParty/tinymce/", bc = this, libs;
		if(CSSession.getEnv() == "dev" || CSSession.getEnv() == "test" || inDesigner(bc.bf)) {
			pathPrefix = "designer/" + pathPrefix;
		}
		libs = [pathPrefix + "tinymce.min.js"];

		SLibraryLoader.loadLib("tinymce", libs, {progress: true}, function () {
			window.tinyLibLoaded = true;
			BFEngine.a();
			BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
			BFEngine.r();
		});
	};
	
	this.Type.prototype.getValue = function(plain) {
		if(this.config.plaintext && plain !== false){
			return this.getPlainText();
		}
		var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if($$dom){
			var obj = tinyMCE.get(this.config.id+"-textarea");
			if(obj){
				this.data = obj.getContent();
			}
		}
		if(this.config.cropHtml){
			var before = "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html>\n<head>\n</head>\n<body>\n";
			var end = "</body>\n</html>";
			var value = this.data || "";
			value = value.replace(before, "");
			value = value.replace(end, "");
			return value;
		}
		return this.data || "";
	};
	this.Type.prototype.focus = function () {
    	var editor = tinyMCE.get(this.config.id + "-textarea");
    	if(editor){
    		editor.focus();
    	}
    };
	this.Type.prototype.getPlainText = function() {
		/**
		 * @function getPlainText
	     * @description Metni sade halde almayı sağlar.
	     */
		var before = "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html>\n<head>\n</head>\n<body>\n";
		var end = "</body>\n</html>";
		var value = this.getValue(false);
		value = value.replace(before, "");
		value = value.replace(end, "");
		var $$x = $$.create("DIV");
		$$x.innerHTML = value;
		return $($$x).text();
	};
	this.Type.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
		this.data = value;
		if(!window.tinyLibLoaded) {
			return;
		}
		var tiny = tinyMCE.get(this.config.id+"-textarea");
		if(tiny && this.initok){
			tiny.setContent(this.data || "", {format: "raw"});
		}
	};
	this.Type.prototype.isEmpty = function() {
		var value = this.getPlainText();
		if(!value || !stringTrim(value)){
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	};
	this.Type.prototype.setTitle = function(title) {
		this.config.title = title;
	};
	this.Type.prototype.clearUndoHistory = function(){
		/**
		 * @function clearUndoHistory
	     * @description Geri alma tarihçesini temizler.
	     */
		try {
			tinyMCE.get(this.config.id+"-textarea").undoManager.clear();
		}catch(e){}
	};
	this.Type.prototype.changeReturnType = function(typeName){
		/**
		 * @function changeReturnType
	     * @description Editördeki metnin sade ya da başka bir tipte olacağını ayarlar.
	     * @param [typeName] Editördeki metnin sade mi yoksa başka bir tipte mi olacağı bilgisi. "plaintext" ya da başka bir tip olabilir.
	     */
		if(typeName == "plaintext"){
			this.config.plaintext = true;
		} else {
			this.config.plaintext = false;
		}
	};
	this.setVisible = function(flag) {
		this.config.visible = flag;
		$("#" + this.config.id).css("display", flag ? "" : "none");
	};
	
	this.Type.prototype.saveState = function() {
		try {
			var editor = tinyMCE.get(this.config.id+"-textarea");
			if(editor){
				this.data = editor.getContent();
			}
		} catch(e){
		}
	};
	
	this.Type.prototype.DRL =
	this.Type.prototype.doReLayout = function(){		
		var $$div = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if($$div){
			this.saveState();
			this.reRender();//TODO mahmuty sadece width height değişimi daha mantıklı, yeniden çizme pahalı bir işlem
		}
	};
	
	this.Type.prototype.render = function(container) {
		if(!window.tinyLibLoaded) {
			return;
		}
		var bc = this;
		var $container = $(container);
        var $$tempSpan = $$.create("span");
        $$tempSpan.innerHTML = "xx";
        container.appendChild($$tempSpan);
		if(!$container.is(":visible")){
			$$.remove($$tempSpan);
            var  $$editorContainerDiv = $$.create("div", {id: this.config.id}, ["csc-editor"], this.config.style);
            container.appendChild($$editorContainerDiv);
            return;
		}
		$$.remove($$tempSpan);
		
		var readonly = this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly();
		
		if(!this.config.style){
			this.config.style = {};
		}
		
		var  $$editorContainerDiv = $$.create("div", {id: this.config.id}, ["csc-editor"], undefined);
		var  $$textarea = $$.create("textarea", {id: this.config.id+"-textarea"}, undefined, undefined, $$editorContainerDiv);
		container.appendChild($$editorContainerDiv);
		
		var w = this.config.style.width || "700";
		if(w.indexOf("px") == -1 && w.indexOf("%") == -1){
			w += "px";
		}
		var h = this.config.style.height || "300";
		if(h.indexOf("px") == -1 && h.indexOf("%") == -1){
			h += "px";
		}
		var val_table_default_styles= "";
		if(this.config.customizationSet =="xslt-designer") { // EFYS Fatura Özelleştirici
			var toolbar1 = "bold italic underline strikethrough | alignleft aligncenter alignright alignjustify | removeformat fontselect fontsizeselect forecolor backcolor";
			var toolbar2 = "bullist numlist | outdent indent | undo redo | code";
			var toolbar3 = "imagebase64 | table | hr | subscript superscript | charmap | visualchars nonbreaking | insertfile";
			
			var pluginsList = [
				"fullpage imagebase64 advlist autolink link image lists charmap hr anchor pagebreak",
				"searchreplace visualchars code fullscreen insertdatetime media nonbreaking",
				"table contextmenu directionality emoticons template textcolor paste"
		    ];
			var val_force_p_newlines = false;
			val_table_default_styles= {width: '50%'};
		} else { //KEYS
			var toolbar1 =  "save newdocument fullpage | bold italic underline strikethrough | alignleft aligncenter alignright alignjustify | removeformat fontselect fontsizeselect";
			var toolbar2 = " pastetext | searchreplace | bullist numlist | outdent indent blockquote | undo redo | code | insertdatetime | forecolor backcolor";
			var toolbar3 = " table | hr | subscript superscript | charmap | visualchars visualblocks nonbreaking | insertfile | link | imagebase64 | defaultBtn fullscreen";
			
			var pluginsList = [
				"imagebase64 advlist autolink link image lists charmap print preview hr anchor pagebreak",
		        "searchreplace  visualblocks visualchars code fullscreen insertdatetime media nonbreaking",
		        "table contextmenu directionality emoticons template textcolor paste fullpage"
			];
			var val_force_p_newlines = true;
		}
		var roPluginList = ["image"];
		
		var size = undefined;
		
		if(readonly){
			toolbar1 = "none";
			toolbar2 = undefined;
			toolbar3 = undefined;
		} else {
			if(this.config.toolbar == "small"){
				toolbar2 = undefined;
				toolbar3 = undefined;
			}
		}
		if(this.config.doc === false){
			toolbar1 = toolbar1.replace("save newdocument fullpage | ", "");
		}
		if(this.config.image === false){
			toolbar3 = toolbar3.replace(" | imagebase64", "");
		}
		
		var statusbar = this.config.statusbar !== false;
		
		try {
			if(this.initialized){
				return;
			}
			this.initialized = true;
			
			setTimeout(function(){
			
				if(!$("#"+bc.config.id).is(":visible")){
					bc.initialized = false;
					return;
				}
			$$.css($$textarea, {width: w, height: h});
				
			tinymce.init({
				init_instance_callback : function(editor) {
					bc.initok = true;
			        console.log("Editor: " + editor.id + " is now initialized.");
			    },
		        selector: "#"+bc.config.id+"-textarea",
//		        theme: "modern",
		        plugins: readonly ? roPluginList : pluginsList,
        		table_default_styles: val_table_default_styles,
		        //body_class : bc.bf.isRequired() ? "csc-required" : "",
		        		
		        //keys
				nonbreaking_force_tab:true,
				resize: "both",
				
		        toolbar1: toolbar1,
		        toolbar2: toolbar2,
		        toolbar3: toolbar3,
		        fontsize_formats: '8pt 9pt 10pt 11pt 12pt 14pt 18pt 24pt 36pt',
		        forced_root_block: false,
		        force_p_newlines : val_force_p_newlines,
		        force_br_newlines : false,
		        entity_encoding : "raw",
 		        statusbar: statusbar,
		        contextmenu: "imagebase64 inserttable | tableprops cell row column deletetable",
		        language: "tr_TR",
		        //autosave_ask_before_unload: false,
		        menubar: false,
		        toolbar_items_size: readonly ? 'none' : 'small',
		        templates: [
		        ],
		        width: w,
		        height: h,
		        readonly: readonly ? 1 : undefined,
		        browser_spellcheck : true,
		        paste_preprocess : function(pl, o) {
		             o.content = o.content.replace(/<table.*?>/gi,'<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="1" align="center" width="643">');
		             o.content = o.content.replace(/<a.*?>/gi,"");
		             o.content = o.content.replace(/”/gi,"\"");
		             o.content = o.content.replace(/“/gi,"\"");
		             o.content = o.content.replace(/‘/gi,"'");
		             o.content = o.content.replace(/’/gi,"'");
		        },
		        formats : {
                    strikethrough : {inline : 'del'},
                    customformat: {block: 'div', styles: {fontSize: '16px', fontFamily: 'times new roman', textAlign:'justify', textIndent: '35px', paddingBottom: "20px" }},
		        },
		        setup : function(editor) {
		        	  
		        	editor.addButton('defaultBtn', {
		                   title : SideMLManager.get(bc, "standardDisplay"),
		                   image : 'css/bc-style/img/defaultBtn.png',
		                   onclick : function() {
		                	   editor.focus();
		                	   tinymce.activeEditor.formatter.apply('customformat');return false;
		                   }
		               });
		        	editor.on('keydown', function (e, evt) {
						 if (e.keyCode == 9) {//tab ise boşluk ekle //keys
						     e.preventDefault();
						     var tab = "";
						     for(var i=0;i<9;i++){ tab += "&nbsp;";}
						     editor.insertContent(tab)
						 }
					 });
		        	
		        	editor.on('click', function(editor) {
	        			bc.bf.fire("selected");
		        	});
		        	
		        	editor.on('blur', function(editor) {
		        		bc.bf.fire("blur");
		        	});
		        	editor.on('change', function(editor) {
		        		bc.bf.fire("onchange");
		        	});
		        	
		        	editor.on('LoadContent', function() {
		        		if(bc.data){
		        			tinyMCE.get(bc.config.id+"-textarea").setContent(bc.data, {format: "raw"});
        				}
		        	});
		        	editor.on('remove', function() {
		        		bc.initialized = false;
		        	});
	        		editor.on('load', function(args) {
	        			try {
	        				if(bc.bf.isRequired()){
	        					var $$cont = $$.byid(bc.config.id);//tinyMCE.get(bc.config.id+"-textarea").contentAreaContainer;
	        					if($$cont){
	        						$$.addClass($$cont.firstChild, "csc-required");
	        					}
	        				}

	        				//Sonradan width ve height değiştirmeyi ele alma kısmı
									var instance = tinyMCE.get(bc.config.id+"-textarea");
									if(instance && bc.config.style && bc.config.style.width && bc.config.style.height){
										var width = bc.config.style.width, height = bc.config.style.height;
										if(width.indexOf("%") < 0 && height.indexOf("%") < 0){
											if(width.indexOf("px")<0){
												width = width+"px";
											}
											if(height.indexOf("px")<0){
												height = height+"px";
											}
											if(instance.getParam("width") != width || instance.getParam("height") != height){
												instance.theme.resizeTo(parseInt(width,10), parseInt(height,10));
											}
										}

									}

									var tinymceDivId = "#"+bc.config.id;
	        				var $bottomToolbarDiv = $(tinymceDivId+" .mce-path").parent();
	        				$bottomToolbarDiv.css("height", "30px");
	        				$(tinymceDivId+" .mce-path").remove();//html özetini gösteren divi kaldır.
	        				
	        				var $buttonCont = $("<div>").addClass("button-container");
	        				var $plainTextButton = $("<div>").addClass("plain-text-icon").attr("title", SideMLManager.get(bc, "plainRichText"));
	        				var $toolbarSwitchButton = $("<div>").addClass("toolbar-switch-icon").attr("title", SideMLManager.get(bc, "changeToolbar"));
	        				
        					if(bc.config.plaintext){
        						$plainTextButton.addClass("button-toggle");
        						$(tinymceDivId+" .mce-toolbar-grp").hide();
        					}
        					
        					if(bc.config.toolbar == "small"){
        						$toolbarSwitchButton.addClass("button-toggle");
        					}
	        				
	        				$plainTextButton.on("click", function(){
	        					bc.config.plaintext = !bc.config.plaintext;//toggle
	        					if(bc.config.plaintext){
									bc.config.plaintextval = bc.getValue(false);
	        						var val = bc.getPlainText();
	        						bc.setValue(val);
	        						$plainTextButton.addClass("button-toggle");
	        						$(tinymceDivId+" .mce-toolbar-grp").hide();
	        					}else{
									bc.setValue(bc.config.plaintextval);
									bc.config.plaintextval = undefined;
	        						$plainTextButton.removeClass("button-toggle");
	        						$(tinymceDivId+" .mce-toolbar-grp").show();
	        					}
	        				});
	        				
	        				$toolbarSwitchButton.on("click", function(){
	        					if(bc.config.toolbar == "small"){
	        						bc.config.toolbar = "normal";
	        						$toolbarSwitchButton.addClass("button-toggle");
	        					}else{
	        						bc.config.toolbar = "small";
	        						$toolbarSwitchButton.removeClass("button-toggle");
	        					}
	        					bc.bf.rerender();
	        				});
	        				if(statusbar){
	        					$buttonCont.append($plainTextButton).append($toolbarSwitchButton);
	        					$bottomToolbarDiv.append($buttonCont);
	        				}
	        				
	        			}catch(e){}
	        		});
		         }
			});
			
			var tinytextarea = tinyMCE.get(bc.config.id+"-textarea");
			if(bc.data && tinytextarea){
				tinytextarea.setContent(bc.data, {format: "raw"});
			}
		}, 300);
		} catch(e){
			
		}

	};
    this.Type.prototype.destroybc = function() {
        try {
        	this.initok = null;
            var editor = tinyMCE.get(this.config.id+"-textarea").destroy();
        }catch(e){}
    };

	this.Type.prototype.load = function() {
		if (this.onloadcallback) {
			this.onloadcallback();
		}
	};

	this.Type.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
		if (eventName == "selected") {
			var dom = byid(this.config.id);
			if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
				dom.onclick = callback;
			}
		} else if (eventName == "onload") {
			this.onloadcallback = callback;
		} 
	};
}

BCEngine.registerType("CSC-EDITOR", new Definition());
})(window);
/////=csc-hidden.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Hidden";	
	this.METHODS = [];
	this.EVENTS = [];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
	this.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
	
	this.Type.prototype.clear = function(){
		this.config.value = null;
	};
	this.Type.prototype.init = function() {
		this.config.value = null;
	};
	this.Type.prototype.getValue = function() {
		return this.config.value;
	};
	this.Type.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
		this.config.value = value;
	};

	this.Type.prototype.isVisible = function() {
		return false;
	};

	this.Type.prototype.render = function($container) { };

	this.Type.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) { };
}

BCEngine.registerType("CSC-HIDDEN", new Definition());
})(window);
/////=csc-table-cell.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-TABLE-HEADER- CELL
 * @author Mahmut Yıldız
 */

function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = { ftype: "eq" };

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.LABEL = "Table Cell";


	this.METHODS = [ "setTitle(title)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-TABLE-CELL", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function() {
	var bf = this.bf;
	var parent = bf.$CS$.parent;
	if(parent.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-TABLE-ROW"){
		return;
	}
	parent = parent.$CS$.parent;
	if(parent.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-TABLE-HEADER"){
		return;
	}
	parent = parent.$CS$.parent;
	if(parent.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-TABLE"){
		return;
	}
	this.table = parent;
};

BC.prototype.setTitle = function(title){
	this.config.title = title;
	var $$td = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	var $$span = $$.child($$td, "SPAN");
	if($$span){
		$$span.innerHTML = this.config.title || "";
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc = this, bf = bc.bf;;
	var colmodel = [];
	//Parent mutlaka TABLE-ROW olmalı
	var parent = bf.$CS$.parent;
	if(parent.bcRef.typeName != "CSC-TABLE-ROW"){
		var $$span = $$.create("span");
		SIDENavigator.notify("TABLE CELL(" +bf.$CS$.name +") can be only use in TABLE-ROW component.", {warning: true, notime: true});
	}
	$container.setAttribute("id", this.config.id);
	var $$span = $$.create("span");
	if(this.config.title){
		this.config.title = stringTrim(this.config.title);
	}

	if(!inDesigner(bf) && bc.clickBinded && !bf.isDisabled()){
		$$.addClass($$span, "csc-textbox-linked");
	}
	if(this.config.title && this.config.title.indexOf("#") == 0){
		var member = BFEngine.get(this.config.title.substring(1), this.table);
		if(!member){
			$$span.innerHTML = "?";
		} else {
			$$span.innerHTML = member.getConfig().title || member.getConfig().label || "";
		}
	} else {
		$$span.innerHTML = this.config.title || "";
	}
	if(this.config.tips){
        $$.attr($$span, "title", this.config.tips);
    }

	$$.bindEvent($$span, "click", function(e){
		SIDENavigator.setEvent(e);
		bf.fire("selected");
	});
	if(this.config.sortProp){
		this.table.bcRef.makeSortable(this.config.sortProp, $$span, this.config.sortType);
	}
	if(this.config.fprop && this.config.ftype){
		this.table.bcRef.makeFilterable(this.config.fprop, this.config.ftype, $$span, $container);
	}else{
		$container.appendChild($$span);
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "drop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "selected") {
		this.clickBinded = true;
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			$$dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	}
};

})(window);
/////=csc-dyn-combobox.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** 
 * @class CSC-DYN-COMBOBOX
 * @classdesc Seçimli ve editable kullanılmak üzere tasarlanmış combobox.
 * @author mahmuty
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled : false,
		cls : "csc-dyn-combobox",
		focusable: true,
		disabledKey: "disabled"
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Dynamic Combo"; 

	this.METHODS = [ "setOptions(items, config)", "addOptions(items, index)","filter(filterProp, filterValue, config)", "inverseFilter(filterProp, filterValue, setNull)", "getSelectedText", "clearOptions", "focus", "setEmptyOption(flag)", "setEmptyText(text)", "getOptions()", 
	                 "setDatasource(serviceName, parameterObj, callback)", "setRefData(refDataName, isSideRef, callback)", "changeRefData(refName, callback)", 
	                 "sortOptions(fieldName, order)", "setDefaultValue(value)", "getSelectedOption", "setTable(name)", "selectFirstOption" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed", "selected", "keyup(prevValue, value)", "button-click", "blur", "onfocus", "oninit(param)" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	} ];

	this.Type = function(moduleName) {};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-COMBOBOX", def);
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-DYN-COMBOBOX", def);
var BC = def.Type;


BC.prototype.init = function() {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	bc.inTabular = false;
	var parent = bf;
	bc.fprop = config.filterProp;

	bc.EMPTY_TEXT = "-----";
	bc.EMPTY_VALUE = config.defaultValue;
	
	if(config.emptyValue){
		bc.EMPTY_TEXT = config.emptyText;
		bc.EMPTY_VALUE = config.emptyValue;
		config.defaultValue = bc.EMPTY_VALUE;
	} 
	while (parent) {
		if (parent.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP") {
			break;
		}
		if (parent.$CS$.definition.isTabular) {
			bc.inTabular = true;
			break;
		}
		parent = parent.$CS$.parent;
	}
	if(bc.inTabular){//Grid içerisinde editable combo sapıtıyor
		config.editable = false;
	}
	if (bc.inTabular && parent[bf.getMemberName()]) {
		var tabularBc = parent[bf.getMemberName()].bcRef;
		bc.tabularBc = tabularBc, tabularConfig = tabularBc.config;

		bc.options = tabularBc.options;
		bc.optionsConfig = tabularBc.optionsConfig;
		
		config.refDataNames = tabularConfig.refDataNames;
		config.appRefData = tabularConfig.appRefData;

		config.sortFieldName = tabularConfig.sortFieldName;
		config.sortOrder = tabularConfig.sortOrder;
		
		bc.fprop = tabularBc.fprop || bc.fprop;
		bc.fvalue = tabularBc.fvalue;

		bc.iprop = tabularBc.iprop || bc.iprop;
		bc.ivalue = tabularBc.ivalue;
	}
	
	if((config.refDataNames || config.appRefData) && (!bc.inTabular || (bc.inTabular && parent && parent[bf.getMemberName()] && parent[bf.getMemberName()].bcRef != bc))){
		CSRefDataManager.bindUpdate(bc, config.refDataNames || config.appRefData);
	}
};

BC.prototype.setDefaultValue = function(value) {
	/**
	 * @function setDefaultValue
     * @description Varsayılan değeri ayarlar.
     * @param [value] Varsayılan değer.
     */
	this.config.defaultValue = value;
}

BC.prototype.clear = function(){
	var bc=this, config=bc.config;
	bc.setValue(config.defaultValue);
	config.text = undefined;
	config.rawvalue  = undefined;//bu önemli. clear ve clearOptions çağırıldığı halde getvalue deyince rawvalue dönmemesi için.
	BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
}

BC.prototype.changeRefData = function(refName, callback){
	/**
	 * @function changeRefData
     * @description Referans veriyi değiştirir.
     * @param [refName] referans verinin adı
     * @param [callback] callback fonksiyonu
     */
	delete this.config.refDataNames;
	delete this.config.appRefData;
	var bc = this;
	function finishOperation(){
		bc.bf.rerender();
		if(callback){
			callback();
		}
	}
	if(!refName){
		finishOperation();
	} else if(CSRefDataManager.refData.side[refName]){//side referans verisi mi? o zaman dinamik olarak getirmeye ihtiyaç yok
		this.config.refDataNames = refName;
		finishOperation();
	} else {
		this.config.appRefData = refName;
		CSRefDataManager.requestRefData(false, [refName], finishOperation, BFEngine.getModuleName(this.bf));
	}
};

BC.prototype.createMaskDiv = function(){
	var bc = this;
	var $$dynDiv = $$.byid(bc.config.id);
	if($$dynDiv){//bc çizilmişse
		if(!$$.byid(bc.config.id+"-mask")){
			var $dynDiv = $($$dynDiv);
			var offset = $dynDiv.offset();
			var width = $dynDiv.width();
			var height = $dynDiv.height();
			var cssObj = {
					width: width+3,
					height: height+3,
					top: offset.top-1+"px",
					left: offset.left+"px",
					position: "absolute",
					background: "#d0d0d0",
					textAlign: "center",
					zIndex: 1111
			};
			
			var $$maskDiv = $$.create("div", { id: bc.config.id+"-mask"}, ["csc-dyncombo-mask"], cssObj, $$dynDiv.parentNode);
			var $$loaderImg = $$.create("img", {src: "css/bc-style/img/ajax-loader2.gif"}, [], null, $$maskDiv);
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.removeMaskDiv = function(){
	var bc = this;
	var $$maskDiv = $$.byid(bc.config.id+"-mask");
	if($$maskDiv){
		$$.remove($$maskDiv);
//		$$maskDiv.remove();
	}
};


BC.prototype.setDatasource = function(serviceName, parameterObj, callback) {
	/**
	 * @function setDatasource
     * @description Combobox'ın bir servisten gelen sonuç ile dolmasını sağlar.
     * @param [serviceName] Çağrılacak servis adı
     * @param [parameterObj] Servise gönderilecek parametre
     * @param [callback] Servisten gelen callback
     */
	var bc = this;
	bc.createMaskDiv();
	bc.config.isMasked = true;
	CSCaller.call(serviceName, parameterObj).then(function(resp){
		bc.setOptions(resp.items);
		if(callback){
			callback();
		}
		bc.removeMaskDiv();
		bc.config.isMasked = false;
	}).error(function(){
		CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(SideMLManager.get("common.errorSystemAdmin"));
	});
	
};

BC.prototype.setRefData = function(refDataName, isSideRef, callback) {
	/**
	 * @function setRefData
     * @description Combobox'a koyulacak referans veriyi ayarlar.
     * @param [refDataName] Referans verinin adı
     * @param [isSideRef] Referans verinin Side referansı olup olmadığı
     * @param [callback] callback fonksiyonu
     */
	var bc = this;
	if(bc.rfRequested){
		return;//realtive ref eklendikten sonra rerender'lar dolayı içiçe tekrar tekrar bu metoda girildiği için bu kod eklendi @mahmuty  
	}
	
	bc.createMaskDiv();
	bc.config.isMasked = true;
	
	var relavetiveBF = null;
	if(bc.config.relativeRefData){
		relavetiveBF = bc.bf;
	}
	
	bc.rfRequested = true;
	CSRefDataManager.requestRefData(isSideRef, [refDataName], function(){
		bc.rfRequested = false;
		bc.removeMaskDiv();
		bc.config.isMasked = false;
		if(isSideRef){
			bc.config.refDataNames = refDataName;
		} else {
			bc.config.appRefData = refDataName;
		}
		bc.reRender();
