	var $$titlediv = $$.create("DIV", null, "chart-title-div");
	$$titlediv.innerHTML = bc.config.title || "";

	var series = [], serieLabels = [], userColorMap = {}, i, k;
	for(i in data.series) {
		series[i] = data.series[i].values;
		serieLabels[i] = {label: data.series[i].label,id: data.series[i].id};
		userColorMap[i] = data.series[i].color;
        for(k in series[i]) {//bu id ler legend çizilirken göster sakla yapabilmek için rel attr için
			series[i][k]["id"] = data.series[i].id;
			if(!series[i][k]["y0"]) {
				series[i][k]["y0"] = 0;
			}
		}
	}

	var factor = 0.02;
	var n = series.length; // number of layers
	var yGroupMax = d3.max(series, function (layer) {
			return d3.max(layer, function (d) {
				return parseFloat(d.y);
			});
		}),
		yStackMin = d3.min(series, function (layer) {
			return d3.min(layer, function (d) {
				return parseFloat(d.y0);
			});
		}),
		yStackMax = d3.max(series, function (layer) {
			return d3.max(layer, function (d) {
				return parseFloat(d.y0) + parseFloat(d.y);
			});
		});

	var margin = {top: 30, right: 10, bottom: 25, left: 50};
	margin = getPaddingMarginObjFromStr(bc.config.style.padding, margin);
	if(config.verticalXaxisLabels) {
		margin.bottom += 60;
	}
	if(config.showYAxis === false) {
		margin.left = 0;
	}
	var legendWidth = 110;
	if(config.style.legendWidth) {
		legendWidth = parseInt(config.style.legendWidth.split("px")[0]);
	}

	if(config.showLegendInChart === false) {
		legendWidth = 0;
	}

	var width = config.style.width, height = config.style.height;
	var maxBarWidth = config.maxBarWidth;

	if(!width) {
		var cw = $$.innerWidth($$container);
		width = cw > 400 ? cw : 400;
	}
	if(!height) {
		var ch = $$.innerHeight($$container);
		height = ch > 200 ? ch : 200;
	}

	var svgWidth = width - legendWidth;

	width = width - margin.left - margin.right - legendWidth;
	height = height - margin.top - margin.bottom;

	var color = d3.scale.ordinal().range(SIDEUtil.chartColors());
	var xBand = d3.scale.ordinal().domain(data.labels).rangeRoundBands([0, width], (bc.config.style.barPadding ? bc.config.style.barPadding : .08), (bc.config.style.barOuterPadding ? bc.config.style.barOuterPadding : 0.2));
	var x = d3.scale.ordinal().domain(data.labels).range(xBand.range());
	var y = d3.scale.linear().range([height, 0]).domain([0, yGroupMax]);

	var xAxis = d3.svg.axis().scale(xBand).tickSize(1).tickPadding(6).orient("bottom");//.tickFormat(function(d){ return "ocak"; });
	var yAxis = d3.svg.axis().scale(y).tickSize(1).tickPadding(6).orient("left");//.tickFormat(d3.format("s"));//gibintra için açıklama satırı yapıldı.
	if(height < 250) {
		yAxis.ticks(6);
	}
	if(bc.config.yAxisTickLines) {
		yAxis.tickSize(-width, 0, 0);
	}

	var svg = null, rect = null, layer = null;
	var $$contTable = $$.create("DIV", {}, "csc-bar-chart-cont-table", {maxHeight: height + margin.top + margin.bottom + "px"}, $$div);
//		var $$contTr = $$.create("tr", {}, undefined, undefined, $$contTable);
	var $$contTdSvgOuter = $$.create("DIV", {}, "csc-bar-chart-svg-container-outer", {maxHeight: height + margin.top + margin.bottom + "px"}, $$contTable);
	var $$contTdSvg = $$.create("DIV", {}, "csc-bar-chart-svg-container", undefined, $$contTdSvgOuter);
	var $$contTdLegendOuter = $$.create("DIV", {}, "csc-bar-chart-legend-container-outer", {
		maxHeight: height + margin.top + margin.bottom + "px",
		minHeight: height + margin.top + margin.bottom + "px"
	}, $$contTable);
	var $$contTdLegend = $$.create("DIV", {}, "csc-bar-chart-legend-container", undefined, $$contTdLegendOuter);

	function createLegend(serieArrParam) {
		if(config.showLegendInChart === false) {
			return;
		}

		var serieArr = serieLabels;
		if(serieArrParam) {
			serieArr = serieArrParam;
		}

		var $$legendTable = $$.create("TABLE", null, "legendTable", {width: legendWidth});
		if(serieArr.length > 1 && config.showLegendCheckbox !== false) {
			var $$checkAllTr = $$.create("tr");
			$$checkAllTr.innerHTML = "<td colspan='2'>Tümünü Seç</td>"
			var $$td = $$.create("TD", null, null, {width: "18px"});
			$$.insertFirst($$td, $$checkAllTr);
			$$legendTable.appendChild($$checkAllTr);

			var $checkAll = $$.create("INPUT", {
				type: "checkbox",
				checked: true,
				id: config.id + "-checkAll",
				rel: "all"
			}, null, null, $$td);
			$checkAll.onchange = function () {
				var checked = this.checked;
				var $div = $($$div);
				var querystr = ".legendTable input:" + (checked ? "not(:checked)" : "checked");
				$(querystr, $div).each(function () {
					this.checked = checked;
					this.onchange();
				});
			};
		}
		for(var i = 0; i < serieArr.length; i++) {
			var d = serieArr[i];
			var clr, id, lbl;
			if(serieArrParam) {
				clr = userColorMap[d] || color(d);
				id = data.series[i].id;
				lbl = d;
			} else {
				clr = userColorMap[i] || color(i);
				lbl = d.label;
				id = d.id;
			}
			var $$labelTd = $$.createWithHtml("TD", lbl);
			if(data.series[i].tips){
                $$.attr($$labelTd, "title", data.series[i].tips);
            }
			var $$colorTd = $$.create("TD");
			$$colorTd.style.width = "20px";
			var $$colorDiv = $$.create("DIV", null, "colorDiv", {"background-color": clr}, $$colorTd);

			if(config.showLegendCheckbox !== false) {
				var $$tr = $$.create("TR", null, null, null, $$legendTable);
				var $$checkTd = $$.create("TD", null, null, null);
				$$tr.appendChild($$checkTd);
				$$tr.appendChild($$colorTd);
				$$tr.appendChild($$labelTd);
				var $$checkbox = $$.create("INPUT", {type: "checkbox", rel: id}, null, null, $$checkTd);
				$$checkbox.checked = true;

				$$checkbox.onchange = function () {
					legendCheckboxChanged(this.getAttribute("rel"), this.checked);
				};
			} else {
				var $$tr = $$.create("TR", null, null, null, $$legendTable);
				var $$td = $$.create("TD", null, null, null, $$tr);
				$$td.appendChild($$colorTd)
				$$td.appendChild($$labelTd)
			}
		}
		$$contTdLegend.appendChild($$legendTable);

		function legendCheckboxChanged(serieid, showSerie, fireEvent) {
			$("rect[rel=" + serieid + "], circle[rel=" + serieid + "], text[rel=" + serieid + "]", $$div).each(function () {
				if(showSerie) {
					$(this).show();
				} else {
					$(this).hide();
				}
			});
			if(fireEvent === undefined || fireEvent === true) {
				var visibleSerieArr = [];
				$(".legendTable input[type=checkbox]:checked", $$div).each(function () {
					var id = $(this).attr("rel");
					visibleSerieArr.push(id);
				});
				//trigger event
				bc.bf.fire("serieToggle", serieid, showSerie, visibleSerieArr);
			}
		}
	}

	svg = d3.select($$contTdSvg).append("svg").attr("width", svgWidth).attr("height", height + margin.top + margin.bottom).append("g").attr("transform", "translate(" + margin.left + "," + margin.top + ")");

	if(config.enableZoom) {
		d3.select($$contTdSvg).call(zm = d3.behavior.zoom().scaleExtent([1, 10]).on("zoom", function (d) {
			svg.attr("transform", "translate(" + ((margin.left * d3.event.scale) + d3.event.translate[0]) + "," + ((margin.top * d3.event.scale) + d3.event.translate[1]) + ")" + " scale(" + d3.event.scale + ")");
		})).on("dblclick.zoom", null);
	}

	if(config.isStackedGrouped) {
		var userColorMap = {};
		var valueArrLength = 0;
		var groupMap = {};
		for(var i in data.series) {
			var group = data.series[i].group;
			var subgroup = data.series[i].subgroup;

			if(!groupMap[group]) {
				groupMap[group] = {};
			}
			groupMap[group][subgroup] = data.series[i].values;

			valueArrLength = data.series[i].values.length;

			if(data.series[i].color) {
				userColorMap[subgroup] = data.series[i].color;
			}
		}

		var labelMap = {};
		var groupKeys = Object.keys(groupMap);
//		var x = d3.scale.ordinal().domain(data.labels).rangeRoundBands([0, width], .08);
//		var xAxis = d3.svg.axis().scale(x).tickSize(1).tickPadding(6).orient("bottom");

		var k = 0, kText = 0;//geçici çözüm. checkbox lar için rel attr konurken kullanıldı. serieid bilinmediği için. serieid bilinecek şekilde düzenleme yapılabilir.
		y.domain([yStackMin, yStackMax]);
		var yAxisElements = svg.append("g").attr("class", "y axis").call(yAxis);
		var yAxisElementList = yAxisElements[0][0].children;
		var yAxisElementIndex;
		var elementText;
		var parentNodeTransform;
		for(yAxisElementIndex = 0; yAxisElementIndex < yAxisElementList.length; yAxisElementIndex += 1) {
			if(yAxisElementList[yAxisElementIndex].children[1] !== undefined) {
				elementText = yAxisElementList[yAxisElementIndex].children[1].innerHTML;
				if(elementText === "0" || elementText === "0.0") {//score<5 olduğunda lablels görüntülenmiyor. Çünkü elementText===0.0 oluyor. Murat FINDIK 30.03.2020
					parentNodeTransform = yAxisElementList[yAxisElementIndex].children[1].parentNode.getAttribute("transform");
					svg.append("g").attr("class", "x axis").attr("transform", parentNodeTransform).call(xAxis);
				}
			}
		}
		var groupIndex = 0;
		for(var group in groupMap) {
			var groupObj = groupMap[group];
			var n = groupKeys.length;

			var subgroupArr = Object.keys(groupObj);
			var groupseries = [];
			var serieTotalLength = 0;
			for(var subgroup in groupObj) {
				var arr = groupObj[subgroup];
				groupseries.push(arr);
				labelMap[subgroup] = 1;
				serieTotalLength += arr.length;
			}

			layer = svg.selectAll(".layer-" + group).data(groupseries).enter().append("g").attr("class", "layer-" + group).style("fill", function (d, i, j) {
				return d.color || userColorMap[subgroupArr[i]] || color(subgroupArr[i]);
			});
			rect = layer.selectAll("rect").data(function (d) {
				return d;
			}).enter().append("rect").attr("x", function (d) {
				if(maxBarWidth) {
					if(maxBarWidth <= 20) {
						return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 10;
					}
					if(maxBarWidth > 20 && maxBarWidth <= 60) {
						return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 20;
					}
					if(maxBarWidth >= 60 && maxBarWidth < 100) {
						return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 30;
					}
					else {
						return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 50;
					}
				}
				else {
					return x(d.x)
				}
			}).attr("y", height).attr("width", function () {
				if(maxBarWidth) {
					return maxBarWidth;
				}
				else {
					return xBand.rangeBand();
				}
			})
				.attr("height", 0).attr("rel", function (d, i, j) {
					return d.id;
				}).attr("rel2", function (d, i, j) {
					return i;
				}); //.style("fill", function(d, i) {return color(i); });
			rect.append("svg:title").text(function (d) {
				return d.tooltip || ("" + bc.formatNumber(d.y));
			});
			rect.transition().delay(function (d, i) {
				return i * 10;
			}).attr("y", function (d) {
				return y(d.y0 + d.y);
			}).attr("height", function (d) {
				return y(d.y0) - y(d.y0 + d.y);
			});
			rect.on("click", function (d) {
				var serieid = d3.select(this).attr("rel");
				var index = d3.select(this).attr("rel2");
				var dataObj;
				for(var k = 0; k < bc.data.series.length; k++) {
					if(data.series[k].id == serieid) {
						dataObj = data.series[k];
						break;
					}
				}
				bc.bf.fire("barSelected", serieid, dataObj.values[index]);
			});

			function transitionStackedGrouped() {
				y.domain([yStackMin, yStackMax]);
				svg.select(".y.axis").call(yAxis);
				rect.transition().duration(durationTime).delay(function (d, i) {
					return i * 10;
				})
					.attr("y", function (d) {
						var height = y(d.y0) - y(d.y0 + d.y);
						return height < 3 ? y(d.y0 + d.y) - 3 : y(d.y0 + d.y);//0 height'lerinde chartta gözükmesi için
					})
					.attr("height", function (d) {
						var height = y(d.y0) - y(d.y0 + d.y);
						return height < 3 ? 3 : y(d.y0) - y(d.y0 + d.y); //0 height'lerinde chartta gözükmesi için
					}).transition().attr("x", function (d, i, j) {
					return x(d.x) + (xBand.rangeBand() / n * groupIndex);
				})
					.attr("width", xBand.rangeBand() / n)
					.style("stroke", "white").style("stroke-width", 1);

				var w = bc.config.isGrouped ? (xBand.rangeBand() / n) : xBand.rangeBand();
				//her çubuğa ait score değeri
				layer.selectAll("text.score").data(
					function (d) {
						return d;
					}).enter().append("text").attr("x", function (d, i, j) {
					var w = (xBand.rangeBand() / n);
					return x(d.x) + w * groupIndex + w / 2;
				})
					.attr("y", function (d) {
						var min = 20;
						var rectHeight = y(d.y0) - y(d.y0 + d.y);
						if(rectHeight < min && y(d.y0) <= (height - min)) {
							return -10000;
						}
						var yPos = y(d.y0 + d.y) - min;//var yPos = y(d.y0 + d.y) + min; SARP Projesi için güncellendi Murat FINDIK 19.03.2020
						return (height - yPos) < min ? height - min : yPos + (min - min/3);//(height - yPos) < min ? height - min : yPos + min; SARP Projesi için güncellendi Murat FINDIK 19.03.2020
					})
					.attr("height", function (d) {
						return y(d.y0) - y(d.y0 + d.y);
					})
					.attr("dy", ".36em")
					.attr("rel", function (d, i, j) {
						return d.id;
					})
					.attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr('class', 'score').text(function (d) {
					if(config.dontShowScore) {
						return;
					}
					if(d.y0 < 0) {
						return config.scoreFromProperty ? d.score : ((typeof d.y0 == "number" && d.y % 1 != 0) ? d.y0.toFixed(2) : d.y0);
					}
					return config.scoreFromProperty ? d.score : ((typeof d.y == "number" && d.y % 1 != 0) ? d.y.toFixed(2) : d.y);
				}).style("fill", "black").attr("transform", function (d) {
					return config.verticalScore ? "rotate(-90, " + d3.select(this).attr("x") + ", " + d3.select(this).attr("y") + " )" : "";
				});
			}

			transitionStackedGrouped();
			groupIndex++;
		}
		createLegend(Object.keys(labelMap));
	} else {
		svg.append("g").attr("class", "x axis").attr("transform", "translate(0," + (config.style.separatedBars ? (height) : height) + ")").call(xAxis);
		var yAxisElement = svg.append("g").attr("class", "y axis").call(yAxis);
		layer = svg.selectAll(".layer").data(series).enter().append("g").attr("class", "layer").style("fill", function (d, i, j) {
			return userColorMap[i] || color(i);
		});
		rect = layer.selectAll("rect").data(function (d) {
			return d;
		}).enter().append("rect").attr("x", function (d) {
			if(maxBarWidth) {
				if(maxBarWidth <= 20) {
					return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 10;
				}
				if(maxBarWidth > 20 && maxBarWidth <= 60) {
					return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 20;
				}
				if(maxBarWidth >= 60 && maxBarWidth < 100) {
					return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 30;
				}
				else {
					return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 50;
				}
			}
			else {
				return x(d.x)
			}
		}).attr("y", height).attr("width", function () {
			if(maxBarWidth) {
				return maxBarWidth;
			}
			else {
				return xBand.rangeBand();
			}
		})
			.attr("height", 0)
			.attr("rel", function (d, i, j) {
				return data.series[j].id;
			}).attr("rel2", function (d, i, j) {
				return i;
			}).style("fill", function (d, i, j) {
				return d.color || "";
			});
		rect.append("svg:title").text(function (d) {
			return d.tooltip || ("" + bc.formatNumber(d.y))
		});
		rect.transition().delay(function (d, i) {
			return i * 10;
		}).attr("y", function (d) {
			return y(d.y0 + d.y);
		}).attr("height", function (d) {
			return y(d.y0) - y(d.y0 + d.y);
		});

		rect.on("click", function (d) {
			var serieid = d3.select(this).attr("rel");
			var index = d3.select(this).attr("rel2");
			var dataObj;
			for(var k = 0; k < bc.data.series.length; k++) {
				if(bc.data.series[k].id == serieid) {
					dataObj = bc.data.series[k];
					break;
				}
			}
			bf.fire("barSelected", serieid, dataObj.values[index]);
		});

		createLegend();


		function transitionGrouped() {
			y.domain([0, yGroupMax]);
			if(maxBarWidth) {
				var w = bc.config.isGrouped ? (maxBarWidth) :maxBarWidth;
			}
			else {
				var w = bc.config.isGrouped ? (xBand.rangeBand() / n) : xBand.rangeBand()
			}

			svg.select(".y.axis").call(yAxis);
			rect.transition().duration(durationTime)
				.delay(function (d, i) {
					return i * 10;
				})
				.attr("x", function (d, i, j) {
					if(maxBarWidth) {
						return j > 0 && bc.config.style.separatedBars ? (x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 + w * j) + 10 * j : (x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 + w * j);
					}
					else {
						return j > 0 && bc.config.style.separatedBars ? (x(d.x) + w * j) + 10 * j : (x(d.x) + w * j);
					}
				})
				.attr("width", w).transition()
				.attr("y", function (d) {
					var yMinVal = yGroupMax * factor;
					var yVal = yMinVal > d.y ? yMinVal : d.y
					return y(yVal);
				}).attr("height", function (d) {
				var yMinVal = yGroupMax * factor;
				var yVal = yMinVal > d.y ? yMinVal : d.y
				return height - y(yVal);
			});

			//her çubuğa ait score değeri
			layer.selectAll("text.score").data(function (d) {
				return d;
			}).enter().append("text")
				.attr("x", function (d, i, j) {
					if(maxBarWidth) {
						return j > 0 && bc.config.style.separatedBars ? x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 + w * j + w / 2 + 10 * j : x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 + w * j + w / 2;
					}
					else {
						return j > 0 && bc.config.style.separatedBars ? x(d.x) + w * j + w / 2 + 10 * j : x(d.x) + w * j + w / 2;
					}
				})
				.attr("y", function (d) {
					var padding = bc.config.moveScopeToTop ? -15 : 20;
					var yPos = y(d.y) + padding;
					var min = padding;
					return (height - yPos) < min ? height - min : yPos;
				})
				.attr("height", function (d) {
					return height - y(d.y);
				})
				//				.attr("dx", 55)
				.attr("dy", ".36em")
				.attr("rel", function (d, i, j) {
					return data.series[j].id;
				})
				.attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr('class', 'score').text(function (d) {
				if(config.dontShowScore) {
					return;
				}
				if(bc.config.scoreFromProperty) {
					return d.score;
				} else if(bc.config.numberFormat) {
					return bc.formatNumber(d.y);
				}
				return (typeof d.y == "number" && d.y % 1 != 0) ? d.y.toFixed(2) : d.y;
			}).style("fill", "black").attr("transform", function (d) {
				return bc.config.verticalScore ? "rotate(-90, " + d3.select(this).attr("x") + ", " + d3.select(this).attr("y") + " )" : "";
			});
		}

		function transitionStacked() {
			y.domain([yStackMin, yStackMax]);
			svg.select(".y.axis").call(yAxis);
			var yAxisElementList = yAxisElement[0][0].children;
			var yAxisElementIndex;
			var elementText;
			var parentNodeTransform;
			for(yAxisElementIndex = 0; yAxisElementIndex < yAxisElementList.length; yAxisElementIndex += 1) {
				if(yAxisElementList[yAxisElementIndex].children[1] !== undefined) {
					elementText = yAxisElementList[yAxisElementIndex].children[1].innerHTML;
					if(elementText === "0" || elementText === "0.0") {//score<5 olduğunda lablels görüntülenmiyor. Çünkü elementText===0.0 oluyor. Murat FINDIK 30.03.2020
						parentNodeTransform = yAxisElementList[yAxisElementIndex].children[1].parentNode.getAttribute("transform");
						svg.append("g").attr("class", "x axis").attr("transform", parentNodeTransform).call(xAxis);
					}
				}
			}
			rect.transition().duration(durationTime).delay(function (d, i) {
				return i * 10;
			}).attr("y", function (d) {
				return y(d.y0 + d.y);
			}).attr("height", function (d) {
				return y(d.y0) - y(d.y0 + d.y);
			}).transition().attr("x", function (d) {
				if(maxBarWidth) {
					if(maxBarWidth <= 20) {
						return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 10;
					}
					if(maxBarWidth > 20 && maxBarWidth <= 60) {
						return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 20;
					}
					if(maxBarWidth >= 60 && maxBarWidth < 100) {
						return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 30;
					}
					else {
						return x(d.x) + xBand.rangeBand() / 2 - 50;
					}
				}
				else {
					return x(d.x)
				}
			}).attr("width", function () {
				if(maxBarWidth) {
					return maxBarWidth;
				}
				else {
					return xBand.rangeBand();
				}
			})
		}

		if(this.config.isStacked) {
			transitionStacked();
		} else {
			transitionGrouped();
		}
	}

	if(config.verticalXaxisLabels) {
		svg.selectAll(".x.axis text")
			.style("text-anchor", function (d) {
				return (d && d.indexOf("\n") > 0) ? "middle" : "end";
			})
			.attr("dx", "-.8em").attr("dy", ".15em")
			.attr("transform", function (d) {
				return "rotate(-65)";
			});
	}

	svg.append("text").attr("transform", "translate(" + width + ", " + (height - 20) + ")").attr("y", 6).attr("dy", ".71em").style("text-anchor", "end").text(this.config.xAxisLabel || "");
	svg.append("text").attr("transform", "rotate(-90)").attr("y", 6).attr("dy", ".71em").style("text-anchor", "end").text(this.config.yAxisLabel || "");

	//x axis te bulunan labellar içinde \n görürse tspan ile çoklu satır olarak yazdırmak için
	svg.selectAll(".x.axis text").each(function (d) {
		if(bc.data.xLabelCallback) {
			var el = d3.select(this);
			var newD = bc.data.xLabelCallback(d);
			el.html(newD);
		}
		if(d && d.indexOf("\n") > 0) {
			var el = d3.select(this);
			el.html("");
			var tArr = d.split("\n");
			for(var i = 0; i < tArr.length; i++) {
				var tspan = el.append('tspan').text(tArr[i]);
				if(i > 0)
					tspan.attr('x', 0).attr('dy', '15');
			}

			var trans = el.attr("transform");
			el.attr("transform", trans + " translate(-30,-10)");
			return;
		}
	});

	//data içinde gelen line'ları çizer. grafikte y axise line ekler.
	if(this.data.lines) {
		svg.selectAll(".cs-line")
			.data(bc.data.lines)
			.enter().append("svg:line")
			.attr("x1", function (d) {
				return 0;
			})
			.attr("y1", function (d) {
				return y(d.y);
			})
			.attr("x2", function (d) {
				return width;
			})
			.attr("y2", function (d) {
				return y(d.y);
			})
			.attr("class", "label-line").style("stroke", function (d, i) {
			return d.color || color(d.label);
		}).style("stroke-width", 1);

		var $$legendTable = $$.byid(config.id);

		for(var i in data.lines) {
			var lineObj = data.lines[i];

			var $$tr = $$.create("TR", null, null, null, $$legendTable);//.append($checkbox);
			$$.create("TD", null, null, null, $$tr);//.append($checkbox); //$$checkTd
			var $colorTd = $$.create("TD", null, null, null, $$tr);
			$$.create("DIV", null, "colorDiv", {"background-color": lineObj.color || color(lineObj.label)}, $colorTd);
			$$.create("TD", null, null, null, $$tr);//$labelTd

		}
	}

	//insertFirst edilme nedeni: title eklendiğinde container.height() 15 geliyor chart çizmiyor.
	$$.insertFirst($$titlediv, $$div);

	if(config.showYAxis === false) {
		svg.selectAll(".y.axis").style("display", "none");
	}
};

BC.prototype.load = function () {
	if(this.onloadcallback) {
		this.onloadcallback();
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function (eventName, callback) {
	if(eventName == "selected") {
		var $$dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if($$dom) {
			$$dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if(eventName == "onload") {
		this.onloadcallback = callback;
	}
};

})(window);
/////=csc-pagex.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-PAGEX LAYOUT
 */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		cls : "csc-pagex",
		border : false,
		style : {
			width : "800px",
			minHeight : "40px"
		},
		layoutConfig : {
			pageLayout : "rows",
			ref : "window",
			minWidth : 800,
			minHeight : 500
		}
	};

	this.BaseBF = "CONTAINER";
	this.LABEL = "Pagex Layout";

	this.METHODS = [ "getDesignedWidth", "close"];
	this.EVENTS = [ "oninit(param)", "onload", "selected", "onopen(param)", "onclose" ];
	
	this.Type = function() {};
}
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-PAGEX", def);
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-PAGE", def);

var BC = def.Type;

var defaultMemberHeight = 100, defaultMinWidth = 250, defaultMinHeight = 40;

BC.prototype.init = function() {
	this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth = parseInt(this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth || defaultMinWidth, 10);
	this.config.layoutConfig.minHeight = parseInt(this.config.layoutConfig.minHeight || defaultMinHeight, 10);
	if (this.config.layoutConfig.pageLayout == "fixed" && !inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		var bc = this;
		window.onresize = function() {
			//Eğer popup açıksa birşey yapma çünkü hesap hatalarına sebep oluyor. PopupContext'in close eventinde yeniden render yap
			if(CSPopupContext.getPopups().length){
				if(bc.popupEventid){//birden fazla event bağlanmaması için
					return;
				}
				bc.popupEventid = CSPopupContext.on("close", function(){
					if(CSPopupContext.getPopups().length){//açık popup kalmışsa birşey yapma
						return;
					}
					bc.popupEventid = null;
					CSPopupContext.unbind(bc.popupEventid);
					bc.renderFixedLayout($$.byid(bc.config.id));
				});
				return;
			}
			var $$dom = $$.byid(bc.config.id);
			if($$dom){
				bc.renderFixedLayout($$dom);
			}
		};
	}
};

BC.prototype.getDesignedWidth = function(){
	/**
	 * @function getDesignedWidth
     * @description Tasarlanan genişliği getirir.
     */
	if (this.config.layoutConfig.width) {
		return this.config.layoutConfig.width;
	} else if (this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth) {
		return this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth;
	}
	return defaultMinWidth;
};

/**
 * @functon close
 * @description Closes the page that is opened as popup or opened in a tab panel or an accordion panel.
 */
BC.prototype.close = function(){
	var parent = this.bf.getParent();
	if(parent && typeof parent.close == "function"){
		parent.close(this.bf.getMemberName());
	}
};

BC.prototype.setTitle = function(title){
	this.config.title = title;
	var parent = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
	if(parent && parent.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP"){
		parent.setTitle(title);
	}
};

BC.prototype.renderFixedLayout = function($$div) {
	if(!$$div){
		return;
	}
	if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		var mainDef = csd.Properties.getMainDef();
		if (!mainDef) {
			return;
		}
	}
	var bf = this.bf;

	if (!this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth || this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth < 100) {
		this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth = defaultMinWidth;
	}
	if (!this.config.layoutConfig.minHeight || this.config.layoutConfig.minHeight < 100) {
		this.config.layoutConfig.minHeight = defaultMinHeight;
	}
	var width = this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth + "px", height = this.config.layoutConfig.minHeight;
	var winWidth = 0, winHeight = 0;
	if (this.config.layoutConfig.ref == "window") {
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf)) {
			var winWidth = $$.innerWidth(window);
			var winHeight = $$.innerHeight(window) - (this.config.layoutConfig && this.config.layoutConfig.ignoreScrollSize ? 0 : 12);//scroll için 12
		} else {
			var mainDef = csd.Properties.getMainDef();
			var winWidth = mainDef.designerConfig.width;
			var winHeight = mainDef.designerConfig.height;
		}
		if (winWidth > this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth) {
			width = "100%";
		}
		if (winHeight > this.config.layoutConfig.minHeight) {
			height = winHeight;
		}
	} else {
		width = this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth + "px";
		height = this.config.layoutConfig.minHeight;
	}
	$$.css($$div, {
		width : width,
	});
	var topTotal = 0, bottomTotal = 0, middle = undefined, bottoms = [];
	for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
		var member = bf.members[memberName];
		if (member.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP") {
			continue;// popup ise çizme devam et
		}
		if (member.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-PAGE-BOX") {
			var $$warn = $$.create("DIV");
			$$warn.innerHTML = "PAGEBOX layout is no longer supported.";
			$$div.appendChild($$warn);
			continue;
		}
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf) && !member.hasVisibleItem()) {
			continue;
		}
		var memConfig = this.getMemberConfig(member);
		var $$memberDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-" + memberName);
		var rerender = false;
		if (!$$memberDiv) {
			$$memberDiv = $$.create("DIV", {"id": this.config.id + "-" + memberName});
			rerender = true;
		}
		if (memConfig.layoutConfig.placement == "top") {
			var memHeight = memConfig.layoutConfig.height || defaultMemberHeight;
			$$.css($$memberDiv, {
				width : width,
				height : memHeight + "px",
				overflow : memConfig.layoutConfig.overflow || "auto"
			});
			topTotal += parseInt(memHeight, 10);
		} else if (memConfig.layoutConfig.placement == "bottom") {
			bottoms.push(memberName);
			var memHeight = memConfig.layoutConfig.height || defaultMemberHeight;
			bottomTotal += parseInt(memHeight, 10);
			rerender = false;
		} else {// placement ise middle
			if (middle) {
				console.error(memberName + "will not be rendered. Only one middle can be render.");
				continue;
			}
			middle = memberName;
			rerender = false;
		}
		if (rerender) {
			$$div.appendChild($$memberDiv);
			BFEngine.render(member, $$memberDiv);
		} else {
			BFEngine.DRL(member);
		}
	}
	if (middle) {// middle en son çizilmeli (bottomTotal ve topTotal tam olarak belli olmalı)
		var $$memberDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-" + middle);
		var rerender = false;
		if (!$$memberDiv) {
			$$memberDiv = $$.create("DIV", {"id": this.config.id + "-" + middle});
			rerender = true;
		}
		var member = bf.members[middle];
		var memConfig = this.getMemberConfig(member);
		var memHeight = height - (bottomTotal + topTotal);
		$$.css($$memberDiv, {
			width : width,
			overflow : memConfig.layoutConfig.overflow || "auto"
		});
/*		if(memConfig.layoutConfig.fixedHeight !== false){*/
			$$.css($$memberDiv, {height : memHeight + "px"});
/*		}*/
		if (rerender) {
			$$div.appendChild($$memberDiv);
			BFEngine.render(member, $$memberDiv);
		} else {
			BFEngine.DRL(member);
		}
	}
	for(var i=0; i<bottoms.length ;i++){
		var $$memberDiv = $$.byid(this.config.id + "-" + bottoms[i]);
		var rerender = false;
		if (!$$memberDiv) {
			$$memberDiv = $$.create("DIV", {"id": this.config.id + "-" + bottoms[i]});
			rerender = true;
		}
		var member = bf.members[bottoms[i]];
		var memConfig = this.getMemberConfig(member);
		
		var memHeight = memConfig.layoutConfig.height || defaultMemberHeight;
		$$.css($$memberDiv, {
			width : width,
			height : memHeight + "px",
			"z-index" : memConfig.layoutConfig.zindex,
			overflow : memConfig.layoutConfig.overflow || "auto"
		});
		
		if (rerender) {
			$$div.appendChild($$memberDiv);
			BFEngine.render(member, $$memberDiv);
		} else {
			BFEngine.DRL(member);
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.renderAbsoluteLayout = function($$div) {
	if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		var mainDef = csd.Properties.getMainDef();
		if (!csd.Properties.getMainDef()) {
			return;
		}
	}
	// TODO mahmuty
};

// Rows layout
BC.prototype.renderRowsLayout = function($$div) {
	var bf = this.bf;
	$$.css($$div, {
		width : this.config.layoutConfig.width || "auto",
		// height: this.config.layoutConfig.height+"px",
		minWidth : this.config.layoutConfig.minWidth + "px"
	});
	if(this.config.layoutConfig.height){
		$$.css($$div, {
			height: this.config.layoutConfig.height+"px"
		});
	}
//	if(this.config.title){
//		var $$titlediv = $$.create("DIV",undefined,["csc-form-title", "csc-page-title", this.config.titleClass]);
//		var $$titlespan = $$.create("span", undefined, this.config.titleIcon);
//		$$titlespan.innerHTML = this.config.title;
//		$$titlediv.appendChild($$titlespan);
//		$div.append($$titlediv);
//	}
	for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
		var member = bf.members[memberName];
		if (member.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP") {
			continue;// popup ise çizme devam et
		}
		if (member.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-PAGE-BOX") {
			var $$warn = $$.create("DIV");
			$$warn.innerHTML = "PAGEBOX layout is no longer supported.";
			$$div.appendChild($$warn);
			continue;
		}
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf) && !member.hasVisibleItem()) {
			continue;
		}
		var memConfig = this.getMemberConfig(member);
		var $$memberDiv = $$.create("DIV", {"id": this.config.id + "-" + memberName});
		var memHeight = memConfig.layoutConfig.height ? (memConfig.layoutConfig.height + "px") : "";
		$$.css($$memberDiv, {
			width : "100%",
			height : memHeight,
			overflow : memConfig.layoutConfig.overflow || ""
		});
		$$div.appendChild($$memberDiv);
		BFEngine.render(member, $$memberDiv);
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var $$div = $$.create("DIV", {"id": this.config.id}, ["csc-pagex", this.config.cssClass]/*, this.config.style*/);
    if(sideDebugLevel() > 1){
        $$div.setAttribute("rel-def",this.bf.getBusinessName());
    }
	if(!inDesigner(this.bf) && this.config.bodyClass){
		$$.addClass($$.body(), this.config.bodyClass);
	}
	
	
	$container.appendChild($$div);

	if (this.config.layoutConfig.pageLayout == "fixed") {
		this.renderFixedLayout($$div);
	} else if (this.config.layoutConfig.pageLayout == "rows") {
		this.renderRowsLayout($$div);
	}
};

BC.prototype.getChildContainer = function(memberName) {
	return $$.byid(this.config.id + "-" + memberName);
};

BC.prototype.getMemberConfig = function(member) {
	var memConfig = member.getConfig();
	if (!memConfig.layoutConfig) {
		memConfig.layoutConfig = {};
	}
	if (this.config.layoutConfig.pageLayout == "fixed") {
		if (!memConfig.layoutConfig.placement) {
			memConfig.layoutConfig.placement = "top";
		}
	}
	return memConfig;
};

BC.prototype.load = function() {
	if (this.onloadcallback) {
		this.onloadcallback();
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "drop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "onload") {
		this.onloadcallback = callback;
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-digitalclock.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * 	@class CSC-DIGITALCLOCK
 * 	@author ADogan
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Digital Clock"; 

	this.METHODS = [];
	this.EVENTS = ["selected"];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	}];

	this.Type = function() {};
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-DIGITALCLOCK", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.render = function($container){
	var bc = this;
	
	var $$clock = $$.create("DIV", {id: "csc-digitalclock"}, (this.config.isDark ? "light dark" : "light"), undefined, $container);
	var $$display = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "display", undefined, $$clock);
	var $$weekdays = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "weekdays", undefined, $$display);
//	var $$ampm = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "ampm", undefined, $$display);
	var $$digits = $$.create("DIV", undefined, "digits", undefined, $$display);
	
	// Saat kodları
	$(function(){
		var clock = $('#csc-digitalclock'),
			alarm = clock.find('.alarm'),
			ampm = clock.find('.ampm');
	
		// Map digits to their names (this will be an array)
		var digit_to_name = 'zero one two three four five six seven eight nine'.split(' ');
	
		// This object will hold the digit elements
		var digits = {};
	
		// Positions for the hours, minutes, and seconds
		var positions = [
			'h1', 'h2', ':', 'm1', 'm2', ':', 's1', 's2'
		];
	
		// Generate the digits with the needed markup,
		// and add them to the clock
	
		var digit_holder = clock.find('.digits');
	
		$.each(positions, function(){
	
			if(this == ':'){
				digit_holder.append('<div class="dots">');
			}
			else{
	
				var pos = $('<div>');
	
				for(var i=1; i<8; i++){
					pos.append('<span class="d' + i + '">');
				}
	
				// Set the digits as key:value pairs in the digits object
				digits[this] = pos;
	
				// Add the digit elements to the page
				digit_holder.append(pos);
			}
	
		});
	
		// Add the weekday names
		var weekdays = SideMLManager.get("common.weekdaysShort");
		var weekday_names = weekdays.split(' '),
			weekday_holder = clock.find('.weekdays');
	
		$.each(weekday_names, function(){
			weekday_holder.append('<span>' + this + '</span>');
		});
	
		var weekdays = clock.find('.weekdays span');
	
	
		// Run a timer every second and update the clock
	
		(function update_time(){
	
			// Use moment.js to output the current time as a string
			// hh is for the hours in 12-hour format,
			// mm - minutes, ss-seconds (all with leading zeroes),
			// d is for day of week and A is for AM/PM
	
//			var now = moment().format("hhmmssdA");
			
			var outformat = "HHMMSS";
			var date = new Date();
			var now = SIDEDateUtil.getFormattedDate(new Date(), undefined ,outformat);
			now += date.getDay();
	
			digits.h1.attr('class', digit_to_name[now[0]]);
			digits.h2.attr('class', digit_to_name[now[1]]);
			digits.m1.attr('class', digit_to_name[now[2]]);
			digits.m2.attr('class', digit_to_name[now[3]]);
			digits.s1.attr('class', digit_to_name[now[4]]);
			digits.s2.attr('class', digit_to_name[now[5]]);
	
			// The library returns Sunday as the first day of the week.
			// Stupid, I know. Lets shift all the days one position down, 
			// and make Sunday last
	
			var dow = now[6];
			dow--;
			
			// Sunday!
			if(dow < 0){
				// Make it last
				dow = 6;
			}
	
			// Mark the active day of the week
			weekdays.removeClass('active').eq(dow).addClass('active');
	
			// Set the am/pm text:
//			ampm.text(now[7]+now[8]);
	
			// Schedule this function to be run again in 1 sec
			setTimeout(update_time, 1000);
	
		})();
	
		// Switch the theme
	
//		$('a.button').click(function(){
//			clock.toggleClass('light dark');
//		});
	
	});
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if(dom){
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-radiobutton.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** @class CSC-RADIOBUTTON */
function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		focusable: true,
        rtype: "boolean"
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "RadioButton";

	this.METHODS = [ "getGroupValue", "focus", "changeReturnType(rtype)"];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed", "selected" ];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {
	};

}
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-RADIOBUTTON", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.rmap = {
	"number": [1, 0],
	"boolean": [true, false],
};

BC.prototype.focus = function(){
	/**
	 * @function focus
     * @description Odağı radio button'a alır.
     */
	$$txt = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$txt){
		$$txt.focus();
	}
};

BC.prototype.init = function(){
	var parent = this.bf.$CS$.parent;
	if(parent && this.config.gvalue){
		parent.bcRef.isRadioGroup = true;
	}
};

BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
	var dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(dom){
		if(dom.checked){
            return this.rmap[this.config.rtype][0];//true
        } else {
            return this.rmap[this.config.rtype][1];//false
        }
	}
    if(this.config.value){
        return this.rmap[this.config.rtype][0];//true
    } else {
        return this.rmap[this.config.rtype][1];//false
    }
};

BC.prototype.getGroupValue = function() {
	/**
	 * @function getGroupValue
     * @description Grup değerini getirir.
     **/
	return this.config.gvalue;
};

BC.prototype.changeGroupValue = function(group) {
	this.config.gvalue = group;
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.changeReturnType = function(rtype){
	/**
	 * @function changeReturnType
     * @description Checkbox'ın döndüğü tipi değiştirir.
     * @param [rtype] Checkbox'ın döndüğü tip. Değer olarak "number" ve "boolean". Dönen değerler number için 1,0; boolean için true,false olur. 
     **/
	this.config.rtype = rtype;
};

BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
	this.config.value = value;
	var dom = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if(dom){
		dom.checked = value;
	}
};
BC.prototype.saveState = function() {
	this.config.value = this.getValue();
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	var group = config.group === undefined ? false : config.group;
	var disabled = bf.isDisabled();
	var value = config.value ? true:false;
	
	//Aynı group ismine sahip radio butonların birbirine karışmaması için atasının id'si group'a eklendi
	if(group && !config.global && bf.$CS$.parent){
		group = group + "-" +bf.$CS$.parent.getConfig().id;
	}
	
	var $$input = $$.create("INPUT", {id: config.id, type : "radio", name : group,	disabled: disabled, checked : value	}, ["csc-radiobutton", config.cssClass]); 
	$$input.style.display = inDesigner(bf) || bf.isVisible() ? "" : "none";
	$container.appendChild($$input);
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	var bc=this, $$dom = $$.byid(bc.config.id);
	if(!$$dom){
		return;
	}
	if (eventName == "changed") {
		$$dom.onchange = callback;
	} else if (eventName == "selected") {
		$$dom.onclick = callback;
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-table-header.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-TABLE  HEADER
 * @classdesc CSC-TABLE için Header bileşeni
 * @author Mahmut Yıldız
 */

function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {};

	this.BaseBF = "CONTAINER";
	this.LABEL = "Table Header";


	this.METHODS = [ ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "selected" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [];

	this.Type = function() {};
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-TABLE-HEADER", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function($container) {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf;
	var parent = bf.getParent();
	if(parent.getTypeName() == "CSC-DT"){
		bc.parentDt = true;
	}
};

//$container bir thead olmalı
BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc = this, bf = bc.bf;
	var colmodel = [];
	//Parent mutlaka TABLE olmalı
	var parent = bf.getParent();
	if(parent.getTypeName() != "CSC-TABLE" && parent.getTypeName() != "CSC-DT"){
		var $$span = $$.create("span");
		$$span.innerHTML = "TABLE HEADER can be used only in a TABLE or in a DATA-TABLE component.";
		$container.appendChild($$span);
		return;
	}
	//Tüm alanlar mutlaka TABLE-ROW olmalı
	for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
		var member = bf.members[memberName];
		var memberRef = member.bcRef;
		if(memberRef.typeName != "CSC-TABLE-ROW"){
			var $$span = $$.create("span");
			$$span.innerHTML = "TABLE HEADER can include only TABLE ROW components.";
			$container.appendChild($$span);
			return;
		}
	}
	
	for ( var memberName in bf.members) {
		BFEngine.render(bf.members[memberName], $container);
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "drop") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondrop = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "dragover") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.ondragover = callback;
		}
	}
};

})(window);
/////=csc-listbox.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/** @class CSC-LISTBOX */

function Definition(CS) {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		disabled : false,
		cls : "csc-listbox"
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "List";
	this.METHODS = [ "setOptions", "setOptionsConfig", "filter(filterProp, filterValue, config)", "inverseFilter(filterProp, filterValue, setNull)","getOptions()", "addOptions(items, index)", "clearOptions()", "removeSelectedOptions()", "getSelectedIndex()", "getSelectedIndexes","removeOption", "setDefaultValue(value)","sortOptions(fieldName,order)" ];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed", "selected", "doubleclick" ];
	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	} ];

	this.Type = function() {
	};
}
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-LISTBOX", def);

var BC = def.Type;

//BC.prototype.init = function(){
//	this.prepareOptions();
//};


BC.prototype.setDefaultValue = function(value) {
	/**
	 * @function setDefaultValue
     * @description Listbox'taki varsayılan değeri ayarlar.
     * @param [value] varsayılan değer
     */
	this.config.defaultValue = value;
}
BC.prototype.sortOptions = function(fieldName, order){
	this.sortFieldName = fieldName;
	this.sortOrder = order || "asc";
	this.reRender();
};
BC.prototype.sortArray = function(data){
    var me = this;
    if(data){
        return data.sort(function(a,b){
            if(me.sortOrder == "desc"){
                if(typeof a[me.sortFieldName] == "string"){
                    return b[me.sortFieldName].localeCompare(a[me.sortFieldName]);
                } else {
                    if(a[me.sortFieldName] < b[me.sortFieldName]) return 1;
                    if(a[me.sortFieldName] > b[me.sortFieldName]) return -1;
                    return 0;
                }
            }else{
                if(typeof b[me.sortFieldName] == "string"){
                    return a[me.sortFieldName].localeCompare(b[me.sortFieldName]);
                } else {
                    if(a[me.sortFieldName] < b[me.sortFieldName]) return -1;
                    if(a[me.sortFieldName] > b[me.sortFieldName]) return 1;
                    return 0;
                }
            }
        });
    }
}


BC.prototype.clear = function() {
	this.setValue(this.config.defaultValue || "");
}

BC.prototype.init = function() {
	this.inTabular = false;
	var parent = this.bf;
	this.fprop = this.config.filterProp;
	while (parent) {
		if (parent.bcRef.typeName == "CSC-POPUP") {
			break;
		}
		if (parent.$CS$.definition.isTabular) {
			this.inTabular = true;
			break;
		}
		parent = parent.$CS$.parent;
	}
	if (this.inTabular && parent[this.bf.$CS$.name]) {
		this.tabularBc = parent[this.bf.$CS$.name].bcRef;
		this.options = this.tabularBc.options;
		this.localOptions = this.tabularBc.localOptions;
		this.optionsConfig = this.tabularBc.optionsConfig;
		
		this.config.refDataNames = this.tabularBc.config.refDataNames;
		this.config.appRefData = this.tabularBc.config.appRefData;
		
		this.fprop = this.tabularBc.fprop || this.fprop;
		this.fvalue = this.tabularBc.fvalue;
		
		this.iprop = this.tabularBc.iprop || this.iprop;
		this.ivalue = this.tabularBc.ivalue;
	}
	
	this.prepareOptions();
};



BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
	if(!(this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly())){
		var $select = $("#" + this.config.id);
		if ($select.length) {
			return $select.val();
		}
	}
	if (Array.isArray(this.config.value)) {
		var value = [];
		for ( var i = 0; i < this.config.value.length; i++) {
			if (typeof this.config.value[i] == "object") {
				value.push(this.config.value[i].value);
			} else {
				value.push(this.config.value[i]);
			}
		}
		return value;
	}
	if (typeof this.config.value == "object") {
		this.config.value;
	}
	return this.config.value || "";
};

BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
	this.config.value = value;
	if(this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly()){
		var $$ul = $$.byid(this.config.id);
		if(!$$ul){
			return;
		}
		$$ul.innerHTML = "";
		var texts = this.getText();
		if(texts === undefined || texts === null){
			return;
		}
		if(!Array.isArray(texts)){
			texts = [texts];
		}
		for(var i=0; i<texts.length ;i++){
			var $$li = $$.create("LI");
			$$li.innerHTML = texts[i];
			$$ul.appendChild($$li);
		}
	} else {
		var $select = $("#" + this.config.id);
		if ($select.length) {
			$select.val(value);
		}
	}
	
};

BC.prototype.saveState = function() {
	this.config.value = this.getValue();
};

BC.prototype.getText = function(value){
	if(value === undefined){
		if(this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly()){
			value = this.config.value;
		} else {
			value = this.getValue();
		}
	}
	if(value === undefined || value === null){
		return undefined;
	}
	if(Array.isArray(value)){
		var texts = [];
		for(var i=0; i<value.length ;i++){
			var val = value[i];
			if(typeof val == "object"){
				texts.push((this.optionsConfig && this.optionsConfig.text) ? val[this.optionsConfig.text] : val.text);
			} else {
				for(var k=0; k<this.localOptions.length ;k++){
					if(this.localOptions[k][0] == val){
						texts.push(this.localOptions[k][1]);
						break;
					}
				}
			}
		}
		return texts;
	}
	if(typeof value == "object"){
		return (this.optionsConfig && this.optionsConfig.text) ? value[this.optionsConfig.text] : value.text;
	}
	for(var k=0; k<this.localOptions.length ;k++){
		if(this.localOptions[k][0] == value){
			return this.localOptions[k][1];
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.prepareOptions = function() {
	var selectedRefDataName = this.config.refDataNames || this.config.appRefData;
	this.localOptions = [];
	if (this.options) {
	  if (this.sortFieldName){
                 this.options = this.sortArray(this.options);
             }
		if (!this.config.filterProp || (this.config.filterProp && this.filterValue)) {
			for ( var i = 0; i < this.options.length; i++) {
				var item = this.options[i];
				if (Array.isArray(item)) {
					if(this.fprop && Array.isArray(this.fvalue) && !isInIt(this.fvalue, item[0])){
						continue;
					}
					if(this.iprop && Array.isArray(this.ivalue) && isInIt(this.ivalue, item[0])){
						continue;
					}
					this.localOptions.push([ item[0], item[1] ]);
				} else if (typeof item != "object") {
					if(this.fprop && Array.isArray(this.fvalue) && !isInIt(this.fvalue, item)){
						continue;
					}
					if(this.iprop && Array.isArray(this.ivalue) && isInIt(this.ivalue, item)){
						continue;
					}
					this.localOptions.push([ item, item ]);
				} else {
					if (this.fprop) {//filter va mı?
						if(Array.isArray(this.fvalue) && !isInIt(this.fvalue, BEANUtils.getValue(item, this.fprop))){
							continue;
						}
						if(!Array.isArray(this.fvalue) && item[this.fprop] != this.fvalue){
							continue;
						}
					}
					if (this.iprop) {//inverse filter va mı?
						if(Array.isArray(this.ivalue) && isInIt(this.ivalue, BEANUtils.getValue(item, this.iprop))){
							continue;
						}
						if(!Array.isArray(this.ivalue) && item[this.iprop] == this.ivalue){
							continue;
						}
					}
					if (this.optionsConfig && this.optionsConfig.value && this.optionsConfig.text) {
						var value = BEANUtils.getValue(item, this.optionsConfig.value), text = BEANUtils.getValue(item, this.optionsConfig.text);
						if((item.aktifPasif === false || item.aktifPasif === "false") && this.nonPassiveValue !== value){
							this.addPassiveOption(value, text);
						} else {
							this.localOptions.push([ value, text ]);
						}
					}else if (this.config.valueField && this.config.textField && item[this.config.valueField] !== undefined && item[this.config.textField] !== undefined) {
						if((item.aktifPasif === false || item.aktifPasif === "false") && this.nonPassiveValue !== item.value){
							this.addPassiveOption(item.value, item.text);
						} else {
							this.localOptions.push([ item[this.config.valueField], item[this.config.textField]]);
						}
					} else {
						if((item.aktifPasif === false || item.aktifPasif === "false") && this.nonPassiveValue !== item.value){
							this.addPassiveOption(item.value, item.text);
						} else {
							this.localOptions.push([ item.value, item.text ]);
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	} else if (selectedRefDataName != undefined) {
		if (!inDesigner(this.bf) && selectedRefDataName != "none") {
			var data = CSRefDataManager.getData(selectedRefDataName);
			if (data) {
				if (!this.config.filterProp || (this.config.filterProp && this.filterValue)) {
					for ( var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
						if (this.fprop && this.fvalue) {
							if(Array.isArray(this.fvalue) && !isInIt(this.fvalue, data[i][this.fprop])){
								continue;
							}
							if(!Array.isArray(this.fvalue) && data[i][this.fprop] != this.fvalue){
								continue;
							}
						}
						if (this.config.filterProp && this.filterValue) {
							if(Array.isArray(this.filterValue) && !isInIt(this.filterValue, data[i][this.config.filterProp])){
								continue;
							}
							if(!Array.isArray(this.filterValue) && data[i][this.config.filterProp] != this.filterValue){
								continue;
							}
						}
						if (this.config.valueField && this.config.textField) {
							this.localOptions.push([ data[i][this.config.valueField], data[i][this.config.textField] ]);
						} else {
							this.localOptions.push([ data[i].value, data[i].text ]);
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var readonly = this.isParentReadonly() || this.bf.isReadonly();
	if(readonly){
		var $$ul = $$.create("UL", {id: this.config.id}, ["csc-listbox-ul",this.config.cssClass], this.config.style);
		$container.appendChild($$ul);
		if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
			$$ul.style.display = "";// Design Time da visible yap
			var texts = ["Readonly"];
		} else {
			var texts = [];
			if(this.getValue()){
				texts = this.getText();
			}
		}
		if(texts === undefined || texts === null){
			texts = "";
		}
		if(!Array.isArray(texts)){
			texts = [texts];
		}
		for(var i=0; i<texts.length ;i++){
			var $$li = $$.create("LI");
			$$li.innerHTML = texts[i];
			$$ul.appendChild($$li);
		}
	} else {
		var disabled = this.bf.isDisabled() ? "disabled" : undefined;
		var $$select = $$.create("SELECT", {id: this.config.id, "tabindex": this.config.tabIndex, name: this.config.id, disabled: disabled, multiple: "multiple"}, ["csc-listbox", this.config.cssClass], this.config.style);
		$$select.style.display = this.config.visible ? "" : "none";
		// Design Time da visible yap
		if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
			$$select.style.display = "";
		}
	
		if (this.bf.isRequired()) {
			$$.addClass($$select, "csc-required");
		}
		
		this.prepareOptions();
		
		if($$.isie9()){
			for ( var i = 0; i < this.localOptions.length; i++) {
				var opt = document.createElement('option');
				opt.value = this.localOptions[i][0];
				opt.text = this.localOptions[i][1];
				$$select.options.add(opt);
			}
		}else{
			var optionStr = "";
			for ( var i = 0; i < this.localOptions.length; i++) {
				optionStr += "<option value='" + this.localOptions[i][0]+ "'>" + this.localOptions[i][1] + "</option>";
			}
			$$select.innerHTML = optionStr;
		}
		$container.appendChild($$select);
		
		if (this.config.value !== undefined) {
			this.setValue(this.config.value);
		}
	}

};

BC.prototype.setOptions = function(items, config) {
	/**
	 * @function setOptions
     * @description Listbox'ta gözüken değerleri ayarlar.
     * @param [items] items dizi olmalıdır. 
     * @example items: [{plaka: "06", adi: "Ankara"},{plaka:"01", adi: "Adana"}]
     * config: {value: "plaka", text: "adi"}
     * @param [config] value ve text isimleri config ile verilir). 
     */
	if (!Array.isArray(items)) {
		return;
	}
	this.options = [];//Gönderilen array'in referansından kurtulmak için değerleri tek tek aktarıyoruz.
	for(var i=0; i<items.length ;i++){
		this.options[i] = items[i];
	}
	this.optionsConfig = config;

	this.prepareOptions();
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.setOptionsConfig = function(config) {
	/**
	 * @function setOptionsConfig
     * @description Listbox'taki gözüken değerlerin konfigürasyonunu ayarlar.
     * @param [config] Konfigürasyon ayarı. Value ve text isimleri config ile verilir). 
     * @example {value: "plaka", text: "adi"}
     */
	this.optionsConfig = config;
};

/**
 * @function getOptions
 * @description Listbox'taki değerleri getirir.
 */
BC.prototype.getOptions = function() {
	if(this.options){
		return this.options;
	}
	var result = [];
	if(this.localOptions){
		for(var i=0; i<this.localOptions.length ;i++){
			result.push({value: this.localOptions[i][0], text: this.localOptions[i][1]});
		}
	}
	return result;
};

/**
 * @function addOptions
 * @description Listbox'a yeni değer(ler) ekler.
 * @param [items] Eklenecek değerler. Dizi de olabilir.
 * @param [index] Değerlerin ekleneceği indeks
 */
BC.prototype.addOptions = function(items, index) {
	if (!Array.isArray(items)) {
		items = [items];
	}
	if (!this.options) {
		this.options = [];
	}
	if (index !== undefined) {
		var op2 = this.options.splice(index, this.options.length - index);
		this.options = this.options.concat(items, op2);
	} else {
		this.options = this.options.concat(items);
	}
	this.prepareOptions();
	this.reRender();
};

/**
 * @function clearOptions
 * @description Listbox'taki değerleri siler.
 */
BC.prototype.clearOptions = function() {
	this.options = [];
	this.prepareOptions();
	this.reRender();
};

/**
 * @function removeOption
 * @description İstenen değerleri listbox'tan siler.
 * @param [values] Silinecek değerler
 */
BC.prototype.removeOption = function(values) {
	if(!values){
		return;
	}
	if(!Array.isArray(values)){
		values = [values];
	}
	
	if (this.options && (!this.config.filterProp || (this.config.filterProp && this.filterValue))) {
		for(var k=0; k<values.length ;k++){
			for ( var i = 0; i < this.options.length; i++) {
				var item = this.options[i];
				if (Array.isArray(item)) {
					if(item[0] == values[k]){
						this.options.splice(i, 1);
						break;
					}
				} else if (typeof item != "object") {
					if(item == values[k]){
						this.options.splice(i, 1);
						break;
					}
				} else {
					if (this.config.filterProp) {
						if(BEANUtils.getValue(item, this.config.filterProp) == values[k]){
							this.options.splice(i, 1);
							break;
						}
					}
					if (this.optionsConfig && this.optionsConfig.value) {
						if(BEANUtils.getValue(item, this.optionsConfig.value) == values[k]){
							this.options.splice(i, 1);
							break;
						}
					} else {
						if(item.value == values[k]){
							this.options.splice(i, 1);
							break;
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	
	for(var k=0; k<values.length ;k++){
		for(var i=0; i<this.localOptions.length ;i++){
			if(this.localOptions[i][0] == values[k]){
				this.localOptions.splice(i, 1);
				break;
			}
		}
	}
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.filter = function(filterProp, filterValue, config) {
	var disableFilterInverseFilter = BCDefaults.get("CSC-LISTBOX", "allowMultipleFilter", false);
	
	if(disableFilterInverseFilter){
		this.iprop = null;
		this.ivalue = null;
	}
	
	
	if((typeof config === "boolean" && config == true) || (config && config.setNull === true)){
		this.setValue(null);
	}
	if(filterValue === undefined){
		this.fprop = this.config.filterProp;
		filterValue = filterProp;
	} else {
		this.fprop = filterProp;
	}
	this.fvalue = filterValue;
	
	if(config && config.forcePrepareOptions){
		this.prepareOptions();
	}
	
	this.reRender();
};

BC.prototype.inverseFilter = function(filterProp, filterValue, setNull) {
	var disableFilterInverseFilter = BCDefaults.get("CSC-LISTBOX", "allowMultipleFilter", false);
	
	if(disableFilterInverseFilter){
		this.fprop = null;
		this.fvalue = null;
	}
	
	if(setNull === true){
		this.setValue(null);
	}
	if(filterValue === undefined){
		this.iprop = this.config.filterProp;
		filterValue = filterProp;
	} else {
		this.iprop = filterProp;
	}
	this.ivalue = filterValue;
	this.reRender();
};

/* Filter uygulanmadığı durumda düzgün çalışır çünkü index tabanlıdır */
/**
 * @function removeSelectedOptions
 * @description Listbox'ta seçilen değerleri kaldırır.
 */
BC.prototype.removeSelectedOptions = function() {

	var $$select = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if (!$$select) {
		return;
	}
	
	if ($$.isie()) {
		for (i = $$select.options.length - 1; i >= 0 ; i--) {
			if ($$select.options[i].selected) {
				this.options.splice(i, 1);
			}
		}
	} else {
		if (!$$select.selectedOptions || $$select.selectedOptions.length == 0) {
			return;
		}
		var indices = [];
		for ( var i = 0; i < $$select.selectedOptions.length; i++) {
			indices.push($$select.selectedOptions[i].index);
		}
		indices.sort(function(a,b){
			return a-b;
		});
		for(var i=indices.length-1; i>=0 ;i--){
			this.options.splice(indices[i], 1);
		}
	}

	this.prepareOptions();
	this.reRender();
};

/**
 * @function getSelectedIndex
 * @description Seçilen değerin indeksini döner.
 */
BC.prototype.getSelectedIndex = function() {
	var $$select = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if (!$$select) {
		return -1;
	}
	return $$select.selectedIndex;
};

BC.prototype.getSelectedIndexes = function() {
	var result = [];
	var $$select = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if (!$$select) {
		return result;
	}
	var $$options = $$.childs($$select, "OPTION");
	for(var i=0; i<$$options.length ;i++){
		if($$options[i].selected){
			result.push(i);
		}
	}
	return result;
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "changed") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onchange = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (dom) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if (eventName == "doubleclick") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (dom) {
			dom.ondblclick = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);
/////=csc-ace-editor.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-ACE-EDITOR
 * @author barist
 */
function Definition(CS) {
  this.DEFAULTS = {
    focusable: true
  };

  this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
  this.LABEL = "Ace Editor";
  this.METHODS = ["getValue","setValue","getAceObject", "focus", "resize", "addCommand(command)","setAnnotations(annotations)", "isAceReady"];
  this.EVENTS = ["changed", "afterRender", "blur", "aceready"];
  this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
    name : "ace",
    version : "1.0"
  }];

  this.Type = function() {};
};

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-ACE-EDITOR", def);

var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype.init = function(){
  this.aceeditor=null;

  if(window.isAceLoaded){
    return;
  }

  var pathPrefix = "js/3thParty/ace/", bc=this;
  if(CSSession.getEnv() == "dev" || CSSession.getEnv() == "test" || inDesigner(bc.bf)){
    pathPrefix = "designer/" + pathPrefix;
  }

  SLibraryLoader.loadLib("ace-editor",[pathPrefix+"ace.js", pathPrefix+"/ext-language_tools.js"], {serieLoad:true, module: bc.bf.getModuleName()}, function () {
    window.isAceLoaded = true;
    BFEngine.a();
    BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
    BFEngine.r();
  });
};

BC.prototype.saveState = function($container) {
  var bc=this, editor=bc.aceeditor;
  if(editor){
    bc.config.value = editor.getValue();
    bc.aceScrollTop = editor.session.getScrollTop();
  }
};

BC.prototype.DRL = function(){
  var bc=this, aceeditor=bc.aceeditor;
  if(aceeditor){
		aceeditor.resize(true);
  }
};

BC.prototype.setReadonly = function(flag){
  var bc=this, editor=bc.aceeditor, config=bc.config;
  config.readonly = flag;
  if(editor){
    editor.setReadOnly(flag);
  }
};

/**
 * @function addCommand
 * Adds ace editor command
 * @param ace command
 * @example
 * {
 *  name: 'save',
 *  bindKey: {win: "Ctrl-S", "mac": "Cmd-S"},
 *  exec: function(editor) {
 *    console.log("Handling ctrl + s ");
 *  }
 * }
 */
BC.prototype.addCommand = function(command) {
  var bc=this, editor=bc.aceeditor;
  if(!bc.commands){
    bc.commands = [];
  }
  bc.commands.push(command);
  if(editor){
    editor.commands.addCommand(command);
  }
};

/**
 * Encapsulates setAnnotations method of ace editor. More information look ace editor's docs.
 * @param annotations - annotations
 * @example
 * [{row:0, column:0, type: "error", text:"Error text"}]
 */
BC.prototype.setAnnotations = function(annotations) {
  var bc=this, editor=bc.aceeditor;
  bc.anns = annotations;
  if(editor){
    editor.session.setAnnotations(annotations);
  }
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
  if(!window.isAceLoaded){
    return;
  }
  var $editorDiv = $$.create("div",{ "id": this.config.id}, this.config.cssClass, {width: this.config.style && this.config.style.width ? this.config.style.width : "500px", height: this.config.style && this.config.style.height ? this.config.style.height : "1000px"}) ;
  $container.appendChild($editorDiv);
  var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;

  var mode = config.mode || "javascript";
  var editor = ace.edit(this.config.id);
  bc.aceeditor = editor;
  if(config.value){
    editor.setValue(config.value, 1);
  }
  editor.renderer.setShowGutter(true);

  editor.setTheme("ace/theme/textmate");
  editor.getSession().setMode("ace/mode/" + mode);
  if(config.syntax === false){
    editor.getSession().setOption("useWorker", false);
  }
  editor.setReadOnly(config.readonly);
  editor.getSession().setFoldStyle("markbegin");
  // enable autocompletion and snippets
  editor.setOptions({
    enableBasicAutocompletion: config.autoComplete,
    enableSnippets: true,
    enableLiveAutocompletion: false
  });

  // Placeholder
  if(config.placeholder){
    function updateArea() {
      var shouldShow = !editor.session.getValue().length;
      var node = editor.renderer.emptyMessageNode;
      if (!shouldShow && node) {
        editor.renderer.scroller.removeChild(editor.renderer.emptyMessageNode);
        editor.renderer.emptyMessageNode = null;
      } else if (shouldShow && !node) {
        node = editor.renderer.emptyMessageNode = document.createElement("div");
        node.textContent = bc.config.placeholder;
        node.className = "ace_invisible ace_emptyMessage";
        node.style.padding = "0 9px";
        editor.renderer.scroller.appendChild(node);
      }
    }
    editor.on("input", updateArea);
    setTimeout(updateArea, 100);
  }

  editor.$blockScrolling = Infinity;
	editor.getSession().on('change', function(){
		if(bc.settingValue){
			return;//setValue cant fire change event in side
		}
		bf.fire("changed");
	});

  editor.on("blur", function(){
    bf.fire("blur");
  });

  if(bc.focusWaiting){
    editor.focus();
    bc.focusWaiting = false;
  }
  if(bc.resizeWaiting){
    editor.resize();
    bc.resizeWaiting = false;
  }
  if(bc.aceScrollTop){
    editor.session.setScrollTop(bc.aceScrollTop)
  }
  if(bc.anns){
    editor.session.setAnnotations(bc.anns);
  }
  if(bc.commands){
    for(var i=0; i<bc.commands.length ;i++){
      editor.commands.addCommand(bc.commands[i]);
    }
  }

  bf.fire("afterRender");
  if(!bc.readyEventTriggered){
    bc.readyEventTriggered = true;
    bf.fire("aceready");
  }
};

BC.prototype.isAceReady = function(){
  return this.readyEventTriggered == true;
};


/**
 * Focuses the editor
 */
BC.prototype.focus = function() {
  if(this.aceeditor){
    this.aceeditor.focus();
  } else {
    this.focusWaiting = true;
  }
};

/**
 * Resizes the editor according to it's container
 */
BC.prototype.resize = function() {
  if(this.aceeditor){
    this.aceeditor.resize();
  } else {
    this.resizeWaiting = true;
  }
};

BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
  if(!window.isAceLoaded){
    return this.config.value;
  }
  this.aceeditor = ace.edit(this.config.id);
  return this.aceeditor.getValue();
};
BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
  if(value === undefined){
    value = "";
  }
  this.config.value = value;
  if(!window.isAceLoaded){
    return;
  }
	if(this.aceeditor){
		this.settingValue = true;
		try {
			this.aceeditor.setValue(value,1);
		} catch(e){
		  //waiting exception when ace editor's display is none
		  console.log("Ace editor setValue ex: " + e);
		} finally {
			this.settingValue = null;
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.getAceObject = function(){
  return this.aceeditor;
};

BC.prototype.destroybc = function() {
  var ace = this.aceeditor;
  if(ace){
    ace.getSession().setMode();
    ace.destroy();
  }
}

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {

};

})(window);
/////=csc-line-chart.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-LINE-CHART
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		showLegend: true,
		showToolTip: false,
	};

	this.BaseBF = "NON-BUSINESS";
	this.LABEL = "Line Chart";

	this.METHODS = ["setData(data, rangeArr, selectedRangeArr, yAxisLabelObj, labelValueMap, notrender)", "setRange(rangeArr,selectedRangeArr, notrender)", "getData()", "setZoomScaleExtent(min, max)", "setTitle(title)", "setXAxisLabel(xAxisLabelObj, notrender)", "setSerieVisibility(serieid, flag)"];
	this.EVENTS = ["onload", "selected", "onmouseover(serie)", "pointSelected(id, xValue, yValue)", "serieToggleAll(serieIds, isVisible)", "serieToggle(serieid, isVisible, visibleSerieIdArr)", "onzoom(xMin, xMax, xAxisTimeTickArr, isZoomIn)", "rangeSelected(rangeArr)"];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [
		{name: "JQuery", version: "2.0.3"},
		{name: "d3", version: "3.1.9"}
	];

	this.Type = function () {
	};
}
var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-LINE-CHART", def);
var BC = def.Type;

BC.prototype = new BaseBC();

BC.prototype.init = function () {
	if(inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		this.rangeArr = [1357714800000, 1357720820000];
		this.selectedRangeArr = [1357715400000, 1357717600000];
		this.data =
			[
				{
					id: "serie1", label: 'red', color: '', visible: true,
					values: [
						{"date": 1357714800000, "value": "5.2"},
						{"date": 1357715400000, "value": "14.2"},
						{"date": 1357717600000, "value": "8.2"},
						{"date": 1357718800000, "value": "15.8"},
						{"date": 1357720820000, "value": "11.2"}
					]
				},
				{
					id: "serie2", label: 'steelblue', color: '', visible: false,
					values: [
						{"date": 1357714900000, "value": "22"},
						{"date": 1357716530000, "value": "26.1"},
						{"date": 1357718200000, "value": "15.4"},
						{"date": 1357720800000, "value": "37.4"}
					]
				}
			];

		this.yAxisLabelObj = {"5.2": "MIN", "21.2": "AVR", "37.4": "MAX"};
		this.labelValueMap = {"A++": [30, 40], "B": [20, 30], "C--": [10, 20]};
	}

	//d3 kütüphanesini dinamik yükleme
	if(window.d3LibLoaded) {
		return;
	}
	var pathPrefix = "js/3thParty/d3/", bc = this, libs;
	if(CSSession.getEnv() == "dev" || CSSession.getEnv() == "test" || inDesigner(bc.bf)) {
		pathPrefix = "designer/" + pathPrefix;
	}
	libs = [pathPrefix + "d3.v3.min.js"];

	SLibraryLoader.loadLib("d3", libs, {progress: true}, function () {
		window.d3LibLoaded = true;
		BFEngine.a();
		BFEngine.renderRequest(bc.bf);
		BFEngine.r();
	});
};
/**
 * @function setTitle
 * @description Başlığa yazılacak metni ayarlar.
 * @param [title] Başlığa yazılacak metin
 */
BC.prototype.setTitle = function (title) {
	var config = this.config;
	config.title = title;
	var $$title = $$.child(config.id, "DIV");
	if($$title){
		$$title.innerHTML = config.title;
	}
};
BC.prototype.setVisible = function (flag) {
	this.config.visible = flag;
	$$.css(this.config.id, "display", flag ? "" : "none");
};

BC.prototype.setSerieVisibility = function (id, flag) {
	var $checkbox = $("#" + this.config.id + " .legendTable input[rel=" + id + "]");
	if($checkbox) {
		var ischecked = $checkbox.is(":checked");
		if(ischecked !== flag) {
			$checkbox.click();
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.setXAxisLabel = function (xAxisLabelObj, notrender) {
	this.xAxisLabelObj = xAxisLabelObj;
	if(notrender) {
		return;
	}
	this.bf.rerender();
}

/**
 * @function setData
 * @description Line chart'ta çizilecek diyagramın verilerini ayarlar.
 * @example [{id: "serie1",label: 'red', color: '', dotColor: '', dotSize: 1.2, visible: true, values: [{"date": 1357714800000, "value": "5.2"}, {"date": 1357715400000,"value": "14.2"}, {"date": 1357717600000,"value": "8.2"}]}]
 * rangeArr: [10, 1357720820000]
 * selectedRangeArr: [1357715400000, 1357717600000]
 * yAxisLabelObj: {"5.2":"MIN", "21.2":"AVR", "37.4":"MAX"}
 * @param [data] Çizilecek veri. Dizi şeklinde 1'den fazla veri girilebilir.
 * @param [rangeArr] X eksenindeki slider'ın aralığı.
 * @param [selectedRangeArr] X eksenindeki slider'da seçili olan aralık.
 * @param [yAxisLabelObj] Y eksenindeki sabit değerler.
 * @param [labelValueMap]
 * @param [notrender] Veriler değiştikten sonra chart'ın render edilip edilmemesini belirler.
 */
BC.prototype.setData = function (data, rangeArr, selectedRangeArr, yAxisLabelObj, labelValueMap, notrender) {
	this.data = data;
	this.rangeArr = rangeArr ? rangeArr : this.rangeArr;
	this.selectedRangeArr = selectedRangeArr ? selectedRangeArr : this.selectedRangeArr;
	this.yAxisLabelObj = yAxisLabelObj ? yAxisLabelObj : this.yAxisLabelObj;
	this.labelValueMap = labelValueMap ? labelValueMap : this.labelValueMap;
	if(notrender) {
		return;
	}
	this.bf.rerender();
};

BC.prototype.DRL = function () {
	//this.bf.rerender();//çift çizmeye neden oluyor...
	this.reRender();
};

/**
 * @function setRange
 * @description Line chart'ta X eksenindeki slider'ın aralıklarını ayarlar.
 * @param [rangeArr] X eksenindeki slider'ın aralığı. Örn: [10, 1357720820000]
 * @param [selectedRangeArr] X eksenindeki slider'da seçili olan aralık. Örn: [1357715400000, 1357717600000]
 * @param [notrender] Veriler değiştikten sonra chart'ın render edilip edilmemesini belirler.
 */
BC.prototype.setRange = function (rangeArr, selectedRangeArr, notrender) {
	this.rangeArr = rangeArr ? rangeArr : this.rangeArr;
	this.selectedRangeArr = selectedRangeArr ? selectedRangeArr : this.selectedRangeArr;
	if(notrender) {
		return;
	}
	this.bf.rerender();
};

/**
 * @function setZoomScaleExtent
 * @description Line chart'ta X eksenindeki slider'ın aralıklarını ayarlar.
 * @param [min] X eksenindeki slider'ın aralığı. Örn: [10, 1357720820000]
 * @param [max] X eksenindeki slider'da seçili olan aralık. Örn: [1357715400000, 1357717600000]
 **/
BC.prototype.setZoomScaleExtent = function (min, max) {
	this.config.zoomScaleExtent = [min, max];
	this.bf.rerender();
};

/**
 * @function setZoomLevel
 * @param [level]
 */
BC.prototype.setZoomLevel = function (level) {
	this.config.zoomLevel = level;
	this.bf.rerender();
};

/**
 * @function getData
 * @description Line chart'ın verisini getirir.
 * @param [data]
 * @param [notrender]
 */
BC.prototype.getData = function (data, notrender) {
	return this.data;
};

BC.prototype.setCenterText = function (text, notrender) {
	this.centerText = text;
	if(notrender) {
		return;
	}
	this.bf.rerender();
};

BC.prototype.render = function ($$container) {
	if(!window.d3LibLoaded) {
		return;
	}
	var bc = this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config, data = bc.data;
	var durationTime = 1000;
	var $$div = $$.create("DIV", {id: config.id}, "csc-line-chart", null, $$container);

	var sliderTopMargin, leftMargin, sliderWidth, sliderPosition;

	var $$titlediv = $$.create("DIV", null, "chart-title-div");
	$$titlediv.innerHTML = config.title || "";

	if(!data) {
		if(config.noDataMessage) {
			var $noDataDiv = $$.create("DIV", null, "chart-no-data", null, $$div);
			$noDataDiv.innerHTML = config.noDataMessage || "";
		}
		return;
	}

	config.style = config.style || {};

	var dataConcat = [];
	for(var i in data) {
		dataConcat = dataConcat.concat(data[i].values);
		if(!data[i].id) {//id verilmemişse ekle
			data[i].id = getid();
		}
	}

	var formatTime = d3.time.format("%d/%m/%Y");
	var tooltipDiv = d3.select("body").append("div").attr("class", "csc-line-chart-tooltip").style("opacity", 20);

	var ymin = d3.min(dataConcat, function (v) {
		return parseFloat(v.value);
	});
	var ymax = d3.max(dataConcat, function (v) {
		return parseFloat(v.value);
	});

	if(bc.yAxisLabelObj) {
		for(var i in bc.yAxisLabelObj) {
			ymin = d3.min([ymin, parseFloat(i)]);
			ymax = d3.max([ymax, parseFloat(i)]);
		}
	}

	var margin = {top: 10, right: 0, bottom: 55, left: 50};
	margin.left = ymax > 1000000 ? 80 : ((ymax > 100000) ? 60 : margin.left);

	margin.left = parseInt(config.style.yAxisWidth) || margin.left;
	margin.bottom = parseInt(config.style.xAxisHeight) || margin.bottom;

	margin = getPaddingMarginObjFromStr(config.style.padding, margin);
	var width = config.style.width || $$.innerWidth($$container) || 400;
	var height = config.style.height || $$.innerHeight($$container) || 200;

	$$div.style.width = width + "px";

	var legendWidth = 155;
	if(config.style.legendWidth) {
		legendWidth = parseInt(config.style.legendWidth.split("px")[0]);
	}

	width = width - 5;
	if(config.showLegend) {
		if(config.legendPosition !== "bottom") {
			width = width - legendWidth;
		} else {
			if(height < 305) {
				height = 305;
			}
			height -= config.style.legendHeight || 155;
		}
	}
	width = width - margin.left - margin.right;
	height = height - margin.top - margin.bottom;

	var xdomain = null;
	xdomain = d3.extent(dataConcat, function (d) {
		return d.date || d.x;
	});


	var x = this.config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? d3.time.scale() : d3.scale.linear();
	var nxExtent = this.config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? [d3.time.day.offset(xdomain[0], -1), d3.time.day.offset(xdomain[1], 1)] : [xdomain[0], xdomain[1]];
	if(dataConcat[0] && dataConcat[0].date) {
		x.domain(nxExtent).range([10, width - 60]);
	}
	else {
		x.domain(nxExtent).range([0, width - 60]);
	}

	var y = d3.scale.linear().range([height, 0]);
	var ydomain = [
		ymin,
		ymax
	];
	y.domain(ydomain);


	var line = d3.svg.line().interpolate("linear").x(function (d) {
		return x(d.date || d.x);
	}).y(function (d) {
		return y(d.value);
	});

	var area = d3.svg.area().interpolate("linear").x(function (d) {
		return x(d.date || d.x);
	}).y0(y(0)).y1(function (d) {
		return y(d.value);
	});

	var zoomScaleExtent = config.zoomScaleExtent || [0.1, 5];
	var zoomFunc = d3.behavior.zoom().x(x).y(y).scaleExtent(zoomScaleExtent).on("zoom", zoomed).scale(config.zoomLevel || 1);
	var fakeZoomFunc = function () {
	};
	zoom = fakeZoomFunc;
	if(window.lastFocusedLineChartId === this.config.id) {//sadece sob focus olduğu line chart ise zoom yap
		zoom = zoomFunc;
	}

	var $$lineChartTable = $$.create("DIV", null, "lineChartTable");

	var $$lineChartTableTd1Outer = $$.create("DIV", null, "csc-line-chart-svg-container-outer");
	var $$lineChartTableTd2Outer = $$.create("DIV", null, "csc-line-chart-svg-container-outer");
	var $$lineChartTableTd1 = $$.create("DIV", null, "csc-line-chart-svg-container");
	var $$lineChartTableTd2 = $$.create("DIV", null, "csc-line-chart-legend-container");

	var containerHeight = height + margin.top + margin.bottom + ( config.showRangeSlider ? 140 : 0);
	$$lineChartTableTd1.style.height = containerHeight + "px";
	$$lineChartTableTd2.style.height = containerHeight + "px";
	$$lineChartTableTd2.style.width = legendWidth + "px";

	$$lineChartTable.appendChild($$lineChartTableTd1Outer);
	if(config.showLegend) {
		$$lineChartTable.appendChild($$lineChartTableTd2Outer);
	}
	$$lineChartTableTd1Outer.appendChild(config.legendPosition === "left" ? $$lineChartTableTd2 : $$lineChartTableTd1);
	$$lineChartTableTd2Outer.appendChild(config.legendPosition === "left" ? $$lineChartTableTd1 : $$lineChartTableTd2);

	$$div.appendChild($$lineChartTable);
	$$div.setAttribute("tabindex", "0");

	if(config.legendPosition == "bottom") {
		$$lineChartTableTd1Outer.style.display = "block";
		$$lineChartTableTd2Outer.style.display = "block";
	} else {
		$$lineChartTableTd1Outer.style.display = "inline-block";
		$$lineChartTableTd2Outer.style.display = "inline-block";
	}

	var svg = d3.select($$lineChartTableTd1).append("svg:svg").attr('width', width + margin.left + margin.right).attr('height', containerHeight);
	var containerG = svg.append("svg:g").attr("transform", "translate(" + margin.left + "," + margin.top + ")").attr("class", "main-chart");

	var grid = containerG.append("svg:rect").attr("width", width).attr("height", height).attr("class", "plot").call(zoom);

	$$div.onfocus = function () {
		window.lastFocusedLineChartId = config.id;
		grid.call(zoomFunc);
	};

	//TODO: make_x_axis ve make_y_axis metodlarına çağırıldıkları yerde mudahele ediliyor. Örn make_x_axis().ticks(10) gibi. böyle olmamalı. bunu yerine yapılacak işler make_x_axis metodu içinde tek yerden yapılmalı.
	var make_x_axis = function () {
		return d3.svg.axis().scale(x).orient("bottom").ticks(6);
	};
	var make_y_axis = function () {
		return d3.svg.axis().scale(y).orient("left").ticks(10);
	};

	var xAxis = d3.svg.axis().scale(x).orient("bottom").ticks(5);

	var createXAxisWithLabel = null;
	if(bc.xAxisLabelObj) {
		createXAxisWithLabel = function () {
			var obj = bc.xAxisLabelObj;
			var xDomain = x.domain();
			var newTickValueObj = {};
			for(var i in obj) {
				newTickValueObj[i] = obj[i];
			}

			xAxis.tickValues(Object.keys(newTickValueObj))
				.tickFormat(function (d) {
					return newTickValueObj[d];
				});

			make_x_axis = function () {
				return d3.svg.axis().scale(x).orient("bottom").tickValues(Object.keys(newTickValueObj))
					.tickFormat(function (d) {
						return newTickValueObj[d];
					});
			};
		};
		createXAxisWithLabel();
