	} else if(config.xAxisAsTime !== false && config.timeAxisAsMonthsValues) {
		newTickValueObj = d3.time.months(x.domain()[0], x.domain()[1]);
		var xDomain = x.domain();

		xAxis.tickValues(newTickValueObj)
			.tickFormat(function(d)
			{
				return d3.time.format("%B")(d);
			});
	}else if(!config.timeAxisAsMonthsValues){
		newTickValueObj = d3.time.years(x.domain()[0], x.domain()[1]);
		var xDomain = x.domain();

		xAxis.tickValues(newTickValueObj)
			.tickFormat(function(d)
			{
				return d3.time.format("%Y")(d);
			})
	}


	containerG.append("svg:g")
		.attr("class", "x axis")
		.attr("transform", "translate(0, " + height + ")")
		.call(xAxis)
		.selectAll("text")
		.style("font-size", "11px")
		.style("text-anchor", "end")
		.attr("dx", "-.8em")
		.attr("dy", ".15em")
		.attr("transform", function (d) {
			return "rotate(-65)";
		});

	var yAxis = d3.svg.axis().scale(y).orient("left").ticks(5);

	var createYAxisWithLabel = null;
	if(bc.yAxisLabelObj) {
		createYAxisWithLabel = function () {
			var obj = bc.yAxisLabelObj;
			var yDomain = y.domain();
			var newTickValueObj = {};
			for(var i in obj) {
				if(yDomain[0] < i && i < yDomain[1]) {
					newTickValueObj[i] = obj[i];
				}
			}
			yAxis.tickValues(Object.keys(newTickValueObj)).tickFormat(function (d) {
				return newTickValueObj[d];
			});

			make_y_axis = function () {
				return d3.svg.axis().scale(y).orient("left").tickValues(Object.keys(newTickValueObj)).tickFormat(function (d) {
					return newTickValueObj[d];
				});
			};
		};
		createYAxisWithLabel();
	}
	if(config.showYAxis !== false) {
		containerG.append("g").attr("class", "y axis").call(yAxis).style("font-size", "11px");
	}

	containerG.append("g").attr("class", "x grid").attr("transform", "translate(0," + height + ")").call(make_x_axis().tickSize(-height, 0, 0).tickFormat(""))
		.append("text").attr("transform", "translate(" + width + ", -20)").attr("y", 6).attr("dy", ".71em").style("text-anchor", "end").text(config.xAxisLabel || "");

	if(config.showYAxis !== false) {
		containerG.append("g").attr("class", "y grid").call(make_y_axis().tickSize(-width, 0, 0).tickPadding(6).tickFormat(""))
			.append("text").attr("transform", "rotate(-90)").attr("y", 6).attr("dy", ".71em").style("text-anchor", "end").text(config.yAxisLabel || "");
	}

	var gradient = containerG.append("defs").append("linearGradient").attr("id", config.id + "gradient").attr("x1", "0%").attr("x2", "0%").attr("y2", "100%");

	gradient.append("stop").attr("offset", "0%").transition().attr("stop-color", "#fff").attr("stop-opacity", .5);

	gradient.append("stop").attr("offset", "100%").transition().attr("stop-color", "#999").attr("stop-opacity", 1);

	var clip = containerG.append("clipPath").attr("id", config.id + "clip").append("rect").attr("x", 0).attr("y", 0).attr("width", width).attr("height", height);

	var chartBody = containerG.append("g").attr("clip-path", "url(#" + config.id + "clip)");

	var colorArr = ["#8ca252", "#e7ba52", "#d6616b", "#9c9ede", "#a55194", "#bd9e39", "#843c39", "#ad494a", "#6b6ecf", "#637939", "#b5cf6b", "#393b79", "#5254a3", "#cedb9c", "#8c6d31", "#e7cb94", "#e7969c", "#7b4173", "#ce6dbd", "#de9ed6"];
	var colorSet = d3.scale.category10();
	colorSet.range(colorArr);
	var defaultDotSize = 2.3;
	var defaultDotColor = "#1589FF";
	var serieLegend = [];
    var defaultWidth = "1.5px"; //erce
	var dataMap = {};
	for(var i in data) {
		var serie = data[i];
		dataMap[serie.id] = serie;
		if(config.showLines !== false) {
			var chartData = chartBody.append("path").datum(serie.values);
			var color = serie.color || colorSet(serie.label || getid());
			var dotColor = serie.dotColor || defaultDotColor;
			var dotSize = serie.dotSize || defaultDotSize;
			//var width = (serie.style && serie.style.width) ? serie.style.width : defaultWidth; //erce
            var widthOnMouseOver = (config.style && config.style.lineWidth) ? config.style.lineWidth : defaultWidth; //erce
            //width += width.search("px") == -1 ? "px" : ""; //erce
            //widthOnMouseOver += widthOnMouseOver.search("px") == -1 ? "px" : ""; //erce

			if(dotColor.charAt(0) !== '#') {
				dotColor = '#' + dotColor;
			}
			chartData.attr("class", "line").attr("rel", serie.id).style("stroke", color)
				.attr("d", line);
			var totalLength = chartData.node().getTotalLength();

			chartData
				.attr("stroke-dasharray", totalLength + " " + totalLength)
				.attr("stroke-dashoffset", totalLength)
				.transition()
				.duration(durationTime)
				.ease("linear")
				.attr("stroke-dashoffset", 0)
				.attr("serie-id", serie.id);
				//.style("stroke-width", width); //erce

//			this.chartData = [];
//            this.chartData.push(chartData); //erce
            if(config.style.lineBold){
                chartData.on("mouseover", function(event){
                    this.style.strokeWidth = widthOnMouseOver;
                    bc.bf.fire("onmouseover", this.getAttribute("serie-id"));
                    // var style = this.getAttribute("style");
                    // this.setAttribute("style", style+ "stroke-width: 5px;");

                });//erce

                chartData.on("mouseout", function(){
                    this.style.strokeWidth = defaultWidth;
                });
            }
		}

		serieLegend.push({label: serie.label,tips:serie.tips, color: color, id: serie.id, visible: serie.visible === false ? false : true});


		if(config.showLegendInChart) {
			var lastItem = serie.values[serie.values.length - 1];
			var lastItemY = y(lastItem.value);
			var lastItemX = x(lastItem.date);
			var text = chartBody.append("text")
				.attr("rel", serie.id)
				.attr("transform", function (d) {
					return "translate(" + (lastItemX - 50) + "," + (lastItemY - 20) + ")";
				})
				.attr("x", 3)
				//.attr("dy", ".35em")
				.attr("width", "30px")
				.style("stroke", color)
				.text(function (d) {
					return serie.label;
				});
			text.attr("transform", function (d) {
				var w = this.getBBox().width;
				return "translate(" + (lastItemX - w) + "," + (lastItemY - 10) + ")";
			});
		}

		(function (serie) {
			var dots = chartBody.selectAll("dot").data(serie.values);
			dots.enter().append("circle").attr("rel", serie.id).attr("r", dotSize).style("fill", dotColor).attr("cx", function (d) {
				return x(d.date || d.x);
			}).attr("cy", function (d) {
				return y(d.value);
			}).on("mouseover", function (d) {
					if(!config.secretPointValues) {
                        function findSetMouseOverFunc(obj) {
                            debugger;
                            if(obj.setMouseOver) {
                                return obj;
                            }
                            if(obj.$CS$.parent) {
                                return findSetMouseOverFunc(obj.$CS$.parent);
                            }
                        }

                        var setMouseOverFuncObj = findSetMouseOverFunc(bc.bf);
                        if(setMouseOverFuncObj && setMouseOverFuncObj.setMouseOver()) {
                            var resp = setMouseOverFuncObj.setMouseOver();
                            if(resp == "%m/%y" || resp == "%m/%Y" || resp == "m/y" || resp == "m/Y") {
                                formatTime = d3.time.format("%m/%Y");
                            }
                        }

					    if(d.label) {//erce
					        var tooltipText = d.label + "<br/>" + (config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? formatTime(new Date(d.date)) : d.date || d.x ) + "<br/>"; //erce
					    }//erce
					    else {//erce
						    var tooltipText = serie.label + "<br/>" + (config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? formatTime(new Date(d.date)) : d.date || d.x ) + "<br/>";
                        }//erce
						if(config.showPointValueAccToLabelRange) {
							function getLabelValue(d) {
								var map = bc.labelValueMap;
								var label = "";
								for(var i in map) {
									var range = map[i];
									if(d >= range[0] && d <= range[1]) {
										label = i;
									}
								}
								return label;
							}
							tooltipText += getLabelValue(d.value);
						} else {
							tooltipText += SIDEUtil.formatMoney(d.value, config.pointValueDecimalDigitCount || 0, '.', ',');
						}

						if (config.showToolTip){
							tooltipDiv.transition().duration(200).style("opacity", .9).style("display", "block");
							tooltipDiv.html(tooltipText).style("left", (d3.event.pageX) + "px").style("top", (d3.event.pageY - 28) + "px");
						}
                        if(d.tooltipBackground) {
                            tooltipDiv.style("background", d.tooltipBackground);
                        }
                        else if(serie.color) {
                            tooltipDiv.style("background", serie.color);
                        }

                        if (config.showToolTip){
							tooltipDiv.transition().duration(200).style("opacity", .9).style("display", "block");
							tooltipDiv.html(tooltipText).style("left", (d3.event.pageX) + 10 + "px").style("top", (d3.event.pageY - 28) + "px");
						}
					}
				})
				.on("mouseout", function (d) {
					tooltipDiv.transition().duration(500).style("opacity", 0).style("display", "none");
					tooltipDiv.style("background", "skyblue");
				}).on("mousedown", function (d) {
					bf.fire("pointSelected", serie.id, d.date || d.x, d.value);
					tooltipDiv.transition().duration(500).style("opacity", 0).style("display", "none");
					tooltipDiv.style("background", "skyblue");
			});

			if(config.showPointValues && !config.secretPointValues) {
				var texts = chartBody.selectAll("texts").data(serie.values);
				texts.enter().append("text").attr("rel", serie.id).attr("x", function (d) {
					return x(d.date || d.x) + 3;
				}).attr("y", function (d) {
					return y(d.value) - 3;
				}).attr("transform", function (d) {
					return "rotate(-65, " + (x(d.date || d.x) + 3) + "," + (y(d.value) - 3) + ")";
				}).text(function (d) {
					if(config.dontShowZeroValues && (!d.value || !parseInt(d.value,10))){
						return "";
					}
					return SIDEUtil.formatMoney(d.value, config.pointValueDecimalDigitCount || 0, '.', ',');
				});

			}
		})(serie);
	}

	//for slider part-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	bc.selectedRangeFunc = null;
	if(config.showRangeSlider && bc.rangeArr) {
		sliderPosition = config.sliderPosition || "center";
		sliderWidth = (config.sliderWidth || width) + "";
		if(sliderWidth.indexOf("%") === 0) {
			sliderWidth = sliderWidth.substring(1, sliderWidth.length);
			sliderWidth = width * sliderWidth / 100;
		} else if(sliderWidth.indexOf("%") === sliderWidth.length - 1) {
			sliderWidth = sliderWidth.substring(0, sliderWidth.length - 1);
			sliderWidth = width * sliderWidth / 100;
		}

		var sliderHeight = config.sliderHeight || 30;
		sliderTopMargin = height + (parseInt(config.sliderTopMargin || 70));
		leftMargin = 0;

		if(sliderPosition === "center") {
			leftMargin = (width - sliderWidth) / 2 + margin.left;
		} else if(sliderPosition === "right") {
			leftMargin = width + margin.left - sliderWidth;
		} else {
			leftMargin = margin.left;
		}

		var margin2 = {top: sliderTopMargin, right: 0, bottom: 50, left: leftMargin};
		var height2 = sliderHeight;

		if(config.showRangeDate) {
			sliderWidth -= 30;
		}

		var x2 = config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? d3.time.scale().domain(bc.rangeArr).range([0, sliderWidth]) : d3.scale.linear().domain(bc.rangeArr).range([0, sliderWidth]);
		var xAxis2 = d3.svg.axis().scale(x2).orient("bottom");
		xAxis2.tickFormat(function(d)
		{
			return d3.time.format("%Y")(d); //barist: slider'in altinda hep 03 AM yaziyordu. Yil yazmasi icin bu sekilde duzenlendi
		});
		var brush = d3.svg.brush().x(x2);

		function brushend() {
			bc.selectedRangeArr = config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? [brush.extent()[0].getTime(), brush.extent()[1].getTime()] : [brush.extent()[0], brush.extent()[1]];
			bf.fire("rangeSelected", bc.selectedRangeArr);
		}

		brush.on("brushend", brushend);

		var context = svg.append("g").attr("transform", "translate(" + margin2.left + "," + margin2.top + ")").attr("class", "slide-chart");

		svg.append("defs").append("clipPath").attr("id", "clip").append("rect").attr("height", height);

		context.append("g").attr("class", "x axis").attr("transform", "translate(0," + height2 + ")").call(xAxis2).selectAll("text").style("text-anchor", "end").attr("dx", "-.8em").attr("dy", ".15em").attr("transform", function (d) {
			return "rotate(-65)";
		});

		var contextArea = d3.svg.area().interpolate("monotone").x(function (d) {
			return x2(d);
		}).y0(height2).y1(0);

		context.append("path").attr("class", "area").attr("d", contextArea(bc.rangeArr)).attr("fill", "LightYellow ");

		context.append("g").attr("class", "x brush").call(brush).selectAll("rect").attr("height", height2).attr("fill", "SkyBlue");


		if(config.xAxisAsTime !== false && config.showRangeDate) {
			var xx = sliderWidth + 5;
			var dateImg = context.append("svg:image")
				.attr('x', xx)
				.attr('width', "25px")
				.attr('height', height2)
				.attr("xlink:href", "css/bc-style/img/tarih.png")

			dateImg.on("click", function () {
				bc.openRangeDialog(bc);
			});
		}


		bc.selectedRangeFunc = function (rangeArr) {
			if(rangeArr) {
				bc.selectedRangeArr = rangeArr;
			}
			if(!bc.selectedRangeArr) {
				return;
			}

			var domainArr = x2.domain();

			var startDomain = config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? domainArr[0].getTime() : domainArr[0];
			var endDomain = config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? domainArr[1].getTime() : domainArr[1];
			var start = startDomain > bc.selectedRangeArr[0] ? startDomain : bc.selectedRangeArr[0];
			var end = endDomain < bc.selectedRangeArr[1] ? endDomain : bc.selectedRangeArr[1];

			//seçili alanı ayarla
			brush.extent(config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? [new Date(start), new Date(end)] : [start, end]);
			//tekrar çiz
			svg.select(".brush").call(brush);
		};
		bc.selectedRangeFunc();
	}
	//end slider part-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------


	if(config.showLegend) {

		var $$legendTable = $$.create("TABLE", null, "legendTable", {"max-width": legendWidth + "px",width: legendWidth + "px"});
		var $$checkAll = $$.create("INPUT", {type: "checkbox", id: config.id + "-checkAll", rel: "all"});
		$$checkAll.checked = true;
		$$checkAll.onchange = function () {
			bc.checkAllEventStarted = true;
			var checked = this.checked;
			var querystr = ".legendTable input:" + (checked ? "not(:checked)" : "checked");
			var serieIdArr = [];
			$(querystr, $$div).each(function () {
				this.checked = checked;
				this.onchange();
				serieIdArr.push(this.getAttribute("rel"));
			});
			bc.checkAllEventStarted = false;
			bf.fire("serieToggleAll", serieIdArr, checked);
		};

		var $$checkAllTr = $$.createWithHtml("TR", "<td colspan='2'>"+SideMLManager.get("common.selectAll")+"</td>", $$legendTable);
		var $$td = $$.createWithHtml("TD", "" , $$checkAllTr);
		$$td.appendChild($$checkAll);
		$$.insertFirst($$td, $$checkAllTr);
		if(config.legendPosition === "bottom") {
			var legendTrMap = {};
			var legendColWidth = config.style.legendColWidth || 140;
			var legendColNumber = config.style.legendColNumber || 3;

			legendTrMap[0] = $$checkAllTr;
			$$.css($$legendTable,{width: "90%", "max-width": "inherit", "margin-left": "10%"});
		}

		for(var i = 0; i < serieLegend.length; i++) {
			var d = serieLegend[i];
			var $$labelTd = $$.createWithHtml("TD", d.label);
			if(d.tips){
                $$.attr($$labelTd, "title", d.tips);
            }
			var $$colorTd = $$.create("TD");
			var $$colorDiv = $$.create("DIV", null, "colorDiv", {"background-color": d.color}, $$colorTd);
            var $$checkTd = $$.create("TD");
			var $$checkbox = $$.create("INPUT", {type: "checkbox", rel: d.id}, null, {"vertical-align": "middle"}, $$checkTd);
			$$checkbox.checked = true;

			var $$tr = null;
			if(config.legendPosition !== "bottom") {
				$$tr = $$.createWithHtml("TR","",$$legendTable);
			} else {
				var mod = Math.floor((i + 1) / legendColNumber);//i+1 tümünü seç için
				$$tr = legendTrMap[mod];
				if(!$$tr) {
					$$tr = legendTrMap[mod] = $$.createWithHtml("TR","",$$legendTable);
				}
				$$labelTd.style.width = legendColWidth;
			}
			$$tr.appendChild($$checkTd);
			$$tr.appendChild($$colorTd);
			$$tr.appendChild($$labelTd);


			(function (d) {
				$$checkbox.onchange = function () {
					legendCheckboxChanged(d, $(this).is(":checked"));
				};
			})(d);

			//gösterilmeyecek serileri sakla.
			if(d.visible === false) {
				legendCheckboxChanged(d, false, false);
				$$checkbox.checked = false;
				$$checkAll.checked = false;
			}
		}
		$$lineChartTableTd2.appendChild($$legendTable);

		function legendCheckboxChanged(serieObj, showSerie, fireEvent) {
			var serieid = serieObj.id;
			dataMap[serieObj.id].visible = showSerie;

			$("path[rel=" + serieid + "], circle[rel=" + serieid + "], text[rel=" + serieid + "]", $$div).each(function () {
				if(showSerie) {
					$(this).show();
				} else {
					$(this).hide();
				}
			});

			//en az biri seçili değilse bile checkall false
			if(!showSerie) {
				$("#" + config.id + "-checkAll").prop("checked", false);
			} else {
				if($(".legendTable input:checked", $$div).length == serieLegend.length) {
					$("#" + config.id + "-checkAll").prop("checked", true);
				}
			}


			if((fireEvent === undefined || fireEvent === true) && bc.checkAllEventStarted !== true) {
				var visibleSerieArr = [];
				$(".legendTable input[type=checkbox]:checked", $$div).each(function () {
					var id = this.getAttribute("rel");
					visibleSerieArr.push(id);
				});
				//trigger event
				bf.fire("serieToggle", serieid, showSerie, visibleSerieArr);
			}
		}
	}
	$$div.appendChild($$.create("DIV", null, null, {"clear": "both", "float": "none"}));

	function zoomstart(e) {
		return false;
	}

	function zoomed() {
		if(config.zoomEnabled === false) {
			console.log("zoom prevented");
			return;
		}
		if(config.xAxisAsTime !== false && config.timeAxisAsMonthsValues) {
			xAxis.ticks(d3.time.months(x.domain()[0], x.domain()[1]).length || 2);
		}
		svg.select(".x.axis").call(xAxis).selectAll("text").style("text-anchor", "end").attr("dx", "-.8em").attr("dy", ".15em").attr("transform", function (d) {
			return "rotate(-65)";
		});
		svg.select(".y.axis").call(yAxis);
		svg.select(".x.grid").call(make_x_axis().tickSize(-height, 0, 0).tickFormat(""));
		svg.select(".y.grid").call(make_y_axis().tickSize(-width, 0, 0).tickPadding(6).tickFormat(""));
		var charData = svg.selectAll(".line").attr("class", "line").attr("d", line);

		//path leri tekrar animasyon ile çiz.
		svg.selectAll("path.line").each(function (path) {
			var path = d3.select(this);
			var totalLength = path.node().getTotalLength();
			path
				.attr("stroke-dasharray", totalLength + " " + totalLength)
				.attr("stroke-dashoffset", totalLength)
				.transition()
				.duration(durationTime)
				.ease("linear")
				.attr("stroke-dashoffset", 0);
		});

		var circle = svg.selectAll("circle");
		circle.attr("transform", "translate(" + d3.event.translate + ")scale(" + d3.event.scale + ")");
		circle.select(".x.axis").style("stroke-width", 1.5 / d3.event.scale + "px");
		circle.select(".y.axis").style("stroke-width", .5 / d3.event.scale + "px");
		circle.attr("r", function () {
			return dotSize / d3.event.scale + "px";
		});
		circle.style("fill", dotColor);

		if(config.showPointValues && !config.secretPointValues) {
			chartBody.selectAll("text")
				.attr("transform", function (d) {
					var trans = this.transform.baseVal[0].matrix;
					var etrans = d3.event.translate;

					var xAtt = this.getAttribute("x");
					var yAtt = this.getAttribute("y");
					xAtt *= d3.event.scale;
					yAtt *= d3.event.scale;

					return "translate(" + d3.event.translate + ") rotate(-65, " + xAtt + "," + yAtt + ") scale(" + d3.event.scale + ") "
				});
		}

		//y ekseni label ile verilmişse y eksenindeki değerleri sınırla
		if(bc.yAxisLabelObj) {
			createYAxisWithLabel();
		}

		//x ekseni label ile verilmişse x eksenindeki değerleri sınırla
		if(bc.xAxisLabelObj) {
			createXAxisWithLabel();
		}

		//zoom yapıldığında x eksenine ait min max değerleri fırlat.
		var xmin = config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? x.domain()[0].getTime() : x.domain()[0];
		var xmax = config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? x.domain()[1].getTime() : x.domain()[1];
		//console.log(xmin, xmax);
		if(xmin != xmax) {
			var xAxisTimeTickArr = [];
			svg.selectAll(".main-chart .x.axis .tick").each(function (d) {
				xAxisTimeTickArr.push(config.xAxisAsTime !== false ? d.getTime() : d);
			});
			//console.log(xAxisTimeTickArr);
			bf.fire("onzoom", xmin, xmax, xAxisTimeTickArr, ((d3.event.sourceEvent.wheelDelta) > 0 ? true : false));

			if(config.showRangeSlider && bc.rangeArr) {
				bc.selectedRangeFunc([xmin, xmax]);
			}
		}
	}

	//prepend edilme nedeni: title eklendiğinde container.height() 15 geliyor chart çizmiyor.
	$$.insertFirst($$.create("DIV", null, null, {"clear": "both", "float": "none"}), $$div);
	$$.insertFirst($$titlediv, $$div);
};

BC.prototype.openRangeDialog = function (bc) {
	var config = bc.config;
	//start range date part-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
	if(config.showRangeDate && bc.rangeArr) {
		var $tarihCont = $("<div>").addClass("chart-show-range-date");
		var $basTarih = $("<input>").attr("readonly", true).attr("type", "text").attr("id", "bastarih").attr("name", "bastarih");
		var $bitTarih = $("<input>").attr("readonly", true).attr("type", "text").attr("id", "bittarih").attr("name", "bittarih");
		bc.$bastarih = $basTarih;
		bc.$bittarih = $bitTarih;


		var $basTarihCont = $("<div>");
		var $bitTarihCont = $("<div>");
		$basTarihCont.append($("<div>").html("Başlangıç:"));
		$basTarihCont.append($basTarih);
		$bitTarihCont.append($("<div>").html("Bitiş:"));
		$bitTarihCont.append($bitTarih);
		$tarihCont.append($basTarihCont);
		$tarihCont.append($bitTarihCont);


		$basTarih.datetimepicker({
//				showOn : "button",
			buttonImage: "css/bc-style/img/tarih.png",
			buttonImageOnly: true,
			onSelect: function (date) {
			},
			onClose: function (date) {
				$basTarih.val(date);
				$basTarih.blur();
				dateSelected();
			}
		});

		$bitTarih.datetimepicker({
//				showOn : "button",
			buttonImage: "css/bc-style/img/tarih.png",
			buttonImageOnly: true,
			onSelect: function (date) {
			},
			onClose: function (date) {
				$bitTarih.val(date);
				$bitTarih.blur();
				dateSelected();
			}
		});

		function dateSelected() {
			var bastar = $basTarih.datetimepicker('getDate');
			var bittar = $bitTarih.datetimepicker('getDate');

//				console.log(bastar);
//				console.log(bittar);
//				
			if(bastar && bittar && bc.selectedRangeFunc) {
				bc.selectedRangeFunc([bastar, bittar]);
				bc.bf.fire("rangeSelected", [bastar.getTime(), bittar.getTime()]);
			}
		}

		bc.selectedRangeDateFunc = function (rangeArr) {
			if(!rangeArr) {
				return;
			}
//				console.log("set date range", rangeArr);
			$basTarih.datetimepicker('setDate', new Date(rangeArr[0]));
			$bitTarih.datetimepicker('setDate', new Date(rangeArr[1]));
		};

		bc.selectedRangeDateFunc(bc.selectedRangeArr);

		$basTarih.datetimepicker("option", "minDate", new Date(bc.rangeArr[0]));
		$basTarih.datetimepicker("option", "maxDate", new Date(bc.rangeArr[1]));
		$bitTarih.datetimepicker("option", "minDate", new Date(bc.rangeArr[0]));
		$bitTarih.datetimepicker("option", "maxDate", new Date(bc.rangeArr[1]));


		var closeCallback = function () {
			$$.remove($tarihCont[0]);
		};
		var openCallback = function () {
//				$basTarih.datetimepicker( "show" );
//				$bitTarih.datetimepicker( "show" );
		};
		var popup = new CSSimplePopup($tarihCont[0], {
			showTitleBar: false,
			contextMenu: true,
			closeCallback: closeCallback,
			openCallback: openCallback
		});
		if(sliderPosition === "left") {
			popup.config.leftPos = d3.event.clientX;
		} else if(sliderPosition === "center") {
			popup.config.leftPos = d3.event.clientX - 110;
		} else {
			popup.config.leftPos = d3.event.clientX - 220;
		}
		popup.config.topPos = d3.event.clientY - 110;
		popup.open();
	}
	//end range date part-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
};


BC.prototype.load = function () {
	if(this.onloadcallback) {
		this.onloadcallback();
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function (eventName, callback) {
	if(eventName == "selected") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if(typeof dom != "undefined" && dom != null) {
			dom.onclick = callback;
		}
	} else if(eventName == "onload") {
		this.onloadcallback = callback;
	}
	else if(eventName == "onmouseover") {
		this.mouseOverBinded=true; //erce
	}
};

})(window);
/////=csc-number.js=/////
(function(window, undefined) {
/**
 * @class CSC-NUMBER
 */
function Definition() {
	this.DEFAULTS = {
		allowZero : false,
		roEmptyValue : "-----",
		defvalue : 0,
		focusable: true,
		disabledKey: "disabled", 
		allowNegative : true
	};

	this.BaseBF = "BASIC";
	this.LABEL = "Number";

	this.METHODS = ["focus", "setDefaultValue(value)", "setEmptyValue(value)"];
	this.EVENTS = [ "changed(event)", "selected(event)", "blur(event)" ];

	this.DEPENDENCIES = [ {
		name : "JQuery",
		version : "2.0.3"
	}, {
		name : "JQuery-Currency-Autonumeric",
		version : "1.9.7"
	} ];

	this.Type = function() {};
}

var def = new Definition();
def.Type.prototype = new BaseBC();
BCEngine.registerType("CSC-NUMBER", def);

var BC = def.Type;

/**
 * @function setDefaultValue
 * @description Number bileşene bir değer verilmediği durumda bileşenin varsayılan değeri belirler.
 * @param [value] alana verilen varsayılan değer
 */
BC.prototype.setDefaultValue = function(value) {
	this.config.defvalue = value;
};

BC.prototype.getSortType = function() {
	return "number";
};

/**
 * @function setEmptyValue
 * @description Sets the empty value. If a number component has an empty value then display value of component is an empty string "".
 * When component doesnt has a value getValue method returns empty value.
 * To use empty value properly defaultValue must be undefined, otherwise empty value will be omitted.
 * @param [value] empty value
 */
BC.prototype.setEmptyValue = function(value) {
	this.config.emptyValue = value;
};

BC.prototype.focus = function(){
	/**
	 * @function focus
     * @description Odağı multi combo'ya getirir.
     */
	$$txt = $$.byid(this.config.id);
	if($$txt){
		$$txt.focus();
	}
};

BC.prototype.init = function() {
	if(typeof this.config.min == "string"){
		this.config.min = parseInt(this.config.min, 10);
	}
	if(typeof this.config.max == "string"){
		this.config.max = parseInt(this.config.max, 10);
	}
	
	if (inDesigner(this.bf)) {
		var t = this.config.thousandSeperator || "";
		var d = this.config.decimalSeperator || ".";
		if( (d || t) && (d == t) ){
			CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox("Thousand Sep. and Decimal Sep. cannot equal!", {error: true});
			this.config.thousandSeperator = "";
			this.config.decimalSeperator = ".";
			this.reRender();
		}
	}
};

BC.prototype.getValue = function() {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	var $el = $("#" + config.id);
	var readonly = bc.isParentReadonly() || bf.isReadonly();
	if ($el.length && !readonly) {
		config.value = $el.autoNumeric('get');
	}
	var value = config.value;
	if(config.emptyValue !== undefined && (value === null || value === undefined || value === "" || isNaN(value) )){
		return config.emptyValue;
	}
	if (config.defvalue !== undefined && (value === null || value === undefined || value === "" || isNaN(value) )) {
		return config.defvalue;
	}
	
	if (value === null) {
		return value;
	}
	return parseFloat(value);
};

BC.prototype.setValue = function(value) {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	if(value && typeof value == "number"){
		value = new BigDecimal(""+value);
		value.form = 0;
		value = value.toString();
	}
	if(config.emptyValue !== undefined && config.emptyValue === value){
		value = "";
	}
	config.value = value;
	$el = $("#" + config.id);

	var readonly = bf.isReadonly();
	if (readonly) {
		if (config.value !== undefined && config.value !== null) {
			$el.autoNumeric('set', config.value);
		} else {
			$el.html(config.roEmptyValue || "");
		}
	} else {
		if (config.value !== undefined && config.value !== null) {
			$el.autoNumeric('set', config.value);
		} else {
			$el.autoNumeric('set', "");
		}
	}
	
	var activeChangedEvent = SideDefaults[SideModuleManager.getLocalModuleName()]["support-changed-event-on-setvalue"];
	if( activeChangedEvent || activeChangedEvent == "true" ){
		bf.fire("changed");
	}
};

BC.prototype.setDisabled = function(flag) {
	var bc=this, config=bc.config;
	config.value = bc.getValue();
	if(config.emptyValue !== undefined && config.value===config.emptyValue){
		config.value = "";
	}
	config.disabled = flag;
};

BC.prototype.saveState = function() {
	var bc=this, config=bc.config;
	var value = bc.getValue();
	if(value && typeof value == "number"){
		value = new BigDecimal(""+value);
		value.form = 0;
		value = value.toString();
	}
	if(config.emptyValue !== undefined && value===config.emptyValue){
		value = "";
	}
	config.value = value;
};

BC.prototype.isEmpty = function(omitDefaultValue) {
	var bc=this, config=bc.config;
	var value = bc.getValue();
	if(omitDefaultValue && value == 0){
		return true;
	}
	if(config.emptyValue !== undefined && value===config.emptyValue){
		return true;
	}
	if (config.allowZero) {
		return false;
	}
	return value == 0;
};

BC.prototype.destroybc = function(){
	$("#"+this.config.id).remove();
};

BC.prototype.render = function($container) {
	var bc=this, bf=bc.bf, config=bc.config;
	var readonly = bc.isParentReadonly() || bf.isReadonly();
	if (config.value === undefined && config.min !== undefined) {
		config.value = config.min;
	}
	var decSep = config.decimalSeperator;
	var thousandSep = config.thousandSeperator || "";
	
	if(config.autoDecimalLength == "false"){ 
		config.autoDecimalLength = false;
	}
	var decimalLen = config.decimalLength || 0;
	if (decimalLen < 0 || config.autoDecimalLength)
		decimalLen = 0;

	var max = 9999999999999;
	if (config.max !== undefined && !isNaN(config.max)) {
		max = config.max;
	}
	if (!config.allowNegative) {
		min = 0;
	}else{
		min = 0 - max;
	}
	if (!config.style) {
		config.style = {};
	}
	if (!config.style.textAlign) {
		config.style.textAlign = "right";
	}
	if (readonly) {
		var $span = $("<span>");
		$span.attr({
			id : config.id,
			title:config.tips
		});
		$span.css(config.style || {});
		$span.addClass("csc-rospan").addClass("csc-number").addClass(config.cssClass);
		if(!inDesigner(bf) && bc.clickBinded && !bf.isDisabled()){
			$span.addClass("csc-textbox-linked");
		}
		
		$span.attr({
			"data-a-sep" : thousandSep,
			"data-a-dec" : decSep,
			"data-m-dec" : decimalLen,
			"data-v-max" : max,
			"data-v-min" : min,
			"data-autoDecimalLength" : config.autoDecimalLength
		});
		if(config.maxDecLength && config.maxDecLength > 0){
			$span.attr("data-maxDecLength", config.maxDecLength);
		}
		$span.autoNumeric('init');
		
		if (config.value !== undefined && config.value !== null) {
			$span.autoNumeric('set', config.value);
		} else {
			$span.html(config.roEmptyValue || "");
		}
		if (inDesigner(bf)) {
			$span.css("display", "");
			$span.html(config.roEmptyValue || "Readonly").addClass("csc-readonly");
		}
		$container.appendChild($span[0]);
	} else {
		var $newTextBox = $("<input>");
		// Set ID, Type, Value And Disabled Attributes if exists

		$newTextBox.attr({
			id : config.id,
			type : "text",
			size : config.size,
			value : config.value,
			title:config.tips,
			tabindex: config.tabIndex,
			"data-a-sign" : "",
			"data-a-sep" : thousandSep,
			"data-a-dec" : decSep,
			"data-m-dec" : decimalLen,
			"data-v-max" : max,
			"data-v-min" : min,
			"data-w-empty" : "empty",
			"data-l-zero" : "deny",
			"data-autoDecimalLength" : config.autoDecimalLength
		});
		if(bf.isDisabled()){
			$newTextBox.attr(config.disabledKey,config.disabledKey);
		}
		
		if(config.maxDecLength && config.maxDecLength > 0){
			$newTextBox.attr("data-maxDecLength", config.maxDecLength);
		}

		try {
			$newTextBox.autoNumeric('init');
		} catch (ex) {
			$newTextBox.attr("value", min);
			$newTextBox.autoNumeric('init');
		}

		$newTextBox.addClass("csc-number").addClass(config.cssClass);

		checkAndSetCss($newTextBox, "display", config.visible ? "" : "none");
		$newTextBox.css(config.style || {});
		
		$newTextBox.blur(function(){
			var value = bc.getValue();
			if(value === undefined || value === null || value === ""){
				return;
			}
			if(bc.config.min !== undefined && parseInt(bc.config.min) > value){
				bc.setValue("");
			}
			if(bc.config.allowZero === false && value === 0){
				bc.setValue("");
			}
		});

		// Design Time da visible yap
		if (inDesigner(bf)) {
			$newTextBox.css("display", "");
		}
		if (config.cssClass) {
			$newTextBox.addClass(config.cssClass);
		}

		if (bf.isRequired()) {
			$newTextBox.addClass("csc-required");
		}
		
		$newTextBox.bind('change', function(event) {
			if(!bc.validate()){
				bc.bf.fire("changed", bc.getValue());
			}else{
				bc.setValue("");
			}
		});
		
		bc.applyInlineValidation($newTextBox[0]);
		$container.appendChild($newTextBox[0]);
	}

};
BC.prototype.validate = function() {
	var value = this.getValue(), label = this.bf.getConfig("label");
	if (this.config.max !== undefined && parseFloat(this.config.max) < value) {
		return SideMLManager.get(this, "maxValue", this.config.max, label);
	}
	if (this.config.min !== undefined && parseFloat(this.config.min) > value) {
		return SideMLManager.get(this, "minValue", this.config.min, label);
	}
};

BC.prototype.bindEvent = function(eventName, callback) {
	if (eventName == "selected") {
		var bc=this, $$dom = byid(bc.config.id);
		if ($$dom) {
			$$dom.onclick = callback;
			if(!inDesigner(bc.bf) && $$dom.tagName == "SPAN" && !bc.bf.isDisabled()){
				$$.addClass($$dom, "csc-textbox-linked");
			}
		}
	} else if (eventName == "blur") {
		var dom = byid(this.config.id);
		if (dom) {
			dom.onblur = callback;
		}
	}
};
})(window);



side-user-lib-e.js?v=1777220494422

dosya içeriği aşağıda 

if(!window.libEDenetis){ var libEDenetis={
    ABDULLAHFISNE : "16811803020",
    HUSEYINBADUK : "61750435450",
    MAHMUTIBIS : "49618801388",
    GENEL_KODLAR : [],
    GIB23SUBE : "000223",
    GIB23KOOR : "KOOR_000",
    ESKISEHIR : "026250",
    predicateBy : function(prop){
       return function(a,b){
          if( a[prop] > b[prop]){
              return 1;
          }else if( a[prop] < b[prop] ){
              return -1;
          }
          return 0;
       };
    },
    ETUZELSERMAYE : 350000,
    getRolName : function(rol)
    {
        if (rol == 10)
		{
			return "YOKLAMA GİRİŞ";
		}
		if (rol == 20)
		{
			return "YOKLAMA ONAY";
		}
		if (rol == 30)
		{
			return "KOORDİNATÖR";
		}
		if (rol == 50)
		{
			return "YOKLAMA MEMURU";
		}
		if (rol == 150)
		{
			return "GELİR MÜDÜRÜ";
		}
		if (rol == 160)
		{
			return "DKM";
		}
		if (rol == 170)
		{
			return "İSTANBUL DKM";
		}
		if (rol == 190)
		{
			return "İSTATİSTİK GÖRÜNTÜLEME";
		}
		if (rol == 200)
		{
			return "GİB";
		}
		return "?";
    },
    setRowColors : function(table)
    {
        for(var i=0; i < table.getRows().length;i++)
        {
            table.getRow(i).highlight( i%2 === 0 ? "#F8FCFD" : "#F3E7E7");
        }
    },
    getGenelKod : function(page, tip, anahtar, pdeger)
    {
        function getKod()
        {
            for(var i = 0; i < libEDenetis.GENEL_KODLAR.length; i++)
            {
                var item = libEDenetis.GENEL_KODLAR[i];
                if(item.tip == tip && ((anahtar && item.anahtar == anahtar) || (pdeger && item.pdeger == pdeger)))
                {
                    return item;
                }
            }
            return {};
        }
        if(libEDenetis.GENEL_KODLAR.length === 0)
        {
            libEDenetis.serviceCall(page,"srvcRefData_getGenelKodlarAll",{},
            function(data){
                libEDenetis.GENEL_KODLAR=data;
                return getKod();
            });
        }
        else
        {
            return getKod();
        }
    },
    MODUL_DICT : [],
    getModulDict : function(page, dbkey, jskey, modul)
    {
        if(libEDenetis.MODUL_DICT.length === 0)
        {
            libEDenetis.serviceCall(page,"srvcRefData_getModulDictAll",{},
            function(data){
                libEDenetis.MODUL_DICT=data;
            });
        }
        for(var i = 0; i < libEDenetis.MODUL_DICT.length; i++)
        {
            var item = libEDenetis.MODUL_DICT[i];
            if((dbkey && item.dbkey == dbkey) || (jskey && item.jskey == jskey) || (modul && item.modul == modul))
            {
                return item;
            }
        }
        return {};
    },
    
    assert : function(test, msg)
    {
      if(!test)
      {
          this.showThrow(msg);
      }
    },
    setIstatistikKriter : function(kriter, crow)
    {
        switch(Number(kriter.group))
        {
            case 1:
                kriter.il = crow.members.birimKodu.getValue();
                break;
            case 2:
                kriter.koorNo = crow.members.birimKodu.getValue();  //getSonucListesi için
                kriter.koor = crow.members.birimKodu.getValue();    //getYoklamalar için
                break;
            case 3:
                kriter.vd = crow.members.birimKodu.getValue();  //getSonucListesi için
                break;
            case 4:
                kriter.dmemuru = crow.members.birimKodu.getValue();
                kriter.ym = crow.members.birimKodu.getValue();
                break;
            case 8:
                kriter.vdbdef = crow.members.birimKodu.getValue();
                break;
        }
        kriter.birimAdi = crow.members.birim.getValue();
        kriter.birim = crow.members.birim.getValue();
    },
    getIstatistikGrupBaslik : function(kriter)
    {
        var grupText = "GRUP";
        switch(Number(kriter.group))
        {
            case 0:
                if(kriter.ym || kriter.dm)
                {
                    grupText = "YM/DM";
                }
                else if(kriter.vd)
                {
                    grupText = "VERGİ DAİRESİ";
                } 
                else if(kriter.koor)
                {
                    grupText = "KOORDİNATÖRLÜK";
                } 
                else if(kriter.il)
                {
                    grupText = "İL";
                } 
                else if(kriter.vdbdef)
                {
                    grupText = "VDB/DEF";
                } 
                else
                {
                    grupText = "BİRİM";
                }
                break;
            case 1:
                grupText = "İL";
                break;
            case 2:
                grupText = "KOORDİNATÖRLÜK";
                break;
            case 3:
                grupText = "VERGİ DAİRESİ";
                break;
            case 4:
                grupText = "YM/DM";
                break;
            case 8:
                grupText = "VDB/DEF";
                break;
        }
        return grupText;
    },
    getIstatistikHeaders : function(kriter)
    {
        var text = "GRUP";
        var kodu = "KODU";
        switch(Number(kriter.group))
        {
            case 0:
                if(kriter.ym || kriter.dm)
                {
                    text = "YM/DM";
                    kodu = "TCKNO";
                }
                else if(kriter.vd)
                {
                    text = "VERGİ DAİRESİ";
                    kodu = "VDKODU";
                } 
                else if(kriter.koor)
                {
                    text = "KOORDİNATÖRLÜK";
                    kodu = "KOOR KODU";
                } 
                else if(kriter.il)
                {
                    text = "İL";
                    kodu = "İL KODU";
                } 
                else if(kriter.vdbdef)
                {
                    text = "VDB/DEF";
                    kodu = "TİPİ";
                } 
                else
                {
                    text = "GENEL";
                    kodu = "KODU";
                }
                break;
            case 1:
                text = "İL";
                kodu = "İL KODU";
                break;
            case 2:
                text = "KOORDİNATÖRLÜK";
                kodu = "KOOR KODU";
                break;
            case 3:
                text = "VERGİ DAİRESİ";
                kodu = "VDKODU";
                break;
            case 4:
                text = "YM/DM";
                kodu = "TCKNO";
                break;
            case 8:
                text = "VDB/DEF";
                kodu = "TİPİ";
                break;
        }
        return {"kodu":kodu,"text":text};
    },
    showThrow : function(msg)
    {
      CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(msg);
      throw {"success":false, messages : [msg]};
    },
    MODULE_REFIX : "e",
    VDBler : ["001", "006", "007", "009", "010", "016", "020", "021", "022", "025", "026", "027", "031", "033", "034", "035", "038", "041", "042", "044", "045", "046", "048", "054", "055", "059", "061", "063", "067"],
	DEFler : ["002", "003", "004", "005", "008", "011", "012", "013", "014", "015", "017", "018", "019", "023", "024", "028", "029", "030", "032", "036", "037", "039", "040", "043", "047", "049", "050", "051", "052", "053", "056", "057", "058", "060", "062", "064", "065", "066", "068", "069", "070", "071", "072", "073", "074", "075", "076", "077", "078", "079", "080", "081"],
    isVD : function(birim)
    {
        return birim.match(/\d{6}/) != null;
    },
    isVDB : function(ilkodu)
    {
        return this.VDBler.indexOf(ilkodu) > -1;
    },
    isDEF : function(ilkodu)
    {
        return this.DEFler.indexOf(ilkodu) > -1;
    },
    isUGM : function(birim)
    {
        return birim.match(/034-\d{2}/) != null;
    },
    isUST : function(birim)
    {
       return birim.match(/\d{3}\-\d{2}/) != null;
    },
    isEQUAL : function(fdurum, sdurum)
    {
        var r0 = fdurum == sdurum;
        var r1 = (fdurum == 10 && sdurum == 11) || (fdurum == 11 && sdurum == 10);
        var r2 = (fdurum == 20 && sdurum == 21) || (fdurum == 21 && sdurum == 20);
        var r3 = (fdurum == 30 && sdurum == 31) || (fdurum == 31 && sdurum == 30);
        var r4 = (fdurum == 120 && sdurum == 121) || (fdurum == 121 && sdurum == 120);
        return r0 || r1 || r2 || r3 || r4;
    },
    clearComponents : function(components)
    {
        for(var c in components)
        {
            components[c].clear();
        }
    },
    clearComboboxes : function (comboboxes)
    {
        for(var c in comboboxes)
        {
            comboboxes[c].clearOptions();
        }
        this.clearComponents(comboboxes);
    },
    setTips : function(tblName, colName)
    {
        tblName.each(function(row){
            var ac = row.get(colName);
            ac.setConfig("tips", ac.getValue());
        });  
    },
    getSessionData : function()
    {
        var sessionData = {};
        sessionData.rol = CSSession.get("EOSROL");
        sessionData.user = CSSession.get("EOSUSER");
        sessionData.giris = CSSession.get("EOSUSERGIRIS");
        sessionData.birim = CSSession.get("EOSBIRIMKODU");
        sessionData.il = CSSession.get("EOSDEFILKODU");
        sessionData.adi = CSSession.get("EOSADI");
        sessionData.userx = CSSession.get("EOSUSERGIRISX");
        return sessionData;
    },
    setDocTitle : function(page)
    {
        console.log("get user title "+page);
        var rt = this.getRoleText(CSSession.get("EOSROL"));
        var rn = CSSession.get("EOSUSER");
        var un = CSSession.get("EOSADI");
        var uc = CSSession.get("EOSUSERGIRIS");
        var ub = CSSession.get("EOSBIRIMKODU");
        if(ub.length == 6 )
        {
            this.serviceCall(page, "srvcRefData_getVDAdi",{"vdkodu":ub},
            function(vdadi)
            {
                document.title =  "    [ " + un + " - "  + vdadi + " (" + rt  + " - " + rn+ ")  ]";
            });
        }
        else
        {
            document.title = "    [ " + un + " - " + uc + " - " + ub + " (" + rt  + " - " + rn+ ")  ]";
        }
    },
    
    getDateFromYYYYMMDD : function(optime)
    {
        var yyyy = optime.substr(0, 4);
        var mm = optime.substr(4, 2);
        var dd = optime.substr(6, 2);
        return new Date(yyyy, mm - 1, dd, 0, 0, 0);
    },
    
    getDateFromOptime : function(optime)
    {
        var yyyy = optime.substr(0, 4);
        var mm = optime.substr(4, 2);
        var dd = optime.substr(6, 2);
        var hh = optime.substr(8, 2);
        var MM = optime.substr(10, 2);
        var ss = optime.substr(12, 2);
        return new Date(yyyy, mm - 1, dd, hh, MM, ss);
    },
    showPdfMektup : function(params,title)
    {
        var w = this.openWindow("/edenetis/getMektup",params,"titlebar=no,scrollbars=no,status=yes,top=40,left=200,width=900,height=900");
        w.setTimeout(function()
        {
            w.document.title = title || "";
        }, 1000);
    },
    showPdfSonuc : function(params,title)
    {
        var w = this.openWindow("/edenetis/getSonuc",params,"titlebar=no,scrollbars=no,status=yes,top=40,left=200,width=900,height=900");
        w.setTimeout(function()
        {
            w.document.title = title || "";
        }, 1000);
    },
    openWindow : function(page, params, options)
    {
        return window.open(SideModuleManager.getAppUrl("e", page)+"?"+params,"_blank", options);
    },
    serviceCall : function(page,serviceName,parameters,returnFunc,errorFunc)
    {
        if(parameters)
        {
            parameters.sessionData = this.getSessionData();
        }
        page.call( serviceName , parameters, {progress: "Lütfen bekleyiniz.."}).
        then(
          function(resp)
          {
              if(returnFunc)
              {
                returnFunc(resp);
              }
              else
              {
                  CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(serviceName + " Cagrisi Icin Donus Fonksiyonu Tanimlanmamis!...",{title : "HATA-libEdenetis"});
              }
          }
        ).error(
          function(resp)
          {
              if(errorFunc)
              {
                errorFunc(resp);
              }
              else
              {
                  CSPopupUTILS.MessageBox(JSON.stringify(resp), {title : "HATA-libEdenetis"});
              }
          }
        );
    },
    getRoleText : function(kod)
    {
        switch(Number(kod))
        {
            case 10	: 
                return "YOKLAMA-GİRİŞ(memur)";	 
            case 20	: 
                    return "YOKLAMA-ONAYLAMA(müdür)";
            case 30	: 
                    return "YOKLAMA-KOORDİNATÖR(şef)"; 
            default :
                return kod;
        }
    },
    getUserId : function()
    {
        return CSSession.get("EOSUSER");
    },
    getUserRol : function()
    {
        return CSSession.get("EOSROL");
    },
    
    AYLAR : {
       "01":"Ocak",
       "02":"Şubat",
       "03":"Mart",
       "04":"Nisan",
       "05":"Mayıs",
       "06":"Haziran",
       "07":"Temmuz",
       "08":"Ağustos",
       "09":"Eylül",
       "10":"Ekim",
       "11":"Kasım",
       "12":"Aralık"
    },
    getOptimeFormatted : function()
    {
        return libEDenetis.getYilAyGunTimeFormatted(libEDenetis.getDateStrFromDate(new Date()));  
    },
    getYilAyAdiFromDate: function(date){
        if(date==="" || date.length<6){
                       return date;
        }
        return date.substr(0,4) + " " + this.AYLAR[date.substr(4,6)]; 
    },
    getAyAdiYilFromDate: function(date){
        if(date==="" || date.length<6){
                       return date;
        }
        return  this.AYLAR[date.substr(4,6)] + " " + date.substr(0,4); 
    },
    // 20130101 01/01/2013
    getGunAyYilFormatted:function(date){
        if(date==="" || date.length<8) {
            return date;
        } else {
            return date.substring(6,8) + "/" + date.substring(4,6) + "/" + date.substring(0,4);
        }
    },
    getYilAyGunFormatted:function(date){
        if(date==="" || date.length<8) {
            return date;
        } else {
            return date.substring(0,4)+"/"+date.substring(4,6)+ "/" + date.substring(6,8);
        }
    },
    getGGMMYYYY:function(date){
        if(date==="" || date.length<8) {
            return date;
        } else {
            return date.substring(0,2)+"/"+date.substring(2,4)+ "/" + date.substring(4,8);
        }
    },

    getYilAyGunTimeFormatted:function(date){
        if(date==="" || date.length<14) {
            return date;
        } else {
            return date.substring(0,4)+"/"+date.substring(4,6)+ "/" + date.substring(6,8) + " "+date.substring(8,10)+":"+date.substring(10,12)+":"+date.substring(12,14);
        }
    },

    getDateTimeFormattedFromOptime:function(optime){
        if(optime.length<14){
            return optime;
        } else {
            return this.getGunAyYilFormatted(optime.substring(0,8)) + " " + optime.substring(8,10) + ":" + optime.substring(10,12) + ":" + optime.substring(12,14);
        }
    },
    kapiNoSirala : function(data, key)
    {
        function compare(a,b) {
          return (a.NKEY < b.NKEY ) ? -1 : ((a.NKEY > b.NKEY) ? 1 : 0); 
        }

        if(data && data instanceof Array)
        {
            var ndata = [];
            for(var i = 0; i < data.length; i++)
            {
                var obj = data[i];
                obj.NKEY = parseFloat(obj[key]);
                ndata.push(obj);
            }
            return ndata.sort(compare);
        }
        return data;
    },
    getDateStrFromDate : function(dt)
    {
        var d = dt || new Date();
        var yyyy = d.getFullYear();
        var mm = (d.getMonth() + 1);
        if(mm < 10)
        {
            mm = "0" + mm;
        }
        mm = "" + mm;
        var dd = d.getDate();        
        if(dd < 10)
        {
            dd = "0" + dd;
        }
        dd = "" + dd;
        var hh = d.getHours();
        if(hh < 10)
        {
            hh = "0" + hh;
        }
        hh = "" + hh;
        var MM = d.getMinutes();
        if(MM < 10)
        {
            MM = "0" + MM;
        }
        MM = "" + MM;
        var ss = d.getSeconds();
        if(ss < 10)
        {
            ss = "0" + ss;
        }
        ss = "" + ss;
        return yyyy + mm + dd + hh + MM + ss;
    },
    getTodayDateStr  : function()
    {
        var d = new Date();
        var yyyy = d.getFullYear();
        var mm = (d.getMonth() + 1);
        if(mm < 10)
        {
            mm = "0" + mm;
        }
        mm = "" + mm;
        var dd = d.getDate();        
        if(dd < 10)
        {
            dd = "0" + dd;
        }
        dd = "" + dd;
        return yyyy + mm + dd;
    },
    getDateBefore : function(thisday, ndaybefore)
    {
        return new Date(thisday.getTime() - ndaybefore * (24*3600*1000));
    },
    getDateAfter : function(thisday, ndayafter)
    {
        return new Date(thisday.getTime() + ndayafter * (24*3600*1000));
    },
    getTimeText : function(seconds)
    {
        var str = "";
        if (seconds > 24 * 60 * 60)
		{
			str += Math.floor(seconds / (24 * 60 * 60)) + "G.";
			seconds %= (24 * 60 * 60);
		}
		if (seconds > 60 * 60)
		{
			str += str == "" ? "" : ",";
			str += Math.floor(seconds / (60 * 60)) + "S.";
			seconds %= (60 * 60);
		}
		if (seconds > 60)
		{
			str += str == "" ? "" : ",";
			str += Math.floor(seconds / (60)) + "D.";
			seconds %= (60);
		}
/*		if (seconds > 0)
		{
			str += str == "" ? "" : ",";
			str += seconds + "sn";
		}
*/
		return str;
    },
    DateDiff : {

        inDays: function(d1, d2) {
            var t2 = d2.getTime();
            var t1 = d1.getTime();
    
            return parseInt((t2-t1)/(24*3600*1000),10);
        },
    
        inWeeks: function(d1, d2) {
            var t2 = d2.getTime();
            var t1 = d1.getTime();
    
            return parseInt((t2-t1)/(24*3600*1000*7),10);
        },
    
        inMonths: function(d1, d2) {
            var d1Y = d1.getFullYear();
            var d2Y = d2.getFullYear();
            var d1M = d1.getMonth();
            var d2M = d2.getMonth();
    
            return (d2M+12*d2Y)-(d1M+12*d1Y);
        },
    
        inYears: function(d1, d2) {
            return d2.getFullYear()-d1.getFullYear();
        },
        
        inSeconds : function(d1, d2)
        {
            var t2 = d2.getTime();
            var t1 = d1.getTime();
            return parseInt((t2-t1)/(1000),10);
        },
        
        inSecOptime : function(d1, d2)
        {
          return libEDenetis.getDateFromOptime(d2).getTime() - libEDenetis.getDateFromOptime(d1).getTime();  
        }
    }

}; }else{ console.error("Project library conflict occured. lib:libEDenetis"); }
